| pūrvaṃ hi pārṣata imān jatugehadagdhān śrutvā'tiduḥkhitamanāḥ punareva mantraḥ | yājopayājamukhanissṛta evameṣa nāsatyatārha iti jīvanameṣu mene |
| yatrakvacit prativasanti nilīnarūpāḥ pārthā iti sma sa tu phalgunakāraṇena | cakre svayambaravighoṣaṇamāṇsu rājasvanyairadhāryadhanurīśavarācca cakre |
| tatkāla eva vasudevasuto'pi kṛṣṇaḥ sampūrṇanaijaparibodhata eva sarvam | j ānannapi sma halinā sahito jagāma pārthān niśamya ca mṛt ānatha kulyahetoḥ |
| sa prāpya hastinapuraṃ dhṛtarāṣṭraputrān saṃ vañcayaṃ stadanusārikathāṇsca kṛtvā | bhīṣmādibhiḥ parigato'priyavajjagāma dvārāvatīmuditapūrṇasunityasaukhyaḥ |
| tasyāntare hṛdikasūnuranantaraṃ svaṃ śvāphalkibuddhibalamāṇsrita ityuvāca | satrājideṣa hi purā pratijajña enāmasmatkṛte svatanayāṃ maṇinā sahaiva |
| sarvāṃ śca naḥ punarasāvavamatya kṛṣṇāyādāt sutāṃ jahi ca taṃ niśi pāpabuddhim | ādāya ratnamupayāhi ca nau virodhe kṛṣṇasya dānapatinā saha sāhyamemi |
| ityukta āṇsu kumatiḥ sa hi pūrvadehe daityo yatastadakarodatha satyabhāmā | ānandasaṃ vidapi lokaviḍambanāya tad dehamasya tilaje patimabhyupāgāt |
| śrutvā tadīyavacanaṃ bhagavān purīṃ svāmāyāta eva tu niśamya mahotsavaṃ tam | pāñcālarājapuruṣoditamāṇsu vṛṣṇivaryairagānmusalinā saha tatpurīṃ ca |
| ccxxv.bhīmo'pi rudravararakṣitarākṣasaṃ taṃ hatvā tṛṇopamatayā haribhaktavandyaḥ | uṣyātha tatra katiciddinamacyutasya vyāsātmano vacanataḥ prayayau nijaiśca |
| maṅgalyametadatulaṃ pratiyāta śīghraṃ pāñcālakān paramabhojanamatra siddhyet | viprairitastata itīritavākyamete śṛṇvanta eva paricakramuruttarāṇsām |
| ṣaṇṇāṃ ca madhyagamudīrṇabhujaṃ viśālavakṣasthalaṃ bahal . apauruṣalakṣaṇaṃ ca | dṛṣṭvaiva mārutimasāvupalapsyatīha kṛṣṇāmiti sma ca vacaḥ pravadanti viprāḥ |
| rātrau divā ca satataṃ pathi gacchamānāḥ prāpuḥ kadācidatha viṣṇupadīṃ niśāyām | sarvasya rakṣitumagādiha pṛṣṭhatastu bhīmo'gra eva śatamanyusuto'ntarā'nye |
| prāpte tadolmukadhare'rjuna eva gaṅgāṃ gandharvarāja iha citraratho'rddharātre | dṛṣṭvaiva viprarahitānudakāntarasthaḥ kṣatrātmajā iti ha dharṣayituṃ sa cā'gāt |
| hantā'smi vo hyupagatānudakāntamasyā nadyāṇsca martyacaraṇāya niṣiddhakāle | itthaṃ vadantamamumāha surendrasūnurgandharva nāstraviduṣāṃ bhayamasti te'dya |
| sarvaṃ hi phenavadidaṃ bahulaṃ balaṃ te nārthapradaṃ bhavati cāstravidi prayuktam | ityuktavantamamumuttamayānasaṃ stho bāṇān kṣipannabhisasāra sureśabhṛtyaḥ |
| āgneyamastramabhimantrya tadolmuke sa cikṣepa śakratanayo'sya rathaśca dagdhaḥ | taṃ cāgninā parigṛhītamabhipragṛhya keśeṣu sañcakarṣā'śu surendrasūnuḥ |
| pārthena sandharṣitaḥ śaraṇaṃ jagāma dharmātmajaṃ tamapi so'tha nijāstramugram | sañjahra eva tata āsa ca nāmato'sāvaṅgāravarṇa iti varṇaviparyayeṇa |
| gandharva ulbaṇasuraktatanuḥ sa bhūtvā svarṇāvadāta uta pūrvamupetya sakhyam | pārthena durlabhamahāstramidaṃ yayāce jānannapi sma nahi tādṛśameṣa veda |
| vidyā suśikṣitatamā hi sureśasūnau tāmasya cāvadadasāvapi kālato'smai | gandharvagāmavadadanvagadṛśyavidyāṃ paścāditi sma puruhūtasutasya vākyāt |
| ādhikyataḥ svagatasaṃ vida eva sāmye naivecchati sma nimayaṃ sa dhanañjayo'tra | dharmārthameva sa tu tāṃ paridāya tasmai kālena saṃ vidamamuṣya ca dharmato'yāt |
| ccxxvi.pārthena so'pi bahulāṇsca kathāḥ kathitvā dhaumyasya saṅgrahaṇamāha purohitatve | dāsyāmi divyaturagāniti so'rjunāya vācaṃ nigadya divamāruhadapyaguste |
| te dhaumyamāpya ca purodhasamuttamajñaṃ viprātmajopamatayā viviśuḥ puraṃ ca | pāñcālakasya nikhilāṃ dadṛśuśca tatra mūrdhāvasiktasamitiṃ samalaṅkṛt āṃ ca |
| rājanyamaṇḍalamudīkṣya supūrṇamatra kṛṣṇāṃ pragṛhya sahajaḥ pragṛhītamālām | teṣāṃ ca madhyamagamat kulavīryasampadyuktāṃ vibhūtimatha cā'ha samastarājñām |
| t āṃ śca pradarśya sakalān sa hutāṇsanāṃ śaścāpaṃ ca tat pratinidhāya sapañcabāṇam | āhābhibhāṣya sakalān nṛpatīnathoccairdīpyaddhutāṇsanavapurghanatulyaghoṣaḥ |
| etena kārmukavareṇa tarūparisthaṃ matsyāvabhāsamudake prativīkṣya yena | etaiḥ śaraiḥ pratihato bhavatīha matsyaḥ kṛṣṇā'nuyāsyati tamadya narendravīrāḥ |
| ityasya vākyamanu sarvanarendraputrā uttasthuruddhatamadāṇscalakuṇḍalāsyāḥ | astraṃ balaṃ ca bahu naijamabhīkṣamāṇāḥ spardhanta eva ca mithaḥ samalaṅkṛt āṅgāḥ |
| kecinnirīkṣya dhanuretya na me suśakyamityeva cāpayayuranya uta pracālya | tatrā'sasāda śiśupāla urupratāpaḥ saṅgṛhya tat samanuropaṇayatna āsīt |
| māṣāntarāya sa cakarṣa yadaiva koṭyā unnamya tat pratijaghāna tameva cā'śu | anyatra phalgunata etadaśakyamevetyañjo girīśavarataḥ sa yayau ca bhagnaḥ |
| madreśa etya cakṛṣe sthaviro'pi vīryāccedīśato'pyadhikameva sa mudgamātre | śiṣṭe'munā pratihataḥ sa yayāvaśakyaṃ matvā'tmanastadanu bhūpatayo viṣaṇṇāḥ |
| sanneṣu bhūpatiṣu māgadha āsasāda so'vajñayaiva balavīryamadena dṛptaḥ | cāpaṃ cakarṣa calapādatal . o balena śiṣṭe sa sarṣapamite'bhihato'munaiva |
| j ānunyamuṣya dharaṇīṃ yayatustadaiva darpeṇa cāsthirapadaḥ sthitimātrahetoḥ | raudrād varāt sa jal . atāṃ gamito'tha rājā rājñāṃ mukhānyanabhivīkṣya yayau svarāṣṭram |
| prāyo gatāstamanu bhūpatayo'tha karṇo duryodhanārthamanugṛhya dhanuścakarṣa | ccxxvii.rāmādupāttaśubhaśikṣitamātrato'sau romāvaśiṣṭamakarod dhanuṣo'ntamāṇsu |
| tasmiṃ śca tena vihate pratisannivṛtte bhīmārjunau dvijasadasyupasanniviṣṭau | uttasthatū raviśaśipratimānarūpau vipreṣu tatra ca bhiyā vinivārayatsu |
| viprāṇsca kecidatiyuktamimau hi vīrau devopamāviti vaco jagadustatastau | dṛṣṭvaiva kṛṣṇamukhapaṅkajamāṇsu cāpasānnidhyamāyayaturuttamavīryasārau |
| tatrārjunaḥ pavanajāt priyato'pyanujñāmādāya keśavamajaṃ manasā praṇamya | kṛtvā guṇānvitamado dhanuraśrameṇa yantrāntareṇa saśarairadhunocca lakṣam |
| kṛṣṇā tadā'sya vidadhe navakañjamālāṃ madhye ca tāṃ pratividhāya narendraputrau | bhīmārjunau yayaturacyutamābhinamya kṣubdhaṃ tadā nṛpavarābdhirimāvadhāvat |
| draṣṭuṃ hi kevalagatirnatu kanyakāyā arthe na cāpamiha vṛṣṇivarāḥ spṛśantu | ityājñayaiva varacakradharasya lipsāmapyatra cakruriha naiva yadupravīrāḥ |
| bhīmastu rājasamitiṃ pratisamprayātāṃ dṛṣṭvaiva yojanadaśocchrayamāṇsu vṛkṣam | ārujya sarvanṛpatīnabhito'pyatiṣṭhad dṛṣṭvā palāyanaparāṇsca babhūvurete |
| bhīmo'yameṣa puruhūtasuto'nya ete pārthā iti sma haline harirabhyavocat | dṛṣṭvaiva so'pi mudamāpa śineśca pautraḥ khaḍgaṃ pragṛhya harṣāt paripupluve'tra |
| prīteṣu sarvayaduṣu prapalāyiteṣu duryodhanādinṛpatiṣvakhileṣu bhīmāt | karṇo'bhyayāddharihayātmajamāṇsu madrarājo jagāma pavanātmajameva vīraḥ |
| vipreṣu daṇḍapaṭadarbhamahājināni kopāt kṣipatsu na vināṇsanamatra bhūyāt | kṣatrasya vairata iti drupade ca kṛṣṇaṃ viprāṃ śca yācati sa mārutirāra śalyam |
| vṛkṣaṃ tvasau pratinidhāya ca madrarājaṃ dorbhyāṃ pragṛhya javato gagane nidhāya | bandhutvato bhuvi śanairadadhāt sa tasya vijñāya vīryamagamannijarājadhānīm |
| pārtho'pi tena dhanuṣā yuyudhe sma karṇaṃ so'pyastrabāhubalamāviramutra cakre | tau dhanvināmanupamau ciramasyatāṃ ca sūryātmajo'tra vacanaṃ vyathito babhāṣe |
| ccxxviii.tvaṃ phalguno harihayo dvijasattapo vā mūrtaṃ na me pramukhataḥ sthitimanya īṣṭe | yo vā'smi ko'pi yadi te kṣamamadya bāṇān muñcānyathehi raṇatastviti pārtha āha |
| kāryaṃ na me dvijavaraiḥ pratiyodhanenetyuktvā yayau ravisutaḥ sa suyodhanādyaiḥ | nāgāhvayaṃ puramatha drupadātmajāṃ t āmādāya cārjunayutaḥ prayayau sa bhīmaḥ |
| agre'śviputrasahitaḥ sa tu dharmasūnuḥ prāyāt kulālagṛhamanvapi bhīmapārthau | bhikṣeti tairabhihite prajagāda kuntī bhuṅgdhvaṃ samastaśa iti pradadarśa kanyām |
| prāmādikaṃ ca vacanaṃ na mṛṣā tayoktaṃ prāyo hi tena kathametaditi sma cintā | teṣāṃ babhūva vasudevasuto hariśca tatrā'jagāma parameṇa hi sauhṛdena |
| sambhāṣya taiḥ sa bhagavānamitātmaśaktiḥ prāyānnijāṃ puramamā yadubhiḥ samastaiḥ | j ñātuṃ ca tān niśi sa tu drupadaḥ svaputraṃ prāsthāpayat sa ca vilīnaṃ imānapaśyat |
| bhikṣānnabhojina uto bhaginīṃ nijāṃ ca tatrātitṛptahṛdayāmatha yuddhavārtām | teṣāṃ niśamya nadatāṃ dhanavad gabhīrāṃ kṣatrottamā iti matiṃ sa cakāra vīraḥ |
| prātastu tasya janiturvacasā purodhāstān prāpya mantravidhinā marudātmajena | sampūjito'tividuṣā pratigṛhya tāṃ śca prāveśayannṛpatigehamamaiva mātrā |
| t ānāgatān samabhipūjya nijātmajāṃ ca viprādiyogyapṛthaguktapadārthajātaiḥ | pūrṇān gṛhāṃ ścatura eva dideśa rājā tatrā'yudhādiparipūrṇagṛhaṃ ca te'guḥ |
| ceṣṭāsvarākṛtivivakṣitavīryaśauryaprāgalbhyapūrvakaguṇaiḥ kṣitibhartṛputrān | vijñāya tān drupada etya ca dharmasūnuṃ papraccha ko'si naravarya vadasva satyam |
| sa prāha mandahasitaḥ kimihādya rājan pūrvaṃ hi varṇaviṣaye na viśeṣa uktaḥ | putrīkṛte tava sutena tu lakṣavedha ukto narendrasamitau sa kṛto'pyanena |
| evaṃ bruvāṇamatha taṃ pṛthayā sahaiva rājā vadeti punareva yayāca eṣaḥ | sarvaṃ pṛthā'pyavadatāṃ sa ca tena tuṣṭo vācaṃ jagāda kṛtakṛtya ihā'samadya |
| pārthārthameva hi mayaiṣa kṛtaḥ prayatnastvaṃ phalguno'nya utavā'dya karaṃ sutāyāḥ | gṛhṇātvitīrita imaṃ sa tu dharmasūnurāha sma sarva iti me manasi prarūḍham |
| ccxxix.nātra pramā mama hṛdi pratibhātyathāpi dharmācalā mama matirhi tadeva mānam | ityuktavatyapi sahaiva sutena rājā naivaicchadatra bhagavānagamacca kṛṣṇaḥ |
| vyāsaṃ tamīkṣya bhagavantamagaṇyapūrṇanityāvyayātmaguṇamāṇsu samasta eva | natvā'bhipūjya varapīṭhagatasya cā'jñāmādāya copaviviśuḥ sahitāstadante |
| kṛṣṇastadā'ha nṛpatiṃ prati dehi kanyāṃ sarvebhya eva vṛṣavāyupurandarā hi| nāsatyadasrasahitā ima eva indrāḥ pūrve ca sampratitanaśca harerhi paścāt |
| eṣāṃ śriyaśca nikhilā apicaikadehāḥ putrī tavaiva na tato'tra viruddhatā hi| ityuktavatyapi yadā drupadaścakāra saṃ vādinīṃ na dhiyamenamathā'ha kṛṣṇaḥ |
| divyaṃ hi darśanamidaṃ tava dattamadya paśyā'śu pāṇḍutanayān divi saṃ sthitāṃ stvam | etāṃ ca te duhitaraṃ saha taiḥ pṛthaksthāṃ tallakṣaṇaiḥ saha tataḥ kuru te yatheṣṭam |
| ityuktavākyamanu tān sa dadarśa rājā kṛṣṇaprasādabalato divi tādṛśāṃ śca | etān niśāmya caraṇau jagadīśituśca bhīto jagāma śaraṇaṃ tadanādareṇa |
| datvā'bhayaṃ sa bhagavān drupadasya kārye tenomiti sma kathite svayameva sarvām | vaivāhikīṃ kṛtimatha vyadadhācca dhaumyayuktaḥ krameṇa jagṛhurnikhilāṇsca pāṇim |
| pāñcālakeṣu ca mahotsava āsa rājā tuṣṭo'bhavat saha sutaiḥ svajanaiśca sarvaiḥ | pauraiśca jānapadikaiśca yathaiva rāme datvā sutāṃ janaka āpa mudaṃ tato'nu |
| udbāhya tatra nivasatsu ca pāṇḍaveṣu ṇsrutvaiva rāmasahitaḥ saha yādavaiśca | ādāya pāribarhaṃ bahulaṃ sa kṛṣṇa āyānmudaiva pṛthayā sahitāṃ śca pārthān |
| dṛṣṭvaiva taṃ mumudurāṇsu kurupravīrā āṇsliṣya kṛṣṇamatha nemurasau ca kṛṣṇām | dṛṣṭvā pradāya gṛhayogyasamastabhāṇḍaṃ sauvarṇamebhya uru bhūṣaṇamacyuto'dāt |
| devāṅgayogyaśubhakuṇḍalahāramaulikeyūravastrasahitānyurubhūṣaṇāni | ṣaṇṇāṃ pṛthakpṛthagadāt pṛthageva yogyānyanyad dadāvatha pitṛṣvasurātmayogyam |
| ratnāni gā gajaturaṅgarathān suvarṇabhārān bahūnapi dadāvatha cā'śiṣo'gryāḥ | ccxxx.vyāso'pyadādiha paratra ca pārṣato'pi bhūṣārathāṇsvagajaratnasukāñcanāni |
| dāsīśca dāsasahitāḥ śubharūpaveṣāḥ sahasraśo dadaturatra harirnṛpaśca | t āsāṃ vicitravasanānyururatnamālāḥ pratyekaśo dadaturapyurubhūṣaṇānām |
| māsān bahūnapi vihṛtya sahaiva pārthaiḥ kṛṣṇo yayau yadupurīṃ sahito'grajena | antarhite bhagavati pratatoruśaktau vyāse ca vatsaramihoṣurime tu pārthāḥ |
| vaicitravīryatanayāḥ saha saubalena karṇena sindhupatinā rathahastiyaudhaiḥ | bhūriśravaḥ prabhṛtibhiśca sahaiva hantuṃ pāñcālarājamaguretya purīṃ punaste |
| tairardite svapura āṇsu sa somakānāṃ rājā sutaiḥ saha sasainika udgato'bhūt | teṣāṃ ca tasya ca babhūva mahān vimardaḥ putrau ca tasya nihatau vidhutāṇsca senāḥ |
| citre hate samara āṇsu sacitraketau dhāvatsu sainikavareṣu ca pārṣatasya | pārthā rathairabhiyayurdhṛtacāpabāṇā vaicitravīryatanayān ravisūnuyuktān |
| taisteṣu pañcasu samaṃ pratiyodhayatsu bhūriśravāḥ saravijo virathaṃ cakāra | śakrātmajaṃ tadanu parvatasannikāṇsaṃ dorbhyāṃ tu mārutiruruṃ tarumudbabarha |
| āyāntamīkṣya taruhastamimaṃ samīrasūnuṃ suyodhanamukhā nikhilāḥ sakarṇāḥ | bhūriśravāḥ śakunibhūrijayadrathāṇsca sarve'pi dudruvuratho viviśuḥ puraṃ svam |
| j ñātvā samastamapi tad viduro'grajaṃ svaṃ varddhanta eva tanayā bhavato narendra | ityāha so'pi muditaḥ svasutena kṛṣṇā prāpteti bhūṣaṇavarāṇyadiśacca vāsaḥ |
| pārthā iti sma viduro'vadadāṇsu so'pi svākāragūhanaparo yadi tarhyatīva | bhadraṃ mṛt ā nahi pṛthāsahitāḥ sma pārthāsteṣāṃ pravṛttimapi me vada sarvaśastvam |
| ityukta āha viduraḥ sa hiḍimbavadhyāpūrvāṃ pravṛttimakhilāmapi lakṣavedham | udbāhamapyatha nadījamukhāṇsca sarve tuṣṭā babhūvurapi vatsaramūṣurevam |
| śrutvā'tha kṛṣṇamupayātamuru pradāya ratnaṃ ca pāṇḍutanayeṣu gataṃ punaśca | t ātapyamānahṛdayāstu suyodhanādyā mantraṃ pracakruratha karṇamukhā yayuśca |
| ccxxxi.yuddhāya teṣu punareva rathaiḥ prayāteṣvāhāgrajaṃ sa viduro'pi nadījamukhyān | ete hi pāpatamacetasa etya pārthān yuddhāya mṛtyumupayānti na saṃ śayo'tra |
| bhīmārjunau viṣahituṃ nahi kaścanāsti sāmarthyayuk suravareṣvapi varddhitāste | j ñātvaiva vatsarata eva mahānadharmasteṣāmupekṣaṇakṛtastadalaṃ niyuṅkṣva |
| ānītaye ca viniyujya susāntvapūrvamānīya yojaya nṛpaiṣu tathā'rddharājyam | evaṃ kṛtaṃ tava bhavet kulavṛddhaye hi dharmāya cobhayavināṇsakaro'nyathā syāḥ |
| ityuktavatyanu tathetyavadannadījo droṇaḥ kṛpaśca viduraṃ sa nṛpo'pyuvāca | yāhyānayeti sa ca vegavatā rathena tatrāgamat tadanu tairabhipūjitaśca |
| tatkāla eva vasudevasutaśca kṛṣṇo vyāsaśca tānupasametya durantaśaktī | ādāya kuntisahitān vidureṇa yuktau nāgāhvayaṃ puramitāṃ saha bhāryayaiva |
| teṣvāgateṣu sumahānabhavat praharṣaḥ paurasya jānapadikasya janasya coccaiḥ | bhīṣmādikāṇsca muditāḥ pratipūjya gehamāveśayan saha nṛpeṇa mahotsavena |
| kṛṣṇāmapūjayadatīva ca saubalī sā duryodhanasya dayitāsahitā'tra te'pi | ūṣustataśca nijaputrakadurvinītyā kṛṣṇānimittamurubhītita āha bhīmāt |
| kunti prayāhi sahitā snuṣayā gṛhaṃ svaṃ bhīmād bibhemi nijaputrakadurvinītyā | kṛṣṇā trilokavanitādhikarūpasārā yasmāditi sma sasutā prayayau gṛhaṃ sā |
| ūṣustathaiva parivatsarapañcakaṃ te pāṇḍorgṛhe susukhino'khilabhogayuktāḥ | kṛṣṇā ca teṣu pṛthageva catuḥ svarūpā reme tathaikatanurapyabhimānibhedāt |
| kanyaiva sā'bhavadataḥ prativāsaraṃ ca janmābhavaddhyabhimateḥ pṛthageva nāṇsāt | prāyo hi nābhimatināṇsamavāpa vāṇī tasmānmarucca sakaleṣvabhiviṣṭa āsīt |
| dharmātmajādiṣu marut prativiṣṭa eṣāṃ buddhiṃ vimohya ramate satataṃ tayā yat | śuddhaiva sā hi tata eva dinedine ca sammohato maraṇavad bhavatīha kanyā |
| no suptivat tvidamato'nyavaśatvato hi dehasya saṃ smṛtita eva harerna mohaḥ | nā'veśavacca tata eva mṛteḥ svarūpametat tvataḥ pratidinaṃ jananāddhi kanyā |
| ccxxxii.evaṃ sa vāyuranuviṣṭayudhiṣṭhirādibhīmātmanaiva ramate satataṃ tayaikaḥ | anyādṛśā hi surabhuktirato'nyarūpā mānuṣyabhuktiriti nātra vicāryamasti |
| vāsiṣṭhayādavavṛṣāvapi keśavau tau tatroṣatuḥ paramasauhṛdato hi teṣu | t ābhyāmanantaguṇapūrṇasukhātmakābhyāṃ pārthāṇsca te mumudire yutasatkathābhiḥ |
| pūrvaṃ hi teṣu vanageṣu babhūva kāṇsirājaḥ sutākṛta urukṣitipālayogaḥ | tatra svayambaragatāṃ dhṛtarāṣṭraputraḥ kanyāṃ balājjagṛha ātmabalātidṛptaḥ |
| pūrvaṃ hi rājagaṇane magadhādhirājaḥ saṅkhyāta ityatiruṣā pragṛhītakanye | duryodhane nṛpatayo yuyudhuḥ sma tena bhagnāṇsca karṇasahitena sahānujena |
| bhagneṣu teṣu punarāttaśarāsaneṣu karṇo jagāda dhṛtarāṣṭrasutaṃ prayāhi | yuktaḥ sahodarajanairgurubhīṣmamukhyayuktasya te na purametya hi gharṣaṇeṇsāḥ |
| ekāntato jayamavīkṣya ca nānuyāti bārhadrathaḥ puragatasya jaye na niṣṭhā | drauṇiṃ ca rudratanumeṣa sadā vijānan no tena yuddhamabhivāñchati rudrabhaktaḥ |
| eko'hameva nṛpatīn pratiyodhayiṣya etairmayi pratijite'pi na te'styakīrtiḥ | ekaṃ ca te'nujamime yadi pauruṣeṇa gṛhṇīyuratra tava kīrtirupaiti nāṇsam |
| bhīṣmādayo'pi nahi yodhayituṃ samarthā rājñā hyanena tata eva hi bāhliko'sya | bhṛtyo babhūva natu bhīṣmamayaṃ yudhe'gād rājā nahīti naca tena virodha āsīt |
| ityukta āṇsu sa vimṛśya yayau puraṃ svaṃ karṇo'pi taiḥ pratiyuyodha jigāya cainān | karṇasya vīryamagaṇayya jarāsuto'pi hyekaikameva nṛpatiṃ sa dideśa yoddhum |
| sarveṣu teṣu vijiteṣvabhijagmivān sa yoddhuṃ bṛhadrathasuto'pyamunā rathena | taṃ caiva rāmavarato virathaṃ viśastraṃ cakre sa cainamatha muṣṭibhirabhyupetau |
| sandhau yadaiva jarayā pratisandhitasya karṇo jaghāna na paratra tutoṣa rājā | na jñātametadapi ho halinā tadetajjñātaṃ tvayā bhava tato mama bhṛtya eva |
| evaṃ vidhaṃ sukuśalaṃ bahuyuddhaśauṇḍaṃ na tvāṃ haniṣya uta te pitureva pūrvam | ccxxxiii.bāhvorbalādabhihṛtaṃ hi mayā'ṅgarājyaṃ tat tvaṃ gṛhāṇa yudhi karmakaraśca me syāḥ |
| ityukta āṇsu sa tathaiva cakāra karṇaḥ pūrvaṃ hi tasya nijarājyapadaikadeśaḥ | duryodhanena vihito magadhādhirājaṃ jitvā vṛkodarahṛtaḥ pitureva dattaḥ |
| aṅgādhirājyamupalabhya jarāsutasya snehaṃ ca sūryasuta āṇsu kurūn jagāma | dṛṣṭvaiva taṃ mumudire dhṛtarāṣṭraputrā nānena tulyamadhijagmurato hariṃ ca |
| udvāhya kāṇsitanayāṃ girijādhiviṣṭāṃ sākṣānnareṣu janitāṃ prathamāmalakṣmīm | tasyāṃ sutaṃ tvajanayat pura āsa yo'kṣaḥ kanyāṃ purā priyatamāṃ ca ṣaḍānanasya |
| putro babhūva sa tu lakṣaṇanāmadheyaḥ sā lakṣaṇetyadhikarūpaguṇā'sa kanyā | tasyānujāṇsca nijayogyaguṇā avāpurbhāryāḥ punaśca sa suyodhana āpa bhāryāḥ |
| pūrvaṃ surāntaka iti prathitaḥ suto'bhūd duḥ śāsanasya tadanu pratitapyamānāḥ | dṛṣṭvaiva pārthabalavīryaguṇān samṛddhiṃ t āṃ caiva te pratiyayuḥ sma kaliṅgadeśam |
| āsīt svayambara utātra kaliṅgarājaputryāḥ suvajra iti yaṃ pravadanti bhūpāḥ | raudrād varādavijitasya ca tasya kanyāṃ dṛpto balāt sa jagṛhe dhṛtarāṣṭrasūnuḥ |
| tatrātha rudravarataḥ sa jarāsutena yukto babandha ca suyodhanamāṇsu jitvā | karṇaḥ parādravadiha sma suteṣu pāṇḍoryasmāt spṛdhā'gamadataḥ sa parājito'bhūt |
| duryodhane'nujajanaiḥ saha tairgṛhīte bhīṣmāmbikeyavidurāgrajavākyanunnaḥ | bhīmo vijitya nṛpatīn sajarāsutāṃ stān hatvā suvajramamucad dhṛtarāṣṭraputrān |
| te'pi sma karṇasahitā mṛtakapratīkā
| tatrārddharājyamanubhuṅkṣva sahānujaistvaṃ kośārddhameva ca gṛhāṇa purā hiśakraḥ | tatrābhiṣikta uta kañjabhavādidevaistatrastha eva sa cakāra ciraṃ ca rājyam |
| tvaṃ vīra śakrasama eva tatastavaiva yogyaṃ puraṃ tadata āṇsvabhiṣecayāmi |
| tasyābhiṣekamakarot prathamaṃ hi kṛṣṇo vāsiṣṭhanandana ururbhava cakravartī | yaṣṭā'śvamedhanikhilātmakarājasūyapūrvairmakhaiḥ satatameva ca dharmaśīlaḥ |
| ityeva pārṣatasutāsahite'bhiṣikte kṛṣṇo'pi vṛṣṇivṛṣabhaḥ sa tathā'bhyaṣi ñcat | evaṃ ca mārutiśirasyabhiṣekametau sañcakratuḥ sma yuvarājapade sabhāryam |
| bhīme ca pārṣatasutāsahite'bhiṣikte tābhyāmanantasukhaśakticidātmakābhyām | anyaiśca vipravṛṣabhaiḥ sukṛte'bhiṣeke dharmātmajānu mumudurnikhilāṇsca santaḥ |
| tasmin mahotsavavare dinasaptakānuvṛtte vasiṣṭhavṛṣabheṇa cavṛṣṇipena | kṛṣṇena te yayuramā pṛthayā tayā capāñcālarājasutayā sthalamindravāsam |
| kośasya cārddhasahitāstu yadaiva pārthā gacchanti tānanuyayurnikhilāṇsca paurāḥ | ūcuśca hā bata suyodhana eṣa pāpo dūre cakāra nanu pāṇḍusutān guṇāḍhyān |
| bhīmapratāpamavalambya kaliṅgabandhānmuktaḥ sutāmapi hi tasya puraṃ nināya | dveṣṭyevamapyatibalān hi sadaiva pārthān yāmo vayaṃ guṇibhiradya sahaiva pārthaiḥ |
| ājñāpayatyapi sa bheriraveṇa pārthān naivānugacchata yadi vrajathānu vo'dya | vittaṃ hariṣya iha sarvamapīti tacca pāpaḥ karotu na vayaṃ vijahāma pārthān |
| sadbhirhi saṅgatirihaiva sukhasya heturmokṣaikaheturatha tadviparītamanyat | tasmād vrajema saha pāṇḍusutairhi śakraprasthaṃ tviti sma dhṛtacetasa āha dhārmaḥ |
| prītiryadi sma bhavatāṃ mayi sānuje'sti tiṣṭhadhvamatra pitureva hi śāsane me | kīrtirhi vo'nugamanāt pituratyayena naśyenna ityanusaradhvamihā'mbikeyam |
| ityeva taiḥ purajanā nikhilairniṣiddhāḥ kṛcchreṇa tasthurapi tān manasā'nvagacchan | prāpyātha śakrapuramasmaratāṃ ca kṛṣṇau deveśavardhakimathā'gamadatra so'pi |
| vāsiṣṭhapena yadupena ca pāṇḍavānāṃ ratnotkaraṃ kuru puraṃ puruhūtapuryāḥ | sādṛśyatastviti niyukta ubhau praṇamya sarveśvarau sa kṛtavāṃ śca puraṃ tathaiva |
| ccxxxv.deśaṃ ca nātijanasaṃ vṛtamanyadeśasaṃ sthairjanairabhipupūrira āṇsu pārthāḥ | teṣāṃ guṇairharipadānatihetutaśca rāṣṭrāntarā iha śubhā vasatiṃ sma cakruḥ |
| prasthāpya dūramanujasya sutān sa rājā cakre'bhiṣekamapi tatra suyodhanasya | duḥ śāsanaṃ ca yuvarājamasau vidhāya mene kṛt ārthamiva ca svamaśāntakāmaḥ |
| pārthāṇsca te mumuduratra vasiṣṭhavṛṣṇivaryoditānakhilatattvavinirṇayāṃ stu | śṛṇvanta eva hi sadā pṛthivīṃ ca dharmād bhuñjanta āṇsritaramāpatipādayugmāḥ |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye pḸaṇḍavarājyalābho nāma ekonaviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ ccxxxvi.(khāṇḍavadāhaḥ ) atha viṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | yajñorudānanaradevavandyatāpraśnarṣipūjāsu yudhiṣṭhiro'bhūt | dharmānuśāstiharitattvaśaṃ sanasvarāṣṭrarakṣādiṣu bhīma āsīt |
| hatvā dhenukamūḍhaṃ balāt pralambaṃ ca kheṭsadhenukamūḍham | vrajamāvīdamṛtāṇsaḥ pītvā vahniṃ carasthirādamṛtāṇsaḥ |
Bha. Gī.
| sa rugmināmako'grajaḥ śriyo dviṣan ramāpatim | hareḥ pradātumudyatāṃ nyavārayaddharipriyām |
| praghoṣite svayambare'tha tena māgadhādayaḥ | samīyurugrapauruṣāḥ sasālvapauṇḍracedipāḥ |
| tadā jagāma keśavo javena kuṇḍinaṃ puram | smṛto'tha tena pakṣirāṭsamājagāma keśavam |
| patatravāyunā'sya te nareśvarāḥ prapātitāḥ | yadedṛśaṃ patatriṇo balaṃ hareḥ kimucyate |
| kimatra naḥ kṛtaṃ bhavet sukhāya hīti te'bruvan | athābravījjarāsuto jayī payobdhimandiraḥ | kilaiṣa pakṣivāhano yataśca nānyathā bhavet |
| jitā vayaṃ ca sarvaśo'munaikalena saṃ yuge | anekaśo na saṅgatairjitaḥ kadācideṣa hi|
| amuṣya cāgrajaḥ purā nihantumudyato hi mām | adṛśyavākyato'tyajat pratāḍanāt supīḍitam |
| kimasya tūcyate balaṃ vayaṃ tṛṇopamāḥ kṛt āḥ | samastaśo mṛdhemṛdhe hi yena cākṣatena hā |
| kimatra kurvatāṃ sukhaṃ bhavedudīrṇasaṅkaṭe | iti bruvannavāṅ mukhaṃ nṛpaścakāra vicchavi |
| athā'ha cedibhūpatiḥ sadantavakrako vacaḥ | clxxvi.purā harerhi pārṣadaḥ prasannabuddhirekadā |
| śṛṇuṣva rājasattama prabhuṃ śivasvayambhuvoḥ | hariṃ vadanti kecidapyado bhavenna vai mṛṣā |
| tathā'vayośca darśane bhavet kadācidūrjitā | amuṣya bhaktiranyathā punaśca jāyate krudhā |
| na kāraṇaṃ na vidmahe na saṃ śayaḥ paro hariḥ | vrajāma taṃ sukhārthino vayaṃ vihāya śatrutām |
| idaṃ hi naḥ śubhapradaṃ nacānyathā ṇsubhaṃ kvacit | itīrito jarāsuto dadarśa tau dahanniva |
| atha prahasya saubharāḍvaco jagāda māgadham | vinindya tau krudhā sphuran krudhā sphurantamīkṣya ca |
| na tanmṛṣā hariḥ svayaṃ janārdano vadhāya naḥ | prajāta eṣa yādavo vayaṃ ca dānaveśvarāḥ |
| svadharma eṣa naḥ sadā dṛḍhapratīpatā harau | svadharmiṇo hatā api prayāma sadgatiṃ dhruvam |
| śivaśca naḥ parā gatirgururbhavānarirhareḥ | itīritaḥ sa māgadho jagāda sādhusādhviti |
| tathaiva rugmipūrvakāḥ karūṇsacedipau ca tau | viniścayaṃ kubuddhayo yudhe ca cakrurūrjitam |
| sadā pratīpakāriṇau bhavāva kṛṣṇa ityapi | guroḥ prasādamāpnutāṃ karūṇsacedibhūbhṛtau |
| punaśca te tvamantrayan sahaiva pāpabuddhayaḥ | dhruvaṃ samāgato harirlabheta rugmiṇīmimām |
| clxxvii.ayaṃ trilokasundaro'nurūpiṇī ca rugmiṇī | mukhena bāhunā'pyayaṃ samastalokajid vaśī |
| samastavedināṃ varaṃ jitārimagryarūpiṇam | samastayoṣit āṃ varā vrajeta rugmiṇī dhruvam |
| vayaṃ ca mānasaṅkṣayaṃ nitāntamāpnumastadā | na śaknumo nivārituṃ śarairamuṃ kathañcana |
| ataḥ svayambare yathā nasaṅgamo harerbhavet | tathā vidhānameva naḥ sunītirūrjitā dhruvam |
| ato na deyamasya naḥ subhūbhujāṃ samāgame | kvacit kadācidāsanaṃ nacārghyapūrvako vidhiḥ |
| nacā'syati kṣitau kvacid vimānitaḥ puro hi naḥ | varāsanasthabhūbhujāṃ sa mānito hi daivataiḥ |
| sa darpamānasaṃ yutaḥ krudhā prayāsyati dhruvam | purīṃ svakāṃ tatau vayaṃ vidhema ca svayambaram |
| iti sma sarvabhūbhṛt āṃ viniścayaṃ sakaiśikaḥ | kratho'vagamya bhīṣmakānujo'bhyayāddhariṃ drutam |
| praṇamya pādapadmayornijaṃ gṛhaṃ praveśya ca | mahāsanaṃ pradāya tau pracakraturvarārcanam |
| athā'gamacchatakratorvacaḥ pragṛhya bhūbhujaḥ | jarāsutādikān pumānuvāca cārthavad vacaḥ |
| ahaṃ priyaḥ śacīpateḥ sadā'sya cākṣigocaraḥ | surendra ājñayā'vadannṛpān va īśvaro hi saḥ |
| samastarājasatpatirharirnacānya ityapi | varābhiṣekamīśituḥ kurudhvamāṇsvasaṃ śayam |
| clxxviii.ato'nyathā ṇsirasyahaṃ nipātayāmi vo'śanim | itīdamindraśāsanaṃ kurudhvamityasau yayau |
| tadīritaṃ niśamya te punaḥ sutaptacetasaḥ | babhūvurūcire vacaḥ sugarvito hi vāsavaḥ |
| purā bibheti naḥ sadā pratiprati sma vāsavaḥ | utādya kṛṣṇasaṃ śrayād dṛḍhaṃ vibhīṣayatyasau |
| adṛśya eva devarāḍyadi sma vajramutsṛjet | bhavema pīḍit ā vayaṃ varādamṛtyavo'pi hi |
| purā divisthitasya ca pramardane vayaṃ kṣamāḥ | utādya yadyamuṃ vayaṃ vrajema kṛṣṇa eṣyati |
| ato'bhiṣecanād yadīha śārṅgiṇaḥ śacīpatiḥ | na vajramutsṛjet tadā'bhiṣecayāma taṃ vayam |
| ato'nyathā danuryathā varādamṛtyuko'pi san | surendravajratāḍito babhūva kukṣigāsyayuk |
| tathaiva kṛṣṇasaṃ śrayāt sa naḥ śacīpatirnayet | iti sma niścitā nṛpānayātayanta śauraye |
| samastaśo jarāsutādibhiḥ kṛte'bhiṣecane | atīva bhagnamānakān nacānuyāti kaścana |
| samāṇsrayaṃ ca keśavaṃ tadaiva jīvanārthinaḥ | prakuryurāsurā apīti devakāryasaṅkṣayaḥ |
| itīkṣya pākaśāsano'vadajjarāsutādikān | sarugmicedisālvapo na yātu māgadho harim |
| tatastu tān vinā'pare'dhirājarāja ityamum | clxxix.tadā'bhiṣektumudyatā nṛpāḥ sureśaśāsanāt |
| ataḥ śacīpatirnijaṃ varāsanaṃ hareradāt | viveśa tatra keśavo nabhastal . āvatārite |
| kare pragṛhya keśavo nyaveśayat sahā'sane | patatripuṅgavaṃ ca tau sa bhīṣmakānujau prabhuḥ |
| athākhilā nareśvarā munīndrasaṃ yutā harim | suśātakaumbhakumbhakaiḥ pracakrurābhiṣekiṇam |
| viriñcaśarvapūrvakairabhiṣṭutaḥ surādibhiḥ | samastadevagāyakaiḥ pragīta āsa keśavaḥ |
| athā'ha bhīṣmakaṃ prabhuḥ svayaṃ varaḥ kila tvayā | abhīpsitaḥ sutākṛte śubhāya te bhavenna saḥ |
| iyaṃ ramā tavā'tmajā babhūva tāṃ harernaca | dadāti cet tadā pitā nirindiro vrajedadhaḥ |
| hitāya caitadīritaṃ tavānyathā na cintaya | na yoṣidicchayā tvahaṃ bravīmi paśya yādṛśaḥ |
| udīrya caivamīśvaraścakāra hā'virātmanaḥ | sa viśvarūpamuttamaṃ visaṅkhyaśīrṣabāhukam |
| anantateja ātataṃ visaṅkhyarūpasaṃ yutam | vicitramaulikuṇḍalāṅgadoruhāranūpuram |
| jvalatsukaustubhaprabhā'bhibhāsakaṃ śubhāmbaram | prapaśya yādṛśāḥ striyo mametyadarśayacchriyam |
| anantarūpiṇīṃ parāṃ manuṣyadṛṣṭito'dhikām | svarugmiṇītanorapi vyadarśayacca devatāḥ |
| clxxx.tadadbhutaṃ samīkṣya tu prabhīta āṇsu bhīṣmakaḥ | papāta pādayorvibhoḥ karomi tat tatheti ca |
| punaśca viśvarūpatāṃ pidhāya padmalocanaḥ | jagāma pakṣivāhanaḥ purīṃ svabāhupālitām |
| apāmpatiśca maithilaḥ svayaṃ varaṅkṛt āvapi | hariṃ viniścayādiyaṃ vrajediti sma cakratuḥ |
| svayaṃ varaḥ kṣiterbhujāṃ svadharma ityato dvayoḥ | na doṣa āsa bhīṣmako na keśavārthamaicchata |
| ato harau prabodhya taṃ gate kṛpālusattame | vaśīkṛte ca bhīṣmake nṛpāstvamantrayan punaḥ |
| yaśaśca dharmamuttamaṃ vidhitsatā vṛkodare | na keśavena sūdito jarāsuto hi manyate |
| varācchivasya māmayaṃ na hantumīṣṭa uttamāt | ataḥ śivaprasādato jito'pi jeṣya uttaram |
| mṛdhemṛdhe jito'pi san dṛḍhāṇsayā punaḥ punaḥ | samīhate yudhe śivaṃ nacāvamanyate kvacit |
| ataḥ punaśca bhūmipānuvāca bārhadrathaḥ | dhigeva pauruṣaṃ hi no yadeṣa no'jayat sadā |
| abhūpaternacā'sanaṃ pradeyamityudāhṛtam | amuṣya nastadanyathā babhūva cintitaṃ nṛpāḥ |
| ayaṃ nṛpottamāṅgaṇe mahendrapīṭhamāruhat | samastarājarājatāmavāpa no'pyanicchatām |
| ataḥ punaḥ kathaṃ hariṃ vayaṃ jayema cintyatām | yathā cabhīṣmakātmajāmavāpnuyācca cedirāṭ|
| clxxxi.ayaṃ hi dattaputrako ma aurasād viśiṣyate | ato niveśya eṣa me surūpiṇī ca rugmiṇī |
| śivāgameṣu ṇsiṣyakāḥ sarugmisālvapauṇḍrakāḥ | mamākhilā nṛpāstataḥ kurudhvametadeva me |
| itīrite tu saubharāḍjagāda rugmisaṃ vidā | svayaṃ varo nivartitaḥ svasārameṣa dāsyati |
| nacātivartituṃ kṣamaḥ pitā'sya cedipāya tām | pradātukāmamātmajaṃ vayogatastathā'balaḥ |
| svayaṃ tu kṛṣṇa etya no vijitya kanyakāṃ haret | tato'sya pūrvameva no hyabhāvatā kṛt ā ṇsubhā |
| upāya eṣa cintito mayā'tra māgadheśvara | muniṃ hi garganāmakaṃ hyamuṣya sāla ākṣipat |
| yadā'sya ṣaṇḍhatoditā muneḥ puro hi tasya ca | pareṇa vṛṣṇayo'hasaṃ ścukopa garga eṣu ha|
| cakāra hi pratiśravaṃ samārjaye sutaṃ drutam | akṛṣṇatāṃ ya ānayed bhuvo'pi vṛṣṇināṇsakaḥ |
| yato hi kṛṣṇasaṃ śrayād batāpahāsitā vayam | iti bruvan vanaṃ yayau tapaśca śaivamācarat |
| sa cūrṇamāyasaṃ tvadan dadarśa cābdataḥ śivam | varaṃ tato'bhipedivān sutaṃ harerabhāvadam |
| sa viṣṇudaivato'pi san praviṣṭa ulbaṇāsuraiḥ | vyadhāddhareḥ pratīpakaṃ vrataṃ ca naiṣṭhikaṃ jahau |
| tamāra cā'surāpsarā baliṣṭhaputrakāmyayā | clxxxii.praviśya gopikāṅganāsamūhamadhyamulbaṇā |
| sa yāvanena bhūbhṛt ā hi gopikābhirarcitaḥ | aputrakeṇa jānatā munermano'nucintitam |
| sa cāpsarastanau sutaṃ niṣicya yāvanāya ca | dadau vimohitaḥ krudhā kimetadīśa vairiṇaḥ |
| sa āṇsramācca naiṣṭhikād vidūṣitaḥ pratīpakṛt | hareśca tāpameyivān jagarha cā'tmaśemuṣīm |
| jagāma cāraṇaṃ hariṃ prapāhi māṃ supāpinam | iti sma viṣṇvanujñayā cakāra vaiṣṇavaṃ tapaḥ |
| kuto hi bhāgyamāpatenmuneḥ śivārcane sadā | bhavādṛśā hidānavāḥ sthirāḥ śivārcane sadā |
| suto'sya kālanāmako babhūva kṛṣṇamarditum | sadaiva kālakāṅkṣaṇāt sa yāvanābhiṣecitaḥ |
| tavaiva śiṣya eṣa cātibhaktimān hi śaṅkare | prabhūtasenayā yuto baloddhataśca sarvadā |
| tameṣa yāmi śāsanāt tavopanīya satvaram | vikṛṣṇakaṃ kṣitestal . aṃ vidhāya saṃ ramāma hā |
| tataśca rugmiṇīṃ vayaṃ pradāpayāma cedipe | vināṇsya devapakṣiṇo yatheṣṭamāsma sarvadā |
| itīrito jarāsuto babhūva durmanā bhṛśam | kirīṭamaṇḍitaṃ śiraścakāra cā'śvavāg bhṛśam |
| karaṃ kareṇa pīḍayan niśāmya cā'tmano bhujau | jagāda kāryasiddhaye kathaṃ prayācaye param |
| clxxxiii.sudurgakāryasantatiṃ hyaguḥ sma madbhujāṇsrayāḥ | samastabhūtal . e nṛpāḥ sa cāhameṣa māgadhaḥ |
| kadā'pyacīrṇamadya tat kathaṃ karomi kevalam | girīśapādasaṃ śrayaḥ prabhuḥ samastabhūbhṛt ām |
| itīritaḥ sa saubharāḍjagāda vākyamuttaram | bhavānapi sma muhyate kimasmadādayaḥ prabho |
| svaśiṣyakaiḥ kṛtaṃ tu yat kimanyasādhitaṃ bhavet | svaśiṣyadāsavargakaiḥ samarthayanti bhūbhujaḥ |
| api sma te balāṇsrayapravṛttayo'smadādayaḥ | pumān kuṭhārasaṅgrahādaśakta īryate hi kim |
| kuṭhārasammito hyasau tavaiva yāvaneśvaraḥ | vinā bhavadbalaṃ kvacit pravartituṃ nahi kṣamaḥ |
| varo hi kṛṣṇamardane vṛto'sya kevalaḥ śivāt | tadanyaśatrupīḍanāt tvameva tasya rakṣakaḥ |
| tavākhilairajeyatā ṇsivaprasādato'sti hi | viśeṣato harerjaye varādayaṃ vimārgyate |
| itīrite'pyatṛptavat sthite tu bārhadrathe | jagāma saubhamāsthitaḥ sa saubharāṭca yāvanam |
| sa kālayāvano'tha taṃ jarāsutāntikāgatam | niśamya bhaktipūrvakaṃ praṇamya cā'rcayad drutam |
| jarāsuto hi daivataṃ samastakeśavadviṣām | iti praṇamya tāṃ diśaṃ tadīyamāṇsvapūjayat |
| tadīritaṃ niśamya ca drutaṃ trikoṭisaṅkhyayā | akṣohiṇīkayā yutaḥ svasenayā nirākramat |
| clxxxiv.tadaśvamūtraviṣṭhayā babhūva nāmata śakṛt | nadī suvegagāminī kalau ca yā vahed drutam |
| punaḥ punarnadībhavaṃ niśāmya deśasaṅkṣayam | tadanyadeśamūtritaṃ vyaśoṣayaddhi mārutaḥ |
| hariśca vainateyayug vicārya rāmasaṃ yutaḥ | sadā'tipūrṇasaṃ vidapyajo'tha līlayā'smarat |
| yuyutsureṣa yāvanaḥ samīpamāgato'dya naḥ | yuyutsatāmanena no jarāsuto'bhiyāsyati |
| sa yādavān haniṣyati prabhaṅgatastu kopitaḥ | purā jayāṇsayā hi nau yadūn na jaghnivānasau |
| nirāṇsako'dya yādavānapi sma pīḍayiṣyati | ataḥ samudramadhyagāpurīvidhānamadya me | prarocate nidhānamapyamutra sarvasāttvatām |
| udīrya caivamīśvaro'smarat sureśavardhakim | sa bhauvanaḥ samāgataḥ kuśasthalīṃ vinirmame |
| nirambuke tu sāgare janārdanājñayā kṛte | mahodakasya madhyataścakāra tāṃ purīṃ śubhām | dviṣaṭkayojanāyatāṃ payobdhimadhyagopamām |
| cakāra lāvaṇodakaṃ janārdano'mṛtopamam | sabhāṃ sudharmanāmakāṃ dadau samīraṇo'sya ca |
| śatakratoḥ sabhāṃ tu tāṃ pradāya keśavāya saḥ | nidhīn samarpya sarvaśo yayau praṇamya taṃ prabhum |
| samastadevatāgaṇāḥ svakīyamarpayan harau | vimucya pakṣipuṅgavaṃ sa yoddhumaicchadacyutaḥ |
| clxxxv.samastamādhurān prabhuḥ kuśasthalīsthitān kṣaṇāt | vidhāya bāhuyodhakaḥ sa yāvanaṃ samabhyayāt |
| anantaśaktirapyajaḥ sunītidṛṣṭaye nṛṇām | vyavāsayannijān janān sa līlayaiva kevalam |
| anādyanantakālakaṃ samastalokamaṇḍalam | yadīkṣayaiva rakṣyate kimasya vṛṣṇirakṣaṇam |
| nirāyudhaṃ ca māmayaṃ varācchivasya na kṣamaḥ | samastasenayā yuto'pi yoddhumityadarśayat |
| sa kṛṣṇapannagaṃ ghaṭe nidhāya keśavo'rpayat | nirāyudho'pyahaṃ kṣamo nihantumapriyāniti |
| ghaṭaṃ pipīlikāgaṇaiḥ prapūrya yāvano'sya ca | bahutvato vijeṣya ityahiṃ mṛtaṃ vyadarśayat |
| kimatra satyamityahaṃ pradarśayiṣya ityajaḥ | udīrya dūtamabhyayāt sa yāvanaṃ prabādhitum |
| sa bāhunaiva keśavo vijitya yāvanaṃ prabhuḥ | nihatya sarvasainikān svamasya yāpayat purīm |
| sahāstraśastrasañcayān sṛjantamāṇsu yāvanam | nyapātayad rathottamāt tal . ena keśavo'rihā |
| vivāhanaṃ nirāyudhaṃ vidhāya bāhunā kṣaṇāt | vimūrcchitaṃ nacāhanat surārthitaṃ smaran hariḥ |
| purā hi yauvanāṇsvaje varapradāḥ sureśvarāḥ | yayācire janārdanaṃ varaṃ varapradeśvaram |
| anarthako varo'munā vṛto'pi sārthako bhavet | clxxxvi.ariṃ bhaviṣyayāvanaṃ dahatvayaṃ taveśvara |
| tathā'stviti prabhāṣitaṃ svavākyameva keśavaḥ | ṛtaṃ vidhātumabhyayāt sa yauvanāṇsvajāntikam |
| sasañjñako'tha yāvano dharātal . āt samutthitaḥ | nipātya yāntamīśvaraṃ sa pṛṣṭhato'nvayāt krudhā |
| harirguhāṃ nṛpasya tu praviśya saṃ vyavasthitaḥ | sa yāvanaḥ padā'hanannṛpaṃ sa taṃ dadarśa ha |
| sa tasya dṛṣṭimātrato babhūva bhasmasāt kṣaṇāt | sa eva viṣṇuravyayo dadāha taṃ hi vahnivat |
| varācchivasya daivatairavadhyadānavān purā | harervarānnihatya sa prapeda āṇsvimaṃ varam |
| sudīrghasuptimātmanaḥ prasuptibhaṅgakṛtkṣayam | svadṛṣṭimātratastato hataḥ sa yāvanastadā |
| ataśca puṇyamāptavān suraprasādato'kṣayam | sa yauvanāṇsvajo nṛpo na devatoṣaṇaṃ vṛthā |
| tato hariṃ nirīkṣya sa stutiṃ vidhāya cottamām | hareranujñayā tapaścacāra muktimāpa ca |
| tato guhāmukhāddharirvinissṛto jarāsutam | samastabhūpasaṃ vṛtaṃ jigāya bāhuneśvaraḥ |
| tal . ena muṣṭibhistathā mahīruhaiśca cūrṇit āḥ | nipeturasya sainikāḥ svayaṃ ca mūrcchito'patat |
| sasālvapauṇḍracedipān nipātya sarvabhūbhujaḥ | sa pupluve janārdanaḥ kṣaṇena tāṃ kuśasthalīm |
| clxxxvii.sasañjñakāḥ samutthitāstato nṛpāḥ punaryayuḥ | jigīṣavo'tha rugmiṇīṃ vidhāya cedipe harim |
| samastarājamaṇḍale viniścayādupāgate | sabhīṣmake ca rugmiṇi pradātumudyate mudā |
| samastalokayoṣit āṃ varā vidarbhanandanā | dvijottamaṃ hareḥ padoḥ sakāṇsamāṇsvayātayat |
| niśamya tadvaco hariḥ kṣaṇād vidarbhakānagāt | tamanvayāddhalāyudhaḥ samastayādavaiḥ saha |
| samastarājamaṇḍalaṃ prayāntamīkṣya keśavam | suyattamāttakārmukaṃ babhūva kanyakāvane |
| purā pradānataḥ surekṣaṇacchalād bahirgatām | rathe nyaveśayaddhariḥ prapaśyatāṃ ca bhūbhṛt ām |
| jarāsutādayo ruṣā tamabhyayuḥ śarottamaiḥ | vidhāya tān nirāyudhān jagāma keśavaḥ śanaiḥ |
| punargṛhītakārmukān hariṃ prayātumudyatān | nyavārayaddhalāyudho balād balorjitāgraṇīḥ |
| tadā sitaḥ śiroruho harerhalāyudhasthitaḥ | prakāṇsamāviśad balaṃ vijetumatra māgadham |
| sa tasya māgadho raṇe gadānipātacūrṇitaḥ | papāta bhūtal . e balo vijitya taṃ yayau purīm |
| varoruveṣasaṃ vṛto'tha cedirāṭsamabhyayāt | tamāsasāra sātyakirnadan mṛgādhipo yathā |
| ciraṃ prayuddhya tāvubhau varāstraśastravarṣiṇau | krudhā nirīkṣya tasthatuḥ parasparaṃ sphurattanū |
| clxxxviii.samānabhāvamakṣamī śineḥ sutātmajaḥ śaram | athodbabarha tatkṣaṇād balānmumoca vakṣasi |
| sa tena tāḍito'patad visañjñako nṛpātmajaḥ | vijitya taṃ sa sātyakiryayau prahṛṣṭamānasaḥ |
| athāpare ca yādavā vijitya tadbalaṃ yayuḥ | puraiva rugmipūrvakāḥ prajagmuracyutaṃ prati |
| sahaikalavyapūrvakaiḥ sametya bhīṣmakātmajaḥ | hariṃ vavarṣa sāyakaiḥ sa siṃ havannyavartata |
| akṣohiṇītrayaṃ haristadā nihatya sāyakaiḥ | avāhanāyudhaṃ vyadhānniṣādapaṃ śaraiḥ kṣaṇāt |
| śaraṃ śarīranāṇsakaṃ samādadānamīśvaram | sa ekalavya āṇsu taṃ vihāya dudruve bhayāt |
| dhanurbhṛt āṃ vare gate raṇaṃ vihāya bhūbhṛtaḥ | karūṇsarājapūrvakāḥ kṣaṇāt pradudruvurbhayāt |
| athā'sasāda keśavaṃ ruṣā sa bhīṣmakātmajaḥ | śarāmbudhāra āṇsu taṃ vivāhanaṃ vyadhāddhariḥ |
| cakarta kārmukaṃ punaḥ sa khaḍgacarmabhṛddhareḥ | rathaṃ samāruhaccharaiścakarta khaḍgamīśvaraḥ |
| śarairvitastimātrakairvidhāya taṃ nirāyudham | priyāvacaḥ prapālayan jaghāna nainamacyutaḥ |
| nibaddhya pañcacūl . inaṃ vidhāya taṃ vyasarjayat | jagajjanitrayoridaṃ viḍambanaṃ rameśayoḥ |
| sadaikamānasāvapi svadharmaśāsakau nṛṇām | clxxxix.ramā hariśca tatra tau vijahraturhi rugmiṇā |
| athā'sasāda saubharāḍhariṃ śarāmbuvarṣaṇaḥ | hariḥ śaraṃ yamopamaṃ mumoca tasya vakṣasi |
| śareṇa tena pīḍitaḥ papāta mandaceṣṭitaḥ | cirāttasañjñako'gamat trinetratoṣaṇecchayā |
| samastarājasannidhāvayādavīṃ mahīmaham | kariṣya ityudīrya sa vyadhāt tapo'tiduścaram |
| atho viveśa keśavaḥ purīṃ kuśasthalīṃ vibhuḥ | priyāyuto'bjajādibhiḥ samīḍitaḥ sureśvaraiḥ |
| purā tato halāyudhaḥ priyāṃ nijāṃ purā'pi hi | sa vāruṇīsamāhvayāmavāpa raivatīṃ vibhuḥ |
| patiṃ yathā'nurūpiṇaṃ tadīyameva pūrvakam | pitā tadīya aicchata pravettumabjasambhavāt |
| sa tatsado gato varāt tadīyataḥ pragītikām | niśamya nāvidad gataṃ yugorukālaparyayam |
| narānayogyagītikā vimohayet tato nṛpaḥ | sumūḍhabuddhirantato'lpakāla ityamanyata |
| sa mūrcchitaḥ prabodhito'bjajena taṃ tvapṛcchata | sutāpatiṃ balaṃ ca so'bravīd yugātyaye bahau |
| sa raivato balāya tāṃ pradāya gandhamādanam | gato'tra cīrṇasattapā avāpa keśavāntikam |
| balo'pi tāṃ purātanapramāṇasammitāṃ vibhuḥ | halena cā'jñayā samāṃ cakāra satyavāñchitaḥ |
| cxc.tayā rataḥ sutāvubhau śaṭholmukābhidhāvadhāt | purā'ryamāṃ śakau surāvudāraceṣṭito balaḥ |
| janārdanaśca rugmiṇīkaraṃ śubhe dine'grahīt | mahotsavastadā'bhavat kuśasthalīnivāsinām |
| caturmukheśapūrvakāḥ surā viyatyavasthitāḥ | pratuṣṭuvurjanārdanaṃ ramāsametamavyayam |
| munīndradevagāyanādayo'pi yādavaiḥ saha | viceruruttamotsave ramārameśayogini |
| surāṃ śakāṇsca ye nṛpāḥ samāhutā mahotsave | sapāṇḍavāḥ samāyayurhariṃ ramāsamāyutam |
| samastalokasundarau yutau ramārameśvarau | samīkṣya modamāyayuḥ samastalokasajjanāḥ |
| tayā raman janārdano viyogaśūnyayā sadā | adhatta putramuttamaṃ manobhavaṃ purātanam |
| catustanorhareḥ prabhostṛtīyarūpasaṃ yutaḥ | tatastadāhvayo'bhavat sa rugmiṇīsuto balī |
| puraiva mṛtyave'vadat tameva śambarasya ha | prajātamabjajāṅkajastavāntako'yamityapi |
| sa māyayā hareḥ sutaṃ pragṛhya sūtikāgṛhāt | avākṣipanmahodadhāvupekṣito'ripāṇinā |
| tamagrasajjalecaraḥ sa dāṇsahastamāgataḥ | kumāramasya tūdare nirīkṣya śambare daduḥ |
| vipāṭya matsyakodaraṃ sa śambaraḥ kumārakam | nyavedayanmanobhavapriyākare surūpiṇam |
| cxci.anaṅgatāmupāgate purā hareṇa sā'ṅgaje | vaśaṃ viriñcaśāpato jagāma śambarasya hi |
| purā hipañcabhartṛkāṃ niśamya kañjajoditām | jahāsa pārṣatātmajāṃ śaśāpa tāṃ tatastvajaḥ |
| bhavāsureṇa dūṣiteti sā tato hi māyayā | pidhāya tāṃ nijāṃ tanuṃ jagāma cānyayā'suram |
| gṛhe'pi sā'sure sthitā nijasvarūpato'suram | na gacchati sma sā patiṃ nijaṃ samīkṣya harṣit ā |
| rasāyanaiḥ kumārakaṃ vyavarddhayad ratiḥ patim | sa pūrṇayauvano'bhavaccaturbhireva vatsaraiḥ |
| patiṃ supūrṇayauvanaṃ nirīkṣya tāṃ viṣajjatīm | uvāca kārṣṇiramba te kuceṣṭitaṃ kathaṃ nviti |
| jagāda sā'khilaṃ patau tadasya janma cā'gatim | tato'grahīt sa tāṃ priyāṃ ratiṃ ramāpateḥ sutaḥ |
| dadau ca mantramuttamaṃ samastamāyināṇsakam | bhṛgūttharāmadaivataṃ ratirhareḥ sutāya sā |
| tataḥ svadāradharṣakaṃ samāhvayad yudhe'ṅgajaḥ | sa śambaraṃ sa caitya taṃ yuyodha śaktito balī |
| sa carmakhaḍgadhāriṇaṃ varāstraśastrapādapaiḥ | yadā na yoddhumāṇsakaddhareḥ sutaṃ na dṛśyate |
| sahasramāyamulbaṇaṃ tvadṛśyamambarād girīn | sṛjantametya vidyayā jaghāna kṛṣṇanandanaḥ |
| sa vidyayā vināṇsitorumāya āṇsu śambaraḥ | cxcii.nikṛttakandharo'patad varāsinā'munā kṣaṇāt |
| nihatya taṃ hareḥ sutastayaiva vidyayā'mbaram | samāsthitaḥ svabhāryayā samaṃ kuśasthalīṃ yayau |
| samastavedinormunirnarān viḍambamānayoḥ | ramārameśayoḥ sutaṃ jagāda taṃ sma nāradaḥ |
| sa rugmiṇījanārdanādibhiḥ sarāmayādavaiḥ | pitāmahena cā'darāt sulāl . ito'vasat sukham |
| tataḥ purā syamantakaṃ hyavāpa sūryamaṇḍale | sthitāddhareḥ sa satrajit sadā'tra keśavārcakaḥ |
| sadā'sya viṣṇubhāvino'pyatīva lobhamāntaram | prakāṇsayan ramāpatiryayāca īśvaro maṇim |
| sa taṃ na dattavāṃ stato'nujo nibaddhya taṃ maṇim | vanaṃ gataḥ prasenako mṛgādhipena pātitaḥ |
| tadā sa satrajiddhariṃ śaśaṃ sa sodarāntakam | upāṃ śu vartmanā tato hariḥ sayādavo yayau |
| vane sa siṃ hasūditaṃ padaiḥ pradarśya vṛṣṇinām | prasenamṛkṣapātitaṃ sa siṃ hamapyadarśayat |
| tato nidhāya tān bilaṃ sa jāmbavatparigraham | viveśa tatra saṃ yugaṃ babhūva tena ceśituḥ |
| yuyodha mandameva sa prabhuḥ svabhakta ityajaḥ | cakāra cogramantataḥ prakāṇsayan svamasya hi |
| sa muṣṭipiṣṭavigraho nitāntamāpadaṃ gataḥ | jagāma cetasā raghūttamaṃ nijaṃ patiṃ gatim |
| cxciii.smṛtiṃ gate tu rāghave tadākṛtiṃ yadūttame | samastabhedavarjitāṃ samīkṣya so'yamityavet |
| tataḥ kṣamāpayan sutāṃ pradāya rohiṇīṃ śubhām | maṇiṃ ca taṃ nunāva sa prapanna āṇsu pādayoḥ |
| vidhāya cakradāritaṃ sujīrṇadehamasya saḥ | yuvānamāṇsu keśavaścakāra vedanāṃ vinā |
| vidhāya bhaktavāñchitaṃ priyāsahāya īśvaraḥ | pragṛhya taṃ mahāmaṇiṃ viniryayau guhāmukhāt |
| guhāpraviṣṭamīśvaraṃ bahūnyahānyanirgatam | pratīkṣya yādavāstu ye gatā gṛhaṃ tadā'hṛṣuḥ |
| samastavṛṣṇisannidhau yadūttamaḥ syamantakam | dadau ca satrajitkare sa vicchavirbabhūva ha |
| sa duryaśo ramāpatāvanūcya mithyayā tapan | svapāpahānakāṅkṣayā dadau sutāṃ janārdane |
| maṇiṃ ca taṃ pradāya taṃ nanāma ha kṣamāpayan | maṇiṃ punardadau harirmumoda satyabhāmayā |
| ramaiva sā hibhūriti dvitīyamūrtiruttamā | babhūva satrajitsutā samastalokasundarī |
| tato hi sā ca rugmiṇī priye priyāsu te'dhikam | janārdanasya te hareḥ sadā'viyoginī yataḥ |
| athā'pa sāmbanāmakaṃ sutaṃ ca rohiṇī hareḥ | caturmukhāṃ śasaṃ yutaṃ kumārameva ṣaṇmukham |
| iti praśāsati prabhau jagajjanārdane'khilam | agaṇyasadguṇārṇave kadācidāyayau dvijaḥ |
| cxciv.janārdanaḥ sa nāmato rameśapādasaṃ śrayaḥ | sa mānitaśca viṣṇunā praṇamya vākyamabravīt |
| kṣamasva me vacaḥ prabho bravīmyatīva pāpakam | yataḥ supāpadūtakastato hi tādṛśaṃ vacaḥ |
| na te'styagocaraṃ kvacit tathā'pi cā'jñayā vade | vadeti codito'munā dvijo jagāda mādhavam |
| sutau hi sālvabhūpaterbabhūvatuḥ śivāṇsrayau | śivaprasādasambhavau pitustapobalena tau |
| ajeyavadhyatāṃ ca tau śivād varaṃ samāpatuḥ | jarāsutasya śiṣyakau tapobalena kevalam |
| mahodaraṃ ca kuṇḍadhāriṇaṃ ca bhūtakāvubhau | tathā'jitāvavadhyakau dideśa śaṅkarastayoḥ |
| tayoḥ sahāya eva tau varācchivasya bhūtakau | ajeyatāmavāpaturnacānyathā'marāvapi |
| ajeyatāmavadhyatāmavāpya tāvubhau śivāt | pitustu rājasūyitāṃ samicchato madoddhatau |
| jarāsuto gurutvato viroddhumatra necchati | nṛpāṃ stu devapakṣiṇo vijitya kartumicchataḥ |
| svayaṃ hi rājasūyitāṃ jarāsuto na manyate | yato hi vaiṣṇavaṃ kratuṃ tamāhurīśa vaidikāḥ |
| imau pituryaśo'rthinau parābhavāya te tathā | samicchato'dya taṃ kratuṃ bhavantamūcatuśca tau |
| samudrasaṃ śrayo bhavān bahūn pragṛhya lāvaṇān | cxcv.subhārakānupaihi nāviti kṣamasva me vacaḥ |
| itīrya taṃ nanāma sa pra cāhasan sma yādavāḥ | haristu sātyakiṃ vaco jagāda meghanisvanaḥ |
| prayāhi sātyake vaco bravīhi me nṛpādhamau | sametya vāṃ varāyudhaiḥ karaṃ dadānyasaṃ śayam |
| upaitamāṇsu saṃ yugārthinau ca puṣkaraṃ prati | itīritaḥ śineḥ suto jagāma viprasaṃ yutaḥ |
| upetya tau harervaco jagāda sātyakirbalī | vidhāya tau tṛṇopamau girā jagāma keśavam |
| tataḥ puraiva tāvubhau dvijaṃ harasvarūpiṇam | suduḥkhavāsanāmakaṃ pracakratustṛṇopamam |
| daśatrikaiḥ śatairvṛto yatīśvaraiḥ sa sarvavit | vipāṭit ātmakaupinādisarvamātrako'bhavat |
| varāt svasambhavādasau na śāpaśaktimānabhūt | tataḥ samastabhañjanoruśaktimāpa keśavam |
| sa tān samarcya mādhavaḥ pradāya corumātrakāḥ | yayau ca taiḥ samanvito vadhāya sālvaputrayoḥ |
| tamatrijaṃ harātmakaṃ yato hi veda māgadhaḥ | tato'tyajat svaśiṣyakau niśamya tatpratīpakau |
| harau tu puṣkaraṃ gate munīśvaraiḥ samarcite | samīyatuśca tāvubhāvathātra haṃ saḍībhakau |
| sa brahmadattanāmako'tra tatpitā'pyupāyayau | samāgatau ca bhūtakau śivasya yau purassarau |
| cxcvi.vicakranāmako'suraḥ purā viriñcato varam | avadhyatāmajeyatāmavāpya bādhate surān |
| sa cābhavat tayoḥ sakhā sahāyakāmyayā'gamat | hiḍimbarākṣaso'pi yaḥ purā'pa śaṅkarād varam |
| na jīyase na vadhyase kutaścaneti toṣit āt | sa caitayoḥ sakhā'bhavat samājagāma tatra ca |
| akṣohiṇīdaśātmakaṃ balaṃ tayorbabhūva ha | vicakragaṃ ṣaḍātmakaṃ tathaikameva rākṣasam |
| dviraṣṭasenayā yutau sahaikayaiva tau nṛpau | samīyaturyudhe hariṃ hariśca tau sasāra ha |
| atha dvayordvayorabhūd raṇo bhayānako mahān | harirvicakrameyivān balaśca haṃ samuddhatam |
| tadā'sya cānujaṃ yayau śinipravīra āyudhī | gadaśca nāmato'nujo hareḥ sa rohiṇīsutaḥ |
| purā sa caṇḍako gaṇo harerniveditāṇsanaḥ | samāhvayad raṇāya vai tayoḥ sa tātameva hi |
| akṣohiṇītrayānvitāḥ samastayādavāstadā | trilocanānugau ca tau nyavārayan sarākṣasau |
| harirvicakramojasā mahāstraśastravarṣiṇam | vivāhanaṃ nirāyudhaṃ kṣaṇāccakāra sāyakaiḥ |
| punaśca pādapān girīn pramuñcato'riṇā'rihā | śiro jahāra devatā vineduratra harṣit āḥ |
| prasūnavarṣibhiḥ stutaścaturmukhādibhiḥ prabhuḥ | sasāra tau harānugau prabhakṣakau sa sāttvatām |
| cxcvii.samastayādavān raṇe vidhūya tau janārdanam | upetya cāṃ sagau hareradaṃ śatāṃ sukarṇakau |
| sa tau bhujapravegato vidhūya śaṅkarālaye | nyapātayad balārṇavo'mitasya kiṃ taducyate |
| prabhakṣayantamojasā hiḍimbamuddhataṃ balam | sahograsenako yayau pitā hareḥ śarān kṣipan |
| tayo rathau sahāyudhau prabhakṣya rākṣaso balī | pragṛhya tāvabhāṣata prayātamāṇsu me mukham |
| tadā gadāvarāyudhaḥ sahaiva haṃ sabhūbhṛt ā | prayuddhyamāna āyayau vihāya taṃ halāyudhaḥ |
| tamāgataṃ samīkṣya tau vihāya rākṣasādhipaḥ | upetya muṣṭinā'hanad balaṃ sa vakṣasi krudhā |
| ubhau hi bāhuṣāl . ināvayuddhyatāṃ ca muṣṭibhiḥ | ciraṃ prayuddhya taṃ balo'grahīt sa jaṅghayorvibhuḥ |
| athainamuddhṛtaṃ balād balaḥ sa dūramākṣipat | papāta pādayojane sa nā'jagāma taṃ punaḥ |
| vihāya sainikāṃ śca tau nṛpau yayau vanāya saḥ | nihatya tasya rākṣasān halāyudho nanāda ha |
| gadastu sālvabhūbhṛt ā vayogatena yodhayan | vivāhanaṃ nirāyudhaṃ cakāra so'pyapādravat |
| sutena tasya kanyasā yuyodha sātyakī rathī | varāstraśastrayodhinau vijahratuśca tāvubhau |
| ciraṃ prayuddhya sātyakiḥ sa haṃ sakanyasā balī | cxcviii.śataṃ sapañcakaṃ raṇe cakarta tasya dhanvanām |
| sa khaḍgacarmabhṛd raṇe'bhyayāt sutātmajaṃ śineḥ | sa cainamabhyayāt tathā varāsicarmabhṛd vibhīḥ |
| dviṣoḍaṇsaprabhedakaṃ varāsiyuddhamaśramau | pradarśya nirviśeṣakāvubhau vyavasthitau ciram |
| parasparāntaraiṣiṇau nacāntaraṃ vyapaśyatām | tato vihāya saṅgaraṃ gatau nirarthakaṃ tviti |
| tataḥ sa haṃ sasaṃ yuto jagāma yoddhumacyutam | kṣaṇena tau nirāyudhau cakāra keśavaḥ śaraiḥ |
| hataṃ ca sainyametayoścaturthabhāgaśeṣitam | kṣaṇena keśavena tadbhayādapeyatuśca tau |
| sa puṣkarekṣaṇastadā surairnuto'tha puṣkare | uvāsa tāṃ niśāṃ prabhuḥ sayādavo'mitaprabhaḥ |
| pare dine janārdano nṛpātmajau pravidrutau | yamasvasustaṭe prabhuḥ samāsasāda pṛṣṭhataḥ |
| sa rauhiṇeyasaṃ yutaḥ samanvitaśca senayā | svaśiṣṭasenayā vṛtau palāyināvavārayat |
| nivṛtya tau svasenayā ṇsarottamairvavarṣatuḥ | sukopitau samastaśo yadūnavāryapauruṣau |
| athā'sasāda haṃ sako halāyudhaṃ mahādhanuḥ | anantaro'sya sātyakiṃ gadaṃ ca sarvasainikān |
| sa sātyakiṃ nirāyudhaṃ vivāhanaṃ vivarmakam | vyadhād gadaṃ ca tau raṇaṃ vihāya hāpajagmatuḥ |
| cxcix.vidhūya sainikāṃ śca sa pragṛhya cāpamātatam | hariṃ jagāma connadan mahāstraśastravarṣaṇaḥ |
| tamāṇsu keśavo'rihā samastasādhanojjhitam | kṣaṇāccakāra so'pyagād visṛjya taṃ halāyudham |
| halāyudho nirāyudhaṃ vidhāya haṃ samojasā | vikṛṣṭacāpa āgataṃ dadarśa tasya cānujam |
| sa haṃ sa āṇsu kārmukaṃ punaḥ pragṛhya taṃ balam | yadā'sasāda keśavo nyavārayat tamojasā |
| śineḥ sutātmajo'pyasau vihāya haṃ sakānujam | rathāntaraṃ samāsthito jagāma tātamasya ca |
| vayogataḥ pitā tayoryuyodha tena vṛṣṇinā | śaraṃ ca kaṇṭhakūbare vyasarjayat sa sātyakeḥ |
| sa sātyakirdṛḍhāhato jagāma mohamāṇsu ca | sulabdhasañjña utthitaḥ samādade'rddhacandrakam |
| sa tena tacchiro balī cakarta śuklamūrddhajam | yadambayā'bhikāmitaṃ purā papāta tat kṣitau |
| nadaṃ śca sātyakirharerjagāma pārśvamuddhataḥ | balo'pi haṃ sakānujaṃ yuyodha senayā yutam |
| haristu haṃ samulbaṇaiḥ śaraiḥ samardayan balam | jaghāna tasya sarvaśo na kaścidatra śeṣitaḥ |
| sa eka eva keśavaṃ mahāstramuk sasāra ha | nivārya tāni sarvaśo harirnijāstramādade |
| sa vaiṣṇavāstramudyataṃ nirīkṣya yānato mahīm | gataḥ parādravad bhayāt papāta yāmunodake |
| cc.varāstrapāṇirīśvaraḥ padā'hanacchirasyamum | sa mūrchito mukhe'patanmahābhujaṅgamasya ha |
| sa dhārtarāṣṭrakodare yathā tamo'ndhameyivān | tathā suduḥkhasaṃ yuto vasan manoḥ paraṃ mriyet |
| tato'ndhameva tat tamo harerdviḍeti niścayāt | tadā'sya cānujo'grajaṃ vimārgayan jale'patat |
| vihāya rohiṇīsutaṃ jale nimajjya mārgayan | apaśyamāna ātmano vyapāṭayacca kākudam |
| vihāya dehamulbaṇaṃ tamo'vatārya cāgrajam | pratīkṣamāṇa ulbaṇaṃ samatti tat sukhetaram |
| tato harirbalairyuto balānvito munīśvaraiḥ | samaṃ kuśasthalīṃ yayau stutaḥ kaśaṅkarādibhiḥ |
| svakīyapādapallavāṇsrayaṃ janaṃ praharṣayan | uvāsa nityasatsukhārṇavo ramāpatirgṛhe |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye haṃ saḍibhakavadho nāma saptadaśo'dhyāyaḥ cci.(bhīmārjunadigvijayaḥ ) atha aṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | yadā rāmādavāptāni divyāstrāṇi prapedire | droṇāt kumārāsteṣvāsīt sarveṣvapyadhiko'rjunaḥ |
| ahanad vatsatanūkaṃ yo'pāllokaṃ svayatnavatsatanūkam | so'pād vatsānamaraḥ sahāgrajo gopavatsavatsānamaraḥ |
Bra. Sū.
| nijapratibhayā jānan sarvāstrāṇi tato'dhikam | nāstrayuddhaṃ kvacid bhīmo manyate dharmamañjasā |
| nahi bhāgavato dharmo devatābhyupayācanam | j ñānabhaktī harestṛptiṃ vinā viṣṇorapi kvacit |
| nā'kāṅkṣyaṃ kimutānyebhyo hyastraṃ kāmyaphalapradam | śuddhe bhāgavate dharme nirato yad vṛkodaraḥ |
| na kāmyakarmakṛt tasmānnāyācad devamānuṣān | na hariścārthitastena kadācit kāmalipsayā |
| bhikṣāmaṭaṃ śca huṅkārāt karavad vaiśyato'grahīt | nānyadevā natāstena vāsudevānna pūjitāḥ |
| na pratīpaṃ hareḥ kvāpi sa karoti kathañcana | anupaskariṇo yuddhe nābhiyāti hyupaskarī | nāpayāti yudhaḥ kvāpi na kvacicchadma cā'caret |
| naivordhvadaihikānujñāmavaiṣṇavakṛte'karot | na karoti svayaṃ naiṣāṃ priyamapyācaret kvacit |
| sakhyaṃ nāvaiṣṇavaiścakre pratīpaṃ vaiṣṇave naca | parokṣe'pi harernindākṛto jihvāṃ chinatti ca |
| pratīpakāriṇo hanti viṣṇorvainānajīghanat | na saṃ śayaṃ kadā'pyeṣa dharme jñāne'pi vā'karot |
| vidyopajīvanaṃ naiṣa cakārā'padyapi kvacit | ccii.ato na dharmanahuṣau pratyuvāca kathañcana |
| ājñayaiva harerdrauṇerastrāṇyastrairaśātayat | adṛśyo'lambuso bhagno nānyatra tu kathañcana |
| nahyastrayuddhe sadṛśo drauṇerastyarjunādṛte | sarvavittvaṃ tato bhīme pradarśayitumīśvaraḥ | adādājñāmastrayuddhe tathaivālambusaṃ prati |
| pratyakṣībhūtadeveṣu bandhujyeṣṭheṣu vā natim | maryādāsthitaye'śāsad bhagavān puruṣottamaḥ |
| tatrāpi viṣṇumevāsau namennānyaṃ kathañcana | ājñayaivāstradevāṃ śca prerayāmāsa nārthanāt |
| anvenameva taddharme kṛṣṇaikā saṃ sthitā sadā | dhṛtarāṣṭrādapi varaṃ tato nā'tmārthamagrahīt |
| nāṇsapad dhārtarāṣṭrāṃ śca mahāpadyapi sā tataḥ | na vācā manasā vā'pi pratīpaṃ keśave'carat |
| anye bhāgavatatve'pi khinnadharmāḥ kvacitkvacit | syamantakārthe rāmo'pi kṛṣṇasya vimanā'bhavat |
| avamene'rjunaḥ kṛṣṇaṃ viprasya śiśurakṣaṇe | pradyumna uddhavaḥ sāmbo'niruddhādyāṇsca sarvaśaḥ |
| hareriṣṭaṃ subhadrāyāḥ phalgune dānamañjasā | j ñātvā'pi rurudhuḥ samyak sātyakiḥ kṛṣṇasammitam |
| kadācinmanyate pārthaṃ dharmajo'pi naraṃ harim | matvā'bibhejjarāsandhavadhe kṛṣṇamudīritum |
| bandhanaṃ śaṅkamāno hi kṛṣṇasya viduro'pitu | kauraveyasabhāmadhye nāvatāramarocayat |
| cciii.nakulaḥ karadānāya preṣayāmāsa keśave | avamene harerbuddhiṃ sahadevaḥ kulakṣayāt |
| devakīvasudevādyā menire mānuṣaṃ harim | bhīṣmastu bhārgavaṃ rāmamavamene yuyodha ca |
| droṇakarṇadrauṇikṛpāḥ kṛṣṇābhāve mano dadhuḥ | devāḥ śivādyā apitu virodhaṃ cakrire kvacit |
| ṛṣimānuṣagandharvā vaktavyāḥ kimataḥ param | janmajanmāntare'jñānādavajānanti yat sadā |
| tasmādeko vāyureva dharme bhāgavate sthiraḥ | lakṣmīḥ sarasvatī ceti paraśuklatrayaṃ śrutam |
| sarvametacca kathitaṃ tatratatrāmitātmanā | vyāsenaiva purāṇeṣu bhārate ca svasaṃ vidā |
| yadā te sarvaśastrāstravedino rājaputrakāḥ | babhūvū raṅgamadhye tān bhāradvājo'pyadarśayat |
| raktacandanasatpuṣpavastraśastragul . odanaiḥ | sampūjya bhārgavaṃ rāmamanujajñe kumārakān |
| te bhīṣmadroṇaviduragāndhārīdhṛtarāṣṭrakān | sarājamaṇḍalān natvā kuntīṃ cādarśayañchramam |
| sarvaiḥ pradarśite'stre tu droṇādāttamahāstravit | drauṇirastrāṇyameyāni darśayāmāsa cādhikam |
| tato'pyatitarāṃ pārtho divyāstrāṇi vyadarśayat | avidhyanmāṇsake pāde pakṣiṇaḥ pakṣma eva ca | evamādīni citrāṇi bahūnyeṣa vyadarśayat |
| cciv.tadaiva karṇa āgatya rāmopāttāstrasampadam | darśayannadhikaḥ pārthādabhūd rājanyasaṃ sadi |
| kuntī nijaṃ sutaṃ j ñātvā lajjayā nāvadacca tam | pārtho'sahaṃ staṃ yuddhāyaivā'hvayāmāsa saṃ sadi |
| raṇāyākṣatriyāhvānaṃ j ānan dharmapratīpakam | bhīmo nivārya bībhatsuṃ karṇāyādāt pratodakam |
| akṣatrasaṃ skārayuto jāto'pi kṣatriye kule | na kṣatriyo hi bhavati yathā vrātyo dvijottamaḥ |
| niruttare kṛte karṇe bhīmenaiva suyodhanaḥ | abhyaṣecayadaṅgeṣu rājānaṃ pitranujñayā | dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ pakṣapātāt putrasyānuvaśo'bhavat |
| abhiṣikte tadā karṇe prāyādadhirathaḥ pitā | sarvarājasadomadhye vavande taṃ vṛṣā tadā | tutuṣuḥ karmaṇā tasya santaḥ sarve samāgatāḥ |
| bhīmaduryodhanau tatra śikṣāsandarśanacchalāt | samādāya gade gurvī saṃ rambhādabhyudīyatuḥ |
| devāsuramanuṣyādi jagadetaccarācaram | sarvaṃ tadā dvidhā bhūtaṃ bhīmaduryodhanāṇsrayāt |
| devā devānukūlāṇsca bhīmameva samāṇsritāḥ | asurā āsurāṇscaiva duryodhanasamāṇsrayāḥ | dvidhābhūtā mānuṣāṇsca devāsuravibhedataḥ |
| jaya bhīma mahābāho jaya duryodhaneti ca | huṅkārāṃ ścaiva bhiṭkārāṃ ścakrurdevāsurā api |
| dṛṣṭvā jagat susaṃ rabdhaṃ droṇo'tha dvijasattamaḥ | nedaṃ jagad vinaśyeta bhīmaduryodhanāṇsrayāt | ccv.iti putreṇa tau vīrau nyavārayadarindamau |
| svakīyāyāṃ svakīyāyāṃ yogyatāyāṃ natu kvacit | yuvayoḥ sama ityuktvā drauṇiretau nyavārayat | droṇājñayā vāritau tau yayatuḥ svaṃ svamālayam |
| surāsurān susaṃ rabdhān kālena drakṣyatheti ca | brahmā nivārya sasuro yayau seśaḥ svamālayam |
| karṇaṃ haste pragṛhyaiva dhārtarāṣṭro gṛhaṃ yayau | pārthaṃ haste pragṛhyaiva bhīmaḥ prāyāt svamālayam |
| pārthena karṇo hantavya ityāsīd bhīmaniścayaḥ | vaiparītyena tasyā'sīd duryodhanaviniścayaḥ | tadarthaṃ nītimatulāṃ cakratustāvubhāvapi |
| tathotkarṣe phalgunasya yaśaso vijayasya ca | udyoga āsīd bhīmasya dhārtarāṣṭrasya cānyathā |
| bhīmārthaṃ keśavo'nye ca devāḥ phalgunapakṣiṇaḥ | āsan yathaiva rāmādyāḥ saṅgraheṇa hanūmataḥ | surāḥ sugrīvapakṣasthāḥ pūrvamāsaṃ stathaiva hi |
| tadarthameva bhīmasya hyanujatvaṃ sureśvaraḥ | āpa pūrvānutāpena tena bhīmastathā'karot |
| duryodhanārthaṃ karṇasya pakṣiṇo daityadānavāḥ | āsuḥ sarve glahāvetāvāsatuḥ karṇaphalgunau |
| atha pṛṣṭo dakṣiṇārthaṃ droṇa āha kumārakān | baddhvā pāñcālarājānaṃ dattetyūcustatheti te |
| te dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ karṇena sahitāḥ pāṇḍavā api | yayurdroṇena sahitāḥ pāñcālanagaraṃ prati |
| ccvi.athā'ha bhīmaḥ sāmarthyavivekābhīpsayā gurum | garva eṣa kumārāṇāmanivāryo dvijottama | gacchantvete'grato naiṣāṃ vaśago drupado bhavet |
| nivṛtteṣvakṛt ārtheṣu vayaṃ baddhvā ripuṃ tava | ānayāma na sandeha iti tasthau sasodaraḥ |
| sadroṇakeṣu pārtheṣu sthiteṣvanye sasūtajāḥ | yayurāttapraharaṇāḥ pāñcālāntaḥ puraṃ drutam |
| kumārān grahaṇepsūṃ stānupayātānudīkṣya saḥ | akṣohiṇītritayayu' n nissṛto drupado gṛhāt |
| te śarairabhivarṣantaḥ parivārya kumārakān | ardayāmāsuruddvṛtt ān striyo bālāṇsca sarvaśaḥ |
| harmyasaṃ sthāḥ striyo bālā grāvabhirmusalairapi | atyarthamardayāmāsuḥ kumārān susukhedhitān |
| drupadasya varo hyasti sūryadattastapobalāt | ā yojanāt puramupa na tvā jeṣyati kaścana |
| iti tena vareṇaiva sukhasaṃ varddhitāṇsca te | bhagnāḥ kumārā āvṛtya dudruvuryatra pāṇḍavāḥ |
| strībālavṛddhasahitaiḥ pāñcālairapyanudrutāḥ | bhīmārjuneti vāṇsanto yayuryatra sma pāṇḍavāḥ |
| t ān prabhagnān samālokya bhīmaḥ praharatāṃ varaḥ | āruroha rathaṃ vīraḥ pura āttaśarāsanaḥ |
| tamanvayādindrasuto yamau tasyaiva cakrayoḥ | yudhiṣṭhirastu droṇena saha tasthau nirīkṣakaḥ |
