| evaṃ pratyakṣe viṣṇupadāṇsrayasya balādhikye kimu vaktavyamatra | ccxxxviii.viṣṇorādhikye kṣatriyāṇāṃ pramāṇaṃ balaṃ vipre jñānameveti cā'huḥ |
| mayā kedāre viprarūpī jitaśca rudro'viśalliṅgamevā'śu bhītaḥ | tataḥ paraṃ vedavidāmagamyatāṇsāpaṃ prādācchaṅkaro brīl . ito'tra |
| evaṃ pratyakṣe viṣṇubale pratīpaṃ mano yasya hyuttaraṃ sa bravītu | krodho'dhikaścet kṣipramāyātu yoddhumityuktāste'bhyāyayurāttaśastrāḥ |
| vidrāpya tān bāṇasaṅghaiḥ samastān jarāsutaṃ gadayā yodhayitvā | bāhubhyāṃ cainaṃ parigṛhyā'śu viṣṇoḥ pādotthāyāṃ prākṣipad devanadyām |
| sa brīl . itaḥ prayayau māgadhāṃ śca bhūpaiḥ sameto bhīmaseno rathaṃ svam | āruhya kāṇsīśvarapūjitaśca yayau kāl . yā ṇsakrasanāmakaṃ puram |
| tasyāṃ trilokādhikarūpasadguṇairāsammatāyāṃ ramamāṇaḥ sutaṃ ca | śarvatrātaṃ nāmājanayat purā yaḥ samānavāyurbalavīryayuktaḥ |
| kṛṣṇo'pi gatvā dvāravatīṃ sarāmaḥ satyāpiturvadhakartārameva | śatadhanvānaṃ hantumaicchat sa caiva yayāce'krūraṃ kṛtavarmānuyuktam |
| t āvabrūtāṃ sarvalokaikakarturnā'vāṃ virodhaṃ manasā'pi kurvaḥ | kṛṣṇasya sarveśiturityanūkta āruhya cāṇsvīṃ bhayataḥ parādravat |
| anveva taṃ kṛṣṇarāmau rathena yātau śataṃ yojanānāṃ dinena | gatvā mṛt āyāṃ baḍabāyāṃ padaiva sa prādravat kṛṣṇa enaṃ padā'gāt |
| chitvā ṇsirastasya cakreṇa kṛṣṇo jānannakrūre maṇimenena dattam | apyajñavallokaviḍambanāya parīkṣya vāso'tra netyāha rāmam |
| aviśvāsāt satu sakrodha eva yayau videhānavasat pañca cābdān | j ānan pārthebhyo'hāryatāṃ keśavasya vaśīkartuṃ dhārtarāṣṭro balaṃ gāt |
| babhūva śiṣyo'sya tathā gadāyāmasannidhānaṃ keśavasya pratīkṣan | tadā yayāce bhaginīṃ ca tasya sa ca pratijñāmakarot pradāne |
| ccxxxix.jyeṣṭhaṃ hyenaṃ keśavo nātivartedityeva mene dhārtarāṣṭraḥ sa tasmāt | jagrāha hastaṃ dakṣiṇaṃ satyahetordadau ca rāmaḥ karamasmai halāṅkam |
| rūpeṇa tasyā mohito dhārtarāṣṭro viśeṣataḥ kṛṣṇarāmau bhaginyāḥ | snehād vaśaṃ yāsyata ityagṛhṇāddhastaṃ halāṅkaṃ halino ripughnam |
| j ātā devakyāṃ sā subhadreti nāmnā bhadrā rūpeṇā'nakadundubhestām | kṛtvā putrīṃ rohiṇī svāmarakṣat pūrvaṃ tu yā'sīt trijaṭaiva nāmnā |
| sīt āyāḥ prāṅ nityaśuśrūṣaṇāt sā babhūva viṣṇorbhaginī priyā ca| umāveśād rūpaguṇopapannā padmekṣaṇā campakadāmagaurī |
| etat kṛtvā dhṛtarāṣṭrātmajaḥ sa yayau kurūn nivasatyatra rāme | kṛṣṇo'krūraṃ vivasantaṃ bhayena sahārdikyaṃ cā'nayitvā jagāda |
| ānīya rāmaṃ ca samastasāttvatāṃ yadā'vādīt keśavaḥ sannidhāne | maṇistvayyāste darśayetyeva bhītastadā'krūro'darśayad ratnamasmai |
| avyājatāmātmano darśayitvā halāyudhe keśavastasya jānan | ratnākāṅkṣāmugrasenasya caiva mātuśca sāmbasya punarbabhāṣe |
| āstāmakrūre maṇiranyairadhāryaḥ sadā yajñād dānapateḥ sa dhāryaḥ | na satyā kṛṣṇāvāñchitaṃ kiñcidicchet tathā'pi tasyā yogya ityāha kṛṣṇaḥ |
| labdhvā ratnaṃ dānapatiḥ sadaiva sandīkṣito'bhūd yajñakarmaṇyatandraḥ | pradarśya kṛṣṇo haline ratnametacchakraprasthaṃ pāṇḍavasnehato'gāt |
| vasannajastatra bahūṃ śca māsān saphalguno'yānmṛgayāṃ kadācit | hatvā mṛgān yamunātīrasaṃ sthaḥ so'nyāṃ kāl . indīṃ dadṛśe tatsvasāram |
| sā sūryaputrī yamunānujātā tapaścarantī kṛṣṇapatnītvakāmā | pṛṣṭā'rjunenā'ha samastametat patnīṃ ca tāṃ jagṛhe vāsudevaḥ |
| tato gatvā nagnajito gṛhaṃ ca svayambare sapta vṛṣānagṛhṇāt | sarvairagrāhyānasurān vareṇa ṇsivasya yairnirjitā bhūmipālāḥ |
| ccxl.tato nīl āṃ tasya sutāṃ ca lebhe pūrvaṃ nīl ā gopakanyā'pi yā'sīt | sā dehe'syāḥ prāviśat pūrvameṣā yasmādekā dvividhā samprajātā |
| pitṛṣvasurmitravindā sutā cakṛṣṇe mālāmāsajad rājamadhye | vindānuvindau bhrātarāveva tasyā nyaṣedhatāṃ dhārtarāṣṭrārthamugrau |
| jitvā'vantyau tau nṛpatīṃ ścaiva sarvānādāya tāṃ prayayau vāsudevaḥ | pitṛṣvasustanayāṃ ca dvitīyāṃ bhadrāṃ dattāmagrahīd bhrātṛbhiḥ saḥ |
| viśveṣāṃ devānāmavatārā hipañca te kaikeyā bhrātaro'syā hareśca | bhaktā nityaṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ ca tāto'pyeṣāṃ vaśe śaivyanāmarbhuragre |
| svayambaro lakṣaṇāyāstathā'sīd yathā draupadyā lakṣavedhātmakaḥ saḥ | madreṣu tasyāṇsca pitā pinākaṃ svayambarārthaṃ jagṛhe girīśāt |
| lakṣaṃ ca tat sarvataśchannameva dvāraṃ śarasyāpyupari sma lakṣāt | chinneṣuṇā pātanīyaṃ ha taddhi draupadyarthāt tadaśakyaṃ tato'lam |
| tatrā'jagmurmāgadhādyāṇsca sarve pārthā api draṣṭumihābhyupāyayuḥ | duryodhanādyāṇsca sasūtaputrā sajyīkartuṃ dhanurapyutsahante |
| kecinnipeturdhanuṣaiva tāḍit ā na vai keciccālayituṃ ca śekuḥ | duryodhano māgadhaḥ sūtaputraḥ sajyaṃ kṛtvā lakṣavīkṣāṃ na śekuḥ |
| dhanañjayaḥ svātmabalaṃ prakāṇsayan sajyaṃ kṛtvā dhanuraikṣacca lakṣam | naivā'dade bāṇamanicchayaiva tat prāpyāṃ j ānan keśavenaiva tāṃ ca |
| bhīmaścāpaṃ lakṣamapyetadatra draṣṭuṃ ca naivaicchadarīndradhāriṇaḥ | yogye karmaṇyāyataṃ ścāparādhī syādityajaḥ paśyamāno mahātmā |
| kṛṣṇastataścāpamadhijyamāṇsu kṛtvā'cintyaśchinnabāṇena lakṣam | apātayad dundubhayaśca divyā neduḥ prasūnaṃ vavṛṣuḥ surāṇsca |
| kṛṣṇe brahmādyaiḥ stūyamāne narendrakanyā mālāṃ keśavāṃ se nidhāya | ccxli.tasthāvupāsyātha sarve narendrā yuddhāyāguḥ keśavaṃ svāttaśastrāḥ |
| vidrāpya tan māgadhādīn sa kṛṣṇo bhīmārjunābhyāṃ sahitaḥ purīṃ svām | yayāvetā aṣṭa mahāmahiṣyaḥ kṛṣṇasya divyā lokasundarya iṣṭāḥ |
| bhaiṣmī satyā caikatanurdvidhaiva jātā bhūmau prakṛtirmūlabhūtā | tayaivānyāḥ sarvadā'nupraviṣṭāstāsāṃ madhye jāmbavatī pradhānā |
| rāmeṇa tulyā jāmbavatī priyatve kṛṣṇasyānyāḥ kiñcidūnāṇsca tasyāḥ | yadā'veśo bahulaḥ syād ramāyāstadā tāsu prīyate keśavo'lam |
| yadā'veśo hrāsamupaiti tatra pradyumnato viṃ śaguṇādhikāḥ syuḥ | anāditastāḥ keśavānnānyasaṃ sthā reme tābhiḥ keśavo dvāravatyām |
| evaṃ kṛṣṇe dvārakāmadhyasaṃ sthe giriṃ bhūpā raivatakaṃ samāyayuḥ | duryodhanādyāḥ pāṇḍavāṇscaiva sarve nānādeśyā yecabhūpālasaṅghāḥ |
| ātmānaṃ t ān draṣṭumabhyāgatān sa kṛṣṇo girau raivatake dadarśa | namaskṛte sarvanarendramukhyaiḥ kṛṣṇe vaidarbhyā saha divyāsanasthe |
| etyā'kāṇsānnāradaḥ kṛṣṇamāha sarvottamastvaṃ tvādṛśo nāsti kaścit | ityāṇscaryo dhanya ityeva śabdadvaye tūkte vāsudevastamāha |
| dakṣiṇābhiḥ sākamityeva kṛṣṇaṃ papracchuretat kimiti sma bhūpāḥ | nārāyaṇo munimūce vadeti śṛṇudhvamityāha sa nārado'pi |
| kūrmo dṛṣṭo viṣṇupadyāṃ mayoktastvamuttamo nāsti samastaveti | ūce gaṅgāmuttamāṃ sā jaleśamumāmūce pṛthivīnāmikāṃ saḥ |
| yā mādṛśā devatāḥ sarvaśastā dhṛt āstayā prathitatvāt pṛthivyā | śivaṃ śeṣaṃ garuḍaṃ cā'ha sā'pi paravānāt parvatanāmadheyān |
| tairevāhaṃ matsamāṇscaiva devyo dhriyanta ityeva ta ūcire'tha | brahmāṇamevottamamāha so'pi vedātmikāṃ prakṛtiṃ viṣṇupatnīm |
| ccxlii.saikā devī bahurūpā babhāṣe yuktā yadā'haṃ j ñena nārāyaṇena | yajñakriyāmāninī yajñanāmnī tadottamā tatpraveśāt tadākhyā |
| viṣṇvāviṣṭā yajñanāmnī tadaṅkasthitā soce keśavo hyuttamo'lam | na tatsamaścādhiko'taḥ kutaḥ syādṛṣe satyaṃ nānyatheti sma bhūyaḥ |
| tayokto'haṃ nāvatāreṣu kaścid viśeṣa ityeva yadupravīram | sarvottamo'sītyavadaṃ sa cā'ha na kevalaṃ me'ṅkagāyāḥ śriyo'ham |
| sadottamaḥ kintu yadā tu sā me vāmārddharūpā dakṣiṇānāmadheyā | yasmāt tasyā dakṣiṇataḥ sthito'haṃ tasmānnāmnā dakṣiṇetyeva sā syāt |
| sā dakṣiṇāmāninī devatā casā ca sthitā bahurūpā madarddhā | vāmārddho me tatpraviṣṭo yato hi tato'haṃ syāmarddhanārāyaṇākhyaḥ |
| tadā'pyasyā uttamo'haṃ supūrṇo namādṛśaḥ kaścidastyuttamo vā | ityevāvādīd dakṣiṇābhiḥ saheti sarvottamatvaṃ dakṣiṇānāṃ smarantsaḥ |
| t ābhiścaitābhirdakṣiṇābhiḥ sametād variṣṭho'haṃ jagataḥ sarvadaiva | matsāmarthyānnaiva cānantabhāgo dakṣiṇānāṃ vidyate nāradeti |
| uktaṃ kṛṣṇenāpratimena bhūpā anyottamatvaṃ dakṣiṇānāṃ ca śaśvat | seyaṃ bhaiṣmī dakṣiṇā keśavo'yaṃ tasyāḥ śreṣṭhaḥ paśyata rājasaṅghāḥ |

| pratyakṣaṃ vo vīryamasyāpi kuntyā yudhe'rthitaḥ keśavo vīryamasyai | adarśayat pāṇḍavān dhārtarāṣṭrān bhīṣmadroṇadrauṇikṛpān sakarṇān | nirāyudhāṃ ścakra ekaḥ kṣaṇena lokaśreṣṭhān daivatairapyajeyān |
| vrataṃ bhīmasyāsti naivābhi kṛṣṇamiyāmiti smā'jñayā tasya viṣṇoḥ | cakraṃ rathasyāgrahīt sa praṇamya kṛṣṇaṃ sa taṃ keśavo'pāharacca |
| evaṃ krīḍanto'pyātmaśaktyā prayatnaṃ kurvantaste vijitāḥ keśavena | tataḥ sarve nemurasmai pṛthā ca savismayā vāsudevaṃ nanāma |
| evaṃ vidhānyadbhutānīha kṛṣṇe dṛṣṭāni vaḥ śatasāhasraśaśca | ccxliii.tasmādeṣa hyadbhuto'tyuttamaścetyuktā nemuste'khilā vāsudevam |
| vāyvājñayā vāyuśiṣyaḥ sa satyamityādyuktvā nārado rugmiṇīṃ ca | stutvā puṣpaṃ pārijātasya datvā yayau lokaṃ kṣipramabjodbhavasya |
| sākṣāt satyā rugmiṇītyekasaṃ vid dvidhābhūtā nātra bhedo'sti kaścit | tathā'pi sā pramadānāṃ svabhāvaprakāṇsanārthaṃ kupitevā'sa satyā |
| sākaṃ rugmiṇyā rājamadhye praveśāt stavādṛṣeḥ puṣpadānācca devīm | kopānanaṃ darśayantīmuvāca viḍambārthaṃ kāmijanasya kṛṣṇaḥ |
| dātāsmyahaṃ pārijātaṃ taruṃ ta ityeva tatrāthā'gamad vāsavo'pi | sarvairdevairbhaumajito'pyadityāstenaivātho kuṇḍalābhyāṃ hṛt ābhyām |
| tadaivā'gurmunayastena tunnā badaryāste sarva evā'śu kṛṣṇam | yayācire bhaumavadhāya natvā stutvā stotrairvaidikaistāntrikaiśca |
| indreṇa devaiḥ sahitena yācito vipraiśca sasmāra vihaṅgarājam | āgamya natvā purataḥ sthitaṃ tamāruhya satyāsahito yayau hariḥ |
| nityaiva yā prakṛtiḥ svecchayaiva jagacchikṣārthaṃ dvādaśīṃ bhīmasañjñām | upoṣya babhre koṭidhārājalasya viṣṇoḥ prītyarthaṃ saiva hi satyabhāmā |
| tayā yukto garuḍaskandhasaṃ stho dūrānuyāto vajrabhṛt ā'pyanujñām | datvā'muṣmai prayayau vāyujuṣṭāmāṇsāṃ kṛṣṇo bhaumavadhe dhṛt ātmā |
| bhaumo hyāsīd brahmavarādavadhyo na śastrabhṛjjīyasa ityamuṣmai | datto varo brahmaṇā tadvadeva tasyāmātyānāṃ tadvadavadhyatā ca|
| bhaumena jayyatvamapi hyamīṣāṃ dattaṃ bhaumāya brahmaṇā kroḍarūpāt | viṣṇorjātāyāsya durgaṃ ca dattaṃ prāgjyotiṣaṃ nāma puraṃ samastaiḥ |

| āsīd bāhye giridurgaṃ tadantaḥ pānīyadurgaṃ mauravaṃ pāṇsadurgam | tasyāpyantaḥ kṣuradhāropamaṃ tat pāṇsāṇsca te ṣaṭsahasrāṇsca ghorāḥ | abhedyatvamaribhiratāryatā ca dattā durgāṇāṃ brahmaṇā'rādhitena |
| ccxliv.tasyāmātyāḥ pīṭhamurau nisumbhahayagrīvau pañcajanaśca śūrāḥ | saṅkalpya tān lokapālānahaṃ ca brahmetyaddhā bhāṣamāṇaḥ sa āste |
| hantuṃ kṛṣṇo narakaṃ tatra gatvā giridurgaṃ gadayā nirbibheda | vāyavyāstreṇodakaṃ śoṣayitvā cakarta khaḍgena murasya pāṇsān |
| athābhipeturmurapīṭhau nisumbhahayagrīvau pañcajanaśca daityāḥ | t āñchailaśastrāstraśilābhivarṣiṇaṇscakre vyasūṃ ścakranikṛttakandharān |
| teṣāṃ sutāḥ saptasaptoruvīryā varādavadhyā giriśasyābhipetuḥ | t ānastraśastrābhimucaḥ śarottamaiḥ samarpayāmāsa sa mṛtyave'cyutaḥ |
| hatvā pañcatriṃ śato mantriputrān jagāma bhaumasya sakāṇsamāṇsu | śrutvā bhaumaḥ kṛṣṇamāyātamārādakṣohiṇītriṃ śakenābhyayāt tam |

| jaghne senāṃ garuḍaḥ pakṣapātaiḥ pādaṃ śeṣāṃ keśavaḥ sāyakaughaiḥ | athā'sasādā'śu bhaumo'cyutaṃ taṃ muñcañcharānastrasammantritān drāk | vivyādha taṃ keśavaḥ sāyakaughairbhaumaḥ śataghnīṃ brahmadattāmamuñcat |
| acchedyo'bhedyo nityasaṃ vitsukhātmā nityāvyayaḥ pūrṇaṇsaktiḥ sa kṛṣṇaḥ | nigīrya tāṃ devavaraḥ śataghnīṃ nityāṇsrānto'darśayacchrāntavacca |
| bahūn varān brahmaṇo'nyeṣvamoghān moghīkṛt ān vīkṣya parātpareśaḥ | bhavet kathañcid bahumānena yukta ityeva kṛṣṇo'darśayacchrāntavat svam |
| tadā dṛptaṃ narakaṃ vīkṣya devī satyā'dade kārmukaṃ śārṅgasañjñam | cakāra taṃ yatamānaṃ ca bhaumaṃ nirāyudhaṃ virathaṃ ca kṣaṇena |
| āliṅgya kṛṣṇaḥ satyabhāmāṃ punaśca rathāntare saṃ sthitaṃ bhaumamugram | sṛjantamastrāṇyariṇā nikṛttakandhaṃ mṛtyorarpayāmāsa śīghram |
| sa mantribhirmantriputraiḥ sameto jagāma kṛṣṇāvajñayā'ndhaṃ tamaśca | tadāviṣṭo vāyuragācca kṛṣṇamantaḥ puraṃ prāviśat satyayeśaḥ |
| ccxlv.tadā bhūmiḥ pañcabhūtāvarā yā yasyāṃ jajñe narakaḥ śrīvarāhāt | mūlaprakṛtyaiva bhūmyā nitāntamāviṣṭā yā sā'gamat kṛṣṇapādau |
| sā'dityāste kuṇḍale pādayośca nidhāya pautraṃ bhagadattasañjñam | samarpayāmāsa tasyābhiṣekaṃ prāgjyotiṣe kārayāmāsa kṛṣṇaḥ |
| saṃ sthāpya taṃ sarvakirātarājye bhaumāhṛtaṃ vaiśravaṇād balena | śivena dattaṃ dhanadāyātisattvaṃ bhagadatte nyadadhāt supratīkam |
| karīndramekaṃ taṃ nidhāyaiva tasmin kṛtvā prasādaṃ ca vasundharāyāḥ | caturdantān ṣaṭsahasrān karīndrān payobdhijān prāhiṇod dvāravatyai |
| narādhipān devagandharvanāgān jitvā'nītaṃ hemaratnoccarāṇsim | śatadvayaṃ yojanānāṃ samṛddhaṃ samantataḥ prāhiṇot svāṃ purīṃ saḥ |
| mahāvīryairnairṛtai rākṣasendrairbhaumānītairnirṛtiṃ yodhayitvā | sa prāhiṇot sarvaratnoccarāṇsiṃ gajāṃ śca nārāyaṇa ādidevaḥ |
| tatrāpaśyat kanyakā bhūmipānāṃ bhaumānīt āḥ samare tān vijitya | dvyaṣṭau sahasrāṇi śataṃ ca rūpaśīlodārā akṣatāḥ sadvratasthāḥ |
| kāṇscit tatrā'san devagandharvakanyāstāsāṃ pradhānā tvaṣṭṛputrī kaśeruḥ | putrā agneḥ pūrvamāsaṃ śca te'tha strītvaprāptyai cakrurugraṃ tapaśca |
| bhāryātvārthe vāsudevasya yoṣittanuṃ t āsāmicchatīnāṃ samīraḥ | adād varaṃ tapasā'rādhitaḥ san strībhūtāste badarīṃ sa prajagmuḥ |
| nārāyaṇaṃ tatra śuśrūṣamāṇāḥ prāpyāpsarastvaṃ rājakuleṣu jātāḥ | kāṇscit svarge tā niśāmyaiva kṛṣṇaṃ vavruḥ patiṃ sarvaguṇābhirāmam |
| ājānadevaiḥ sarvaguṇaiḥ samāstāḥ svabhāvato'thendirāveśato'taḥ | guṇādhikāstāḥ śibikāsu kṛṣṇa āropayitvā prāhiṇod dvāravatyai |
| samantato yojanānāṃ śate dve pravṛddhamindrasya sa ratnaparvatam | nityāmṛtasrāvi jaleśvarasya cchatraṃ ca dorbhyāṃ garuḍe nyadhāddhariḥ |
| ccxlvi.svayaṃ ca satyāsahitaḥ samāruhat sa cāṇsrameṇaiva yayau triviṣṭapam | abhiprayāto'khilalokapālairjanārdanaḥ śakragṛhaṃ viveśa |
| sampūjitaḥ satyabhāmāsahāyaḥ śakreṇa ṇsacyā sahitena sādaram | dadāvadityā api kuṇḍale śubhe samastadevairmunibhiśca vanditaḥ |
| tamāsurāveśavaśādajānatī satyāṃ ca sarvaprabhavau jagatprabhū | nirdoṣasaukhyaikatanū ṇsubhāṇsiṣastābhyāṃ dadau sā'ditirātmaputravat |
| atho sadānandacidātmadehaḥ na nandanodyānamajo'nurūpayā | anantaśaktiḥ saha satyabhāmayā viveśa rantuṃ priyayā'khileśvaraḥ |
| tayā'cyuto'sau kanakāvadātayā sukuṅkumādigdhapiśaṅgavāsasā | pūrṇendukoṭyoghajayanmukhābjayā reme'mitātmā jagadekasundaraḥ |
| sarvartunityoditasarvavaibhave suratnacāmīkaravṛkṣasadvane | sadaiva pūrṇenduvirājite hariścacāra devyā pavanānusevite |
| vidoṣasaṃ vittanuratra sattaruṃ dadarśa satyā'mṛtamanthanodbhavam | sā pārijātaṃ maṇikāñcanātmakaṃ samastakāmapradamārtihāriṇam |
| dṛṣṭvaiva taṃ susmitacandrikāsphuranmukhāravindā'sitalolalocanā | kapolanirbhātacalatsukuṇḍalā jagāda devādhipatiṃ patiṃ satī |
| tarurjagajjīvada me gṛhāṅgaṇe saṃ sthāpanīyo'yamacintyapauruṣa | itīritastāṃ kalaśopamastanīmāliṅgya devastarumudbabarha |
| sa tena vṛkṣeṇa sahaiva keśavastayā cadevyā'ruhadagryapauruṣam | khageśvaraṃ tacca niśamya śacyā pracodito vāsava āgamat suraiḥ |
| t ānāsurāveśayutān hareśca balaprakāṇsāya samudyatān surān | nyavārayacchārṅgaśarāsanacyutairharipriyā bāṇavaraiḥ samastaśaḥ |
| nirāyudhaṃ vaiśravaṇaṃ cakāra cikṣepa cābdhau garuḍo jaleśvaram | ccxlvii.pradhānavāyostanayaṃ tu vāyuṃ koṇādhipaṃ vahniyamādikānapi |
| vibodhya śārṅgottharavaiḥ svakāṃ tanumāveśitānāmasurairagāddhariḥ | te bodhitāstena raṇaṃ visṛjya yayurviditvā tamanādipūruṣam |
| śivaṃ ca śakrārthamupāgataṃ harirvyadrāvayacchārṅgaviniḥ sṛtaiḥ śaraiḥ | savāhano dūratare nipātito gurutmatā ṇsambhuragāccharāhataḥ |
| vidrāvite bāṇagaṇaiśca śauriṇā hare harau vajramavāsṛjad drutam | śakro'grahīt taṃ prahasan janārdanaḥ kareṇa vāmena ca cāpajagmivān |
| apāhasat taṃ jagadekasundarī haripriyā'tho jagadekamātaram | uvāca śakro jagatāṃ janitre pradarśayāmo vayamātmaśaiśavam |
| jagāma cātho śaraṇaṃ janārdanaṃ surairvṛto devapatiḥ kṣamāpayan | śṛṅgaṃ ca datvā maṇiparvatasya praṇamya devyā sahitaṃ jagadgurum |
| yayāca enaṃ parirakṣaṇāya śacīpatiḥ keśavamarjunasya | jagāda kṛṣṇo'pi dharātal . asthite na mayyamuṃ kaścana jeṣyatīti |
| tamarjunārthaṃ varamāpya vāsavaḥ punaḥ punaścakradharaṃ praṇamya | prasannadṛṣṭyā hariṇā'bhivīkṣito yayau mahābhāgavataḥ svamālayam |
| kṛṣṇo'pyanujñāpya purandaraṃ purīṃ nijāṃ vrajannabhyadhikaṃ vyarocata | kirīṭadhārī varakuṇḍalollasanmukhāmbujaḥ pītapaṭaḥ sukaustubhaḥ |
| virocamānasya sadā jagatprabhornavai viśeṣaḥ kvacidacyutasya | tathā'pi tat smārayituṃ vaco bhavedapekṣya cālpajñamatiṃ purāṇagam |
| praviśya ceśaḥ svapurīṃ sa yādavaiḥ supūjito'ntaḥ purametya cāṅgaṇe | taruṃ priyāyā nyadadhād gṛhasya sahaiva śṛṅgeṇa ca ratnasadgireḥ |
| pradāya ratnāni ca sarvasāttvatāṃ yatheṣṭatastā api kanyakāḥ prabhuḥ | udvāhya reme pṛthageva ratnaprāsādasaṃ sthābhiranantarūpaḥ |
| ccxlviii.pṛthakpṛthak tāsu daśaiva putrakānadhatta kanyāmapi sarvaśaḥ prabhuḥ | pradyumnasāmbāvapi bhānucārudeṣṇau ca teṣāṃ nitarāṃ guṇādhikāḥ |
| vivasvato yo'varajo'diteḥ sutaḥ khyātaśca nāmnā saviteti kṛṣṇāt | j ātaḥ sa satyājaṭhare'tra nāmnā bhānustu bhaiṣmyā api cārudeṣṇaḥ |
| sa cārudeṣṇo'pi hi vighnarājo ye'nye ca kṛṣṇasya sutāḥ samastāḥ | te caiva gīrvāṇagaṇāstathā'nye ye dvārakāyāṃ nivasanti sarve |
| tasyāṃ samastairabhipūjyamāne deve svapuryāṃ nivasatyanante | yayau kadācit sa tu raugmiṇeyaḥ sāmbena sārdhaṃ bhujagendralokam |
| ajñānatastairabhiyodhitaḥ sa jigāya sarvānapi vāsukiṃ ca | vidrāpya bāṇairatha ratnasañcayān samādade nemuramuṃ tataste |
| taiḥ pūjitaḥ sāmbasahāya āṇsu mayaṃ ca māyāvinamastravarṣaiḥ | vijitya rundhānamanena pūjito yayau rathenāmbaragena nākam |
| tatraiva kṛṣṇena tu pārijāte hṛte jayantaṃ prajigāya cā'jau | saṃ spardhayā'yātamamuṣya cānujaṃ sāmbo'jayad vṛṣabhaṃ nāma śastraiḥ |
| astrāṇi tāvastravarairnihatya tayośca tābhyāṃ pratidagdhayānau | vidrāpya tau bāṇavaraiḥ surendrasampūjitau yayaturvidyayā khe |
| sa vidyayā sāmbamudūhya ratyā pradattayā rugmiṇinandanaḥ purīm | yayau tato nārada āgamad drutaṃ j ñātuṃ harerbahubhāryāsu vṛttim |
| taṃ dvyaṣṭasāhasragṛheṣu dṛṣṭvā tāvatsvarūpairviharantamekam | suvismitaḥ prayayau taṃ praṇamya śakraprasthaṃ pūjitaścātra pārthaiḥ |
| sa ājñayā brahmaṇa āha kṛṣṇāṃ kramāt kartuṃ bhīma evaikasaṃ sthām | anyā devīḥ svāpayitvā ṇsarīre tasyā bhāratyāḥ pūrṇabhogārthameva |
| sundopasundau bhrātarau brahmavākyāt parasparādanyato naiva vadhyau | tilottamārthe nihatau parasparaṃ tayorvadhārthe sṛṣṭayā tena daityau |
| ccxlix.ataḥ pṛthag vatsarato bhavatsu kramāt kṛṣṇā tiṣṭhatāṃ yo'nyayuktām | paśyed vo'sau vatsaraṃ tīrthayātrāṃ kuryāditi smātha cakrustathā te|
| tataḥ kadācid dharmarājena yuktāṃ śastrāgāre vipragorakṣaṇārtham | śastrāditsuḥ phalguno'drāk sa śastrairdasyūn hatvā tīrthayātronmukho'bhūt |
| yudhiṣṭhirādyaiḥ sauhṛdād vārito'pi yayau satyārthaṃ sa kadācid dyunadyām | kurvan snānaṃ māyayā nāgavadhvā hṛto lokaṃ bhujagānāṃ kṣaṇena |
| tasyāḥ pitā garuḍenā'ttapatyuḥ putrākāṅkṣī codayāmāsa pārtham | saṃ vatsarabrahmacarye tu pārthaiḥ kṛṣṇāhetoḥ samaye sādhu baddham |
| punaḥ punaryācyamānaḥ sa pārthaḥ putrārthamasyā bhujagena tasyām | utpādayāmāsa sutaṃ kujāṃ śaṃ nāmnairāvantaṃ varuṇāveśayuktam |
| guṇāḥ piturmātṛj ātiḥ sutānāṃ yasmāt satāṃ prāyaśastena nāgaḥ | balī ca pārthaprathamodbhavatvānmāyāvidastrī ca sudhārmikaśca |
| tato yayāvarjunastīrthayātrākrameṇa pāṇḍyāṃ stanayo'sya mātrā | saha tyakto bhujagairdevaloke sampūjito nyavasad daivataiśca |
| satyātyayānnaiva doṣo'rjunasya tejīyasaścintanīyaḥ kathañcit | śreṣṭhāparādhānnānyadoṣasya lepastejīyasāṃ nirṇayo'yaṃ hi śāstre |
| atisnehāccāgrajābhyāṃ tadasya kṣāntaṃ sutā pāṇḍyarājena dattā | saṃ vatsarānte phalgunasyābhirūpā citrāṅgadā vīrasenena toṣāt |
| sa vīrasenastvaṣṭuraṃ śo yamasyāpyāveśayuk sā ca kanyā ṇsacī hi| t ārādehe sūryajasyāṅgasaṅgāt svargaṃ nāgādantarikṣādihā'sīt |
| tenaiva hetornātisāmīpyamāsīt tasyāḥ pārthe putrikāputradharmā | tasyāṃ j āto babhruvāho'rjunena pūrvaṃ jayantaḥ kāmadevāṃ śayuktaḥ |
| putraṃ vīraṃ janayitvā'rjuno'to gacchan prabhāsaṃ śāpato grāhadehāḥ | ccl.amūmucaccāpsarasaḥ sa pañca tābhirgṛhītaḥ pravikṛṣya tīram |
| evaṃ hi tāsāṃ śāpamokṣaḥ pradatto yadā'khilā vo yugapat samprakarṣet | ekastadā nijarūpāptirevetyalaṃ tuṣṭena brāhmaṇenā'natānām |
| viprāpahāsāt kutsitayonitastāḥ kanyātīrthe pāṇḍavaḥ sampramucya | prāptaḥ prabhāsaṃ vāsudevānujātāṃ śuśrāva rāmeṇa suyodhanodyatām |
| vicintya kāryaṃ yatirūpaṃ gṛhītvā kuśasthalīṃ prayayau taṃ samīpe | prāptaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ prāhasat saṃ vijānan satyāsahāyaḥ śayanīyādhirūḍhaḥ |
| sarvajñā sā līlayā hāsahetumapṛcchat taṃ so'pi tasyai babhāṣe | līl ābhājau darśanārthaṃ punastāvagacchatāṃ raivataṃ śailarājam |
| ākrīḍo'sau vṛṣṇibhojāndhakānāṃ tatrāpaśyat keśavaḥ phalgunaṃ tam | svasurdāne sa pratijñāṃ raho'smai cakre kṛṣṇo'thā'sadat sarvavṛṣṇīn |
| dṛṣṭvā girau rauhiṇeyo yatīndraveṣaṃ pārthaṃ j ñātiyuktaḥ praṇamya | cakre pūjāṃ phalguno'pi praṇāmaṃ guṇajyeṣṭho'sīti cakre balāya |
| sarvajñaṃ taṃ vāgminaṃ vīkṣya rāmaḥ kanyāgāre varṣakāle nivāsam | satkārapūrvaṃ kārayetyāha kṛṣṇaṃ naivetyūce keśavo doṣavādī |
| yuvā balī darśanīyo'tivāgmī nāyaṃ yogyaḥ kanyakāgāravāsam | ityuktavantaṃ rāma āhā'ptavidye nāsmiñchaṅketyeva lokādhinātham |
| nāsmanmate rocate tvanmataṃ tu sarveṣāṃ naḥ pūjyamevāstu tena | ityuktvā taṃ keśavaḥ sodarāyai śuśrūṣasvetyāha santaṃ yatīndram |
| nityāpramattā sādhu santoṣayeti proktā tathā sā'karot so'pi tatra | cakre māsān vārṣikān satkathābhirvāsaṃ vākyaṃ śraddadhāno harestat |
| saṃ yācitaḥ phalgunenā'ha vākyaṃ yad vāsudevastanna jānāti kaścit | ṛte pitrorvipṛthoḥ sātyakervā subhadrāṃ te pradadānīti satyam |
| ccli.astre śastre tattvavidyāsu caiva śiṣyaḥ śaineyo vāsudevendrasūnvoḥ | tasmādasmai kathayāmāsa kṛṣṇaḥ svaśiṣyatvād vipṛthoścāpi sarvam |
| anye sarve vāsudevasya pārthān priyān nityaṃ j ānamānā api sma | rāmeṇā'diṣṭā uddhavo'thā'hukādyā hārdikyādyā naiva ditsanti jiṣṇoḥ |
| duryodhane dātumicchanti sarve rāmapriyārthaṃ j ānamānā harestat | apyapriyaṃ rākṣasāveśayuktāstasmāt sarvān vañcayāmāsa kṛṣṇaḥ |
| pradyumnasāmbapramukhāṇsca vañcitā yayustīrthārthaṃ rāmayuktāḥ samagrāḥ | piṇḍoddhāraṃ tatra mahotsaveṣvāvartatsu kvacidūce subhadrā |
| yate tīrthānācaran bāndhavāṃ stvamadrākṣīrnaḥ kaccidiṣṭān sma pārthān | kuntīṃ kṛṣṇāṃ cetyāha pṛṣṭaḥ sa pārtha Oṃ ityeteṣāmāha cānāmayaṃ saḥ |
| bhūyaḥ sā'vādīd bhagavannindrasūnurgatastīrthārthaṃ brāhmaṇebhyaḥ śruto me | kaccid dṛṣṭo bhavatetyomiti sma pārtho'pyūce kveti sā'pṛcchadenam |
| atraiveti smayamānaṃ ca pārthaṃ punaḥ punaḥ paryapṛcchacchubhāṅgī | so'pyāhonmatte so'smi hīti smayaṃ stāṃ phullākṣī taṃ sā dadarśātihṛṣṭā |
| tato harṣāllajjayā cotpalākṣī kiñcinnoce pārtha enāmuvāca | kāmāviṣṭo mukhyakālo hyayaṃ nāvudvāhārthoktastviti sā cainamāha |
| nātikramo vāsudevasya yuktastasmāt tena svapitṛbhyāṃ ca dattām | yukto nijairbandhubhiścotsave māṃ samudvahetyatha kṛṣṇaṃ sa dadhyau |
| mātāpitṛbhyāṃ sahito'tha kṛṣṇastatraivā'yād vāsavaścātha śacyā | samaṃ munīndraiḥ phalgunena smṛtaḥ saṃ statraivā'gāt prītiyukto niśāyām |
| kṛṣṇastataḥ puruhūtena sākaṃ tayorvivāhaṃ kārāyāmāsa samyak | mātāpitṛbhyāṃ satyakinā'pi yukto mahotsave'nyāvidito munīndraiḥ |
| tataḥ kṛṣṇaḥ syandanaṃ phalgunārthe nidhāya svaṃ prayayau tadrajanyām | gate ca śakre rathamāruroha prātaḥ pārthaḥ sahito bhāryayaiva |
| cclii.sarvāyudhairyuktarathaṃ samāsthite gṛhītacāpe phalgune dvāravatyām | āsīd rāvaḥ kiṅkimetat tridaṇḍī kanyāṃ haratyeṣa kodaṇḍapāṇiḥ |
| tatastu taṃ satanutraṃ mahendradatte divye kuṇḍale vāsasī ca| divyāni ratnāni ca bhūṣaṇāni dṛṣṭvā bibhrāṇaṃ rakṣiṇo'vārayan sma |
| tataḥ sa ābaddhatal . āṅgulitraḥ satūṇīraścāpamāyamya bāṇaiḥ | cakre'ntarikṣaṃ pradiśo diśaśca nirantaraṃ śikṣayā vidyayā ca|
| cakre sārathyaṃ keśavenaitadarthe suśikṣit ā tasya samyak subhadrā | tayā pārtho vārito naiva kañcit bhinnatvacaṃ kṛtavān krīḍamānaḥ |
| sa śikṣayā tvadbhutayā ṇsaraughairvidrāpya tān bhīṣayitvaiva sarvān | nirgatya puryā vipṛthuṃ dadarśa rāmeṇa puryā rakṣaṇe sanniyuktam |
| priyaṃ kurvanniva rāmasya so'pi vyājena pārthaṃ senayaivā'vṛṇot tam | kṛṣṇādeśānnaiva pārthasya cakre samyagrodhaṃ yuyudhe ca cchalena |
| eko hyasau marutāṃ saumyanāmā ṇsuśrūṣārthaṃ vāsudevasya jātaḥ | taṃ yādavaṃ śaravarṣairvavarṣa yathā kṣataṃ na bhavet savyasācī |
| nirāyudhaṃ virathaṃ caiva cakre pārthaḥ senāṃ tasya naivāhanacca | dṛṣṭvā ṇsarāṃ stasya tīkṣṇāṃ stvaco'pi nacchedakān vipṛthuḥ santutoṣa |
| śikṣāṃ pārthasyādhikaṃ mānayāna upetya pārthaṃ ca śaśaṃ sa sarvam | ājñāṃ viṣṇoḥ sanniyuddhyannivāsmai kṛtt āyudhaḥ phalgunenaiva pūrvam |
| tataḥ parājitavacchīghrametya śaśaṃ sa sarvaṃ haline'tha so'pi | pradyumnasāmbādiyuto'tha kopādāyāt purīṃ hantukāmo'rjunaṃ ca |
| kṛṣṇo'pi sarvaṃ vipṛthorniśamya prāptaḥ sudharmāṃ vimanā ivā'sīt | avāṅmukhastatra yadupravīrāḥ pradyumnādyā āhuruccairnadantaḥ |
| māyāvrataṃ taṃ vinihatya śīghraṃ vayaṃ subhadrāmānayāmaḥ kṣaṇena | ccliii.ityuktavākyānavadad balastān kṛṣṇājñayā yāntu na svecchayaiva |
| j ñātavyametasya mataṃ purastāddharervirodhe na jayo bhaved vaḥ | ityuktavākye halini sma sarve papracchurānamya janārdanaṃ tam |
| athābravīd vāsudevo'mitaujāḥ śṛṇvantu sarve vacanaṃ madīyam | puraivoktaṃ tanmayā kanyakāyā māyāvrato nārhati sannidhisthitim |
| t āṃ me vācaṃ nāgrahīdagrajo'yaṃ bahūn doṣān vyāharato'pyato mayā | anullaṅghyatvādagrajo'nupravṛttaḥ kanyāgṛhe vāsane kūṭabuddheḥ |
| atītaścāyaṃ kāryayogo'samakṣaṃ hṛt ā kanyā'to no'tra kā mānahāniḥ | bhūyastarāṃ māninastasya sā syājjñātā ca vo vipṛthoḥ pārthatā'sya |
| deyā ca kanyā nāsti pārthena tulyo varo'smākaṃ kauraveyaśca pārthaḥ | pautraśca kṛṣṇasya supūrṇaṇsakteḥ paitṛṣvaseyo vīratamo guṇāḍhyaḥ |
| arthyo'smābhiḥ svayamevāharat sa śakrātmajo nātra naḥ kāryahāniḥ | anudrutyainaṃ yadi ca syāt parājayo hānirdṛḍhaṃ yaśaso vo bhaveta |
| jitvā yadyenaṃ kanyakā cā'hṛt ā cet parāmṛṣṭāṃ naiva kaściddhi lipset | ato na me rocate vo'nuyānamityūcivānāsa tūṣṇīṃ pareśaḥ |
| śrutvā halī kṛṣṇavākyaṃ babhāṣe mā yāta cittaṃ viditaṃ mamāsya | asyānuvṛttirvijayāya naḥ syācchubhāya śāntyai parataśca muktyai |
| tato'rjuno yatra tiṣṭhan na kaścit parājayaṃ yāti kṛṣṇājñayaiva | rathena tenaiva yayau sabhāryaḥ śakraprasthaṃ cāviśad bhrātṛguptam |
| sambhāvito bhrātṛbhiścātituṣṭairūce'tha sarvaṃ teṣu yaccā'tmavṛttam | śānteṣu vākyādātmano yādaveṣu kṛṣṇo yukto halinā'gācca pārthān |
| sārddhaṃ yayau śakaṭai ratnapūrṇaiḥ śakraprasthaṃ pūjitastatra pārthaiḥ | dadau teṣāṃ t āni rāmeṇa yuktastathā kṛṣṇāyai bhūṣaṇāni svasuśca |
| ccliv.māsānuṣitvā katicid rauhiṇeyo yayau purīṃ svāṃ keśavo'trāvasacca | bahūn varṣān pāṇḍavaiḥ pūjyamānaḥ prītiṃ teṣāmādadhāno'dhikāṃ ca |
| āsan kṛṣṇāyāḥ pañca sutā guṇāḍhyā viśvedevāḥ pañcagandharvamukhyaiḥ | āviṣṭāste citrarathābhitāmrakiśoragopālabalaiḥ krameṇa |
| prativindhyaḥ sutasomaḥ śrutākhyakīrtiḥ śatānīka uta śrutakriyaḥ | yudhiṣṭhirādyaiḥ kramaśaḥ prajātāsteṣāṃ dvayoścāvarajo'bhimanyuḥ |
| candrāṃ śayukto'titarāṃ budho'sau jātaḥ subhadrājaṭhare'rjunena | dharmeraśakrāṃ śayuto'śvinośca tathaiva kṛṣṇasya sa sannidhānayuk |
| sarve'pi te vīryavantaḥ surūpā bhaktā viṣṇoḥ sarvaśāstreṣvabhijñāḥ | modaṃ yayuḥ pāṇḍavāstaiḥ sutaiśca viśeṣataḥ sāttvatīnandanena |
| tataḥ kadācit khāṇḍavaṃ kṛṣṇapārthau cikrīḍiṣū satyabhāmāsubhadre | ādāya yātau paricārakaiśca rathena gandharvarānugītau |
| svairaṃ tayostatra vikrīḍatośca strīratnābhyāṃ mandavātānujuṣṭe | vane prasūnastabakorurājite jale ca tigmadyutikanyakāyāḥ |

| viriñcaśarvavākyataḥ samastalokajāyini | sthite tu te jarāsute na setsyati kratūttamaḥ |
| cclxvi.itīrite rathāṅginā jagāda dharmanandanaḥ | nivartitaṃ manaḥ kratoralaṃ mamāmunā prabho |
| babhūvureva bhūbhṛto nacā'dhirājyamāpire | yadā ca cakravartinastadedṛśā naśatravaḥ |
| itīrite'munā'vadat pradhānamārutātmajaḥ | padaṃ caturmukhasya vā susādhyameva yatnataḥ |
| nijānubhāvavarjitā hareranugrahojjhitāḥ | mahāprayatnavarjitā janā na jagmurunnatim |
| sthiro'nubhāva eva me mahānanugraho hareḥ | prayatnamekamagrato nidhāya bhūtimāpnumaḥ |
| itīrite'munā hariḥ samudyamāt pradhānataḥ | sthite hi yajñakāraṇe vṛkodare jagāda ha |
| sa eka eva pūruṣo jarāsuto'dya vartate | samastasadvirodhināṃ balaṃ kaleranantaraḥ |
| tathā satāṃ samāṇsrayo yadudbhavāḥ satāṃ guṇāḥ | sa eka eva tādṛśastvayā vicintya yātyatām |
| yadi sma tena māgadho nihanyate satāṃ jayaḥ | viparyayeṇa cāsatāmiti sma viddhi nānyathā |
| sa pārameṣṭhyasatpadaṃ prayātyasaṃ śayaṃ yudhi | ya eva hanti māgadhaṃ sa vedadharmapālakaḥ |
| nihanti māgadheśvaraṃ ya eṣa vaiṣṇavaṃ jagat | karoti śarvapālito yataḥ sa bārhadrathaḥ |
| nihanti śaivanāyakaṃ ya eṣa vaiṣṇavāgraṇīḥ | iti sma bhāvasaṃ yute vadatyaje'bibhennṛpaḥ |
| cclxvii.yudhiṣṭhire bruvatyajaṃ makhena me tvalaṃ tviti | tamāha mārutātmajo nihanmi māgadhaṃ raṇe |
| itīrite'vadaddharirvrajāmahe vayaṃ trayaḥ | ahaṃ ca bhīmaphalgunau nihantumeva māgadham |
| vṛkodareṇa hanyate yadi sma māgadhādhipaḥ | makhaśca setsyate dhruvaṃ jagacca te vaśe bhavet |
| itīrite tu śauriṇā jagāda dharmanandanaḥ | sa śūrasenamaṇḍalaprahāṇato harestrasan |
| bhayāddhi yasya mādhuraṃ vihāya maṇḍalaṃ gatāḥ | bhavanta eva sāgaraṃ tato bibhemyahaṃ ripoḥ |
| imau hi bhīmaphalgunau mamākṣiṇī sadā prabho | manonibho bhavān sadā na vo vinā'smyataḥ pumān |
| ato na jīvitāt priyānahaṃ riporbalīyasaḥ | sakāṇsamātmahetutaḥ prayātayāmi vo vibho |
| itīrite'vadat punarvṛkodaro'rikakṣabhuk | yadīyanetṛkā ramāviriñcaśarvapūrvakāḥ |
| vaśe ca yasya tad balaṃ surāsuroragādinām | sa eṣa keśavaḥ prabhuḥ kva cāsya bārhadrathaḥ |
| adhṛṣyamasti me balaṃ hariḥ praṇāyako'sya ca | samastalokanetari prabhau hi sarvaśaktitā |
| ajeyatā tathā'rjune harervarodbhavā'sti hi | ato vayaṃ trayo'dya taṃ prayāma māgadhaṃ ripum |
| haniṣya eva māgadhaṃ hareḥ puro na saṃ śayaḥ | cclxviii.itīrite'munā harirjagāda dharmanandanam |
| vayaṃ trayaḥ sametya taṃ prayātayāma mṛtyave | haniṣyati sphuṭaṃ raṇe vṛkodaro jarāsutam |
| bhayaṃ na kāryameva te mayā hataḥ sa neti ha | mayā hinītihetutaḥ svayaṃ na hanyate ripuḥ |
| sa śarvasaṃ śrayāgraṇīrmadāṇsrayottamena tu | nihanyate yadā tadā prakāṇsitaṃ hi me balam |
| ato na śaṅkitaṃ manaḥ kuruṣva bhūpate kvacit | pradarśayāmi te'nujau nihatya māgadheśvaram |
| itīritaḥ sa viṣṇunā vicārya tadguṇān parān | tatheti cā'ha te trayaḥ pratasthurāṇsu māgadhān |
| sametya māgadhāṃ stu te śivoruliṅgamityalam | sumālyavastrabhūṣaṇaiḥ samarcitaṃ giriṃ yayuḥ |
| svaśīrṣato'pi cā'dṛtaṃ jarāsutena te girim | nyapātayanta bāhubhistamasya cottamāṅgavat |
| advārataste nagaraṃ praviśya māṣasya nāl . ena kṛt āstribherīḥ | puṣṭipradā bibhidustasya kīrtiśāstropamā nyakkṛtamāgadheśāḥ |
| tathā'paṇebhyo bahumālyagandhān prasahya saṅgṛhya śubhāṃ śca dadhruḥ | advāratastasya gṛhaṃ ca sasrurbhośabdatastaṃ ca nṛpaḥ prasasruḥ |
| t ān vipraveṣān sa niśāmya rājā mahābhujān snātakaveṣayuktān | dvitīyavarṇān pravicintya bāhūn jyākarkaśān vīkṣya babhāṣa etān |
| ke ṣṭhātha kiṃ hetuta āgatāṇsca kṛtaśca me parvataliṅgabhedanam | kṛtaṃ bhavadbhiḥ kuta eva durnayāḥ kṛt āstathā'nye dvijavaryaveṣaiḥ |
| cclxix.iti bruvāṇaṃ bhagavānuvāca kāryaṃ hi śatrorakhilaṃ pratīpam | ityukta ūce nahi vipraśatrurahaṃ kuto vo mama śatrutā bhavet |
| ityuktavākyaṃ nṛpatiṃ jagāda janārdano naiva hi tādṛśā dvijāḥ | vayaṃ ripuste'smi hi vāsudeva imau ca bhīmārjunanāmadheyau |
| yad bāndhavān naḥ piśitāṇsidharmato raudre makhe kalpayituṃ paśutve | icchasyare vedapathaṃ vihāya taṃ tvāṃ balācchāstumihā'gatā vayam |
| vimokṣayāmaḥ svajanān yadi tvaṃ na mocayasyadya nigṛhya ca tvām | muñcāthavā tānabhiyāhi vā'smān raṇāya martuṃ kṛtaniścayo'tra |
| itīrito'sau magadhādhipo ruṣā jagāda nāhaṃ śiva yāgayuktān | mokṣye paśūn yugapad vā krameṇa yotsye ca vo'thāpi camūsahāyān |
| nirāyudhaḥ sāyudho vā yuṣmadiṣṭāyudhena vā | eko'pi sakalairyotsye saseno vā sasainikān |
| ityuktavantamavadadajitorubalo hariḥ | ehyekameko vā'smāsu sasainyo vā raṇe nṛpa |
| yena kāmayase yoddhuṃ taṃ na āsādaya drutam | nirāyudhaḥ sāyudho vā tvadabhīṣṭāyudhena vā | ityā'ha bhagavāñchatruṃ yaśo bhīme vivarddhayan |
| ghātayitvā svaśatruṃ ca bhīmasenānugrahaṃ param | bhīmasya kartumicchaṃ śca bhaktijñānādivarddhanam |
| tṛṇīkartuṃ ripuṃ caiva nirāyudhatayā'gaman | kṛṣṇabhīmārjunāstena vipraveṣāṇsca te'bhavan |
| nirāyudhaḥ kṣatraveṣo naiva yogyaḥ kathañcana | tato jagmurvipraveṣāstṛṇīkartuṃ hi māgadham |
| māgadhasya sasainyasya svagṛhe saṃ sthitasya ca | cclxx.nirāyudhena bhīmena samāhvāne kṛte'mitam | dharmaṃ yaśaśca bhīmasya varddhayāmāsa keśavaḥ |
| tṛtīyamarjunaṃ caiva samādāya yayau ripum | haristasmācca bhīmasya mahādhikyaṃ prakāṇsayan | mukhena māgadhasyaiva vṛṇvekaṃ na iti bruvan |
| vṛṇvekamasmāsviti sa prokta āha jarāsutaḥ | kuryāṃ naivārjunenāhamabalenaiva saṅgaram |
| pañcapañcāṇsadabdo'dya hyayamevaṃ ca bālavat | abalatvād yuvā'pyeṣa bāla eva mato mama |
| ityukto'pyarjuno nā'ha kuru tarhi parīkṣaṇam | bāhubhyāṃ dhanuṣā veti śaṅkamānaḥ parājayam |
| ato bhīme balādhikyaṃ suprasiddhamabhūnmahat | etadarthaṃ hi kṛṣṇena sahā'nītaḥ sa phalgunaḥ |
| j ānan kṛṣṇe balaṃ ghoramaviṣahyaṃ sa māgadhaḥ | kutsayan gopa iti taṃ bhayānnaivā'hvayat prabhum |
| āhvayāmāsa bhīmaṃ tu syād vā me jīvanaṃ tviti | haniṣyatyeva māṃ kṛṣṇa ityāsīnnṛpaterbhayam | tasmāt taṃ nāhvayāmāsa vāsudevaṃ sa māgadhaḥ |
| arjune tu jite kṛṣṇabhīmau māṃ nihaniṣyataḥ | trayāṇāṃ durbalāhvānānnaśyet kīrtiśca me dhruvā |
| iti matvā'hvayāmāsa bhīmasenaṃ sa māgadhaḥ | kathañcijjīvitaṃ vā syānnatu naśyati me yaśaḥ |
| iti sma bhīmaṃ pratiyodhanāya saṅgṛhya rājā sa jarāsuto balī | rājye nijaṃ cā'tmajamabhyaṣi ñcat purā khyātaṃ patratāpākhyarudram |
| cclxxi.balaṃ bhīme manyamāno'dhikaṃ tu gadāṇsikṣāmātmani cādhikāṃ nṛpaḥ | bhīto niyuddhe'sya dadau gadāṃ sa bhīmāya cānyāṃ svayamagrahīd balī |
| tadarthamevā'śu gadāṃ pragṛhya bhīmo yayau māgadhasaṃ yuto bahiḥ | purāt sakṛṣṇārjuna eva tatra tvayuddhyatāṃ keśavapārthayoḥ puraḥ |
| vācā'jayat taṃ prathamaṃ vṛkodaraḥ śivāṇsrayaṃ viṣṇuguṇaprakāṇsayā | tato gadābhyāmabhipetatustau vicitramārgānapi darśayantau |
| tayorgade te'śanisannikāṇse cūrṇikṛte dehamahādṛḍhimnā | anyonyayorvakṣasi pātite ruṣā yathā'śmanoḥ pāṃ supiṇḍau sumuktau |
| sañcūrṇitagadau vīrau jaghnuturmuṣṭibhirmithaḥ | brahmaṇḍasphoṭasaṅkāṇsairyathā keśavakaiṭabhau |
| cacāla pṛthvī girayaśca cūrṇit āḥ kulācalāṇsceluralaṃ vicakṣubhuḥ | samastavārāmpatayaḥ surāsurā viriñcaśarvādaya āsadannabhaḥ |
| surāstu bhīmasya jayābhikāṅkṣiṇastathā'surādyā magadhādhipasya | paśyanti sarve kramaśo balaṃ svaṃ samādade mārutanandano'pi |
| mānayitvā varaṃ dhāturdivasān daśa pañca ca | vāsudevājñayā bhīmaḥ śatruṃ hantuṃ nao dadhe |
| sa praṇamya hṛṣīkeśaṃ harṣādāṇsliṣya phalgunam | ripuṃ jagrāha makuṭe vāraṇaṃ mṛgarāḍiva |
| pṛṣṭhe'sya jānumādhāya kūrmadeśaṃ babhañja ha | mṛtikāle punardehaṃ vidadāra yathā purā |
| marmaṇyeva na hantavyo mayā'yamiti mārutiḥ | svapuruṣaprakāṇsāya babhañjainamamarmaṇi |
| bhajyamāne śarīre'sya brahmāṇḍasphoṭasannibhaḥ | babhūva rāvo yenaiva trastametajjagattrayam |
| cclxxii.nihatya kṛṣṇasya ripuṃ sa bhīmaḥ samarpayāmāsa tadarcanaṃ hareḥ | kṛt āṃ hi bhīmena samarcanāṃ t āṃ samakṣamādātumihā'gato hyajaḥ |
| svīkṛtya pūjāṃ ca vṛkodarasya dṛḍhaṃ samāṇsliṣya ca taṃ janārdanaḥ | prīto nitāntaṃ punareva kṛṣṇaṃ nanāma bhīmaḥ praṇato'rjunena |
| jagmuḥ surāṇscātitarāṃ prahṛṣṭā brahmādayo dīnatarāṇsca daityāḥ | balādumeśasya vare prabhagne vṛkodareṇācyutasaṃ śrayeṇa |
| suto yayau śaraṇaṃ t ān rameśabhīmārjunān sahadevo'sya dhīmān | rathaṃ svasāraṃ ca dadau sa māruternanāma kṛṣṇaṃ parayā ca bhaktyā |
| ratho hyasau vasunā vāsudevācchakrāntarā'pto vasuvaṃ śajatvāt | jarāsutasyā'sa vṛkodarastaṃ hare rathaṃ prārpayāmāsa tasmai |
| kṛṣṇo'smarad garuḍaṃ sa dhvaje'bhūd rathaṃ kṛṣṇo'thā'ruhat pāṇḍavābhyām | bhīmaḥ kanyāṃ sahadevasya hetoḥ samagrahīdanujasyā'tmanaḥ saḥ |

| nakulasyā'dānmadrarājo hi pūrvaṃ svīyāṃ kanyāṃ sā tathaiṣā'pyuṣā hi| ekā pūrvaṃ te aśvinoścaiva bhāryā yamau remāte yaduṣā aśvibhāryā | tataḥ kṛṣṇāyāmagrajabhrātṛbhāryāvṛttiṃ hi tau cakraturmādriputrau |
| jarāsutasyā'tmajaḥ keśavādīn ratnaiḥ samabhyarcya yayāvanujñayā | tadājñayā pitṛkāryāṇi kṛtvā tadājñayaivāmucat tān nṛpāṃ śca | taiḥ saṃ stutaḥ keśavo bhīmapārthayukto yayau bhaktinamrairyathāvat |
| sambhāvitāste sahadevena samyak praśasya kṛṣṇaṃ bhīmasenaṃ ca sarve | yayurgṛhān svānapatat keśavadviḍjarāsuto'ndhe tamasi krameṇa |
| kṛṣṇaṇsca pārthau ca tathaikayānaṃ samāsthitā dharmajamabhyagacchan | teṣāṃ śaṅkhadhvanisambodhitātmā rājā prītaścātitarāṃ babhūva |
| dvaipāyano'tha bhagavānabhigamya pārthānājñāpayat sakalasambhṛtisādhanāya | taṃ rājasūyasahitaṃ paramāṇsvamedhayajñaṃ samādiśadananyakṛtaṃ viriñcāt |
| cclxxiii.kartā hi tasy aparameṣṭhipadaṃ prayāti yadyanyasadguṇavaraiḥ parameṣṭhitulyaḥ | bhīme makhasya phalamatyadhikaṃ nidhātuṃ vyāsaḥ kratuṃ tamadiśad gururabjajasya |
| asādhāraṇaheturyaḥ karmaṇo yasya cetanaḥ | sa eva tatphalaṃ pūrṇaṃ bhuṅkte'nyo'lpamiti sthitiḥ | vinā viṣṇuṃ nirṇayo'yaṃ sa hi karmaphalojjhitaḥ |
| hetavo'pi hi pāpasya na prāyaḥ phalabhāginaḥ | devāḥ puṇyasya daityāṇsca mānuṣāstadvibhāginaḥ |
| asādhāraṇahetuśca bhīma eva prakīrtitaḥ | yajñasyāsya jarāsandhavadhāt karṇajayādapi |
| jayācca kīcākādīnāmanyairjetumaśakyataḥ | dvitīyaḥ phalgunaścaiva tṛtīyastu yudhiṣṭhiraḥ |
| tasmād brahmapadāvāptyai vyāso bhīmasya taṃ kratum | ananyakṛtamādiśya diśāṃ vijayamādiśat |
| athābravīd dhanañjayo dhanurdhvajo ratho varaḥ | mamāsti tad diśāṃ jayo mamaiva vāñchitaḥ prabho |
| itīrito'khilaprabhurjagāda satyamasti te | samastasādhanonnatirmahacca vīryamasti te |
| tathā'pi kīcakādayo vṛkodarādṛte vaśam | na yānti nāpi te vaśaṃ prayāti karṇa eva ca |
| balādhiko'si karṇatastathā'pi nāmṛtaḥ karam | dadāti te hyatispṛdhā na vadhya eṣa te'dya ca |
| savarmakuṇḍalatvato na vadhya eṣa yat tvayā | tato vṛkodaro diśaṃ prayātu te pituḥ priyām |
| cclxxiv.jīvagrāhabhayāt karṇo dadāti karamañjasā | bhīmāya nātra sandeho jito'nena ca saṃ yuge |
| ajeyau śarvavacanād raṇe kīcakapauṇḍrakau | vaśaṃ prayāto bhīmasya tathā'vadhyo'pi cedipaḥ |
| jīvagrāhabhayaṃ hyeṣāṃ bhīmānmāgadhapātanāt | tasmāt karaṃ prayacchanti jitā vā pūrvameva vā |
| prayāhi ca tvaṃ dhanadaprapālitāṃ diśaṃ dvīpān sapta cāṇseṣadikṣu | nāgāṃ śca daityāṃ śca tathā'dharasthān vijitya śīghraṃ punarehi cātra |
| ratho hi divyo'mbaragastavāsti divyāni cāstrāṇi dhanuśca divyam | ye'nye ca bāṇapramukhā ajeyāḥ śarvāṇsrayāstānapi bhīma etu |
| tathā surāṇscāpi samastaśo'sya baliṃ prayacchanti madajñayetare | diśaṃ pratīcīmatha dakṣiṇāṃ ca yātāṃ yamau kramaśo hyadhvarārthe |
| yaśaśca dharmaśca tayorapi syāditi syaditi sma kṛṣṇena sutena kāl . yāḥ | ukte yayuste tamabhipraṇamya diśo yathoktāḥ paramorusadguṇāḥ |
| vṛkodaro'jayannṛpān virāṭamāsasāda ha | jite'tra kīcake raṇe samādade karaṃ tataḥ |
| tataḥ kramānnṛpān jitvā cedīnāṃ viṣayaṃ gataḥ | mātṛvākyād bhayāccaiva śiśupālena pūjitaḥ |
| mātṛṣvasurgṛhe coṣya divasān katicit sukham | karaṃ sumahadādāya tataḥ pūrvāṃ diśaṃ yayau |
| krameṇa sarvān nirjitya pauṇḍrakaṃ ca mahābalam | virathīkṛtya karṇaṃ ca karamādāya sarvataḥ |
| himavacchikhare devān jitvā ṇsakrapurogamān | krīḍārthaṃ yuddhyatastebhyastuṣṭebhyo ratnasañcayam |
| cclxxv.bāhuyuddhena śeṣaṃ ca garuḍaṃ ca mahābalam | krīḍamānau vinirjitya bhūṣaṇānyāpa toṣataḥ | t ābhyāṃ ca dṛḍhamāṇsliṣṭaḥ snehaviklinnayā dhiyā |
| poplūyamānaḥ sa tato'mbudhau balī jagāma bāṇasya puraṃ haraṃ ca | raṇe'jayad vāraṇarūpamāsthitaṃ krīḍantametena ca toṣito haraḥ |
| pṛṣṭaṇsca giriśenāsau vistaraṃ digjayasya ca | siṃ havyāghrādirūpāṇsca ātmanā vijitā yathā | garutmaccheṣaṇsakrādyā devāḥ sarve tadabravīt |
| niśamya śaṅkaro'khilaṃ makhasya ca prasādhakam | hariṃ tato baleḥ sutād dadau ca ratnasañcayam |
| sa bāṇadaityato mahacchivena dattamuttamam | pragṛhya ratnasañcayaṃ svakaṃ puraṃ samāyayau |
| sa viprayādaveśvaraṃ dvidhāsthitaṃ janārdanam | puro nidhāya tad vasu prabhūtamānamat tadā |
| so'bhivādyāgrajaṃ caiva yathāvṛttaṃ nyavedayat | ātmanaḥ kṛṣṇayoḥ sarvaṃ dharmarājāgrato mudā |
| yathā jitāḥ kīcakādyā ekalavyasahāyavān | yathā jitaḥ pauṇḍrakaśca karṇādyāṇsca tathā'pare |
| yathā siṃ hāditanavaḥ śeṣavīndrendrapūrvakāḥ | yathā gajatanuḥ śarvastacca sarvamavarṇayat |
| sambhāvitaśca kṛṣṇābhyāṃ rājñā ca sumahābalaḥ | ājñayā vyāsadevasya yajñāṅgāni samārjayat |
| ūce taṃ bhagavān vyāso jitaṃ sarvaṃ tvayā'rihan | jaye sarvasya yajño'yaṃ pūrṇo bhavati nānyathā |
| cclxxvi.viriñcaḥ sarvajit pūrvaṃ dvitīyastvamihābhavaḥ | ityuktvainaṃ samāṇsliṣya yajñāṅgāni samādiśat |
| tadaivānye diśo jitvā samīyustasya ye'nujāḥ | sahadevo dakṣiṇāṇsāṃ jitvā ratnānyupāharat |
| tatra rugmī na yuyudhe sahadevena vīryavān | jitaḥ kṛṣṇena pūrvaṃ yaḥ śarvādāpa dhanurvaram |
| tapasā toṣit āt kṛṣṇādanyānevāmunā'khilān | vijeṣyasi yadā kṛṣṇavirodhaste tadā dhanuḥ | māmeṣyatīti tenokto na vyaruddhyata keśave |
| svasuḥ snehācca kṛṣṇasya yajñakārayitṛtvataḥ | bhīmārjunabalāccaiva mādreyāya dadau karam | jigye balenānyanṛpān sahadevaḥ pratāpavān |
| tathā smṛtaṃ samāgataṃ ghaṭotkacaṃ vibhīṣaṇe | samādiśad yayau ca so'pi so'dadānmahākaram |
| purā hirāghavoditaṃ tadasya so'khilaṃ tadā | vicārya keśavaṃ ca taṃ balaṃ ca bhīmapārthayoḥ | divaukasaśca pāṇḍavānavetya so'dadāt karam |

| ityukta ūce pavamānasūnuḥ pūjyo'smākaṃ dharmajo'saṃ śayena | guruścāhaṃ vo'khilānāṃ yato hi balajyeṣṭhaṃ kṣatramāhurmahāntaḥ |
| balajyaiṣṭhye yadi vaḥ saṃ śayaḥ syāduttiṣṭhadhvaṃ sarva evādya vīrāḥ | mṛdgāmi vaḥ pādatal . ena sarvān sahānubandhān yaśca māṃ yoddhukāmaḥ |
| iti bruvan samutthito nadan vṛkodaro yadā | vighūrṇit ā sabhā'khilā bhayānnacā'ha kiñcana |
| bhīṣmo droṇo vidurādyāḥ kṣamasva sarvaṃ tvayoktaṃ satyamityeva hastau | gṛhītvainaṃ sthāpayāmāsurasmin sthite śāntiṃ cā'pire dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ |
| nivārito dharmajena gurubhiścāparaistadā | mānanārthaṃ gurūṇāṃ tu na bhīmastān jaghāna ha |
| nacātyavartata jyeṣṭhaṃ dharmātmānaṃ yudhiṣṭhiram | teṣāṃ pāpābhivṛddhyarthaṃ jyeṣṭhavṛttiṃ ca darśayan |
| cclxxxviii.atha duryodhanaḥ pāpo bhīmasenasya paśyataḥ | ūruṃ sandarśayāmāsa kṛṣṇāyai bhīma āha tam |
| tavorumenaṃ gadayoruvegayā bibhetsya ityeva punaḥ suyodhanaḥ | ūce nānyad bhavatāmasti vittaṃ dyūte kṛṣṇaṃ sthāpayadhvaṃ paṇāya |
| athābravīd vṛkodaraḥ kṛte'vamānane hareḥ | nipātya bhūtal . e hiteśiro mṛdiṣya ityalam |
| sa vadhya eva me sadā parokṣato'pi yo harim | vinindayediti dhruvaṃ pratiśrutaṃ hi māruteḥ |
| punaśca pāpavṛddhaye tadaiva no jaghāna tam | vikartanātmajaḥ punarjagāda somakātmajām |
| prayāhi bhūbhṛto hi no gṛhaṃ na santi pāṇḍavāḥ | itīrite samutthitau vṛkodaro'nu cārjunaḥ |
| ubhau ca tau yudhiṣṭhiro nyavārayat tathā'pare | tato viṣaṇṇayostayoḥ suyodhano vaco'bravīt |
| duḥ śāsanaiṣāṃ vāsāṃ si dāsānāṃ no vyapākuru | ityukto'bhyagamat pārthān svavāsāṃ syatha te daduḥ |
| te carmavasanā bhūtvātānaśiṣṭān prakāṇsya ca | niṣeduśca kṣamāyānte kṣamāmālambya vistṛt ām |
| punarduryodhanenoktaḥ pārthānāmatha paśyatām | cakarṣa vāso draupadyāstadā'vādīd vṛkodaraḥ |
| pāpeṣu pūrvasya tathā'dhamasya vaṃ śe kurūṇāmurudharmaśīlinām | duḥ śāsanasyāsya vidārya vakṣaḥ pibāmi raktaṃ jagataḥ samakṣam |
| vikṛṣyamāṇe vasane tu kṛṣṇā sasmāra kṛṣṇaṃ suviśeṣato'pi | tadā'nyadāsīd vasanaṃ ca tasyā divyaṃ susūkṣmaṃ kanakāvadātam |
| cclxxxix.punaḥ punaścaiva vikarṣamāṇe duḥ śāsane'nyāni ca tādṛśāni | babhūvurantaṃ na jagāma pāpaḥ śrānto nyaṣīdat svinnagātraḥ sabhāyām |
| vastroccaye śailanibhe prajāte duryodhanaḥ prāha sañjātakopaḥ | praveśayemāṃ gṛhameva śīghraṃ kiṃ naścireṇeti sumandabuddhiḥ |
| tacchrutvā vacanaṃ kṛṣṇā pratijñāmakarot tadā | bhīmo duryodhanaṃ hantā karṇaṃ hantā dhanañjayaḥ | śakuniṃ tvakṣakitavaṃ sahadevo vadhiṣyati |
| ityukte tat tathetyāha bhīmasenaḥ sabhātal . e | pratijñāmādade pārthastāṃ mādrīnandanastathā | nakulaḥ pratijajñe'tha śākuneyavadhaṃ prati |
| tataḥ suyodhanānujaścakarṣa pārṣatātmajām | gṛhāya tanniśāmya tu krudhā'ha mārutātmajaḥ |
| arjunārjuna naivātra kṣamā me tāta rocate | patitasyāsya dehasya kāṣṭhaviṣṭhāsamasya ca | phalāni trīṇi śiṣyante vidyā karma sutā iti |
| iti vedoditaṃ vākyaṃ na suto dāradūṣaṇe | duṣṭadāro nacā'pnoti lokānarddho hi dūṣitaḥ | arakṣaṇād dūṣit āyā na tyāgācca śubhaṃ bhavet |
| ato'dya sānubandhakān nihanmi dhārtarāṣṭrakān | iti bruvan vyalokayad ripūn dahannivaujasā |
| dadarśa ca mahāghoramādātuṃ parighaṃ ruṣā | kartuṃ vyavasito buddhyā niśśeṣān dhṛtarāṣṭraj ān |
| tadā ṇsivā vavāṇsire suyodhanāgnigehataḥ | tathaiva tatpiturgṛhe'pyabhūd bhayānakaṃ bahu |
| ccxc.nimittānyatighorāṇi kupite mārutātmaje | dṛṣṭvā'mbikeyo viduraṃ papracchaiṣāṃ phalaṃ drutam |
| āha taṃ viduro jyeṣṭhaṃ kṣaṇe'smiṃ stava putrakāḥ | sānubandhā naśiṣyanti vṛkodarabalāhatāḥ |
| krīḍase'rbhakavat tvaṃ hi kiṃ jitaṃ kiṃ jitaṃ tviti | adharmeṇa jitānatra jitān paśyasi pāṇḍavān |
| strīṣu dyūteṣu vā dattaṃ madāndhena nareṇa vā | na dattamāhurvidvāṃ sastasya bandhubhireva ca |
| āhāryaṃ punarāhuśca tathā'pi natu pāṇḍavaiḥ | tat kṛtaṃ tava putrāṇāṃ khyāpayadbhiraśiṣṭatām |
| ityukta āhā'mbikeyo nimittānāṃ phalaṃ katham | na bhavediti sa prāha drutaṃ kṛṣṇā vimucyatām |
| toṣayasva varaiścaināmanyathā te sutān mṛt ān | viddhi bhīmena niṣpiṣṭān mā'tra te saṃ śayo bhavet |
| kṛṣṇā ca pāṇḍavāṇscaiva tapovṛddhimabhīpsavaḥ | tapasā naiva dakṣyanti tena jīvanti te sutāḥ |
| tathā'pi yadi kṛṣṇāṃ tvaṃ na mocayasi te sutān | haniṣyati na sandeho balenaiva vṛkodaraḥ |
| itīrito vinirbhartsya putraṃ duḥ śāsanaṃ nṛpaḥ | amocayad varaiścaināṃ chandayāmāsa pārṣatīm |
| chanditā sā varaistena dharme bhāgavate sthitā | naivā'tmano varān vavre vavre teṣāṃ vimokṣaṇam |
| yudhiṣṭhirasya sabhrātuḥ sarāṣṭrasya vimokṣaṇam | dadau nṛpo'syā na punaśchandyamānā'pi sā'vṛṇot |
| ccxci.bharturviṣṇoṇsca nānyasmād varasvīkāra iṣyate | evaṃ hi bhagavaddharmastasmāt sā nāvṛṇot param |
| adharmato hṛtatvāttu tad dānaṃ na varo bhavet | iti matvā pāṇḍavānāṃ vavre kṛṣṇā vimokṣaṇam |
| śvaśurādaihikavarāḥ kṣatriyāyāstrayo yataḥ | uktāḥ śataṃ ca viprāyā dharme bhāgavate tataḥ | hetunā'nena vavre sā nānyat kiñcidataḥ param |
| tato vimuktāḥ prayayuśca pārthā gurūn praṇamya svapuraṃ sakṛṣṇāḥ | duryodhanānantarajo jagāda tātaṃ nijaṃ pāpakṛt āṃ pradhānaḥ |
| samastapāṇḍavaśriyaṃ samāgatāmaho punaḥ | vyamocayo vṛkodarād vadhaśca no dhruvo bhavet |
| ataḥ punaśca pāṇḍavān samāhvayasva naḥ kṛte | punaśca devanaṃ bhavejjito vanaṃ prayātu ca |
| tenoktaḥ sa tadā rājā pāṇḍavān punarāhvayat | punaḥ pitrā samāhūto devanāya yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | bhrātṛbhirvāryamāṇo'pi kṛṣṇayā cā'gamat sabhām |
| dvādaśābdaṃ vane vāsamajñātatvena vatsaram | vāsaṃ prasiddhanṛpateḥ pure naivātidūrataḥ |
| kṛṣṇāyāḥ pāṇḍavānāṃ vā darśane'jñātavāsinām | ekasyāpi samastānāṃ dvādaśābdaṃ punarvanam |
| vatsarājñātavāsaṃ ca tyāge'pyuktavidhestathā | duryodhanaḥ paṇaṃ cakre buddhyā duḥ śāsanoktayā |
| gāndhāreṇa punaścākṣahṛdayajñena dharmajaḥ | parājito vanaṃ yātumaicchat sabhrātṛko yadā |
| ccxcii.tadā nanarta pāpakṛt suyodhanānujo hasan | vadaṃ śca mārutātmajaṃ punaḥ punaśca gauriti |
| uvāca ca punaḥ kṛṣṇāṃ nṛtyanneva sabhātal . e | apatirhyasi kalyāṇi gaccha duryodhanālayam |
| ete'khilāḥ ṣaṇḍhatilāstamo'ndhamāptā nacaiṣāṃ punarutthitiḥ syāt | iti bruvāṇo'nucakāra bhīmaṃ tadā'hasan dhārtarāṣṭrāṇsca sarve |
| tadā'karod bhīmasenaḥ pratijñāṃ hantā'smi vo nikhilān saṅgare'ham | itīrite śaraṇaṃ droṇameva jagmuḥ samastā dhṛtarāṣṭraputrāḥ |
| yatra droṇastatra putrastatra bhīṣmaḥ kṛpastathā | nacātyeti gurūn bhīma iti taṃ śaraṇaṃ yayuḥ |
| abravīd dhārtarāṣṭrāṃ śca droṇo vipro'pi sannaham | saputraḥ sakṛpaḥ śastraṃ grahīṣye bhavatāṃ kṛte |
| rakṣaṇe bhavatāṃ caiva kuryāṃ yatnaṃ svaśaktitaḥ | natu bhīmād rakṣituṃ vaḥ śaktaḥ satyaṃ bravīmyaham |
| tato yayuḥ pāṇḍavāste sabhāyā vanāya kṛṣṇāsahitāḥ suśūrāḥ | gatyā'nucakre yuvasiṃ hakhelagatiṃ bhīmaṃ dhārtarāṣṭro'pahasya |
| dṛṣṭvā sabhāyā arddhaniṣkrāntadeho vyāvṛtya bhīmaḥ prāha saṃ raktanetraḥ | ūruṃ tavānyaṃ ca raṇe vibhetsya ityuktvā'sau nirgato'satsabhāyāḥ |
| prayātānanu tān kuntī prayayau putragṛddhinī | rorudyamānāṃ viduraḥ sthāpayāmāsa tāṃ gṛhe | praṇamya tāṃ yayuḥ pārthāḥ sakṛṣṇāḥ śīghragāminaḥ |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye pḸaṇḍavavanapraveśo nāma ekaviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ ccxciv.(araṇīprāptiḥ ) atha dvāviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | āgantukāmān puravāsinaste saṃ sthāpya kṛcchreṇa kurupravīrāḥ | rātrau praviṣṭā gahanaṃ vanaṃ ca kirmīramāseduratho narāṇsam |
| reme gopīṣvarihā sa manmathākrāntasundarīpīṣvarihā | pūrṇā'nandaikatanuḥ sa viśvarukpāvano'pyanandaikatanuḥ |
Tai. Ā.
| bakānujo'sau nikhilairajeyo varād girīśasya nihantukāmaḥ | sadārasodaryamabhiprasasre bhīmaṃ mahāvṛkṣagirīn pramuñcan |

| nihatya rakṣo vanamadhyasaṃ sthāstadā yatīnāmayutaiḥ sametāḥ | aṇsītisāhasramunipravīrairdaśāṃ śayuktaiḥ sahitā vyacintayan |

| gavāṃ ca lakṣaṃ pradadāti nityaśaḥ suvarṇabhārāṃ śca śataṃ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | sabhrātṛko'sau vanamāpya śakravanmumoda vipraiḥ sahito yathāsukham |

| śaśāpa cainaṃ munirugratejāstavorubhedāya bhavet suyuddham | ityūcivān dhṛtarāṣṭrānato'pi yayau na ced rājyadastvaṃ tatheti | śrutvā tu kirmīravadhaṃ svapitrā pṛṣṭakṣatroktaṃ so'trasad dhārtarāṣṭraḥ |
| ccxcvi.vane vasanto'tha pṛthāsutāste vārtāṃ svakīyāṃ prāpayāmāsurāṇsu | kṛṣṇe so'pi drutamāyāt sasatyaḥ sambandhino ye ca pāñcālamukhyāḥ |
| kruddhaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ dhārtarāṣṭrāya pārthāḥ kṣamāpayāmāsuruccairgṛṇantaḥ | guṇāṃ stadīyānamitān praṇamya tadā rudantī draupadī cā'pa pādau | sā pādayoḥ patitā vāsudevamastaut samastaprabhumātmatantram |
| acintya nityāvyaya pūrṇasadguṇārṇavaikadehākhiladoṣadūra | ramābjajeśerasurendrapūrvavṛndārakāṇāṃ satatābhivandya | samastaceṣṭāprada sarvajīvaprabho vimuktāṇsraya sarvasāra |
| iti bruvantī sakalānubhūtaṃ jagāda sarveśituracyutasya | yasyādhikānugrahapātrabhūtā svayaṃ hi śeṣeṇsavipādikebhyaḥ |
| śrutvā samastaṃ bhagavān pratijñāṃ cakāra teṣāmakhilāṇsca yoṣāḥ | patīn samāliṅgya vimuktakeśyān bhīmāhatān darśaye nānyatheti | t āṃ sāntvayitvā madhuraiḥ suvākyairnārāyaṇo vācamimāṃ jagāda |
| yadīhāhaṃ sthito naivaṃ bhavitā'haṃ tvayodhayam | sālvarājaṃ durātmānaṃ hataścāsau supāpakṛt |
| sannidhāne'tha dūre vā kālavyavahite'pi vā | svabhāvād vā vyavahite vastuvyavahite'pi vā | nāṇsaktirvidyate viṣṇornityāvyavahitatvataḥ |
| tathā'pi naralokasya karotyanukṛtiṃ prabhuḥ | duṣṭānāṃ doṣavṛddhyarthaṃ bhīmādīnāṃ guṇonnateḥ |
| yudhiṣṭhire'tivṛddhaṃ tu rājasūyādisambhavam | dharmaṃ ca saṅkrāmayituṃ kṛṣṇāyāmanujeṣu ca|
| yogyatākramato viṣṇuricchayetthamacīklṛpat | edhamānadvil . ityeva viṣṇornāma hi vaidikam |
| ccxcvii.svayogyatāyā adhikadharmajñānādijaṃ phalam | bhīṣmadroṇāmbikeyādeḥ pārtheṣveva nidhāpitum |
| punaśca pāpavṛddhyarthamajo duryodhanādiṣu | vyāso'mbikāsutaṃ prāha pārthā me'bhyadhikaṃ priyāḥ | teṣāṃ pravāsanaṃ caiva priyaṃ na mama sarvathā |
| iti duryodhanādīnāṃ pāpavṛddhyarthameva saḥ | priyā ityeva kathanāt pāṇḍavānāṃ śubhonnateḥ |
| gurutvād bhīmasenasya kṣamā dyūte'rjunādinām | nātidharmasvarūpo'tra dharmo bhīme niraupadhaḥ |
| draupadyā apyatikleśāt kṣamā dharmo mahānabhūt | sā hibhīmamano veda na kāryaḥ śāpa ityalam |
| tasmād yathāyogyatayā hariṇā dharmavarddhanam | kṛtaṃ tatrāsannidhānakāraṇaṃ keśavo'bravīt |
| sālvaṃ śrutvā samāyātaṃ raugmiṇeyādayo mayā | prasthāpitā hi bhavatāṃ sakāṇsāt te yayuḥ purīm | tadā sālvo'pi saubhena dvārakāmardayad bhṛśam |
| pradyumna āṇsu niragādatha sarvasainyairanyaiśca yādavagaṇaiḥ sahito'nujaiśca | sālvo'vagamya tanayaṃ mama tadvimānāt pāpo'varuhya rathamāruhadatra yoddhum |
| kṛtvā suyuddhamamunā mama putrako'sāvastrāṇi tasya vinivārya mahāstrajālaiḥ | dattaṃ mayā ṇsaramamoghamathā'dade taṃ hantuṃ nṛpaṃ kṛtamatistvaśṛṇod vacaḥ khe |
| nārāyaṇena hi purā manasā'bhiklṛptaṃ kṛṣṇāvatāramupagamya nihanmi sālvam | ityeva tena hariṇā'pi sa bhārgaveṇa vidrāvito na nihataḥ svamanonusārāt |
| vadhyastvayā nahi tato'yamayaṃ ca bāṇaṇscakrāyudhasya dayito nitarāmamoghaḥ | mā muñca tena tamimaṃ vinivartaye'haṃ sālvaṃ hṛdi sthita itīritamīraṇena |
| ccxcviii.śrutvā vacaḥ sa pavanasya śaraṃ tvamoghaṃ sañjahra āṇsu sa ca sālvapatiḥ svasaubham | āruhya bālakalahena kimatra kāryaṃ kṛṣṇena saṅgara iti prayayau svadeśam |
| pradyumnasāmbagadasāraṇacārudeṣṇāḥ senāṃ nihatya saha mantrigaṇaistadīyām | āhlādinaḥ svapuramāyayurapyahaṃ ca tatrāgamaṃ sapadi taiḥ śrutavānaśeṣam |
| yasmiñchare karagate vijayo dhruvaḥ syānmattejasā tadanusaṅgrahaṇāt sutānme | yātaṃ niśamya ripumātmapurīṃ ca bhagnāṃ dṛṣṭvaiva tena tadanubrajanaṃ kṛtaṃ me |
| taṃ sāgaroparigasaubhagataṃ niśāmya mukte ca tena mayi śastramahāstravarṣe | taṃ sannivārya tu mayā ṇsarapūgaviddho māyā yuyoja mayi pāpatamaḥ sa sālvaḥ |
| t āḥ krīḍayā kṣaṇamahaṃ samare niśāmya jñānāstrataḥ pratividhūya bahūṃ śca daityān | hatvā'śu taṃ ca girivarṣiṇamāṇsu saubhaṃ vārdhau nyapātayamarīndravibhinnabandham |
| taṃ syandanasthitamatho vibhujaṃ vidhāya bāṇena tadrathavaraṃ gadayā vibhidya | cakreṇa tasya ca śiro vinikṛtya dhātṛśarvādibhiḥ pratinutaḥ svapurīmagāṃ ca |
| tasmādidaṃ vyasanamāsa hi viprakarṣānme kāryatastviti nigadya punaśca pārthān | kṛṣṇāṃ ca sāntvayitumatra dinānyuvāsa satyā ca somakasutāmanusāntvayantī |
| pāṇḍavānāṃ ca yā bhāryāḥ putrā api hi sarvaśaḥ | anveva pāṇḍavān yātā vanamatraiva ca sthitāḥ |
| dhṛṣṭadyumnastataḥ kṛṣṇāṃ sāntvayitvaiva keśavam | praṇamya samanujñāto bhāgineyaiḥ puraṃ yayau |
| dhṛṣṭaketuśca bhāginīṃ kāṇsirājaḥ sutāmapi | puraṃ yayaturādāya kuntyaivānyāḥ saha sthitāḥ |
| pārvatī nakulasyā'sīd bhāryā pūrvaṃ tilottamā | pūrvokte caiva yamayorbhārye kuntyā hivāritāḥ |
| subhadrāmabhimanyuṃ ca rathamāropya keśavaḥ | pāṇḍavānabhyanujñāya sabhāryaḥ svapurīṃ yayau |
| ccxcix.kañcit kālaṃ draupadeyā uṣya pāñcālake pure | yayurdvāravatīmeva tatroṣuḥ kṛṣṇalāl . it āḥ |
| tataḥ paraṃ dharmarājo nirviṇṇaḥ svakṛtena ha | bhrātṛbhāryāpade kṛṣṇāṃ sthāpayāmāsa sarvadā |
| ūṣurvane ca te pārthā muniśeṣānnabhojinaḥ | bhuktavatsvevānujeṣu bhuṅkte rājā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ |
| alaṅghyatvāt tadājñāyā anujāḥ pūrvabhojinaḥ | tasyānantaramevaikā bhuṅkte sā pārṣatātmajā |
| evaṃ sadā viṣṇuparāyaṇānāṃ tatprāpaṇānnaikabhujāṃ prayātaḥ | saṃ vatsarastatra jagāda kṛṣṇā bhīmājñayā dharmarājaṃ suvettrī |
| atimārdavayuktatvād dharmarājaścaturdaśe | api varṣe gurubhayād rājyaṃ necchediti prabhuḥ | mārutiḥ preṣayāmāsa kṛṣṇāṃ prastāvahetave |
| kṣamā sarvatra dharmo na pāpahetuśca durjane | rājñāṃ sāmarthyayuktānāmiti saṃ sthāpya śāstrataḥ |
| hatvā caturdaśe varṣe dhārtarāṣṭrānarājyadān | kartuṃ rājyaṃ puro gantā bhavānītyagrajena ha |
| kārayan satyaśapathaṃ vivādasya kramecchayā | ādiśat prathamaṃ kṛṣṇāṃ bhīmaḥ sā nṛpamabravīt |
| naiva kṣamā kujanatāsu nṛpasya dharmastāṃ tvaṃ vṛthaiva dhṛtavānasi sarvakālam | ityukta āha nṛpatiḥ paramā kṣamaiva sarvatra tadvidhṛtameva jagat samastam |
| kartā ca sarvajagataḥ sukhaduḥkhayorhi nārāyaṇastadanudattamihāsya sarvam | tasmānna kopaviṣayo'sti kutaśca kaścit tasmāt kṣamaiva sakaleṣu paro'sya dharmaḥ |
| ccc.ityuktavantaṃ nṛpamāha pārṣatī yadi kṣamā sarvanareṣu dharmaḥ | rājñā nakṛtyaṃ naca lokayātrā bhavejjagat kāpuruṣairvinaśyet |
| satyaṃ ca viṣṇuḥ sakalapravartako ramāviriñceśapurassarāṇsca | kāṣṭhādivat tadvaśagāḥ samastāstathā'pi na vyarthatā pauruṣasya |
| tadājñayā puruṣaṇsceṣṭamānaśceṣṭānusāreṇa ṇsubhāṇsubhasya | bhoktā na tacceṣṭitamanyathā bhavet kartā tasmāt puruṣo'pyasya vaśyaḥ |
| vṛthā yadi syāt pauruṣaṃ kasya hetorvidhirniṣedhaśca samastavedagaḥ | vidherniṣedhasya ca naiva gocaraḥ pumān yadi syād bhavato hi tau hareḥ |
| tenaiva lepaśca bhavedamuṣya puṇyena pāpena ca naiva cāsau | lipyeta tābhyāṃ paramasvatantraḥ kartā tataḥ puruṣo'pyasya vaśyaḥ |
| itīrito dharmajaḥ kṛṣṇayaiva niruttaratvaṃ gamitastvabhartsayat | kutarkamāṇsritya harerapi tvamasvātantryaṃ sādhayasīti coktvā |
| chalena tena pratibhartsitā sā kṣamāpayāmāsa nṛpaṃ yataḥ strī | vācāl . atā nātitarāṃ hi śobhate strīṇāṃ tataḥ prāha vṛkodarastam |
| rājan viṣṇuḥ sarvakartā nacānyastattantramevānyadasau svatantraḥ | tathā'pi puṃ sā vihitaṃ svakarma kāryaṃ tyājyaṃ cānyadatyantayatnāt |
| pratyakṣametat puruṣasya karma tenānumeyā preraṇā keśavasya | svakarma kṛtvā vihitaṃ hi viṣṇunā tatpreraṇetyeva budho'numanyate |
| tenaiti samyaggatimasya viṣṇorjano'śubho daivamityeva matvā | hitvā svakaṃ karma gatiṃ ca tāmasīṃ prayāti tasmāt kāryameva svakarma |
| j ñātavyaṃ caivāsya viṣṇorvaśatvaṃ kartavyaṃ caivā'tmanaḥ kāryakarma | pratyakṣaiṣā kartṛt ā jīvasaṃ sthā tathā'gamādanumānācca sarvam |
| viṣṇorvaśe tanna heyaṃ dvayaṃ ca jānan vidvān kurute kāryakarma | tatprerakaṃ viṣṇumevābhijānan bhavet pramāṇatritayānugāmī |
| ccci.pūrṇaṃ pramāṇaṃ tattrayaṃ cāvirodhenaikatrasthaṃ tattrayaṃ cāvirodhi | pṛthaṅ madhyaṃ cāpramāṇaṃ virodhi syāt tat tasmāt trayamekatra kāryam |
| ajñaḥ pratyakṣaṃ tvapahāyaiva daivaṃ matvā kartṛsvātmakarma prajahyāt | vidvān jīvaṃ viṣṇuvaśaṃ viditvā karoti kartavyamajasrameva |

| svabhāvākhyā yogyatā yā haṭhākhyā yā'nādisiddhā sarvajīveṣu nityā | sā kāraṇaṃ tat prathamaṃ tu dvitīyamanādi karmaiva tathā tṛtīyaḥ | jīvaprayatnaḥ pauruṣākhyastadetat trayaṃ viṣṇorvaśagaṃ sarvadaiva |
| sa kasyacinna vaśe vāsudevaḥ parāt paraḥ paramo'sau svatantraḥ | haṭhaścāsau tāratamyasthito hi brahmāṇamārabhya kaliśca yāvat | haṭhācca karmāṇi bhavanti karmajo yatno yatno haṭhakarmaprayoktā |
| vinā yatnaṃ na haṭho nāpi karma phalapradau vāsudevo'khilasya | svātantryaśakterviniyāmako hi tathā'pyetān so'pyapekṣyaiva yuñjet |
| etānapekṣyaiva phalaṃ dadānītyasyaiva saṅkalpa iti svatantratā | nāsyāpagacchet sa hi sarvaśaktirnāṇsaktatā kvacidasya prabhutvāt |

| tasmāt kāryaṃ tena klṛptaṃ svakarma tatpūjārthaṃ tena tatprāptireva | ato'nyathā nirayaḥ sarvathā syāt svakarma viprasya japopadeśau | viṣṇormukhād viprajātiḥ pravṛtt ā mukhotthitaṃ karma tenāsya so'dāt |

| bāhvorjātaḥ kṣatriyastena bāhvoḥ karmāsya pāpaprativāraṇaṃ hi | pravartanaṃ sādhudharmasya caiva mukhasya bāhvoścātisāmīpyato'sya | japopadeśau kṣatriyasyāpi viṣṇuṇscakre dharmau yajñakarmāpi vipre |

| vaiśyo yasmādūrujastena tasya prajāvṛddhistajjakarmaiva dharmaḥ | tatsādṛśyāt sthāvarāṇāṃ ca vṛddhiḥ karorūrvoḥ sannikṛṣṭatvahetoḥ | vārtātmakaṃ karma dharmaṃ cakāra viṣṇustasyaivāṅghrijaḥ śūdra uktaḥ |
| gatipradhānaṃ karma śuśrūṣaṇākhyaṃ sādṛśyato hastapadostathaiva | hastodbhavaṃ karma tasyāpi dharmaḥ santānavṛddhiśca samīpagatvāt |

| cccii.bhujāvuro hṛdayaṃ yad balasya jñānasya ca sthānamato nṛpāṇām | balaṃ j ñānaṃ cobhayaṃ dharma uktaḥ pāṇau kṛtīnāṃ kauśalaṃ kevalaṃ hi | tasmāt pāṇyorūrupadorupasthiterviṭchūdrakau karmaṇāṃ kauśaletau |
| prādhānyato dharmaviśeṣa eṣa sāmānyataḥ sarvamevākhilānām | vayaṃ hi devāstena sarvaṃ hi karma prāyeṇa no dharmatāmeti śaśvat |
| etairdharmairviṣṇunā pūrvaklṛptaiḥ sarvairvarṇairviṣṇurevābhipūjyaḥ | tadbhaktirevākhilānāṃ ca dharmo yathāyogyaṃ j ñānamasyāpi pūjā |
| pitā guruḥ paramaṃ daivataṃ ca viṣṇuḥ sarveṣāṃ tena pūjyaḥ sa eva | tadbhaktatvād devatāṇscābhipūjyā viśeṣatasteṣu ye'tyantabhaktāḥ |
| sampūjito vāsudevaḥ sa muktiṃ dadyādevāpūjito duḥkhameva | svatantratvāt sukhaduḥkhaprado'sau nānyaḥ svatastadvaśā yat samastāḥ |
| svatantratvāt sukhasajjñānaśaktipūrvairguṇaiḥ pūrṇa eṣo'khilaiśca | svatantratvāt sarvadoṣojjhitaśca nissīmaśaktirhi yataḥ svatantraḥ |

| doṣāspṛṣṭau guṇapūrtau ca śaktirnissīmatvād vidyate tasya yasmāt | evaṃ guṇairakhilaiścāpi pūrṇo nārāyaṇaḥ pūjyatamaḥ svadharmaiḥ | asmākaṃ yat tena nātikṣamaiva dharmo duṣṭānāṃ vāraṇaṃ hyeva kāryam |
| hanyād duṣṭān yaḥ kṣatriyaḥ kṣatriyāṃ śca viśeṣato yuddhagatān smaran harim | svabāhuvīryeṇa ca tasya bāhū caitanyamātrau bhavataḥ sadehau |
| pāpādhikāṃ ścaiva balādhikāṃ śca hatvā muktāvadhikānandavṛddhiḥ | prītiśca viṣṇoḥ paramaiva tatra tasmāddhantavyāḥ pāpinaḥ sarvathaiva |
| ye tvakṣadhūrtā grahaṇaṃ gatā vā pāpāste'nyairghātanīyāḥ svadorbhyām | rājānaṃ vā rājaputraṃ tathaiva rājānujaṃ vā'bhiyātaṃ nihanyāt |

| rājñaḥ putro'pyakṛtodvāhako yaḥ sa ghātanīyo na svayaṃ vadhya eva | krūraṃ cānyad dharmayuktaṃ paraistat prasādhanīyaṃ kṣatriyairna svakāryam | ccciii.evaṃ dharmo vihito veda eva vākyaṃ viṣṇoḥ pañcarātreṣu tādṛk |
| akṣadyūtaṃ nikṛtiḥ pāpameva kṛtaṃ tvayā garhitaṃ saubalena | na kutracid vidhirasyāsti tena na tad dattaṃ dyūtahṛtaṃ vadanti |
| bhītena dattaṃ dyūtadattaṃ tathaiva dattaṃ kāminyai punarāhāryameva | evaṃ dharmaḥ śāṇsvato vaidiko hi dyūte striyāṃ nālpamāhāryamāhuḥ |
| yadyeṣāṃ vai bhogyamalpaṃ tadīyaṃ bhogena tadbandhubhistacca hāryam | nivāraṇe puruṣasya tvaśaktaistad rājyaṃ na punarāhāryameva |
| tvaṃ dharmanityaścāgrajaśceti rājan ṛte'nujñāṃ na mayā tat kṛtaṃ ca | dātāsyanujñāṃ yadi tān nihatya tvayyeva rājyaṃ sthāpayāmyadya samyak |

| satyaṃ pāpeṣvapi kartuṃ yadīcchā tathā'pi māsā dvādaśaḥ naḥ prayātāḥ | vedaprāmāṇyād vatsarāste hi māsaiḥ sahasrābdaṃ satramuktaṃ narāṇām | ajñātamekaṃ māsamuṣyā'tha śatrūn nihatya rājyaṃ pratipālayāmaḥ |
| mā mitrāṇāṃ t āpakastvaṃ bhavethāstathā'mitrāṇāṃ nandakaścaiva rājan | jvalasvārīṇāṃ mūrdhni mitrāṇi nityamāhlādayan vāsudevaṃ bhajasva |
| svatantratvaṃ vāsudevasya samyak pratyakṣato dṛśyate hyadya rājan | yasmāt kṛṣṇo vyajayacchaṅkarādīn jarāsutādīn kādivarairajeyān |
| brahmādīnāṃ prakṛtestadvaśatvaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ hi no bahuśo vyāsadehe | pārāṇsaryo divyadṛṣṭiṃ pradāya svātantryaṃ no'darśayat sarvaloke |
| tasmād rājannabhiniryāhi śatrūn hantuṃ sarvān bhoktumevādhirājyam | evañca te kīrtidharmau mahāntau prāpyau rājan vāsudevaprasādāt |
| evamukto'bravīd bhīmaṃ dharmaputro yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | trayodaśābdasyānte'haṃ kuryāmeva tvadīritam |
| satyametanna sandehaḥ satyenā'tmānamālabhe | lokāpavādabhīruṃ māṃ nāto'nyad vaktumarhasi |
| ccciv.tudase cātivācā māṃ yadyevaṃ bhīma māṃ vadeḥ | tadaiva me'tyayaḥ kāryo hantavyāṇscaiva śatravaḥ | naitādṛśairidānīṃ tu vākyairbādhitumarhasi |
| bhīṣmadroṇādayo'strajñā nivāryāṇsca kathaṃ yudhi | pūjyāste bāhuyuddhena na nivāryāḥ kathañcana |
| astrāṇi jānannapi hi na prayojayasi kvacit | tasmād tadaiva gantavyaṃ vijñātāstre dhanañjaye |
| ityukto bhīmasenastu snehabhaṅgabhayāt tataḥ | novāca kiñcid vacanaṃ svābhipretamavāpya ca |
| abhiprāyo hi bhīmasya niścayena trayodaśe | yudhiṣṭhirasya rājyārthaṃ gamanārthe pratiśravaḥ | anyathā'timṛdutvāt sa na gacched bhinnadhīḥ paraiḥ |
| kṛtakṛtye tathā bhīme sthite dharmātmajo hi saḥ | bhīṣmadroṇādivijayaḥ kathaṃ syādityacintayat |
| nivāraṇaṃ gurūṇāṃ hi bhīma icchati na kvacit | tasmāt te hyarjunenaiva nivāryā ityacintayat |
| āpadyeva hi bhīmastān nivārayati nānyathā | evaṃ cintāsamāviṣṭaṃ vijñāyaiva yudhiṣṭhiram |
| sarvajñaḥ sarvaśaktiśca kṛṣṇadvaipāyano'gamat | nṛpatiṃ bodhayāmāsa cintāvyākulamānasam |
| imaṃ mantraṃ vadiṣyāmi yena jeṣyati phalgunaḥ | bhīṣmadroṇādikān sarvān taṃ tvaṃ vada dhanañjaye |
| ityuktvaivāvadanmantraṃ sarvadaivatadṛṣṭidam | na svayaṃ hyavadat pārthe phalādhikyaṃ yato bhavet |
| cccv.bhīṣmadroṇādivijaya etāvad vīryameva hi | alaṃ nāto'dhikaṃ kāryametāvad yogyamasya ca | phalgunasyeti bhagavān na svayaṃ hyavadanmanum |
| gate vyāse bhagavati sarvajñe sarvakartari | dharmarājo'diśanmantraṃ phalgunāya rahasyamum |
| tamāpya phalguno mantraṃ yayau jyeṣṭhau praṇamya ca | yamajau ca samāṇsliṣya girimevendrakīlakam | tapaścacāra tatrasthaḥ śaṅkarasthaṃ hariṃ smaran |
| ṣaṇmāse'tigate'paśyanmūkaṃ nāmāsuraṃ girau | varāharūpamāyātaṃ vadhārthaṃ phalgunasya ca |
| taṃ j ñātvā phalguno vīraḥ sajyaṃ kṛtvā tugāṇḍivam | cikṣepa vajrasamitāṃ statkāye sāyakān bahūn |
| kirātarūpastamanu sabhāryaśca triyambakaḥ | sa mamāra hatastābhyāṃ dānavaḥ pāpacetanaḥ |
| tenokto'sau mayaivāyaṃ varāho'nugato'dya hi | tamavidhyo yatastvaṃ hi tad yuddhyasva mayā saha |
| ityuktaḥ phalgunaḥ prāha tiṣṭha tiṣṭha na mokṣyase | ityuktvā tāvubhau yuddhaṃ cakratuḥ puruṣarṣabhau |
| tatrākhilāni cāstrāṇi phalgunasyāgrasacchivaḥ | tato'rjunastu gāṇḍīvaṃ samādāyābhyatāḍayat |
| tadapyagrasadevāsau prahasan giriśastadā | bāhuyuddhaṃ tatastvāsīt tayoḥ puruṣasiṃ hayoḥ |
| piṇḍīkṛtya tato rudraścikṣepātha dhanañjayam | mūrcchāmavāpa mahatīṃ phalguno rudrapīḍitaḥ |
| cccvi.pūrvaṃ samprārthayāmāsa śaṅkaro garuḍadhvajam | avarāṇāṃ varaṃ matto yeṣāṃ tvaṃ samprayacchasi | ajeyatvaṃ prasādāt te vijeyāḥ syurmayā'pi te |
| ityuktaḥ pradadau viṣṇurumādhīśāya taṃ varam | tenājayacchvetavāhaṃ giriśo raṇamadhyagam |
| kevalān vaiṣṇavān mantrān vyāsaḥ pārthāya no dadau | etāvatā'laṃ bhīṣmāderjayārthamiti ciddhanaḥ |
| kevalairvaiṣṇavairmantraiḥ svadattairvijayāvahaiḥ | ativṛddhasya pārthasya darpaḥ syādityacintayat |
| pārthaḥ sañjñāmavāpyātha jayārthyārādhayacchivam | vyāsoditena mantreṇa tāni puṣpāṇi tacchiraḥ |
| āruhan sa tu taṃ j ñātvā rudra ityeva phalgunaḥ | namaścakre tataḥ prādādastraṃ pāṇsupataṃ śivaḥ |
| astraṃ tad viṣṇudaivatyaṃ sādhitaṃ śaṅkareṇa yat | tasmāt pāṇsupataṃ nāma svānyastrāṇyapare surāḥ | dadustadaiva pārthāya sarve pratyakṣagocarāḥ |
| indro'rjunaṃ samāgamya prāha prīto'smi te'nagha | rudradehasthitaṃ brahma viṣṇvākhyaṃ toṣitaṃ tvayā | tena lokaṃ mamā'gaccha preṣayāmi rathaṃ tava |
| ityuktvā prayayāvindrastadrathena ca mātaliḥ | āyāt pārthastamāruṃ hya yayau tātaniveśanam |
| pūjito daivataiḥ sarvairindreṇaiva niveśitaḥ | tena sārddhamupāsīdat tasminnaindre varāsane |
| prītyā samāṇsliṣya kurupravīraṃ śakro dvitīyāṃ tanumātmanaḥ saḥ | cccvii.īkṣan mukhaṃ tasya mumoda so'pi hyuvāsa tasmin vatsarān pañca loke |
| astrāṇi tasmā adiśat sa vāsavo mahānti divyāni tadorvaśī tam | samprāpya bhāvena tu mānuṣeṇa mātā kulasyeti nirākṛt ā'bhūt |
| ṣaṇḍho bhavetyeva tayā'bhiśapte pārthe śakro'nugrahaṃ tasya cādāt | saṃ vatsaraṃ ṣaṇḍharūpī carasva na ṣaṇḍhatā te bhavatīti dhṛṣṇuḥ |
| tato'vasat pāṇḍaveyo gāndharvaṃ vedamabhyasan | gandharvāccitrasenāttu tathā'strāṇi sureśvarāt |
| subhadrayā'bhimanyunā saha svakāṃ puraṃ gataḥ | janārdano'tra saṃ vasan kadāciditthamaikṣata |
| mayā varo hi śambhave pradatta āsa pūrvataḥ | varaṃ grahīṣya eva te sakāṇsato vimohayan |
| "tvāmārādhya tathā ṇsambho grahīṣyāmi varaṃ sadā | dvāparādau yuge bhūtvā kalayā mānuṣādiṣu"
| iti vākyamṛtaṃ kartumabhiprāyaṃ vijajñuṣī | prītyarthaṃ vāsudevasya rugmiṇī vākyamabravīt |
| "jāte'pi putre putrārthaṃ sā hi veda manogatam | putro me balavān deva syāt sarvāstraviduttamaḥ " |
| ityukto bhagavān devyā sammohāya suradviṣām | yayau suparṇamāruhya svīyaṃ badarikāṇsramam |
| "eṣa mohaṃ sṛj āmyāṇsu yo janān mohayiṣyati | tvaṃ ca rudra mahābāho mohaśāstrāṇi kāraya |
| atatthyāni vitatthyāni darśayasva mahābhuja |
| ahaṃ tvāṃ pūjayiṣyāmi lokasammohanotsukaḥ | tamo'surā nānyathā hiyāntītyetanmataṃ mama" |
| ityuktavacanaṃ pūrvaṃ keśavena śivāya yat | tat satyaṃ kartumāyātaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ badarikāṇsramam | sarvajñā munayaḥ sarve pūjayāñcakrire prabhum |
| rātrau kṛṣṇe munimadhye niviṣṭe ghaṇṭākarṇaḥ karṇanāmā piśācau | samāyātāṃ giriśena pradiṣṭau kṛṣṇaṃ draṣṭuṃ dvārakāṃ gantukāmau |
| tau dṛṣṭvā munimadhyasthaṃ keśavaṃ tadabodhataḥ | kṛtvā svajāticeṣṭāṇsca dhyānenainamapaśyatām |
| dṛṣṭvā hṛdi sthitaṃ taṃ tu kautūhalasamanvitau | stutvā bhaktyā praṇāmaṃ ca bahuśaścakratuḥ śubhau |
| tayoḥ prasanno bhagavān spṛṣṭvā gandharvasattamau | cakāra kṣaṇamātreṇa divyarūpasvarānvitau |
| t ābhyāṃ punarnṛttagītasaṃ stavaiḥ pūjitaḥ prabhuḥ | yayau kailāsamadrīśaṃ cakāreva tapo'tra ca |
| svīyāneva guṇān viṣṇurbhuñjan (yuñjan) nityena śociṣā | śārvaṃ tapaḥ karotīva mohayāmāsa durjanān |
| tapo'surāṇāṃ mohāya surāḥ santu gatajvarāḥ |
| ājñayā cārayāmāsa kṣipraṃ dvādaśarāṇsiṣu | dvādaśābdamabhūt tena tadahaḥ keśavecchayā |
| ekasminnahni bhagavān rāṇsiṃ rāṇsiṃ ca vatsaram | kalpayitvopavāsādīn manasā niyamānapi |
| māsabrataṃ sārddhaśataśvāsakālairakalpayat | manasaiva svabhaktānāṃ dvādaśābdavratāptaye |
| tatrāsya garuḍādyāṇsca paricaryāṃ svapārṣadāḥ | cakrurhomādikāṇscaiva kriyāṇscakre janārdanaḥ | svātmānaṃ prati pāpānāṃ śivāyeti prakāṇsayan |
| evaṃ sthitaṃ tamaravindadalāyatākṣaṃ brahmendrapūrvasurayogivaraprajeśāḥ | abhyāyayuḥ pitṛmunīndragaṇaiḥ sametā gandharvasiddhavarayakṣavihaṅgamādyāḥ |
| śarvo'pi sarvasuradaivatamātmadaivamāyātamātmagṛhasannidhimāṇsvavetya | abhyāyayau nijagaṇaiḥ sahitaḥ sabhāryo bhaktyā'tisambhramagṛhītasamarhaṇāgryaḥ |
| abhyetya pādayugal . aṃ jagadekabhartuḥ kṛṣṇasya bhaktibharitaḥ śirasā nanāma | cakre stutiṃ ca paramāṃ paramasya pūrṇaṣāḍguṇyavigrahavidoṣamahāvibhūteḥ |

| kṛṣṇo'pyayogyajanamohanameva vāñchaṃ stuṣṭāva rudrahṛdigaṃ nijameva rūpam | rudro niśamya taduvāca surān samastān satyaṃ vadāmi śṛṇutādya vaco madīyam | viṣṇuḥ samastasujanaiḥ paramo hyupeyastatprāptaye'hamanilo'tha ramā'bhyupāyāḥ |

| eṣa hyaśeṣanigamārthavinirṇayottho yad viṣṇureva paramo mama cābjayoneḥ | avyaktataḥ sakalajīvagaṇācca nitya ityeva niścaya utaitadanusmaradhvam | ityuktavatyakhiladevagaṇā girīśe kṛṣṇaṃ praṇemurativṛddharameśabhaktyā |
| uktairanyaiśca giriśavākyaistattvavinirṇayaiḥ | kṛṣṇasyaiva guṇākhyānaiḥ punarindrādidevatāḥ | j ñānābhivṛddhimagaman purā'pi jñānino'dhikam |
| cccx.sarvadevottamaṃ taṃ hi jānantyeva surāḥ sadā | tathā'pi tatpramāṇānāṃ bahutvād ye'tra saṃ śayāḥ | yuktimātre te'pi rudravākyādapagatāstadā |
| tataḥ kṛṣṇaḥ sutavaraṃ tvatta ādāsya ityajaḥ | yaduktavāñchivaṃ pūrvaṃ satyaṃ kartuṃ tadabravīt |
| putraṃ dehīti so'pyāha pūrvameva sutastava | j ātaḥ pradyumnanāmā yaḥ sa maddattaḥ pravādataḥ |
| purā dagdho mayā kāmastadā'yācata māṃ ratiḥ | dehi kāntaṃ mametyeva tadā tāmahamabruvam |
| utpatsyate vāsudevād yadā taṃ patimāpsyasi | ityato'sau mayā datta iva deva tvadājñayā |
| dāso'smi tava deveśa pāhi māṃ śaraṇāgatam | ityuktvā'bhipraṇamyainaṃ punarāha surān haraḥ |
| yadarthameṣa āyātaḥ keśavaḥ śṛṇutāmarāḥ | yo'suro vakranāmā'sīdavadhyo brahmaṇo varāt | tadājātād vāsudevaputrāt kāmādṛte kvacit |
| taṃ hantumeva putraṃ svaṃ pradyumnamudare'rpya ca | āyāta iha taṃ cāpi dadāha svodarāt sutam | nissārayitvā kakṣaṃ ca dagdhaṃ paśyata devatāḥ |
| jvālāmālākarāl . ena svatejovarddhitena ca | pradyumnenaiva taṃ daityaṃ dagdhvā vanasamanvitam | punaśca svodare putraṃ sthāpayāmāsa keśavaḥ |
| sadyogarbhaṃ punastaṃ ca rugmiṇyāṃ janayiṣyati | pūrvavat kṣaṇamātreṇa yuvā ca sa bhaviṣyati |
| cccxi.dṛṣṭametannāradādyairmunibhiḥ sarvameva ca | evaṃ krīḍatyayaṃ devaḥ pūrṇaiśvaryeṇa kevalam | ityukte keśavaṃ nemurdevāḥ śakrapurogamāḥ |
| tato harirbrahmasurendramukhyaiḥ suraiḥ stuto garuḍaskandhasaṃ sthaḥ | punaḥ punaḥ praṇataḥ śaṅkareṇa stutastṛtīye'hni nijāṃ purīmagāt |
| kṛṣṇe prayāte nilayaṃ puradviṣo rātrau pauṇḍrau vāsudevaḥ samāgāt | sahaikalavyena nijena mātuḥ pitrā tathā'kṣohiṇikatrayeṇa |
| purīṃ prabhañjantamamuṃ viditvā sarāmaśaineyayadupravīrāḥ | saṃ yodhayāmāsurathābhyavarṣaccharairniṣādādhipa ekalavyaḥ |
| tadastraśastraiḥ sahasā viṣaṇṇā yadupravīrā vihatapradīpāḥ | sahaiva rāmeṇa ṇsineśca naptrā samāviśan svāṃ purameva sarve |
| punaḥ samādāya tathorudīpikā agre samādhāya ca rauhiṇeyam | vinissṛt ā āttaśastrāḥ svapuryāḥ siṃ hā yathā dharṣit āḥ sadguhāyāḥ |
| "athā'sasādaikalavyaṃ rathena rāmaḥ śaineyaḥ pauṇḍrakaṃ vāsudevam | ayuddhyatāṃ tau sātyakiḥ pauṇḍrakaśca tathā'nyonyaṃ virathaṃ cakratuśca"
| tato gadāyuddhamabhūt tayordvayostathā rāmaścaikalavyaśca vīrau | kṛtvā'nyonyaṃ virathaṃ gadābhyāmayuddhyatāṃ j ātadarpau balāgryau |
| tasmin kāle keśavo vainateyamāruṃ hyā'yād yatra te yuddasaṃ sthāḥ | dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇaṃ harṣasampūritātmā rāmo hantuṃ caikalavyaṃ samaicchat |
| udyamya dorbhyāṃ sa gadāṃ javenaivābhyāpatad rauhiṇeyo niṣādam | balaṃ kopaṃ cāsya dṛṣṭvaikalavyaḥ parādravajjīvitecchuḥ sudūram |
| vidrāvayan rauhiṇeyo'nvayāt taṃ bhīto'pataccaikalavyo'mbudhau saḥ | velāntaṃ taṃ drāvayitvā'tra tasthau rāmo gadāpāṇiradīnasattvaḥ |
| rāmo vijityātibalaṃ raṇe ripuṃ mudaiva dāmodaramāsasāda | pauṇḍrastvavajñāya śinipravīraṃ nivāryamāṇo'pi yayau janārdanam |
| taṃ keśavo virathaṃ vyāyudhaṃ ca kṣaṇena cakre sa yayau nijāṃ purīm | prasthāpayāmāsa punaśca dūtaṃ kṛṣṇāyaiko vāsudevo'hamasmi |
| madīyali' ngāni visṛjya cā'śu samāgacchethāḥ śaraṇaṃ māmanantam | taddūtoktaṃ vākyametanniśamya yadupravīrā uccakaiḥ prāhasan sma |
| kṛṣṇaḥ prahasyā'ha tavā'yudhāni dāsyāmyahaṃ li ṅgabhūtāni cā'jau | ityukto'sau dūta etyā'ha tasmai sa cābhyāgād yoddhukāmo hariśca |
| taṃ śātakaumbhe garuḍe rathasthe sthitaṃ cakrādīn kṛtrimān sandadhānam | śrīvatsārthe dagdhavakṣasthalaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇaḥ prāhasat pāpabuddhim |
| tato'straśastrāṇyabhivarṣamāṇaṃ vijitya taṃ vāsudevo'riṇaiva | cakarta tatkandharaṃ tasya cānu mātāmahasyācchinat sāyakena |
| apātayaccā'śu śiraḥ sa tena kāṇsīśvarasyeśvaro vāraṇāsyām | sa ca brahmāhaṃ vāsudevo'smi nityamiti jñānādagamat tat tamo'ndham |
| sāhāyyakṛccāsya ca kāṇsirājo yathaiva kirmīrahiḍimbasālvāḥ | anye ca daityā apataṃ stamo'ndhe tathaiva so'pyapatat pāpabuddhiḥ |
| nihatya tau keśavo raugmiṇeyaṃ punarvaidarbhyāṃ janayāmāsa sadyaḥ | sa caikalavyo rāmajitaḥ śivāya cakre tapo'jeyatāṃ cā'pa tasmāt |
| sa śarvadattena vareṇa dṛptaḥ punaryoddhuṃ kṛṣṇamevā'sasāda | tasyāstraśastrāṇi nivārya keśavaścakreṇa cakre tamapāstakandharam | sa cā'pa pāpastama eva ghoraṃ kṛṣṇadveṣānnityaduḥkhātmakaṃ tat |
| cccxiii.evaṃ yadūnāmṛṣabheṇa sūdite pauṇḍre tathā kāṇsinṛpe ca pāpe | kāṇsīśaputrastu sudakṣiṇākhyastapo'caracchaṅkarāyorubhaktyā |

| pratyakṣagaṃ taṃ śivaṃ pāpabuddhiḥ kṛṣṇābhāvaṃ yācate duṣṭacetāḥ | kṛtyāmasmai dakṣiṇāgnau śivo'pi daityāveśādadadādāvṛt ātmā | 22.208| sa dakṣiṇāgniścāsurāveśayuktaḥ sampūjitaḥ kāṇsirājātmajena | varādumeśasya vivṛddhaśaktiryayau kṛṣṇo yatra sampūrṇaṇsaktiḥ |
| kṛṣṇastasya pratighātārthamugraṃ samādiśaccakramanantavīryaḥ | j ājvalyamānaṃ tadamoghavīryaṃ vyadrāvayad vahnimimaṃ sudūram |
| kṛtyātmako vahnirasau pradhānavahneḥ putraścakravidrāvito'tha | sahānubandhaṃ ca sudakṣiṇaṃ taṃ bhasmīcakārā'śu saputrabhāryām |
| dagdhvā purīṃ vāraṇasīṃ sudarśanaḥ punaḥ pārśvaṃ vāsudevasya cā'gāt | sudakṣiṇo'sau tama eva jagmivān kṛṣṇadveṣāt sānubandhaḥ supāpaḥ |
| kṛṣṇaḥ krīḍan dvāravatyāṃ supūrṇanityānandaḥ kvacidāha sma bhaiṣmīm | viḍambayan gṛhiṇāmeva ceṣṭā nityāvirodho'pi tayā vidoṣayā |
| tvayā nakāryaṃ mama kiñca bhadre mayā'rīṇāṃ mānabhaṅgārthameva | samāhṛt ā'sīti sā cāviyogaṃ sadā kṛṣṇenā'tmano'pyeva vettrī |
| striyā bhetavyaṃ bharturityeva dharmaṃ vijñāpayantī duḥkhitevā'sa devī | t āṃ sāntvayāmāsa gṛhasthadharmaṃ vijñāpayan devadevo'pyaduḥkhām |
| evaṃ krīḍatyabjanābhe ramāyāṃ kṛṣṇādiṣṭo gokulaṃ rauhiṇeyaḥ | prāyād dṛṣṭvā tatra nandaṃ yaśodāṃ tatpūjitaḥ kṛṣṇavārtāṃ ca pṛṣṭaḥ |
| māsau tatra nyavasad gopikābhī reme kṣībo yamunāmāhvayacca | matto'yamityeva nadīmanāgatāṃ cakarṣa rāmo lāṅgalenāgryavīryaḥ |
| punastayā praṇataḥ saṃ stutaśca vyasarjayat tāmatha nandagopam | āpṛcchya jagāda dvārakāṃ keśavāya nyavedayannandagopādibhaktim |
| cccxiv.tadaiva maindo vividaśca bhaume hate sakhāyau dānavāveśayuktau | ānartarāṣṭraṃ vāsudevapratīpau vyanāṇsayetāṃ vāsudevo'tha coce |
| rāmāya so'dād varamabjanābho vadhyāvetau bhavatāṃ te'pyavadhyau | varād viriñcasya tathā'mṛt āṇsanādubhau ca maindo vivido vrajeti |

| gatvā sa maindaṃ prathamaṃ jaghāna krodhāt yuddhāyā'gataṃ raivatāgre | dine parasmin vividaṃ jaghāna śilā varṣantaṃ musalenāgryakarmā | tayorāviṣṭau tāvasurau tamo'ndhaṃ prāptau ca tāvaśvinau svaṃ ca lokam |
| duryodhanasyā'sa putrī ratiryā pūrvaṃ nāmnā lakṣaṇā kāntarūpā | svayambarasthāṃ t āṃ balādeva sāmbo jagrāha sā cainamāsānuraktā |

| balād gṛhīt āṃ vīkṣya tāṃ karṇamukhyā duryodhanādyā yuyudhuḥ krodhadīptāḥ | kṛcchreṇa taṃ virathīkṛtya caikaṃ sarve sametā jagṛhurdhārtarāṣṭrāḥ | karṇena bhūriśravasā casārddhaṃ bāhvorbalādeva duryodhanasya |
| śrutvaiva tad vṛṣṇayaḥ sarva eva samudyamaṃ cakrire kauraveṣu | nivārya tān balabhadraḥ svayaṃ yayau sahoddhavaḥ kauraveyāñchamārthī |
| purasya bāhyopavane sthitaḥ sa prāsthāpayaccoddhavaṃ kauravārthe | āgatya sarve kuravo'sya pūjāṃ cakruḥ sa cā'hograsenasya cā'jñām |
| ājñāpayad vo nṛpatiḥ sma yannaḥ kumārakaḥ pragṛhīto bhavadbhiḥ | ekaḥ sametairbahubhirbāndhavārthaṃ kṣāntaṃ tanno muñcatā'śveva sāmbam |
| ājñāpayāmāsa va ugrasena ityuktameva tu niśamya kurupravīrāḥ | saṃ śrāvya duṣṭavacanāni balaṃ puraṃ svaṃ krodhāt samāviviśuratra cukopa rāmaḥ |
| sa lāṅgalena tat puraṃ vikṛṣya jāhnavījale | nipātayan nivāritaḥ praṇamya sarvakauravaiḥ |
| sabhāryamāṇsu putrakaṃ suyodhanābhipūjitam | sapāribarhamāpya ca prajagmivān svakāṃ puram |
| cccxv.ityādikarmāṇi mahānti rāmasyā'sañcheṣasyācyutāveśino'lam | yasyācyutāveśaviśeṣakālaṃ j ñātvā bhīmo'pyasya nodeti yuddhe |
| krīḍāyuddhe bahuśo rauhiṇeye vyaktiṃ viṣṇorbhīmaseno viditvā | t ātkālikīṃ krīḍamāno'pi tena naivodyamaṃ kurute viṣṇubhaktyā |
| tadā jayī prabhavatyeṣa rāmo nātivyaktastatra yadā janārdanaḥ | tadā bhīmo vijayī syāt sadaiva viṣṇoḥ keśāveśavān yat sa rāmaḥ |
| etādṛśenaiva rāmeṇa yukte kṛṣṇe dvārvatyāṃ nivasatyabjanābhe | svapne'niruddhena ratā kadācid bāṇātmajoṣā citralekhāmuvāca |
| tamānayetyatha sā citravastre pradarśya lokān samadarśayat tam | pautraṃ viditvā vacanācca tasyāḥ kṛṣṇasya taṃ cā'nayat tatra rātrau |
| aniruddhaṃ guṇodāramānītaṃ citralekhayā | prāpya reme bāṇasutā divasān subahūnapi |
| gūḍhaṃ kanyāgṛhe taṃ tu jñātvā kanyābhirakṣiṇaḥ | ūcurbāṇāyādiśacca kiṅkarān grahaṇe'sya saḥ |
| āgatānaniruddhastān parigheṇa mahābalaḥ | nihatya drāvayāmāsa svayamāyāt tato'suraḥ | sa tu yuddhvā'tikṛcchreṇa nāgāstreṇa babandha tam |
| atha kṛṣṇaḥ samāruhya garuḍaṃ rāmasaṃ yutaḥ | pradyumnena ca tatrāgāt prathamaṃ tatra vahnibhiḥ |
| yuddhvaivāṅgirasā caiva kṣaṇād vidrāpya tān hariḥ | vidrāpya sarvapramathānāsasāda jvaraṃ tataḥ |
| tena bhasmaprahāreṇa jvaritaṃ rohiṇīsutam | āṇsliṣya vijvaraṃ cakre vāsudevo jagatprabhuḥ |
| cccxvi.svayaṃ vikrīḍya tenātha kañcit kālaṃ janārdanaḥ | niṣpiṣya muṣṭibhiścānyaṃ sasarja jvaramacyutaḥ |
| svayaṃ jitvā'pi giriśabhṛtyaṃ nālamiti prabhuḥ | svabhṛtyenaiva jetavya ityanyaṃ sasṛje tadā |
| jvareṇa vaiṣṇavenāsau subhṛśaṃ pīḍitastadā | grāsārthamupanītaśca jagāma śaraṇaṃ harim | tena stutaḥ sa bhagavān mocayāmāsa taṃ vibhuḥ |
| krīḍārthamatyalpajaneṣvapi prabhuḥ kathañcideva vyajayad vyathāṃ vinā | ityādi mohāya sa darśayatyajo nityasvatantrasya kuto vyathādayaḥ |
| yadā jvarādyā akhilāḥ pravidrutāstadā svayaṃ prāpa hariṃ girīśaḥ | tayorabhūd yuddhamathainamacyuto vijṛmbhayāmāsa ha jṛmbhaṇāstrataḥ |
| vijṛmbhite śaṅkare niṣprayatne sthāṇūpame saṃ sthite kañjajātaḥ | daityāveśād vāsudevānabhijñaṃ sambodhayāmāsa saduktibhirvibhuḥ |
| pragṛhya śarvaṃ ca viveśa viṣṇoḥ sa tūdaraṃ darśayāmāsa tatra | śivasya rūpaṃ stambhitaṃ bilvanāmni vane girīśena ca yat tapaḥ kṛtam |
| śaivaṃ padaṃ prāptumevācyutācca taccāvadat kañjajaḥ śaṅkarasya | apetamoho'tha vṛṣadhvajo hariṃ tuṣṭāva bāṇo'bhisasāra keśavam | tasyācyuto bāhusahasramacchinat punaścāriṃ jagṛhe tacchiro'rthe |
| tadā ṇsivena praṇato bāṇarakṣaṇakāmyayā | kṛtvā svabhaktaṃ bāṇaṃ taṃ rarakṣa dvibhujīkṛtam | mocayitvā'niruddhaṃ ca yayau bāṇena pūjitaḥ |
| evamagnīna' ngirasaṃ jvaraṃ skandamumāpatim | bāṇaṃ cāyatnato jitvā prāyād dvāravatīṃ punaḥ |
| yenāyatnena vijitaḥ sarvalokaharo haraḥ | kiṃ jvarādijayo viṣṇostasyānantasya kathyate |
| cccxvii.īdṛśānantasaṅkhyānāṃ śivānāṃ brahmaṇāmapi | ramāyā api yadvīkṣāṃ vinā na calituṃ balam |
| naca jñānādayo bhāvā nacāstitvamapi kvacit | anantaśakteḥ kṛṣṇasya na citraḥ śūlino jayaḥ |
| citralekhāsametoṣānvitapautrasamanvitaḥ | sarāmaḥ sasuto vīndramāruhya dvārakāṃ gataḥ | reme tatra ciraṃ kṛṣṇo nityānando nijecchayā |
| evaṃ vidhānyagaṇit āni yadūttamasya karmāṇyagaṇyamahimasya mahotsavasya | nityaṃ ramākamalajanmagirīśaśakrasūryādibhiḥ parinutāni vimuktidāni |
| evaṃ vasatyamitapauruṣavīryasāre nārāyaṇe svapuri śakradhanañjayoktaḥ | samprāpya lomaśamuniḥ sakalāni tīrthānyāptuṃ sa pāṇḍutanayeṣu sahāya āsīt |

| pṛthvīṃ pradakṣiṇata etya samastatīrthasnānaṃ yathākramata eva vidhāya pārthāḥ | sampūjya teṣu nikhileṣu hariṃ subhaktyā kṛṣṇe samarpayitumāpuratha prabhāsam | sambhāvanāya sakalairyadubhiḥ sametasteṣāṃ ca rāmasahito harirājagāma |
| pārthaiḥ sampūjitastatra kṛṣṇo yadugaṇaiḥ saha | pārthān sampūjayāmāsurvṛṣṇayaścā'jñayā hareḥ |
| tatra bhīmaṃ tapoveṣaṃ dṛṣṭvā'tisnehakāraṇāt | duryodhanaṃ nindayati rāme sātyakirabravīt |
| sarve vayaṃ nihatyādya sakarṇān dhṛtarāṣṭraj ān | abhimanyuṃ sthāpayāmo rājye yāvat trayodaśam |
| saṃ vatsaraṃ samāpyaiva puraṃ yāsyanti pāṇḍavāḥ | tato yudhiṣṭhiro rājā rājyaṃ śāsatu pūrvavat |
| evaṃ vadatyeva śinipravīre janārdanaḥ pārthamukhānyudīkṣya | uvāca śaineya na pāṇḍuputrāḥ pareṇa saṃ sādhitarājyakāmāḥ |
| cccxviii.svabāhuvīryeṇa nihatya śatrūnāpsyanti rājyaṃ ta itīrite'munā | tatheti pārthā avadaṃ stataste kṛṣṇaṃ puraskṛtya yayurdaśārhāḥ |
| krameṇa pārthā api śaiśiraṃ giriṃ samāsadaṃ statra kṛṣṇāṃ sudurge | viṣajjantīmīkṣya taiḥ samsmṛto'tha haiḍimba āyāt sahito niśācaraiḥ |
| uvāha kṛṣṇāṃ sa tu tasya bhṛtyā ūhuḥ pārthāṃ ste badaryāṇsramaṃ ca | prāpyātra nārāyaṇapūjayā kṛtasvakīyakāryā yayuruttarāṃ diśam |
| atītya śarvaśvaśuraṃ giriṃ te suvarṇakūṭaṃ niṣadhaṃ giriṃ ca | meroḥ prācyāṃ gandhamāde girau ca prāpurbadaryāṇsramamuttamaṃ bhuvi |
| tasmin munīndrairabhipūjyamānā nārāyaṇaṃ pūjayantaḥ sadaiva | cakrustapo jñānasamādhiyuktaṃ sattattvavidyāṃ pratipādayantaḥ |
| evaṃ badaryāṃ viharatsu teṣu kvacid rahaḥ kṛṣṇayā vāyusūnau | sthite garutmānuragaṃ jahāra mahāhradād vāsudevāsanāgryaḥ |
| tatpakṣavātena vicālite tu tasmin girau kamalaṃ haimamagryam | papāta kṛṣṇābhīmayoḥ sannidhāne udyadbhānormaṇḍalābhaṃ sugandham |
| dṛṣṭvā'tigandhaṃ varahemakañjaṃ kutūhalād draupadī bhīmasenam | bahūnyayācat tādṛśānyānubhāvamaviṣahyaṃ j ānatī devadaityaiḥ |
| tayā'rthitaḥ sagadastuṅgamenaṃ giriṃ vegādāruhad vāyusūnuḥ | praśasyamānaḥ surasiddhasaṅghaiḥ mṛtnan daityān siṃ haśārdūlarūpān |
| āsedivāṃ statra hanūmadākhyaṃ nijaṃ rūpaṃ prodyadādityabhāsam | j ānannapyenaṃ svīyarūpaṃ sa bhīmaścikrīḍa etena yathā pareṇa |
| dharmo devānāṃ paramo mānuṣatve svīye rūpe'pyanyavadeva vṛttiḥ | anādānaṃ divyaśakterviśeṣānnarasvabhāve sarvadā caiva vṛttiḥ | tasmād bhīmo hanumāṃ ścaika eva jyāyaḥ kanīyovṛttimatrābhipede |
| cccxix.sarve guṇā āvṛt ā mānuṣatve yugānusārānmūlarūpānusārāt | kramāt surāṇāṃ bhāgato'vyaktarūpā ādānato vyaktimāyāntyurūṇām |
| naivāvyaktiḥ kācidastīha viṣṇoḥ prādurbhāve'pyatisuvyaktaśakteḥ | icchāvyaktiḥ prāyaśo mārutasya tadanyeṣāṃ vyaktatā kāraṇena |
| tasmād bhīmo dharmavṛddhyarthameva svīye rūpe'pyanyavad vṛttimeva | pradarśayāmāsa tathā'surāṇāṃ mohāyaivāṇsaktavacchaktirūpaḥ |
