| tadrūpavṛddhiṃ bhīmaseno'tha dṛṣṭvā ṇsrutvā hanūmanmukhataḥ kathāṇsca | rāmasya taccāturātmyaṃ ca divyaṃ cāturyugaṃ dharmamapyagryameva |
| dhvajād bībhatsorgarjanenaiva śatruparābhave tena datte'rjunasya | yayau praṇamyainamāṇsveva bhīmaḥ saugandhikaṃ vanamatyagryarūpam |
| narāgamyāṃ nal . inīmetya tatra dṛṣṭvā padmānyadbhutākāravanti | haimāni divyānyatigandhavanti sāmāsadad vāryamāṇo narāṇsaiḥ |
| te bhīmamāttāyudhamugrarūpaṃ mahābalaṃ rūpanavāvatāram | nyavārayan krodhavaśā sametāḥ śataṃ sahasrāṇyajitāni saṅkhe |
| varācchivasyaiva parairajeyāḥ śastrāstravṛṣṭiṃ mumucuḥ subhīmām | bhīme'khilajñe tapasāṃ nidhāne balodadhau śaivaśāstraṃ vadantaḥ |
| t ān vaiṣṇavaireva śāstraiḥ sa bhīmo vijitya pūrvaṃ vāṅmaye saṅgare tu | śāstrāstravarṣasya kurvan pratīpaṃ jaghne'khilān gadayā teṣu vīrān |
| vātena kuntyāṃ balavān sa jātaḥ śūrastapasvī dviṣatāṃ nihantā | satye ca dharme ca rataḥ sadaiva parākrame śatrubhirapradhṛṣyaḥ |
| tatrāparāṃ ścaiva bahūnasatyaṃ nirīśvaraṃ cāpratiṣṭhaṃ ca lokam | siddho'hamīśo'hamiti bruvāṇān guṇān viṣṇoḥ khyāpayan vādato'jait |

| bhinnaṃ viṣṇumadhikaṃ sarvataśca bruvan pravīrān lakṣameṣāṃ nijaghne | te tasya vīryaṃ ca balaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā vidyābalaṃ bāhubalaṃ tathaiva | cccxx.aṇsaknuvantaḥ sahitāḥ samastā hatapravīrāḥ sahasā nivṛtt āḥ |
| vikramya tān gadayā'sau nihatya vidrāpya sarvān nal . inīṃ praviśya | pītvā'mṛt āmbhaśca tato'mbujāni divyāni jagrāha kurupravīraḥ |
| atho kalahaśaṃ sīni nimittāni yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇāmapṛcchacca kva bhīma iti dīnadhīḥ |
| saugandhikārthaṃ yātaṃ taṃ śrutvā kṛṣṇāmukhānnṛpaḥ | āruhya rākṣasaśreṣṭhān kṛṣṇayā bhrātṛbhiḥ saha |
| yayau vṛkodaro yatra dṛṣṭvā cainamavasthitam | uvāca maivamityenaṃ bhīto giriśakopataḥ |
| devebhyo maraṇād bhīt ā rākṣasā vittapājñayā | tadīyāṃ nal . inīṃ te hi rakṣantyasyā'śrayo haraḥ | j ānan vitteśvaro bhīmamāhātmyaṃ na cukopa ha |
| vasatsu tatra pārtheṣu punaḥ katipayairdinaiḥ | uvāca bhīmasenasya yaśodharmādibhivṛddhaye |
| pañcavarṇāni puṣpāni kṛṣṇā vīkṣyā'hṛt āni tu | mārutena kuberasya gṛhānnṛbhiragamyataḥ |
| agamyo'yaṃ giriḥ sarvaiḥ kubereṇābhipālitaḥ | adya tvayaiva gantavyo vidhūyākhilarākṣasān |
| ityukta āṇsu sagadaḥ sadhanuḥ sabāṇo bhīmo girīndramajitorubalo vigāhe | prāptaṃ niśāmya baladaivatasūnumatra padmatrayaṃ nyaruṇaduddhatarākṣasānām |
| agre nidhāya maṇimantamajeyamugraṃ śambhorvarād vividhaśastramahābhivṛṣṭyā | t ān sarvarākṣasagaṇān maṇimatsametān bhīmo jaghāna sapadi pravaraiḥ śaraughaiḥ |
| avadhyāṃ stān kṣaṇenaiva hatvā bhīmo mahābalaḥ | raṇe krodhavaśān sarvānatiṣṭhad girimūrddhani |
| cccxxi.te hatā bhīmasenena prāpurandhandhantamo'khilāḥ | hatāḥ saugandhikavane maṇimāṃ śca punaḥ kalau | j āto mithyāmatiṃ samyagāstīryā'pustamo'dhikam |
| tato vaiśravaṇo rājā mahāpadmatraye hate | rākṣasānāmavadhyānāṃ sakhāye maṇimatyapi | āruroha rathaṃ divyaṃ yoddhukāmo vṛkodaram |
| asurāveśatastasya bhīme krodho mahānabhūt | sa ājagāma bhīmena yoddhuṃ vittapatiḥ svayam |
| tasmin kāle bhīmasenasya ghoṣaṃ śrutvā rājā'pṛcchadāṇsu sma kṛṣṇām | kva bhīma ityeva tayoditaṃ ca śrutvā jagāma'śu rakṣo'ṃ sasaṃ sthaḥ |
| sabhrātṛke munibhiḥ kṛṣṇayā ca gate rājanyatra bhīmaṃ kuberaḥ | dṛṣṭvā'surāveśato dharmajaṃ ca kiñcinmuktaḥ snehayuktastathā'sa |
| dhṛt āyudhaṃ bhīmamīkṣyāpi kiñcid daityāveśād bahu mene na bhīmam | agastyaśāpaṃ cāvadat svasya pūrvaṃ sakhāyanāṇse kāraṇaṃ rājarājaḥ |
| daityāveśādujjhitaḥ śāntabhāvo dadau nijaṃ sthānameṣāṃ sutuṣṭaḥ | āvāsārthaṃ te'vasaṃ statra pārthāstathā'nyeṣāṃ daivatānāṃ gṛheṣu |
| tatraiva teṣāṃ vasatāṃ mahātmanāmānandināmabdacatuṣṭaye gate | pañcābdamadhyāpya mahānti cāstrāṇīndro gurvarthaṃ phalgunenārthito'bhūt |
| vadhaṃ vavre svaśatrūṇāmindraḥ pārthāt svarūpataḥ | nivātakavacākhyānāṃ yeṣāṃ brahmā dadau varam | avadhyatvaṃ surairdaityairgandharvaiḥ pakṣirākṣasaiḥ |
| punarindreṇārthito'dājjahīmān naradehavān | iti tenārjunaṃ śakraḥ svātmānaṃ naradehagam | jagāda tān jahītyeva kirīṭaṃ svaṃ nibaddhya ca |
| cccxxii.aindraṃ syandanamāruhya pārtho mātalisaṃ yutaḥ | gāṇḍīvaṃ dhanurādāya yayau hantuṃ mahāsurān |
| śaṅkhaṃ dadustasya devā devadattaḥ sa śaṅkharāṭ| nādayan śaṅkhaghoṣeṇa dhanurviṣpharayan mahat |
| dadhānaḥ kuṇḍale divye śakradatte subhāsvare | āsasāda puraṃ divyaṃ daityānāmindranandanaḥ |
| tasya śaṅkhadhvaniṃ śrutvā gāṇḍīvasya ca nissvanam | abhisasrurmahāvīryā nivātakavacāsurāḥ |
| tisraḥ koṭyo dānavānāṃ svayambhuvaragarvitāḥ | nānāyudhai raṇe pārthamabhyavarṣan susaṃ hatāḥ |
| teṣāṃ sa śastrāṇi kirīṭamālī nivārya gāṇḍīvadhanuḥ pramuktaiḥ | śaraiḥ śirāṃ si pracakarta vīro mahāstraśikṣābalasamprayuktaiḥ |
| sarve hatāstena mahārathena te dānavāḥ so'pi yayau tathā'nyān | paulomakāleyagaṇābhidhānān ṣaṣṭiṃ sahasrāṇi mahārathānām |
| t ānastraśastrāṇyabhivarṣamāṇān dhanañjayaḥ pāṇsupatāstrato drāk | dagdhvā yayau punarevendrasadma taṃ sasvaje prītiyuktaśca śakraḥ |
| yayurandhaṃ tamaste'pi sarvadevadviṣo'surāḥ | athānujñāpya pitaraṃ rathenaindreṇa bhāsvatā | sodaryāṇāṃ sakāṇsaṃ sa yayau vajradharātmajaḥ |
| āyāntamīkṣya bībhatsuṃ mumudurbhrātaro'dhikam | ūṣuṇsca caturo'bdāṃ ste punarmerau pramodinaḥ |
| kathābhirvāsudevasya dhyānenābhyarcanena ca | yayau kālaḥ sukhenaiva teṣāṃ viṣṇuratātmanām |
| naiva śatrūnanutsādya nānādāya mahad yaśaḥ | cccxxiii.nākṛtvā vāsudevājñāṃ rājñāṃ mukhyagatirbhavet |
| tadanyeṣāṃ tu varṇānāṃ kṣamā bāhyeṣu ṇsatruṣu | prāyo dharma iti prokto harerājñā'khilasya ca |
| iti bhīmavacaḥ śrutvā sasodaryo yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | rākṣasaskandhamārūḍhaḥ kṛṣṇayā cā'yayau punaḥ |
| pādeṣu teṣu nivasatsu himācalasya yāmyāṇsriteṣu pavamānasutaḥ kadācit | dhanvī mṛgānanucaran sahasā'sasāda hā'yoḥ sutaṃ nahuṣamājagarorurūpam |
| pūrvaṃ hi vṛtravadhato'mbujanāl . atantusaṃ sthe śacīpraṇayini pravicintya devāḥ | cakrustrilokapatimāyusutaṃ varaṃ ca datvā'kṣigocaratapo'sya balaṃ ca sarvam |
| sa sarvasuraviprendratapaśca balamakṣayam | avāpya vavṛdhe nityaṃ darpādaicchacchacīmapi |
| sa indravacanācchacyā maharṣigaṇavāhane | niyukto vañcanāyaiva vāhayāmāsa tānṛṣīn |
| sa śacīpratiṣedhārthamagastyena mahātmanā | vedaprāmāṇyaviṣaye pṛṣṭo netyāha mūḍhadhīḥ | pramāṇamiti tenoktaḥ śirasyenaṃ padā'hanat |
| tadā bhṛguṃ tasya jaṭāsu līnaṃ kadā'pi tasyākṣipathaṃ na yātam | āviśya kañjaprabhavaḥ śaśāpa vrajā'śu pāpājagaratvameva |

| ṣaṣṭhe kāle yastvayā'sāditaḥ syāt sa te vaśaṃ yātu balādhiko'pi | yadā gṛhītaṃ puruṣaṃ nihantuṃ na śakṣyase yadi sa tvadgṛhītaḥ | śakto'pi nā'tmānamabhipramocayet tadā'sya syāt tvattapo'gryaṃ balaṃ ca |
| sarvadevamunīnāṃ yat tapastvāṃ samupāṇsritam | tacca sarvaṃ tamevaiti nātra kāryā vicāraṇā |
| yadā praśnāṃ stvadīyāṃ śca kaścit parihariṣyati | cccxxiv.tadā gantā'si ca divaṃ visṛjyā'jagaraṃ tanum | smṛtiśca matprasādena sarvadā te bhaviṣyati |
| bhṛgudehagatenaivaṃ śaptaḥ kamalayoninā | papātājagaro bhūtvā nahuṣaḥ kṣaṇamātrataḥ |
| indro'pyavāpa svaṃ sthānamiṣṭvā viṣṇuṃ vipāpakaḥ | dharmavṛddhyarthamevaitat pāpamāsīcchacīpateḥ |
| nahi lokāvanaṃ pāpaṃ trailokyeśasya vajriṇaḥ | vṛtraṃ hatvā mahānāsetyādi vedapadaṃ ca yat |
| kvacit pāpaṃ ca puṇyānāṃ vṛddhaye bhavati sphuṭam | vṛtrahatyā yathendrasya jātā dharmasya vṛddhaye |
| devānāṃ vā munīnāṃ vā bhavedevaṃ navai nṛṇām | pāpaṃ yat puṇyamevaitadasurāṇāṃ vilomataḥ | evaṃ skānde hi vacanaṃ na pāpaṃ tacchacīpateḥ |
| nānyasya padamāpsyanti tad devānāṃ vrataṃ param | tasmāt te nahuṣaṃ śakrapade nidadhurīśvarāḥ |
| tasminnevaṃ nipatite brahmaṇaḥ śāpakāraṇāt | aṣṭāviṃ śatime prāpa yuge bhīmastamulbaṇam | j ānanneva tadīyaṃ tat tapa ādātumīpsayā |
| yattat surāṇāṃ sarveṣāṃ munīnāṃ ca tapaḥ sthitam | tad gṛhītuṃ vaśagavadicchayaivā'sa mārutiḥ |
| devānāṃ hi nṛj ātānāmalpaṃ vyaktaṃ bhaved balam | icchayā vyaktatāṃ yāti vāyoranyeṣu tacca na |
| nityavyaktā guṇā viṣṇoriti śāstrasya nirṇayaḥ | evamanye'pi hi guṇā mānuṣādiṣu janmasu |
| cccxxv.devānāṃ mānuṣādau tu śakye'pyavyaktatākṛteḥ | dharmavṛddhirbhavet teṣāṃ prīto bhavati keśavaḥ |
| tanmānuṣe bale tasya varād vāritavat sthite | daivaṃ balaṃ na śakto'pi vyaktaṃ cakre na mārutiḥ |
| ātmamokṣāya na praśnān vyājahāra sa cābhibhūḥ | vidyopajīvanaṃ dharmo viprāṇāmapi no yataḥ |
| kimuta kṣatriyasyeti jānannapi vṛkodaraḥ | tatpraśnaparihāreṇa nā'tmamokṣaṃ samaicchata |
| ayatantamapi hyenaṃ cālanāyāpi nāṇsakat | pūrṇo'pi sarvalokānāṃ balena nahuṣastadā | veṣṭayitvaiva taṃ bhīmaṃ sthito'sau nāṇsakat param |
| bhrātṛmātrādiṣu snehāt kṣipramātmavimokṣaṇam | icchannapi na mokṣāya yatnaṃ cakre vṛkodaraḥ | sarvadevamunīndrāṇāṃ tapa ādātumatragam |
| bhrātrādiṣu snehavaśānna sthātavyamihetyapi | manvānaḥ kālato bhaṅgaṃ svayamevaiṣa yāsyati | ājñayā vāsudevasya dārḍhyād dehasya me tathā |
| srastāṅge patite sarpe yāsyāmīti vicintayan | tasthau bhīmo hariṃ dhyāyan svabhāvānna tadicchayā |
| tadaiva brahmavacanāt pūrvoktāt keśavājñayā | balaṃ tapaśca sarvasya tatsthamāyād vṛkodaram |
| pūrite nahuṣasthena tapasā ca balena ca | bhīme sa nahuṣo'thā'sīt srastabhogaḥ śanaiḥ śanaiḥ |
| gate bhīme nimittāni dṛṣṭvā rājā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | papraccha kva gato bhīma iti kṛṣṇāṃ calanmanāḥ |
| cccxxvi.yātaṃ mṛgārthaṃ sa niśamya tasyāstadūruvegāt patitān nagendrān | dṛṣṭvā pathā tena yayau sa tatra dṛṣṭvā ca sarpāvṛtamanvapṛcchat |
| sa kāraṇaṃ nahuṣāt sarvameva śuśrāva tatpraśnamaśeṣataśca | bhrātṛsnehād vyākarod dharmasūnustadaiva so'pyāruhat svargalokam |
| divyāmbare kuṇḍalini svapūrve gate vimānena sa dharmarājaḥ | bhīmaścā'yāt svāṇsramāyaiva sarvaṃ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ kathayāmāsa tatra |
| śrutvā kṛṣṇā bhrātaraścāsya sarve sarve munīndrā bhīmasene'tibhaktāḥ | vrīl . āṃ yayurbhīmasenagraheṇa tathā'bruvan snehato bhīmasenam |
| naitādṛśaṃ sāhasaṃ te'nurūpaṃ śakto'pi yat svātmano mokṣaṇāya | naivā'caro yatnamato nijānāṃ mahad duḥkhaṃ hṛdaye prārpayastvam |
| maivaṃ punaḥ kāryamiti bruvantaḥ samāṇsliṣan sarva evaitya bhīmam | tato'hobhiḥ kaiścidāpuḥ kurūṇāṃ rāṣṭraṃ pārthā munimukhyaiḥ sametāḥ |
| tato'mitaujābhagavānupāgamannārāyaṇaḥ satyabhāmāsahāyaḥ | sampūjitaḥ pāṇḍavaistaiḥ sametaścakre'tha sauhārdanimittasatkathāḥ |
| kṛṣṇā ca satyā ca parasparaṃ mudā sambhāṣaṇaṃ cakraturyoṣidagrye | parīkṣantyā satyayā sarvavettryā nirdoṣayā coditā prāha kṛṣṇā |
| strīdharmānakhilāṃ statra satyāṃ nirdoṣasaṃ vidam | j ñātvā'pi kṛṣṇā provāca lokaśikṣārthameva tu |
| krīḍārthameva vacanaṃ j ñātvā satyāsamīritam | tasyānusāravākyāni tatprītyā eva sā'bravīt |
| tataḥ katipayāhāni niruṣyātra janārdanaḥ | yayau sabhāryaḥ svapurīṃ pāṇḍavānanumānya ca |
| cccxxvii.tataḥ kadācinmṛgayāṃ gateṣu pārtheṣu rājā saindhava āsasāda | sakoṭikāṇsyaḥ sabalaśca teṣāṃ varāṇsramaṃ so'tra dadarśa kṛṣṇām |
| brajan vivāhārthamasau niśāmya kṛṣṇāṃ koṭiṃ preṣayitvaiva kāṇsyam | āyāhi māmityavadat supāpastayā nirasto jagṛhe kare ca |
| tayā dhuto nipapātā'śu bhūmau punaśca sajjo'bhyapatad vilajjaḥ | tato'sahāyatvata eva kṛṣṇā dhaumyāyoktvā sāgniranvehi meti | samāruhat saindhavasyaiva yānaṃ sukhaṃ na yāsīti tamīrayitvā |
| tadā nimittāni niśāmya pārthāḥ samāyayustvarayaivā'śramāya | śrutvā dāsīvacanāt sarvameva cakruḥ kṣipraṃ saindhavasyānuyānam |

| ākrośamānaṃ bhīmaseneti dhaumyaṃ dṛṣṭvā tasyāgre saindhavaṃ cātipāpam | cakrurnādān siṃ havat pāṇḍuputrā dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇā cāvatarad rathāt tadā | dhaumyena sārddhaṃ sā yayau cā'śramāya sainyaṃ pārthāstatra nijaghnurojasā |
| agre kṛṣṇāṃ yo'vadat sindhurājaṃ yāhīti taṃ koṭikāṇsyaṃ supāpam | chitvā ṇsiro mṛtyave bhīmaseno nivedayāmāsa tamaḥ sa cāgāt |
| hatvā senāmakhilāṃ saindhavasya bhīmārjunau sayamaṃ dharmarājam | visṛjya dhāvantamathānujagmaturjayadrathaṃ virathaṃ phalguno'kaḥ |
| padbhyāṃ dhāvantaṃ bhīmaseno nigṛhya datvā prahārāṃ śca bhṛśaṃ tamārtam | ādāyādhād draupadīpādayośca taṃ mocayāmāsa ca dharmasūnuḥ |
| dāso draupadyā ahamityeva vākye tenaivokte bhīmaseno'pyamuñcat | sa brīl . ito'vāgvadano yayau vanaṃ pārthāṇsca tatroṣuratipramodinaḥ |
| mārkaṇḍeyastadā'gatya teṣāmakathayat kathāḥ | bahvyaścaiva vicitrāṇsca bhāṣātrayasamanvitāḥ |
| lokadarśanamāṇsritya devāṇsca munayastathā | brūyuḥ kathāstatra śikṣā grāhyā nārthāḥ kathañcana |
| cccxxviii.arthaḥ samādhibhāṣāsu grāhyaḥ sarvo'pyasaṃ śayam | paradarśanabhāṣāsu jñeyaṃ taddarśanaṃ tathā |
| grāhyo nārtho vaidikaṃ tu darśanaṃ grāhyameva ca | anyārtho guhyabhāṣāsu grāhya evaṃ vinirṇayaḥ |
| jayadrathastu bhīmena tadā pañcaśikhīkṛtaḥ | tapasā ṇsivamāradhya vavre pāṇḍavarodhanam | ṛte'rjunādarjunasya tuṣṭo hi tapasā ṇsivaḥ |
| vane vasatsveva ca pāṇḍaveṣu cakre yajñaṃ pauṇḍarīkākhyameva | saṃ spardhayā rājasūyasya rājā duryodhano nāpyasau tatkalārhaḥ |
| duryodhanasyā'jñayā pāṇḍavānāṃ duḥ śāsanaḥ preṣayāmāsa tatraḥ | āgacchatetyavamānāya taṃ tu bhīmo'vādīd raṇayajñaṃ svagamyam |
| tato dinaiḥ kaiścana dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ sakarṇagāndhāranṛpāḥ kumantrataḥ | sabhāryakāḥ pāṇḍavān draupadīṃ ca mahaiśvaryaṃ darśayitvā'vamantum |
| te syandanaiḥ kāñcanaratnacitrairmahāgajaisturagaiḥ pattibhiśca | svalaṅkṛt āṇscitramālyāmbarāṇsca viniryayurdvaitavanāya śīghram |
| gavāṃ dṛṣṭicchadmanā nirgatāṃ stān jñātvā ṇsakrastejaso bhaṅgakāmaḥ | tatsāmarthyaṃ varamasmai pradāya tadbandhanāyādiśaccitrasenam |
| sa ṣaṣṭisāhasrakakoṭiyūthapairgandharvamukhyaiḥ saṃ vṛto'gāt sarastat | yasmin snātuṃ vāñchati dhārtarāṣṭrastadājñayā puruṣāstānathocuḥ |
| snātuṃ samāyāsyati dhārtarāṣṭro r ājeśvaro nissaradhvaṃ tadasmāt | tīrthādājñāṃ dhārayantaśca tasyetyuktā gandharvā jahasustānathoccaiḥ |
| ūcurvayaṃ mānayāmastadājñāṃ trilokānāṃ yaḥ patiḥ śakradevaḥ | na mānuṣāṇāmapi cakravartināṃ kimvalpasārasya suyodhanasya |
| itīrite kupito dhārtarāṣṭro jaghāna gandharvavarāñcharaughaiḥ | cccxxix.jaghnuḥ sakarṇā api tasya sodarā jaghnuśca te dhārtarāṣṭrasya senām |
| muhūrtamāsīt samameva yuddhaṃ teṣāṃ tadā dhārtarāṣṭrasya caiva | purāṃ bhindorvarato māyayā ca gandharvavīrā vavṛdhustataḥ sma |
| tejobhaṅgaṃ tatra suyodhanasya pārthārthamatra pravidhātumeva ca | balaṃ dadāvabjajaḥ keśavaśca gandharvāṇāṃ te'bhyayurdhārtarāṣṭrān |
| sa citrasenaḥ prathamaṃ karṇameva yuyodha pārthaspardhayā tena yuddhyan | karṇo nāṇsaknod vacanād bhārgavasya rāmasya nityāmitaṣaḍguṇasya |
| sa bhagnayānaśca vikarṇayānamāsthāya tasyaiva niyamya vājinaḥ | parādravat tena sahaiva śīghraṃ duryodhanaścitrasenaṃ yuyodha |
| muhūrtamenena samaṃ sa yuddhyannanyairgandharvairbahubhirmāyayaiva | bhagne rathe bhūmital . e sthitaḥ san gṛhīta āsīccitrasenena saṅkhe |
| mahābalo dhārtarāṣṭro'pi śakravarād viṣṇorājñayā cābhivṛddhe | sa citrasenena dhṛtastadā'sīd baddhaḥ pāṇsairvaidyutairindradattaiḥ |
| tasyānujāḥ śakunī rājabhāryāḥ sarve baddhāḥ śakrabhṛtyaiḥ praṇīt āḥ | ādāya tānambaraṃ samprayāteṣvarūruvan pāṇḍavān mantriṇo'sya |
| samīpamāgatya pṛthāsutānāṃ paribhūtaṃ vaḥ kulaṃ śakrabhṛtyaiḥ | dhṛtaḥ sabhāryaḥ sānujo dhārtarāṣṭrastaṃ mocayadhvaṃ bhrātaraṃ bhāratāgryāḥ |
| ityukta ūce bhīmaseno'grajaṃ svaṃ j āne rājan yādṛśo'yaṃ vimardaḥ | aiśvaryaṃ svaṃ darśayan na samāgād duryodhanastejaso bhaṅgamicchan |
| vijñāya teṣāṃ mantritaṃ vajrabāhuretaccakre nātra naḥ kāryahāniḥ | divyaṃ j ñānaṃ svātmano darśayan sa etāvaduktvā virarāma bhīmaḥ |
| ekāhayajñe dīkṣitenaiva rājñā sampreṣito bhīmaseno'rjunaśca | samādreyo citrasenaṃ raṇe tau vijitya duryodhanamāṇsvamuñcatām |
| cccxxx.sa citraseno vāsavoktaṃ ca sarvaṃ kumantritaṃ dhārtarāṣṭrasya cā'ha | pārthasya bhīmasya ca tanniśamya subrīl . ito dhṛtarāṣṭrātmajo'bhūt |
| samāpya yajñaṃ ca tato'bhiyātaṃ sarve prāpurdharmarājaṃ sa cā'śu | sampūjya tūtsṛjya ca citrasenamūce gāndhāre na punaḥ kāryamīdṛk |
| sa pāṇḍavairmocitaḥ sānujaśca sabhāryakaḥ kiñcidato'pagamya | sammel . anāyopaviṣṭaṇsca tatra subrīl . itaḥ sūtaputraṃ dadarśa |
| sa cā'ha diṣṭyā jayasi rājanniti suyodhanam | brīl . ito neti taṃ coktvā yathāvṛttaṃ suyodhanaḥ | uktvā prāyopaveśaṃ ca cakre tatra suduḥkhitaḥ |
| karṇaduḥ śāsanābhyāṃ ca saubalena ca devinā | anyaiśca yācyamāno'pi naivottasthau suyodhanaḥ |
| tato niśāyāṃ prāptāyāṃ svapakṣe praviṣīdati | mantrayitvā'suraiḥ kṛtyā nirmitā homakarmaṇā |
| śukreṇotpāditā kṛtyā sā prasupteṣu mantriṣu | dhārtarāṣṭraṃ samādāya yayau pātāl . amāṇsu ca | atha sambodhayāmāsurdaityā duryodhanaṃ nṛpam |
| tvaṃ divyaḥ puruṣo vīraḥ sṛṣṭo'smābhiḥ pratoṣit āt | tapasā ṇsaṅkarād vajrakāyo'vadhyaśca sarvadā | asmākaṃ pakṣabhūtastvaṃ devānāṃ caiva pāṇḍavāḥ |
| idānīṃ sarvadevānāṃ varāt tvaṃ vijito raṇe | vayaṃ tathā kariṣyāmo yathā jeṣyasi pāṇḍavān |
| kṛṣṇena nihataścaiva narakaḥ karṇa āsthitaḥ | sa ca kṛṣṇārjunābhāvaṃ kariṣyati na saṃ śayaḥ |
| bhīṣmādīṃ śca vayaṃ sarvānāviśāma jayāya te | tapasā varddhayiṣyāmastvāṃ karṇādīṃ śca sarvaśaḥ |
| cccxxxi.tasmād gatvā pālayasva rājyaṃ rājannapetabhīḥ | idaṃ kasyāpi nā'khyeyaṃ suguptaṃ bhūtivarddhanam |
| ityuktvā kṛtyayā bhūyaḥ svasthāne sthāpito nṛpaḥ | umayā nirmitātmārddhamuttaraṃ haranirmitam | j ñātvaivāvadhyatāṃ caiva rājye buddhiṃ cakāra saḥ |
| novāca kasyacit teṣu svānubhūtaṃ suyodhanaḥ | prabhātāyāṃ tu śarvaryāṃ punaḥ karṇo vaco'bravīt |
| bhṛtyaistavaiva pārthairyanmocito'si parantapa | tena mānyo'dhikaṃ loke yad bhṛtyā eva tādṛśāḥ | kimu tvaṃ rājaśārdūla taduttiṣṭha sthiro bhava |
| yā ca te'rjunamāhātmye śaṅkā sā vyaitu me śṛṇu | yāvannaivārjunaṃ hanyāṃ pādau prakṣāl . aye svayam |
| ityukto'varajaiścaiva sarvaiḥ śakuninā tathā | yācito rathamāruhya yayau nāgapuraṃ drutam |
| sakuṇḍalaṃ sakavacamavadhyaṃ sūryanandanam | j ñātvendra ubhayaṃ tasmādaicchadādātumuttamam |
| tad vijñāya raviḥ karṇaṃ svapna uktvā nyavārayat | sarvathā dāsya ityukte prāhā'deyaṃ varāyudham |
| dadau cotkṛtya kavacaṃ kuṇḍale ca śacīpateḥ | amoghāṃ śaktimādāya jñātvaiva dvijarūpiṇam |
| ṛte'rjunādekameva vadhiṣyasyanayeti saḥ | datvā ṇsaktiṃ yayau śakraḥ sārddhaṃ kavacakuṇḍalaiḥ |
| pārthā vimucyaiva suyodhanaṃ taṃ vane vasanto muditāḥ sadaiva | sahāraṇībhāṇḍamatho mṛgeṇa hṛtaṃ dvijasyā'śu niśamya cānvayuḥ |
| cccxxxii.tasminnadṛśye tṛṣit ā ekaika udakārthinaḥ | yayuryudhiṣṭhiramṛte suptāste dharmamāyayā |
| adṛśyenaiva dharmeṇa vāritā vāripāyinaḥ | kṣatradharmasya rakṣārthaṃ na tatpraśnān vidāṃ varāḥ | vyācakruḥ śaktimanto'pi pānīyārthamarindamāḥ |
| na viprāṇāṃ ca dharmo'yaṃ vidyāyā upajīvanam | kṣatriyāṇāṃ tu kimuta prasabhaṃ tena te papuḥ |
| devā api manuṣyeṣu jātāḥ subalino'pi hi | mānuṣeṇaiva bhāvena yuktāḥ syuḥ keśavādṛte | kāryeṣveṣāṃ krameṇaiva vyaktimāyānti sadguṇāḥ |
| ato bhīmārjunau dharmādatyuttamabalāvapi | devamāyāṃ samāṇsritya dharmeṇa svāpitau kṣaṇāt |
| muhūrtameva sā māyā tayorācchādanakṣamā | tataḥ prabuddhayordharmo naiva śaktiśatāṃ śabhāk |
| uktaṃ pādmapurāṇe ca tadetat sarvamañjasā | tasmānnāṇsaktiranayoḥ sambhāvyā bhīmapārthayoḥ |
| dharmātmajo'thā'jagāmodakāntaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhrātḸṛṃ statra duḥkhābhitaptaḥ | icchan pātuṃ vāri saṃ vāritaśca pitrā bakākāramitena nāpāt |
| arthe bhrātḸṛṇāmaicchadasau tadīyapraśnaprativyāharaṇaṃ dayāl . uḥ | tato dharmo yakṣatanuḥ sa bhūtvā praśnāṃ ścakre vyākarot tān sa pārthaḥ |
| tatastuṣṭo varamasmai dadau sa ekotthānaṃ bhrātṛmadhye sa vavre | yadyekaḥ syānnakulo'stvityathā'ha tuṣṭo dharmaḥ kathametat kṛtaṃ te | atiprītirbhīmasene tavāsti balī cāsau rājyahetustava syāt |
| ityukta ūce mādriputraṃ vihāya kuntīputro na mayotthāpanīyaḥ | cccxxxiii.sa evamukto nitarāṃ prīyamāṇa utthāpayāmāsa ca tān samastān |
| yatheṣṭarūpaprāptimeṣāṃ punaśca svakāmatonijarūpāptimādāt | ajñātavāse'jñātatāṃ sarvadaiva dadau teṣāṃ prīta ivā'nṛśaṃ syāt | evaṃ krīḍan putra ityātmanaiva yaśodharmāvātmano varddhayan saḥ |
| yudhiṣṭhirātmanastasya yaśodharmavivṛddhaye | kṛtvā'raṇyapahārādi punardatvā ca tat svayam | dātuṃ viprāya taddhaste yayau dharmo divaṃ punaḥ |
| tato rājā bhīmasenārjunau ca sārddhaṃ yamābhyāmaraṇīṃ pradāya | mudā yutāḥ kṛṣṇayā sārddhameva santuṣṭuvuḥ kṛṣṇamanantamacyutam |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye araṇīprāptirnāma dvāviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ cccxxxiv.(aj_ñḸatavāsasamāptiḥ_) atha trayoviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | nārāyaṇānugrahato yathāvannistīrya tān dvādaśābdān vane te | visṛjya ca brāhmaṇādīn sadhaumyānajñātavāsāya tato mano dadhuḥ |
| cdlxxi.atha hatayorgal . ikeśyoḥ śvaphalkajaprāpitaḥ purīṃ gal . ikeśyoḥ | bhaṅktvā dhanurājavaraṃ jaghāna tenaiva ca svayaṃ rājavaram |
Śve. U.
| sa gatvā dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ taṃ bhīṣmadroṇādibhiryutam | uvāca na virodhasta utpādyo dharmasūnunā | yasya bhīmārjunau yaudhau netā yasya janārdanaḥ |
| śrutāste bhīmanihatā jarāsandhādayo'khilāḥ | yathā ca rudravacanādavadhyā rākṣasādhipāḥ |
| tīrthavighnakarāḥ sarvatīrthānyācchādya saṃ sthitāḥ | tisraḥ koṭyo mahāvīryā bhīmenaiva nisūditāḥ |
| bhrātḸṛṇāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ ca lokānāṃ ca hitaiṣiṇā | tato hi sarvatīrthāni gamyānyāsan nṛṇāṃ kṣitau |
| yathā jaṭāsuraḥ pāpaḥ śarvāṇīvarasaṃ śrayāt | avadhyo viprarūpeṇa vañcayanneva pāṇḍavān |
| j ñātvā'pi bhīmasenena viprarūpasya no vadhaḥ | yogya ityahato bhīme mṛgayārthaṃ gate kvacit |
| yamau yudhiṣṭhiraṃ kṛṣṇāṃ cā'dāyaiva parādravat | dṛṣṭo bhīmena tāṃ styaktvā saṃ saktastena saṅgare |
| nipātya bhūmau pādena sañcūrṇitaśirāstamaḥ | jagāma kimu te putrāḥ śakyā hantumiti sma ha |
| nivātakavacāṇscaiva hatāḥ pārthena te śrutāḥ | j ānāsi ca harervīryaṃ yasyedamakhilaṃ vaśe | sabrahmarudraśakrādyaṃ cetanācetanātmakam |
| cccxli.tasmādetaiḥ pālitasya dharmajasya svakaṃ vasu | dīyatāmiti tenokto dhṛtarāṣṭro nacākarot |
| tataḥ sahaiva yadubhiḥ kṛṣṇaṃ dvāravatīṃ gatam | yuddhasāhāyyamicchantau dhārtarāṣṭradhanañjayau |
| yugapad yayatustatra vegenājayadarjunam | duryodhanaḥ śirasthāna āsīno'bhūddharestadā |
| darpānnāhaṃ rājarāja upāsye pādayoriti | tayorāgamanaṃ pūrvaṃ j ñātvaiva hi hariḥ prabhuḥ |
| asuptaḥ suptavacchiśye tatrātiṣṭhad dhanañjayaḥ | praṇamya pādayoḥ prahvo bhaktyudrekāt kṛt āñjaliḥ |
| tamaikṣat prathamaṃ devo jānannapi suyodhanam | svāgataṃ phalgunetyukte pūrvamāgāmahaṃ tviti | āha duryodhanastaṃ ca svāgatenābhyapūjayat |
| tayorāgamane hetuṃ śrutvā prāha janārdanaḥ | ekaḥ pūrvāgato'trānyaḥ pūrvadṛṣṭo mayā yataḥ |
| samaṃ kariṣye yuvayorekatrāhaṃ nirāyudhaḥ | anyatra daśalakṣaṃ me putrāḥ śūrāḥ padātayaḥ |
| ityukte phalgunaḥ kṛṣṇaṃ vavre tadbhaktimān yataḥ | anyastatrābhaktimattvād vavre gopān prayuddhyataḥ |
| pārthānāmeva sāhāyyaṃ kariṣyannapi keśavaḥ | tasyābhaktiṃ darśayituṃ cakre samavadīśvaraḥ |
| tataḥ pārthena sahitaḥ pāṇḍavān keśavo yayau | duryodhano yayau rāmaṃ sa bhayāt keśavasya ca | na sāhāyyaṃ karomīti prāha tatsnehavānapi |
| cccxlii.upaplāvye sabhāyāṃ hi tatpakṣīyaṃ vaco bruvan | nirākṛtaḥ sātyakinā samakṣaṃ keśavasya ca |
| tato duryodhanaṃ nāyāt sa ca hārdikyasaṃ yutaḥ | jagāma hastinapuramakṣohiṇyo daśābhavan | ekā ca dhārtarāṣṭrasya nānādeśyairnṛpairyutāḥ |
| sapta pāṇḍusutānāṃ ca mātsyadrupadakekayaiḥ | dhṛṣṭaketujarāsandhasutakāṇsīnṛpairyutāḥ |
| purujit kuntibhojaśca cekitānaśca sātyakiḥ | pāṇḍavān senayā yuktāḥ samīyurdevapakṣiṇaḥ |
| vindānuvindāvāvantyau jayatseno'nyakekayāḥ | kṣemadhūrtirdaṇḍadhāraḥ kaliṅgo'mbaṣṭha eva ca |
| śrutāyuracyutāyuśca bṛhadbalasudakṣiṇau | śrutāyudhaḥ saindhavaśca rākṣaso'lambusastathā |
| alāyudho'lambalaśca daityā duryodhanaṃ yayuḥ | gatvā duryodhanāhūto bhagadatto'pi taṃ yayau |
| saputrapautro bāhlīko bhīṣmadroṇakṛpā api | prītyarthaṃ dhṛtarāṣṭrasya babhūvustatsutānugāḥ |
| pāṇḍyaśca vīrasenākhyaḥ pāṇḍavāneva saṃ śritaḥ | śalyaṃ ca pāṇḍavāneva yāntaṃ j ñātvā suyodhanaḥ | susabhāḥ kārayāmāsa sarvabhogasamanvitāḥ |
| t ā yudhiṣṭhiraklṛptāḥ sa matvā ṇsalyo'bravīdidam | ya etāḥ kārayāmāsa tadabhīṣṭaṃ karomyaham |
| līnaḥ śrutvā dhārtarāṣṭraḥ satyaṃ kurvityabhāṣata | dehi me yuddhasāhāyyamiti so'pi yaśo'rthayan | rakṣārthamātmavākyasya tathetyevābhyabhāṣata |
| cccxliii.sa pāṇḍavāṃ stato gatvā tairanujñāta eva ca | tejovadhārthaṃ karṇasya dhanañjayakṛte'rthitaḥ | tathetyuktvā yayau dharmanandanaṃ kauravān prati |
| sañjayaṃ preṣayāmāsa dhṛtarāṣṭro'tha śāntaye | pāṇḍavān pratyadharmaṃ ca yuddhaṃ sa pratyapādayat |
| haṭhavāde'vadad bhīmo yaṃ dharmaṃ draupadī tathā | tamevoktvā dharmajastu cakāra ca niruttaram | kṛṣṇo'pi tasya dharmasya prāmāṇyaṃ pratyapādayat |
| tato niruttaraḥ kṛṣṇaṃ pāṇḍavāṃ śca praṇamya saḥ | dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ yayau taṃ ca vinindya prayayau gṛham |
| ninditaḥ sañjayenāsāvāhūya viduraṃ niśi | papraccha so'vadad dharmaṃ pārthānāṃ rājyadāpanam |
| aihikasya sukhasyāpi kāraṇaṃ tadaninditam | anyathā sarvaputrāṇāṃ nāṇsaṃ dharmātilaṅghanam |
| tatra bhāvamakṛtvā sa jñānādicchannaghakṣayam | viṣṇoḥ svarūpaṃ papraccha so'smaracca sanātanam |
| sa āgatyāvadat tattvaṃ viṣṇormāyāvinaḥ śubhā | na gatiścetyatha prātaḥ sañjayaḥ pāṇḍavoditam | avadad dhṛtarāṣṭrāya sabhāyāṃ kurusannidhau |
| tacchrutvā satubhīto'pi putrasnehānugo nṛpaḥ | rājyaṃ nādāt pāṇḍavānāṃ tato dharmasuto nṛpaḥ |
| yaduktavān sañjayāya yadi ditsatiḥ naḥ pitā | rājyaṃ tadā tvamāgaccha viduro vā na cennaca | t āvathānāgatau jñātvā mantrayāmāsa śauriṇā |
| cccxliv.so'pyāhāhaṃ gamiṣyāmi sabhāyāmṛṣisannidhau | vakṣye pathyāni yuktāni yadi nāsau grahīṣyati | vadhyaḥ sarvasya lokasya sa bhavet sarvadharmahā |
| ityukte vairamātmotthaṃ lokamadhye prahāpayan | lokasaṅgrahaṇārthāya bhīmaseno'bravīd vacaḥ |
| nāsmannimittanāṇsaḥ syāt kulasyāpi vayaṃ kulam | rakṣituṃ dhārtarāṣṭrasya bhavemādhaścarā iti |
| icchatā'pyakhilān hantuṃ dhārtarāṣṭrān dṛḍhātmanā | bhīmenokto vāsudevo lokasaṅgrahaṇecchayā |
| vadhaṃ teṣāṃ dharmameva loke jñāpayituṃ hariḥ | ākṣipanniva bhīmaṃ taṃ yuddhāya prerayad dṛḍham |
| abhiprāyaṃ keśavasya jānan bhīmo nijaṃ balam | rājñāṃ madhye'vadat tacca kṛṣṇo'bhyadhikameva hi |
| śaśaṃ sa satyaiḥ sadvākyai rājñāṃ madhye prakāṇsayan | vadhaṃ kurūṇāṃ saddharmaṃ guṇān bhīmasya cāmitān |
| nityamekamanaskau tāvapi keśavamārutī | evaṃ lokasya saṃ vādahetoḥ saṃ vādamakratām |
| tataḥ kṛṣṇo'rjunaṃ caiva kṛpāluṃ sandhikāmukam | hetumadbhiḥ śubhairvākyairanunīya jagatpatiḥ | ukto mānuṣayā buddhyā nakulena sunītivat |
| śauryaprakāṇsanāyaiva yuddhaṃ yojayatāṃ bhavān | ityuktaḥ sahadevena yuyudhānena cācyutaḥ |
| dasyūnāṃ nigraho dharmaḥ kṣatriyāṇāṃ yataḥ paraḥ | ato na dhārtarāṣṭrairnaḥ sandhiḥ syāditi pārṣatī | jagāda kṛṣṇaṃ so'pyenāṃ Oṃ ityuktvā viniryayau |
| cccxlv.sasātyakiḥ syandanavaryasaṃ sthitaḥ pṛthātanūjairakhilaiḥ sa bhūmipaiḥ | anvāgato dūrataraṃ girā tān saṃ sthāpya viprapravaraiḥ kurūn yayau |
| eko'pi viṣṇuḥ sa tu bhārgavātmā vyāsaḥ saśiṣyastadananyadṛśyaḥ | yayau tadukterhi guṇān pravettuṃ nānyo hi śaktastamṛte yataḥ prabhum |
| sa vandyamāno'khilarāṣṭravāsibhiḥ prasūnavarṣairabhivarṣitaḥ suraiḥ | saṃ stūyamānaḥ praṇato'bjajādibhirgajāhvayaṃ prāpa paro'prameyaḥ |
| sa bhīṣmamukhyaiḥ sarasābhiyātaḥ sahaiva taiḥ prayayau rājamārge | didṛkṣavastaṃ jagadekasundaraṃ guṇārṇavaṃ prāyayuratra sarve |
| sabhājitastaiḥ paramādareṇa viveśa gehaṃ nṛpateranantaḥ | sa bhīṣmamukhyān purato nidhāya vaicitravīryeṇa samarcito'jaḥ | raugme niṣaṇṇaḥ paramāsane prabhurbabhau svabhāsā kakubho'vabhāsayan |
| yathocitaṃ teṣu vidhāya keśavo dauryodhanaṃ prāpya gṛhaṃ ca pūjitaḥ | pūjāṃ tadīyāṃ guṇavaddviḍityasau jagrāha no viduraṃ cā'jagāma |
| sa bhīṣmapūrvairabhiyācito'pi jagāma naiṣāṃ gṛhamādidevaḥ | upekṣit ā draupadīyaprameyo jagāma gehaṃ vidurasya śīghram |
| sa tena bhaktyā'bhigataḥ prasannaḥ praviśya cāntargṛhamīśvaro'jaḥ | bhaktyā'bhipūrṇena sasambhrameṇa sampūjitaḥ sarvasamarpaṇena |
| pare dine'sau dhṛtarāṣṭrasūnunā samānītaḥ saṃ sadi kauravāṇām | viveśa divye maṇikāñcanāsane sārddhaṃ munīndraiḥ paramārthavedibhiḥ |
| sampūjito bhīṣmamukhyaiḥ samastai rarāja rājīvasamānanetraḥ | yathocitāstatra vidhāya vārtā jagāda kāle kalikalmaṣāpahaḥ |
| vaicitravīrya svakulasya vṛddhyai pradehi rājyaṃ tava satsutāya | yaśaśca dharmaṃ paramaṃ prasādaṃ mama tvamāpnoṣi tadaiva rājan | ato'nyathā yaśaso dharmataśca hīnaḥ pratīpatvamupaiṣi me'taḥ |
| cccxlvi.itīritaḥ prāha mamātivartinaḥ sutaṃ svayaṃ me pratibodhayeti | sa vāsudevena vibodhito'pi pāpābhisandhirdhṛtarāṣṭrasūnuḥ | utthāya tasmādanujairamātyairniyantumīśaṃ kumatirvyadhānmatim |
| yeye tadā keśavasaṃ yamāya nyamantrayaṃ ste vibudhapratīpāḥ | ato vikarṇapramukhā api sma vadhyatvamāyannaśubhāṃ gatiṃ ca |
| karṇaḥ surāgryo'pi suyodhanārthe nyamantrayad bhāvato naiva duṣṭaḥ | ato gatiścāsya suśobhanā'bhūd ye'trānukūlāḥ paramasya te śubhāḥ |
| ṛṣibhirjāmadagnyena vyāsenāpyamitaujasā | vāsudevātmanā caiva trirūpeṇaiva viṣṇunā |
| mātāpitṛbhyāṃ bhīṣmādyairanuśiṣṭo'pi durmatiḥ | duryodhano mantrayate mukundasyā'śu bandhanam |
| sātyakiḥ kṛtavarmā ca tacchuśruvaturañjasā | saṃ sthāpya kṛtavarmāṇaṃ rahaḥ sātyakiratra ca | abhyetya keśavaṃ prāha duryodhanaviniścayam |
| j ānannapyakhilaṃ kṛṣṇastacchrutvā sātyakermukhāt | vaicitravīryamavadat paśya māmiti sarvagam |
| atha tenā'hute putre sāmātye puruṣottamaḥ | svaṃ rūpaṃ darśayāmāsa sarvagaṃ pūrṇasadguṇam |
| tat kālasūryāmitadīpti sarvajagadbharaṃ śāṇsvatamaprameyam | dṛṣṭvaiva cakṣūṃ ṣi suyodhanādyā nyamīlayan dīdhitivāritāni |
| pidhāya rūpaṃ punareva taddharirvaicitravīryeṇa samarthitaḥ punaḥ | kṛtvā'ndhameva prayayau suyodhanaṃ sahānugaṃ pāpatamaṃ prakāṇsya |
| anantaśaktiḥ puruṣottamo'sau śakto'pi duryodhanacittanigrahe | naiva vyadhādenamathoktakāriṇaṃ nipātayannandhatamasyanantaḥ |
| cccxlvii.punaśca kuntīgṛhametya kṛṣṇastayodyogaṃ dharmasutasya śiṣṭam | śrutvā yayau sūryajamātmayāne nidhāya tasyāvadadātmajanma |
| āyāhi pāṇḍūniti tadvacaḥ sa naivākaronmānito dhārtarāṣṭraiḥ | saṃ sthāpya taṃ bhagavān drauṇaye ca raho'vadanmitrabhāvaṃ pṛthājaiḥ |
| yāvat piturmaraṇaṃ so'pi maitrīṃ vavre pārthaistaṃ ca visṛjya kṛṣṇaḥ | yayau kurūn pūrvamevodvisṛjya pṛthāsutānāṃ sa sakāṇsamīśaḥ |
| samprārthitaḥ pṛthayā caiva karṇaḥ pārthairyogaṃ yāhi sūnurmamāsi | tenāpyuktā vāsavinā vinā'haṃ hanyāṃ sutāṃ ste na kathañcaneti |
| tato yayuḥ kauravāḥ pāṇḍavāṇsca kurukṣetraṃ yoddhukāmāḥ sakṛṣṇāḥ | cakruśca te śibirāṇyatra sarve śubhe deśe pāṇḍavāḥ kṛṣṇabuddhyā |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye yuddhodyogo nāma caturviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ cccxlviii.(bhīṣmapātaḥ ) atha pañcaviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | te sene samarārambhe samete sāgaropame | bhīmabhīṣmamukhe vīkṣya prāha vāsaviracyutam |
| prādāt sāndīpanaye mṛtaputraṃ jñḸanadīpasandīpanaye | gurvarthe'jñḸanatamaḥ prabheditā nityasambhṛtājñḸanatamaḥ |
Śve. U.
| gatvā virāṭasya purīṃ nidhāya hetīḥ śamyāṃ channarūpā babhūvuḥ | yatiḥ sūdaḥ ṣaṇḍhaveṣo'śvasūtaveṣo gopo gandhakartrī cajātāḥ |
| sarve virāṭaṃ yayuratra devavat sambhāvitāstena śubhorulakṣaṇāḥ | yudhiṣṭhirasyaiva śuśrūṣaṇaṃ te cakrurhṛdā vāsudevasya nānyat |
| parapāko gṛhasthasya kṣatriyasya viśeṣataḥ | na yogya iti sūdasya babhre veṣaṃ vṛkodaraḥ |
| vaidikavyavahāreṣu jñānādhikyaprasiddhitaḥ | j ānīyurbhīma ityeva śūdraveṣastato'bhavat |
| svīyaṃ vedavidāṃ sarvaṃ deveśānāṃ ca kiṃ punaḥ | ataste'nyāṇsrayaṃ naiva cakruḥ svabalasaṃ śrayāt |
| śāpādevārjunaḥ ṣaṇḍhaveṣo'bhūnnakulastathā | kṣatriyānantaratvāttu sūtajātestathā'bhavat |
| sūtasyānantaratvāttu vaiśyajātestathā'bhavat | sahadevo vaiśyajātirgopālasteṣu cottamaḥ | tato gopālatāmāpa yatiḥ pūjyo'khilairyataḥ |
| yatirāsīd dharmajo'taḥ so'bhyāsārthaṃ sadaiva ca | akṣāsakto'bhavat paścād darśayiṣyan svaśiṣṭatām |
| bhīmasenasadharmārthaṃ śūdrā sairandhrikā'bhavat | draupadī bhartṛsādharmyaṃ strīṇāṃ dharmo yataḥ sadā |
| athā'jagāma mallakaḥ samastabhūmimaṇḍale | cccxxxv.vareṇa yo'jito jayī śivasya sañjagarja ca |
| tamīkṣya sarvamallakā virāṭarājasaṃ śrayāḥ | pradudruvurbhayārditāstadā'vadad yudhiṣṭhiraḥ |
| ya eṣa sūda āṇsu taṃ nihatya mallamojasā | yaśastavābhivarddhayet samāhvayādya taṃ nṛpa |
| itīrite samāhuto jagāda mārutirvacaḥ | prasādato harerahaṃ nisūdaye'dya mallakam |
| samastadevavṛndato mahān ya eva keśavaḥ | samastadevanāmavāṃ stadīyabhaktito balam |
| ya eva devanāmadhā iti śrutirjagāda hi | mahāṃ śca deva eṣa tat sa me jayaṃ vidhāsyati |
| yudhiṣṭhirābhidhaśca yo yudhiṣṭhire sthitaḥ sadā | tvayi sthitastvamityasau sadā'bhidhīyate hariḥ |
| iti bruvāṇo mallaṃ tamabhiyāto vṛkodaraḥ | anayanmṛtyulokāya balāḍhyairapi durjayam |
| evaṃ nivasatāṃ tatra pāṇḍavānāṃ mahātmanām | saṃ vatsare dvimāsone vijitya diśa āgataḥ | kīcako matsyanṛpateḥ syālo balavatāṃ varaḥ |
| sa draupadīmīkṣya manobhavārtaḥ samprārthayāmāsa tayā nirastaḥ | māse gate bhaginīṃ svāṃ sudeṣṇāṃ samprārthayāmāsa tadarthameva |
| tayā niṣiddho'pi punaḥ punastāṃ yadā yayāce'tha ca sā'ha kṛṣṇām | samānayā'śveva surāṃ madarthamitīritā neti bhīt ā'vadat sā |
| balāt tayā preṣit ā tadgṛhāya yadā'gamat tena haste gṛhīt ā | vidhūya taṃ prādravat sā sabhāyai smṛtvā'dityasthaṃ vāsudevaṃ pareśam |
| cccxxxvi.anudrutyaitāṃ pātayitvā padā sa santāḍayāmāsa tadā ravisthitaḥ | nārāyaṇo hetināmaiva rakṣo nyayojayat tadadṛśyaṃ samāgāt |
| vāyustamāviśya tu kīcakaṃ taṃ nyapātayat tāṃ samīkṣyaiva bhīmaḥ | cukopa vṛkṣaṃ ca samīkṣamāṇaṃ taṃ vārayāmāsa yudhiṣṭhiro'grajaḥ |
| kṛṣṇā rātrau bhīmasakāṇsametya hantuṃ pāpaṃ kīcakaṃ prairayat tam | bhīmasya buddhyā niśi sā kīcakaṃ ca jagāda gantuṃ śūnyagṛhaṃ sa cāgāt |
| tatrainamāsādya tu bhīmaseno vijitya taṃ bāhuyuddhe nihatya | śiro gude pāṇipādau ca tasya praveśayāmāsa vimṛdya vīraḥ |
| avadhyaṃ taṃ nihataṃ vīkṣya tasya pañcottaraṃ śatamevānujānām | sarvaṃ varācchaṅkarasya hyavadhyaṃ sahaiva kṛṣṇāṃ tena dagdhuṃ babandha |
| sā nīyamānā kīcakaiḥ saṃ rurāva śrutvaiva taṃ bhīmaseno mahāntam | uddhṛtya vṛkṣaṃ tena jaghāna sarvānādāya kṛṣṇāṃ punarāgāt puraṃ ca |
| evaṃ yatnāt tapasā tairavāpto varaḥ śivādajayatvaṃ raṇeṣu | avadhyatā caiva ṣaḍuttarāste śataṃ hatā bhīmasenena saṅkhe |

| gandharva ityeva nihatya sarvān mumoda bhīmo draupadī cā'tha kṛṣṇām | yāhītyūce tāṃ sudeṣṇā bhayena trayodaśāhaṃ pālayetyāha tāṃ sā | astvityenāmāha bhayāt sudeṣṇā tathā'vasan pūrṇamabdaṃ ca te'tra |
| tadā pārthān pravicintyākhilāyāṃ pṛthvyāṃ channān dhārtarāṣṭrasya dūtāḥ | avijñāya prayayurdhārtarāṣṭramūcurhataṃ kīcakaṃ yoṣidarthe |
| tenāvadad draupadīkāraṇena duryodhano nihataṃ kīcakaṃ tam | bhīmenāgustatra duryodhanādyā bhīṣmādibhiḥ saha karṇena caiva |
| agre yayau tatra yoddhuṃ suśarmā sagā virāṭasya samājahāra | śrutvā virāṭo'nuyayau sasenastaṃ pāṇḍavāṇscānuyayurvinā'rjunam |

| cccxxxvii.vijitya saṅkhe jagṛhe virāṭaṃ tadā suśarmā tamayād vṛkodaraḥ | sa tasya senāṃ vinihatya mātsyaṃ vimocya jagrāha suśarmarājam | yudhiṣṭhiro mocayāmāsa taṃ ca tato rātrau nyavasan bāhyataste |
| tato'paradine sarve bhīṣmadroṇapurassarāḥ | rahitaṃ kīcakairmātsyaṃ śakyaṃ matvā'bhiniryayuḥ |
| kīcakasya hiḍimbasya bakakirmīrayorapi | jarāsandhasya nṛpateḥ kaṃ sādīnāṃ ca sarvaśaḥ |
| na bādhanāya bhīṣmādyā api śekuḥ kathañcana | tasmāt te kīcakaṃ śāntaṃ śrutvā mātsyaṃ yayuryudhe |
| yatiṣye rakṣituṃ bhīmād dhārtarāṣṭrāniti svakām | satyāṃ kartuṃ pratijñāṃ tu yayau droṇaḥ saputrakaḥ |
| yadi yuddhāya niryānti jñātāḥ syuḥ pāṇḍavāstadā | na ced virāṭamanataṃ namayiṣyāmahe vayam | iti matvā virāṭasya jagṛhurgāḥ samantataḥ |
| tadottaraḥ sārathitve prakalpya pārthaṃ yayau tān niśāmyaiva bhītaḥ | tato'rjunaḥ sārathiṃ taṃ vidhāya kṛcchreṇa saṃ sthāpya ca taṃ yayau kurūn |
| ādāya gāṇḍīvamatha dhvajaṃ ca hanūmadaṅkaṃ sadaro'grato gāḥ | nivartya yuddhāya yayau kurūṃ stān jigye sarvān dvairathenaiva saktān |
| ekībhūtān punarevānuyātān sammohanāstreṇa vimohayitvā | jagrāha teṣāmuttarīyāṇyṛte tu bhīṣmasya vedāstraghātaṃ sa eva |
| vidhāya bhīṣmaṃ virathaṃ jagāma tadā ṇsrutvā matsyapatirjitān kurūn | mumoda putreṇa jitā iti sma tadā'ha ṣaṇḍhena jitān yudhiṣṭhiraḥ |
| tadā kruddhaḥ prāharat taṃ virāṭaḥ so'kṣeṇa tad bhīmadhanañjayābhyām | śrutaṃ tadā kupitau tau niśāmya nyavārayat tāvapi dharmasūnuḥ |
| cccxxxviii.nijasvarūpeṇa samāsthitān no yadi sma nāsau praṇipātapūrvakam | kṣamāpayed vadhya ityātmarūpaṃ samāsthitāstasthurathāpare dine |
| tadā virāṭāsanamāsthitaṃ nṛpaṃ yudhiṣṭhiraṃ vīkṣya virāṭa āha | kimetadityūcivānuttaro'smai tān pāṇḍavān gograhaṇe cavṛttam |
| tato virāṭo bhayakampitāṅgaḥ praṇamya pārthāñcharaṇaṃ jagāma | dadau ca kanyāmuttarāṃ phalgunāya putrārthameva pratijagrāha so'pi |
| evaṃ virāṭaṃ mocayitvaiva gāṇsca tamasyandhe kīcakān pātayitvā | prāpto dharmaḥ sumahān vāyujena tasyānu pārthena ca govimokṣaṇāt |
| ayātayan keśavāyātha dūtān sahābhimanyuḥ so'pi rāmeṇa sārddham | āgādanantānandacid vāsudevo vivāhayāmāsurathābhimanyum |
| āsīnmahānutsavastatra teṣāṃ daśārhavīraiḥ saha pāṇḍavānām | sa pāñcālānāṃ vāsudevena sārddhamajñātavāsaṃ samatītya modatām |
| duryodhanādyāḥ sūtaputreṇa sārddhaṃ sasaubaleyā yudhi pārthapīḍit āḥ | bhīṣmādibhiḥ sārddhamupetya nāgapuraṃ mantraṃ mantrayāmāsuratra |
| ajñātavāse phalguno no'dya dṛṣṭastasmāt punaryāntu pārthā vanāya | iti bruvāṇānāha bhīṣmo'bhyatītamajñātavāsaṃ droṇa āhaivameva |
| tayorvākyaṃ te tvanādṛtya pāpā vanaṃ pārthāḥ punareva prayāntu | iti dūtaṃ preṣayāmāsuratra jānanti viprā iti dharmajo'vadat |
| sauramāsānusāreṇa dhārtarāṣṭrā apūrṇatām | āhuścāndreṇa māsena pūrṇaḥ kālo'khilo'pyasau |
| dinānāmadhipaḥ sūryaḥ pakṣamāsābdapaḥ śaśī | tasmāt saumyābdamevātra mukhyamāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ | saumyaṃ kālaṃ tato yajñe gṛhṇanti natu sūryajam |
| tadetadavicāryaiva lobhācca dhṛtarāṣṭrajaiḥ | cccxxxix.rājyaṃ na dattaṃ pārthebhyaḥ pārthāḥ kālasya pūrṇatām | khyāpayanto vipravarairupaplāvyamupāyayuḥ |
| suvāsudevā akhilaiśca yādavaiḥ pāñcālamatsyaiśca yutāḥ sabhāryāḥ | upaplāvye te katicid dināni vāsaṃ cakruḥ kṛṣṇasaṃ śikṣit ārthāḥ |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye ajñḸatavāsasamāptirnāma trayoviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ cccxl.(yuddhodyogaḥ ) atha caturviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | tataḥ sammantryānumate kṛṣṇasya svapurohitam | drupadaḥ preṣayāmāsa dhṛtarāṣṭrāya śāntaye |
| mṛdgan gajamugrabalaṃ sabalo raṅgaṃ viveśa sṛtimugrabalam | hatvā mallau balinau kaṃ saṃ ca vimokṣitau tatau lau balinau |
Bha. Gī.
| "senayorubhayormadhye rathaṃ sthāpaya me'cyuta"
| svadharmo duṣṭadamanaṃ dharmajñānānupālanam | kṣatriyasya tamutsṛjya nindito yātyadho dhruvam |
| "yataḥ pravṛttirbhūtānāṃ yena sarvamidaṃ tatam | svakarmaṇā tamabhyarcya siddhiṃ vindati mānavaḥ "
| naca śokastvayā kāryo bandhūnāṃ nidhanekṣayā | dehasya sarvathā nāṇsādanāṇsāccetanasya ca |
| sṛṣṭisthityapyayājñānabandhamokṣapravṛttayaḥ | prakāṇsaniyamau caiva brahmeśādikṣarasya ca | akṣaraprakṛteḥ santo matta eva nacānyataḥ |
| na me kutaścit sargādyāḥ svātantryād guṇapūrtitaḥ | ataḥ samādhikābhāvānmama madvaśameva ca |
| j ñātvaiṣāṃ nidhanādyaṃ ca jīvāderasvatantratām | asvātantryānnivṛttau ca māmanusmara yuddhya ca |
| "ye tu sarvāṇi karmāṇi mayi saṃ nyasya matparāḥ | ananyenaiva yogena māṃ dhyāyanta upāsate |
| teṣāmahaṃ samuddhartā mṛtyusaṃ sārasāgarāt |
| "mayā tatamidaṃ sarvaṃ jagadavyaktamūrtinā | matsthāni sarvabhūtāni nacāhaṃ teṣvavasthitaḥ "
| supūrṇasatsarvaguṇadeho'haṃ sarvadā prabhuḥ | aspṛṣṭākhiladoṣaikanityasattanuravyayaḥ | ityukto vāsaviḥ prāha vyāptaṃ te darśayeśa me |
| atha divyadṛśaṃ tasya datvā vyāptaṃ nijaṃ vapuḥ | deśataḥ kālataścaiva pūrṇaṃ sarvaguṇaiḥ sadā | darśayāmāsa bhagavān yāvatyarjunayogyatā |
| tatprārthitaḥ punaḥ kṛṣṇastad rūpaṃ lokamānataḥ | pūrvavad darśayāmāsa punaścainamaśikṣayat |
| j ñānajñeyaprakṛtyādi jñāpayan puruṣottamaḥ | tenānuśiṣṭaḥ pārthastu saśaraṃ dhanurādade |
| atha vyūḍheṣvanīkeṣu nadan vāyusuto'bhyayāt | samitiṃ dhārtarāṣṭrāṇāṃ te taṃ sarve'bhyavārayan | sasṛjuḥ śaravṛṣṭiṃ ca bhīmasenasya mūrddhani |
| kṣipraṃ naiva prahartavyaṃ j ñātiṣu praharatsvapi | ityevāpraharatyasmin śatrubhiḥ śaravikṣate |
| amucan dhārtarāṣṭreṣu ṇsastravṛṣṭiṃ durāsadām | saubhadrapramukhā vīrāḥ sarve pāṇḍusutātmajāḥ |
| apīḍayaṃ stāñchastraughairdhārtarāṣṭrāḥ samantataḥ | rarakṣa tān vāyusuto visṛjañcharasañcayān |
| tatra bhīmaśarairnunnā dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ samantataḥ |
| atha dvandvāni yuddhāni babhūvurvijigīṣatām | droṇapārṣatayoścaiva śaineyakṛtavarmaṇoḥ |
| duḥ śāsanena vīrasya mādreyasya yavīyasaḥ | nakulasya vikarṇasya kārṣṇeyairdurmukhādinām |
| vṛtte dvandvamahāyuddhe tatra dharmajapakṣagāḥ | jitā vinaiva śaineyaṃ so'jayaddhṛdikātmajam |
| atha bhīṣmadroṇamukhairbhagadattādibhistathā | vidrāpyamāṇaṃ svabalaṃ sthāpayāmāsa mārutiḥ |
| droṇaṃ ca bhagadattaṃ ca kṛpaṃ duryodhanaṃ tathā | kevalaṃ bāhuvīryeṇa vyajayad bhīmavikramaḥ | hatvottaraṃ madrarājo vyadrāvayadanīkinīm |
| atha bhīṣmamudīrṇāstraṃ drāvayantaṃ varūthinīm | sasaumadattiṃ saubhadrasahāyo'rjuna āsadat |
| saubhadraṃ tatra vikrāntamatītya dyusaritsutaḥ | drāvayāmāsa pāñcālān paśyataḥ savyasācinaḥ |
| tasya vikramamālakṣya pārthaṃ tadgauravānugam | dṛṣṭvā yudhiṣṭhiro rājā kruddhaḥ senāmapāharat |
| rātrau yudhiṣṭhiraścintāmāpya pārthaṃ vyagarhayat | sa kṛṣṇādyaiḥ sāntvitaśca punaryuddhāya niryayau |
| evaṃ bhīṣmo daśāhāni senāpatyaṃ cakāra ha | kṛtvā'pi pāṇḍavairyuddhaṃ tat kartumakṛtopamam |
| karṇo'rddharatha ityuktvā tāvad yuddhāt prayāpitaḥ | yāvat tvaṃ yotsyase tāvanna yotsyāmīti nirgate |
| cccli.karṇe'yutarathānāṃ sa nityaśo vadhamāhave | pratijajñe'karot tacca punaścāstravidāṃ varaḥ |
| susamarthāvapi vadhe tasya bhīmadhanañjayau | snehena yantritau tasya gauravāccānvavartatām |
| babhūvustatra yuddhāni citrāṇi subahūni ca | t ānyambare vimānasthā brahmarudrapurassarāḥ | apaśyan devatāḥ sarvā gandharvāpsaraso'surāḥ |
| dhṛṣṭadyumno maheṣvāsaḥ prativyūhyā'pagāsutam | cakre yuddhāni subahūnyajeyaḥ śatrubhī raṇe |
| tatroddadhāra kṛṣṇo'pi phalgunaṃ mṛduyodhinam | dṛṣṭvā cakraṃ tathodyamya bāhuṃ bhīṣmāya jagmivān |
| tena stuto gṛhītaśca phalgunena praṇamya ca | prārthito rathamārūḍhaḥ punaḥ śaṅkhamapūrayat |
| tato bhīṣmo'rjunaścaiva śastrāstrairabhyavarṣatām | ayatnena jitaścaiva phalgunenā'pagāsutaḥ |
| ayutāni bahūnyājau rathānāṃ nijaghāna ca | jitāḥ senāpahāraṃ ca cakrurbhīṣmamukhāstataḥ |
| kadācidagrago bhīmo bhīṣmadroṇau visārathī | kṛtvā vidrāpya tānaśvān bhitvā vyūhaṃ viveśa ha |
| punaḥ saṃ sthāpitarathau vijityāyatnato balī | yatamānau maheṣvāsau dhārtarāṣṭrān jaghāna ha | pañcaviṃ śaddhatāstatra dhārtarāṣṭrā mahābalāḥ |
| bhagadattadrauṇikṛpaśalyaduryodhanādayaḥ | sarve jitā drāvitāṇsca senā ca bahulā hatā |
| ccclii.viratho vyāyudhaścaiva dṛḍhavedhavimūrcchitaḥ | kṛto duryodhanaḥ sarvarājñāṃ bhīmena paśyatām |
| tato'pahāraṃ sainyasya jitāṇscakruśca kauravāḥ | duryodhano niśāyāṃ ca yayau yatra nadīsutaḥ | pīḍito bhīmabāṇaiśca kṣaradgātro nanāma tam |
| uvāca hetunā kena vayaṃ kṣīyāma sarvadā | pāṇḍavāṇsca jayaṃ nityaṃ labdhvā harṣamavāpnuvan |
| tamāha bhīṣmaste'jeyā devāste dharaṇīṃ gatāḥ | viśeṣataḥ keśavena pālitāstatpriyāḥ sadā |
| mānasottaraśaile hi purā brahmapurassarāḥ | sthitā devāstadā'paśyad brahmaiko harimambare |
| stutvā sampūjya bhūmeḥ sa bhārāvataraṇāya tam | prārthayāmāsa tenoktaṃ devānāmavadad vibhuḥ |
| ayaṃ nārāyaṇo devaḥ purṇānantaguṇārṇavaḥ | ājñāpayati vaḥ sarvān prādurbhāvāya bhūtal . e | svayaṃ ca devakīputro bhaviṣyati jagatpatiḥ |
| evaṃ tena samādiṣṭā dharmavāyvādayo'khilāḥ | abhavan pāṇḍavādyāste sendrāḥ sahamarudgaṇāḥ |
| sa ca nārāyaṇo devo devakīnandano'bhavat | tenaite pālitāḥ pārthā ajeyā devasargiṇaḥ | tasmāt taiḥ sandhimanviccha yadīcchasyaparābhavam |
| ityukto ḍambhabuddhyaiva natvā viṣṇuṃ tato yayau | prātarniryātayāmāsa senāṃ yuddhāya durmatiḥ |
| divyauṣadhena bhīṣmasya bhūtvā ca nirujastataḥ | cccliii.bhīṣmamagre nidhāyaiva yayau yuddhāya daṃ sitaḥ |
| tatrā'sīd yuddhamatulaṃ bhīmabhīṣmānuyāyinām | pāṇḍavānāṃ kurūṇāṃ ca śūrāṇāmanivartinām |
| dhṛṣṭadyumnastatra bhīmānuyāyī duryodhanasyāvarajaiḥ prayuddhyan | sammohanāstreṇa vimohayitvā vikarṇapūrvānahanacca senām |
| tato droṇastān samutthāpya sarvān vijñānāstreṇā'sadat pārṣataṃ ca | taṃ bhīmasenaḥ sūtahīnaṃ vidhāya vyadrāvayacchatrugaṇāñcharaughaiḥ |
| athā'sadat kṛtavarmā rathena dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ so'bhyayāt tāvubhau ca | vavarṣatuḥ śaravarṣairathograistatrākarod virathaṃ draupadistam |
| tasmin jite rathavīre svayaṃ taṃ duryodhanaḥ pārṣatamāsasāda | taṃ bhīmaseno virathāyudhaṃ ca kṛtvā bāṇenāhanajjatrudeśe |
| vimūrcchitaṃ taṃ rudhiraughamuccairvamantamāṇsu svarathe nidhāya | kṛpo yayau mārutirdhārtarāṣṭrīṃ vyadrāvayat pṛtanāṃ bāṇapūgaiḥ |
| athendrasūnuḥ keśavapreritena rathena śatrūn vidhamañcharaughaiḥ | rathān raṇe pañcaviṃ śatsahasrān nināya vaivasvatasādanāya |
| tamanvayād yuyudhānaḥ sudhanvā vidrāvayan dhārtarāṣṭrasya senām | tamabhyayāt saumadattistayośca suyuddhamāsīdatibhairavāstram |
| putrān daśāsyā'śu nihatya vīraḥ sa sātyakeḥ saumadattiḥ sakāṇse | samarpayāmāsa śarīradāraṇaiḥ śarairubhau tau virathau ca cakratuḥ |
| athāsipāṇiṃ yuyudhānamāṇsu mahāsihastena ca saumadattinā | āsāditaṃ vīkṣya rathaṃ svakīyamāropayāmāsa suto'nilasya |
| suyodhanaḥ saumadattiṃ svakīyarathe vyavasthāpya ca bhīmasenāt | apādravad vāsavirbhīṣmamājau samāsasādā'śu mahendrakalpaḥ |
| cccliv.ubhau ca tāvastravidāṃ prabarhau śarairmahāṇsīviṣasannikāṇsaiḥ | tatakṣaturnākasadāṃ samakṣaṃ mahābalau saṃ yati jātadarpau |
| svabāhuvīryeṇa jitaḥ sa bhīṣmaḥ kirīṭinā lokamahārathena | senāmapāhṛtya yayau niśāyāmāsāditāyāmatha pāṇḍavāṇsca |
| tataḥ paredyuḥ punareva bhīmabhīṣmau puraskṛtya samīyatuste | sene tadā sārathihīnamāṇsu bhīṣmaṃ kṛtvā mārutirabhyagāt parān | nipātitāstena rathebhavājinaḥ pradudruvuścāvaśiṣṭāḥ samastāḥ |
| duryodhanādyeṣu parājiteṣu bhīṣmadroṇadrauṇipurassareṣu | mahāgajastho bhagadatta āgādāyan bāṇaṃ bhīmasene'mucacca |
| tenātividdhe bhīmasene'sya putra udyacchamānaṃ pitaraṃ nivārya | ghaṭotkaco'bhyadravadāṇsu vīraḥ svamāyayā hasticatuṣṭayasthaḥ |
| sa vaiṣṇavāstraṃ bhagadattasaṃ sthaṃ vijñāya viṣṇorvarato viśeṣataḥ | amoghamanyatra harermarutsutaḥ putre yāte na svayamabhyadhāvat |
| anugrahādabhyadhikādavadhyaṃ j ānannapi svaṃ vāsudevasya nityam | tadbhaktivaiśeṣyata eva tasya satyaṃ vākyaṃ kartumariṃ nacāyāt | yadā svaputreṇa jito bhavet sa kimvātmanetyeva tadā pravettum |
| sa vismṛt āstrastu yadā bhavet tadā bhīmo bhagadattaṃ prayāti | ṛte bhīmaṃ vā'rjunaṃ nāstrameṣa pramuñcatītyeva hi veda bhīmaḥ |
| caturgajātmoparigātmakaśca ghaṭotkacaḥ supratīkaṃ ca taṃ ca | nānāprahārairvitudaṃ ścakāra sandigdhajīvau jagatāṃ samakṣam |
| gajārtanādaṃ tu niśamya bhīṣmamukhāḥ samāpeturamuṃ ca dṛṣṭvā | mahākāyaṃ bhīmamamuṣya pṛṣṭhagopaṃ ca vāyvātmajamatrasan bhṛśam | te bhītabhīt āḥ pṛtanāpahāraṃ kṛtvā'pajagmuḥ śibirāya śīghram |
| dine pare caiva punaḥ sametāḥ parasparaṃ pāṇḍavakauravāste | tatrā'sadannāgasutāsamudbhavaḥ pārthātmajaḥ śākuneyān ṣal . ekaḥ |
| ccclv.taiḥ prāsahastaiḥ kṣatakāyo'tirūḍhakopaḥ sa khaḍgena cakarta teṣām | śirāṃ si vīro balavānirāvān bhayaṃ dadhad dhārtarāṣṭreṣu cogram |
| dṛṣṭvā tamugraṃ dhṛtarāṣṭraputro dideśa rakṣo'lambusanāmadheyam | jahyārjuniṃ kṣipramiti sma tacca samāsadannāgasutātanūjam |

| tayorabhūd yuddhamatīva dāruṇaṃ māyāyujorvīryavatormahādbhutam | sasādino'śvān sa tu rākṣaso'sṛjat te pārthaputrasya ca sādino'hanan | tatastvanantākṛtimāptamārjuniṃ suparṇarūpo'hanadāṇsu rākṣasaḥ |
| hataṃ niśamyā'rjunimugrapauruṣo nanāda kopena vṛkodarātmajaḥ | cacāla bhūrnānadato'sya rāvataḥ sasāgarāgendranagā bhṛśaṃ tadā |
| alambusastaṃ prasamīkṣya māruteḥ sutaṃ balāḍhyaṃ bhayataḥ parādravat | parādravan dhārtarāṣṭrasya senāḥ sarvāstamārātha suyodhano nṛpaḥ |
| sa bhīmaputrasya jaghāna mantriṇo mahābalāṃ ścaturo'nyāṃ stathaiva | hatāvaśeṣeṣu ca vidravatsu ghaṭotkaco'bhyāhanadāṇsu taṃ nṛpam |

| sa pīḍyamāno yudhi tena rakṣasā praveśayāmāsa śaraṃ ghaṭotkace | dṛḍhāhatastena tadā valīyasā ghaṭotkacaḥ pravyathitendriyo bhṛśam | tasthau kathañcid bhuvi pātyamānaḥ punaḥ śarānapyasṛjat suyodhane |
| ciraprayuddhau nṛparākṣasādhipau parasparājeyatamau raṇājire | droṇādayo vīkṣya rirakṣiṣantaḥ suyodhanaṃ prāpuramitrasāhāḥ |
| sa droṇaṇsalyau guruputragautamau bhūriśravaḥ kṛtavarmādikāṃ śca | vavarṣa bāṇairgaganaṃ samāṇsrito ghaṭotkacaḥ sthūlatamai suvegaiḥ |
| tamekagryai rathibhiḥ pariṣkṛtaṃ nirīkṣya bhīmo'bhyagamat samastān | droṇo'tra bhīmaprahitaiḥ śarottamaiḥ supīḍitaḥ prāptamūrcchaḥ papāta |
| drauṇiṃ kṛpādyān sasuyodhanāṃ śca cakāra bhīmo virathān kṣaṇena | nivāryamāṇāṃ stu vṛkodareṇa ghaṭotkacastān pravavarṣa sāyakaiḥ |
| ccclvi.tenāmbarasthena tarupramāṇairabhyarditāḥ kuravaḥ sāyakaughaiḥ | bhūmau ca bhīmena śaraughapīḍit āḥ peturneduḥ prādravaṃ ścātibhīt āḥ |
| sarvāṃ śca tāñchibiraṃ prāpayitvā vinā bhīṣmaṃ kauravān bhīmasenaḥ | ghaṭotkacaścānadatāṃ mahāsvanau nādena lokānabhipūrayantau |
| duryodhano'tha svajanaiḥ sametaḥ punaḥ prāyād raṇabhūmiṃ sa bhīṣmam | jayopāyaṃ bhaimasenerapṛcchat svasyaiva sa prāha na taṃ vrajeti |
| prāgjyotiṣaṃ caiva ghaṭotkacāya sampreṣayāmāsa surāpagāsutaḥ | sa prāpya haiḍimbamayodhayad balī sacārdayāmāsa sakuñjaraṃ tam |
| tenārditaḥ prāhiṇocchūlamasmai viyatyabhiplutya tadā ghaṭotkacaḥ | pragṛhya śūlaṃ prababhañja jānumāropya devā jahṛṣustadīkṣya |
| tadā sa tasyaiva padānugān nṛpo jaghāna taṃ mārutirabhyayād raṇe | sa prāhiṇod bhīmasenāya vīro gajaṃ tamastambhayadāṇsu sāyakaiḥ |
| saṃ stambhite bāṇavaraistu nāge bhīmasyāṇsvān sāyakairārdayat saḥ | so'bhyarditāṇsvo'tha gadāṃ pragṛhya hantuṃ nṛpaṃ taṃ sagajaṃ samāsadat |
| sa hantukāmena ruṣā'bhipanno bhīmena rājā purataḥ pṛṣṭhataśca | kṛṣṇenāstraṃ vaiṣṇavaṃ tad gṛhītuṃ sahārjunenāpayayau subhītaḥ |
| tasmin gate bhīmasenārjunābhyāṃ vidrāvite rājasaṅghe samaste | bhīṣmaḥ senāmapahṛtyāpayāto duryodhanastaṃ niśi copajagmivān |
| saṃ śrāvitaḥ krūravacaḥ sa tena cakre satyaṃ mṛtyubhayaṃ vihāya | śaktyā haniṣyāmi parāniti sma cakre ca tat karma tathā paredyuḥ |
| taṃ śaktito jugupurdhārtarāṣṭrāstenārditāṇscedipāñcālamatsyāḥ | parādravan bhīṣmabāṇorubhīt āḥ siṃ hārditāḥ kṣudramṛgā ivā'rtāḥ |
| saṃ sthāpya tān bhīṣmamabhiprayāntamalambuso'vārayat pārthasūnum | ccclvii.vijitya taṃ keśavabhāgineyo yayau bhīṣmaṃ dhārtarāṣṭro'mumāra |
| tad yuddhamāsīnnṛpapārthaputrayorvicitramatyadbhutamugrarūpam | samaṃ ciraṃ tatra dhanuścakarta dhvajaṃ ca rājā sahasā'bhimanyoḥ |
| athainamugraiśca śarairvavarṣa sūtaṃ ca tasyā'śu jaghāna vīraḥ | tadā'sadad bhīmaseno nṛpaṃ taṃ jaghāna cāṇsvān dhṛtarāṣṭrajasya |
| droṇo drauṇirbhagadattaḥ kṛpaśca sacitrasenā abhyayurbhīmasenam | sarvāṃ śca tān vimukhīkṛtya bhīmaḥ sa citrasenāya gadāṃ samādade |
| t āmudyatāṃ vīkṣya parādravaṃ ste sa citrasenaśca rathādavaplutaḥ | sañcūrṇito gadayā tadrathaśca tajjīvanenoddhṛṣit āṇsca kauravāḥ |
| bhīṣmastu pāñcālakarūṇsacediṣvahan sahasrāṇi caturdaśograḥ | rathaprabarhānatitigmatejā vidrāvayāmāsa parānavīniva |
| vidrāpya sarvāmapi pāṇḍusenāṃ viśrāvya lokeṣu ca kīrtimātmanaḥ | senāṃ samāhṛtya yayau niśāgame sampūjyamāno dhṛtarāṣṭraputraiḥ |
| droṇo virāṭasya puro nihatya śaṅkhaṃ sutaṃ tasya vijitya taṃ ca | vidrāpya senāmapi pāṇḍavānāṃ yayau nadījena sahaiva hṛṣṭaḥ |
| bhīmārjunāvapi śatrūn nihatya vidrāpya sarvāṃ śca yudhi pravīrān | yudhiṣṭhireṇāpahṛte svasainye bhītena bhīṣmācchibiraṃ prajagmatuḥ |
| yudhiṣṭhiro bhīṣmaparākrameṇa bhīto bhīṣmaṃ svavadhopāyameva | praṣṭuṃ yayau niśi kṛṣṇo'nujāṇsca tasyānvayustaṃ sa pitāmaho yat |
| bhīmārjunau śaknuvantāvapi sma narte'nujñāṃ hantumimaṃ tadaicchatām | pūjyo yato bhīṣma udārakarmā kṛṣṇo'pyayāt tena hi pāṇḍavārthe |
| prāpyānujñāṃ bhīṣmataste vadhāya śikhaṇḍinaṃ tadvacasā'grayāyinam | kṛtvā paredyuryudhaye vinirgatā bhiṣmaṃ puraskṛtya tathā pare'pi |
| ccclviii.śikhaṇḍino rakṣakaḥ phalguno'bhūd bhīṣmasya duḥ śāsana āsa cāgre | anye ca sarve jugupurbhīṣmameva nyavārayan bhīmasenādayastān |
| bhīṣmāya yāntaṃ yuyudhānamājau nyavārayad rākṣaso'lambuso'tha | taṃ vajrakalpairatudad vṛṣṇivīraḥ śaraiḥ sa māyāmasṛjat tadogrām |
| astreṇa māyāmapanudya vīro vyadrāvayad rākṣasaṃ sātyakistam | tasmin gate yuyudhāno rathena yayau bhīṣmaṃ pārthamanveva dhanvī |
| droṇo drauṇirdhārtarāṣṭraśca rājā bhūriśravā bhagadattaḥ kṛpaśca | śalyo bāhlīkaḥ kṛtavarmā suśarmā sarvāṇsca senā vāritā vāyujena |
| sa tān muhurvirathīkṛtya vīraḥ prāgjyotiṣaṃ sagajaṃ drāvayitvā | nyavārayat phalgunaṃ roddhukāmaṃ pārthaśca devavratamāsasāda |
| yudhiṣṭhiraṃ bhīṣmamabhiprayāntaṃ mādrīsutābhyāṃ sahitaṃ nṛvīram | nyavārayacchakuniḥ sādināṃ ca yuto'yutenaiva varāṇsvagena |
| t ān sādino'śvāṃ śca nihatya sarvān vijitya taṃ śakuniṃ pāṇḍavāste | prāpurbhīṣmaṃ draupadeyāṇsca sarve tathā virāṭadrupadau kuntibhojaḥ |
| dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ bhīṣmamabhiprayāntaṃ nyavārayat saindhavastaṃ sa bāṇaiḥ | hatāṇsvasūtaṃ sagaṇaṃ drāvayitvā samāsadad bhīṣmamevā'śu vīraḥ |
| gupto'tha pārthena raṇe ṇsikhaṇḍī bhīṣmaṃ samāsādya śarairatāḍayat | bhīṣmaḥ strītvaṃ tasya jānan na tasmai mumoca bāṇān sa tu taṃ tutoda |
| śikhaṇḍinaṃ vārayāmāsa bāṇairdurmarṣaṇo'marṣaṇavihvalekṣaṇaḥ | nātyetumenamaśakacchikhaṇḍī duḥ śāsanaḥ pārthamavārayat tadā |
| sa lokavīro'pi durātmanā'munā ruddho'śakannainamatītya yātum | bhīṣmaṃ pārthaḥ sāyakāṇscāsya tasmin sasajjire parvateṣvapyasaktāḥ |
| amarṣayuktau cirameva vīrāvayuddhyatāmarjunadhārtarāṣṭrau | samaṃ tadāsīnmahadadbhutaṃ ca divaukasāṃ paśyatāṃ bhūbhṛt āṃ ca |
| ccclix.tadā virāṭadrupadau kuntibhojaṃ kṛṣṇāsutān kekayāṃ ścekitānam | bhūriḥ śalaḥ somadatto vikarṇaḥ sakekayā vārayāmāsuruccaiḥ |
| jitvaiva tāṃ ste'bhiyayuśca bhīṣmaṃ tato'rjuno'tītya duḥ śāsanaṃ ca | bhīṣmaṃ śarairārcchadaripramāthibhiḥ śikhaṇḍinaṃ dhārtarāṣṭrād vimucya |
| sa taiḥ samastairbahuśastrapūgairbhṛśaṃ marmasvarditaścāpamuktaiḥ | śaraiḥ samastān virathāṃ ścakāra śainaiyapāñcālyayudhiṣṭhirādyān |
| sa cedipāñcālakarūṇsamukhyān rathottamān pañcaviṃ śatsahasrān | sampreṣayāmāsa yamāya bāṇairyugāntakāle'gniriva pravṛddhaḥ |
| nirīkṣya taṃ sūryamivā'tapantaṃ sañcodito vāsudevena pārthaḥ | ciccheda tatkārmukaṃ lokavīro raṇe'rddhacandreṇa sacānyadādade |
| ciccheda taccaivamaṣṭau dhanūṃ ṣi śaktiṃ ca carmāsivaraṃ parāṇi ca| dhanūṃ ṣi dattāni nṛbhirnṛpasya sarvāṇi ciccheda sa pākaśāsaniḥ |
| tataḥ śaraiḥ sūryakaraprakāṇsairvivyādha sarve ca yudhiṣṭhirādyāḥ | tairardito nyapatad bhūtel . e saprāṇān dadhārāpi tathottarāyaṇāt |
| nipātite'smin mārutidroṇamukhyān vidrāpya tatrā'gamadāṇsu te'pi | tadāyudhāni praṇidhāya vīrāḥ pārthāḥ pare cainamupāsadan sma |
| praṇamyataṃ tadvacanāt samīyustasmin dine śibirāṇyeva sarve | pare dine sarva evopatasthurbhīṣmaṃ yadūnāmpatinā sahaiva |
| sa pūrvadivase pārthadattabāṇopabarhaṇaḥ | tadā'pi tṛṭparīt ātmā yogyaṃ peyamayācata |
| dhārtarāṣṭrairavijñātaṃ tadabhijñāya vāsaviḥ | vāruṇāstreṇa bhittvā sabhūmiṃ vāri sugandhi ca | ūrdhvadhāramadādāsye tarpito'nena so'vadat |
| ccclx.yādṛśyastrajñatā pārthe dṛṣṭā'tra kurunandanāḥ | yādṛg bāhvorbalaṃ bhīme saṃ yugeṣu punaḥ punaḥ |
| yādṛśaṃ caiva māhātmyamanantamajaraṃ hareḥ | vijñātaṃ sarvalokasya sabhāyāṃ dṛṣṭameva ca |
| upāramata tad yuddhaṃ sukhinaḥ santu bhūmipāḥ | yathocitavibhaktāṃ ca bhuṅgdhvaṃ bhūpāḥ sadā bhuvam | ityuktaḥ prayayau tūṣṇīṃ dhārtarāṣṭraḥ svakaṃ gṛham |
| vyāsadattoruvijñānāt sañjayādakhilaṃ pitā | śrutvā tadā paryatapyat pāṇḍavāḥ kṛṣṇadevatāḥ | mumuduḥ śibiraṃ prāpya sarve kṛṣṇānumoditāḥ |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye bhīṣmapāto nāma pañcaviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ ccclxi.(nārāyaṇāstropaśamanam) atha ṣaḍviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | athākhilānāṃ pṛthivīpatīnāmācāryamagryaṃ rathināṃ suvidyam | rāmasya viśvādhipateḥ suśiṣyaṃ cakre camūpaṃ dhṛtarāṣṭraputraḥ |
| jitvā māgadharājaṃ toṣitamakarot sadā'tmayogadharājam | anu kurvan nijasadanaṃ cakre ramyāṃ puraṃ subodhanujasadanam |
śrutiśca tatparā tadvat "tadyathā"27 ityavadat sphuṭam |
'etatsūtragam' ityasya etat prameyaṃ sūtragam | "tadadhigama uttarapūrvāghayoraśleṣavināṇsau tadvyapadeśād" (Bra. Sū.
| karṇo'pi bhīṣmānumato dhanuṣmān yuddhodyato'bhūt tadasatkṛtaḥ purā | tasmin sthite'nāttadhanustadaiva rathaṃ samāsthāya guruṃ samanvayāt |
| droṇo vṛto dhārtarāṣṭreṇa dharmasutagrahe tena kṛte pratiśrave | j ñātvā yattāḥ pāṇḍavāstaṃ samīyuryuddhāya tatrābhavadugrayuddham |
| patatribhistatra dudhāva śātravān droṇo dhanurmaṇḍalamantranissṛtaiḥ | tamāsasādā'śu vṛkodaro nadaṃ stamāsadan drauṇikṛpau ca madrarāṭ|

| sa tān vidhūyābhyapatad raṇe'graṇīrdroṇaṃ tamanvārjunirabhyayāt parān | vavāra taṃ madrapatistayorabhūd raṇo mahāṃ statra gadāṃ samādade | śalyo'tha bhīmo'bhiyayau gadādharastametayoratra babhūva saṅgaraḥ |
| ubhāvajeyau gadināmanuttamāvatulyavīryau pravarau balīyasām | viceratuścitratamaṃ prapaśyatāṃ manoharaṃ t āvabhinardamānau | gadāprapātāṅkitavajragātrau dadarśa loko'khila eva tau raṇe |
| gadābhighātena vṛkodarasya vicetanaḥ prāpatadatra madrarāṭ| bhīmo'pi kopāt pracalatpadaḥ kṣitau nidhāya jānuṃ sahasotthitaḥ kṣaṇāt |
| vicetanaṃ patitaṃ madrarājaṃ vilokya bhīmaṃ ca tamāhvayantam | rathaṃ samāropya janasya paśyataḥ puraśca bhīmasya kṛpo'pajagmivān |
| vijitya madrādhipamojasā'rihā nadan rathaṃ prāpya nijaṃ sa mārutiḥ | vyadrāvayad bāṇagaṇaiḥ pareṣāmanīkinīṃ droṇasamakṣameva |
| vidrāvayatyāṇsu kurūn vṛkodare vidhūya saubhadramukhān sasātyakīn | droṇo'bhipede nṛpatiṃ gṛhītuṃ tamāsasādā'śu dhanañjayo rathī |
| ccclxii.sa vāsudevaprayate rathe sthitaḥ śaraiḥ śarīrāntakaraiḥ samantataḥ | nihatya nāgāṇsvanarān pravartayannadṛśyatā'śveva ca śoṇit āpagāḥ |
| nihanyamānāsu kirīṭinā camūṣvārakṣite dharmasute tathā'padaḥ | camūṃ ca bhīmārjunabāṇabhagnāṃ droṇo'pahṛtyāpayayau niśāgame |
| sa dhārtarāṣṭreṇa yudhiṣṭhirāgrahāt saṃ śrāvitaḥ krūravaco niśāyām | jagāda dūraṃ samarād vinīyatāṃ pārthastato dharmasutaṃ grahīṣye |
| tataḥ suśarmā sahito mahārathaiḥ saṃ śaptakairdūrataraṃ praṇetum | yuddhāya bhīmānujamāṇsu klṛpto duryodhanenomiti so'pyavādīt |
| samāhvayāmāsurathārjunaṃ te prātarhutāṇsasya diśaṃ raṇāya | ayodhayat tān sa ca tatra gatvā bhīmo gajānīkamathātra cāvadhīt |
| nihanyamāneṣu gajeṣu sarvaśo vidrāpyamāṇeṣvakhileṣu rājasu | prāgjyotiṣo dhārtarāṣṭrārthitastaṃ samāsadat supratīkena dhanvī |
| vibhīṣit āḥ supratīkena bhīmahayā na tasthustadanu sma sātyakiḥ | saubhadramukhyāṇsca gajaṃ tamabhyayuścikṣepa teṣāṃ sa rathānathāmbare |
| śaineyapūrveṣu rathojjhiteṣu bhūmāvavaplutya kathañcideva | sthiteṣu bhīme ca vibhīṣit āṇsvān saṃ yamya yuddhyatyapi kṛṣṇa aikṣat |
| saṅkleśito vaiṣṇavāstraṃ pramuñcet prāgjyotiṣo bhīmasene tato'ham | yāmyārjunenaiva tadastramātmanaḥ svīkartumanyena varādadhāryam |
| iti sma sañcintya sahārjunena tatrā'yayāvatha pārthaṃ trigartāḥ | nyavārayaṃ stvāṣṭramastraṃ sa teṣu vyavāsṛjanmohanāyā'śu vīraḥ |
| tadastravīryeṇa vimohitāste parasparaṃ kṛṣṇapārthāviti sma | jaghnustadā vāsavistān visṛjya prāgjyotiṣaṃ hantumihābhyagād drutam |
| visṛjya bhīmaṃ sa ca pārthameva yayau gajaskandhagato gajaṃ tam | pracodayāmāsa rathāya tasya cakre'pasavyaṃ harirenamāṇsu |
| ccclxiii.manojavenaiva rathe pareṇa sambhrāmyamāṇe natu taṃ gajaḥ saḥ | prāptuṃ śaśākātha śaraiḥ sutīkṣṇairabhyarddayāmāsa nṛpaṃ sa vāsaviḥ |
| astraiśca śastraiḥ suciraṃ nṛvīrāvayuddhyatāṃ tau balināṃ prabarhau | atho cakartāsya dhanuḥ sa pārthaḥ sa vaiṣṇavāstraṃ ca tadā'ṅkuśe'karot |
| tasminnastre tena tadā pramukte dadhāra tad vāsudevo'mitaujāḥ | tadaṃ sadeśasya tu vaijayantī babhūva mālā'khilalokabhartuḥ |
| dṛṣṭvaiva tad dhāritamacyutena pārthaḥ kimarthaṃ vidhṛtaṃ tvayeti | ūce tamāhā'śu jagannivāso mayā'khilaṃ dhāryate sarvadaiva |

| na mādṛśo'nyo'sti kutaḥ paro mat so'haṃ caturdhā jagato hitāya | sthito'smi mokṣapral . ayasthitīnāṃ sṛṣṭeṇsca kartā kramaśaḥ svamūrtibhiḥ | sa vāsudevādicatuḥ svarūpaḥ sthito'niruddho hṛdi cākhilasya |
| sa eva ca kroḍatanuḥ parā'haṃ bhūmipriyārthaṃ narakāya cādām | astraṃ madīyaṃ varamasya cādāmavadhyatāṃ yāvadastraṃ sasūnoḥ |
| astrasya cānyo natu kaścidasti yo'vadhya etasya kutaśca mattaḥ | iti sma tenaiva mayā dhṛtaṃ tadastraṃ tadenaṃ jahi cāstrahīnam |
| ityuktamākarṇya sa keśavena sammantrya bāṇaṃ hṛdaye mumoca | prāgjyotiṣasyāparamuttamaṃ śaraṃ gajendrakumbhasthala āṇsvamajjayat |
| ubhau ca tau petaturadrisannibhau mahendravajrābhihatāvivā'śu | nihatya tau vāsavirugrapauruṣo mumoda sādhu svajanābhipūjitaḥ |
| athācalaṃ vṛṣakaṃ caiva hatvā kanīyasau śakunestaṃ ca bāṇaiḥ | vivyādha māyāmasṛjat sa tāṃ ca vijñānāstreṇā'śu nāṇsāya cakre |
| sa naṣṭamāyaḥ prādravat pāpakarmā tataḥ pārthaḥ śarapūgaiścamūṃ t ām | vidrāvayāmāsa tadā guroḥ suto māhiṣmatīpatimājau jaghāna |
| ccclxiv.tadā bhīmastasya nihatya vāhān vyadrāvayad dhārtarāṣṭrīṃ camūṃ ca | bhīmārjunābhyāṃ hanyamānāṃ camūṃ t āṃ dṛṣṭvā droṇaḥ kṣipramapājahāra |
| prāgjyotiṣe nihate'thāgrahācca yudhiṣṭhirasyātiviṣaṇṇarūpaḥ | duryodhano'śrāvayad dīnavākyānyatra droṇaṃ so'pi nṛpaṃ jagāda |
| pārthe gate śvo nṛpatiṃ grahīṣye nihanmi vā tatsadṛśaṃ tadīyam | iti pratijñāṃ sa vidhāya bhūyaḥ prātaryayau yuddhamākāṅkṣamāṇaḥ |
| padmavyūhaṃ vyūhya parairabhedyaṃ varād viṣṇostasya mantraṃ hyajaptvā | pārthāṇsca taṃ prāpurṛte'rjunena saṃ śaptakairyuyudhe so'pi vīraḥ |
| pārthā vyūhaṃ tu taṃ prāpya nāṇsakan bhettumudyatāḥ | j ānaṃ śca pratibhāyogāt kāmyaṃ naivājapanmanum |
| bhīmo yudhiṣṭhirastatra tajjñaṃ saubhadramabravīt | bhindhi vyūhamimaṃ t āta vayaṃ tvāmanuyāmahe |
| sa evamukto rathināṃ prabarho viveśa bhittvā dviṣatāṃ camūṃ t ām | anveva taṃ vāyusutādayaśca vivikṣavaḥ saindhavenaiva ruddhāḥ |
| vareṇa rudrasya niruddhyamāno jayadrathenātra vṛkodarastu | viṣṇorabhīṣṭaṃ vadhamārjunestadā vijñāya śakto'pi nacātyavartata |
| jayadrathasthena vṛṣadhvajena prayuddhyamāneṣu vṛkodarādiṣu | praviśya vīraḥ sa dhanañjayātmajo vilol . ayāmāsa parorusenām |
| sa droṇaduryodhanakarṇaṇsalyairdroṇyagraṇībhiḥ kṛtavarmayuktaiḥ | ruddhaścacārāribaleṣvabhītaḥ śirāṃ si kṛntaṃ stadanubratānām |
| sa lakṣaṇaṃ rājasutaṃ prasahya pituḥ samīpe'nayadāṇsu mṛtyave | bṛhadbalaṃ cottamavīryakarmā varaṃ rathānāmayutaṃ ca patribhiḥ |
| droṇādayastaṃ harikopabhīt āḥ pratyakṣato hantumaśaknuvantaḥ | sammantrya karṇaṃ purato nidhāya cakrurvicāpāṇsvarathaṃ kṣaṇena |
| ccclxv.karṇo dhanustasya kṛpaśca sārathī droṇo hayānāṇsu vidhamya sāyakaiḥ | sacarmakhaḍgaṃ rathacakramasya praṇudya hastasthitameva tasthuḥ |
| bhīteṣu kṛṣṇādatha tadvadhāya teṣvāsasādā'śu gadāyudhaṃ gadī | dauḥ śāsanistau yugapacca mamraturgadābhighātena mitho'tipauruṣau |
| tasmin hate śatruravaṃ niśamya harṣodbhavaṃ mārutirugravikramaḥ | vijitya sarvānapi saindhavādīn yudhiṣṭhirasyānumate nyaṣīdat |
| vyāsastadā tānamitātmavaibhavo yudhiṣṭhirādīn glapitānabodhayat | vijitya saṃ śaptakapūgamugro niśāgame vāsavirāpa sācyutaḥ |
| niśamya putrasya vadhaṃ bhṛśārtaḥ pratiśravaṃ so'tha cakāra vīraḥ | jayadrathasyaiva vadhe niśāyāṃ svapne'nayat taṃ giriśāntikaṃ hariḥ |
| svayamevākhilajagadrakṣādyamitaśaktimān | apyacyuto gurudvārā prasādakṛdahaṃ tviti |
| j ñāpayan phalgunasyāstraguruṃ giriśamañjasā | prāpayitvainamevaitatprasādādastramudbaṇam | cakre tadarthamevāsya rakṣāṃ cakre tadātmikām |
| sāntvayitvā subhadrāṃ ca gatvopaplāvyamacyutaḥ | yojayitvā rathaṃ prātaḥ sārjuno yuddhamabhyayāt |
| śrutvā pratijñāṃ puruhūtasūnorduryodhanenārthitaḥ sindhurājam | trātāsmyahaṃ sarvatheti pratijñāṃ kṛtvā droṇo vyūhamabhedyamātanot |
| sa divyamagryaṃ śakaṭābjacakraṃ kṛtvā svayaṃ vyūhamukhe vyavasthitaḥ | pṛṣṭhe karṇadrauṇikṛpaiḥ saśalyairjayadrathaṃ guptamadhāt paraiśca |
| athārjuno divyarathoparisthitaḥ surakṣitaḥ keśavenāvyayena | vijitya durmarṣaṇamagrato'bhyayād droṇaṃ sudhanvā gurumugrapauruṣaḥ |
| ccclxvi.pradakṣiṇīkṛtya tamāṇsvagāt tataḥ kālātyayaṃ tveva viśaṅkamānaḥ | rathaṃ manovegamathānayaddhariryathā ṇsarāḥ peturamuṣya pṛṣṭhataḥ |
| vijitya hārdikyamathāprayatnaḥ sa indrasūnuḥ praviveśa tad balam | vilol . ayāmāsa ca sāyakottamairyathā gajendro nal . inīṃ baloddhataḥ |
| sa uccakāṇse'tiratho rathottame savāsudevo hariṇā yathendraḥ | cakarta cogro dviṣatāṃ śirāṃ si śaraiḥ śarīrāntakaraiḥ samantataḥ |
| dṛḍhāyumacyutāyuṃ ca hatvā vindānuvindakau | śarābhyāṃ preṣayāmāsa yamāya vijayo yudhi |
| sudakṣiṇaṃ ca kāmbojaṃ nihatyāmbaṣṭhameva ca | śrutāyudhaṃ nadīj ātaṃ varuṇādāsasāda ha | yasyādād varuṇo divyāmamoghāṃ mahatīṃ gadām |
| sa tu tena śaraistīkṣṇairarpito virathaṃ kṣaṇāt | cakāra pārthasya rathamāruhyāridharāya tām |
| gadāṃ cikṣepa sā tasya vāruṇeḥ śira eva tu | bibheda śatadhā ṇsīrṇamastiṣkaḥ so'patad bhuvi |
| ayuddhyantaṃ svagadayā yadi tāḍayasi svayam | tayā viśīrṇamastiṣko mariṣyasi na saṃ śayaḥ | amoghā cānyathā seyaṃ gadā tava bhaviṣyati |
| ityabravīt taṃ varuṇaḥ purā tena sa keśave | ayuddhyati gadākṣepāt tayā ṇsīrṇaṇsirā abhūt |
| hateṣu vīreṣu nijeṣu saṅghaśo vidrāviteṣvālul . ite ca sainye | duryodhano droṇamupetya dīnamuvāca hā pārtha upekṣitastvayā |
| itīrite'bhedyamamuṣya varma baddhvā mahāmantrabalāt sa vipraḥ | jagāda yenaiva balena pārthairviruddhyase tena hi yāhi phalgunam |
| ccclxvii.itīrito dhārtarāṣṭraḥ sa cāpamādāya sauvarṇarathoparisthaḥ | jagāma pārthaṃ tamavārayacca śarairanekairanalaprakāṇsaiḥ |
| vivyādha pārtho'pi tamugravegaiḥ śarairna te tasya ca varmabhedam | cakrustato vāsavirdivyamastraṃ tadvarmabhedāya samādade ruṣā |
| sandhīyamānaṃ tu guroḥ sutastacciccheda pārtho'tha suyodhanāṇsvān | hatvā tal . e'viddhyadathainamugrairdrauṇiḥ śaraiḥ pārthamavārayad yudhi |
| sa drauṇikarṇapramukhairdhanañjayo yuyodha te cainamavārayañcharaiḥ | babhūva yuddhaṃ tadatulyamadbhutaṃ jayadrathārthe'dbhutavīryakarmaṇām |
| pārthe praviṣṭe kurusainyamadhyaṃ droṇo'viśat pāṇḍavasainyamāṇsu | sa tadrathānīkamudagravegaiḥ śarairvidhūya nyahanacca vīrān |
| sa vīravaryaḥ sthaviro'pi yūnāṃ yuveva madhye pracacāra dhanvinām | prapātayan vīraśirāṃ si bāṇairyudhiṣṭhiraṃ cā'sadadugravīryaḥ |
| nṛpagrahecchuṃ tamavetya satyajinnyavārayad draupadirāṇsu vīryavān | nivāritastena śiraḥ śareṇa cakarta pāñcālasutasya vipraḥ |
| nihatya taṃ vīratamaṃ raṇotkaṭaṃ yudhiṣṭhiraṃ bāṇagaṇaiḥ samārdayat | sa śaktistena vidhāya saṅgaraṃ nirāyudho vyaśvarathaḥ kṛtaḥ kṣaṇāt |
| sa ūrdhvabāhurbhuvi saṃ sthito'pi gṛhītumājau guruṇā'bhipannaḥ | mādrīsutasyāvarajasya yānamāruhya vegādapajagmivāṃ stataḥ |
| droṇaṃ tataḥ śaiśupāliḥ saputro jārāsandhiḥ kāṇsirājaḥ saśaivyaḥ | samāsadan kekayāṇscaiva pañca samārdayan bāṇagaṇaiśca sarvaśaḥ |
| sa tān krameṇaiva nikṛttakandharāñcharottamairatra vidhāya vipraḥ | nināya lokaṃ paramarkamaṇḍalaṃ vrajanti nirbhidya yamūrdhvaretasaḥ |
| vidhūyamāne guruṇorusainye pṛthāsutānāṃ pṛtanāḥ pareṣām | prāyo raṇe mārutasūnunaiva hatapravīrā mṛditāḥ parādravan |
| ccclxviii.alambuso nāma tadaiva rākṣasaḥ samāsadanmārutimugrapauruṣam | sa pīḍitastena śaraiḥ sutejanaiḥ kṣaṇādadṛśyatvamavāpa māyayā |
| so'dṛśyarūpo'nucarānapīḍayad bhīmasya tad vīkṣya cukopa mārutiḥ | astrajñatāmātmanikeśavājñayā sandarśayannāgatadharmasaṅkaṭaḥ |
| tvāṣṭrāstramādatta sa kāmyakarmahīno'pi bhīmastata utthitāḥ śarāḥ | te bāṇavaryāstadadṛśyavedhino rakṣo vidāryā'viviśurdharātal . am |
| taddhanyamānaṃ pravihāya bhīmamapādravad dūrataraṃ subhītam | tatastu bhīmo dviṣatāṃ varūthinīṃ vidrāvayāmāsa śaraiḥ sumuktaiḥ |
| tadaiva kṛṣṇātanayāḥ sametā jaghnuḥ śalaṃ saṃ yati saumadattim | alambusaṃ prāpa tadā ghaṭotkacaḥ parasparaṃ tau rathināvayuddhyatām |
| ghaṭotkacastaṃ virathaṃ vidhāya khasthaṃ kha evābhiyuyodha saṃ sthitaḥ | tatastu taṃ bhīmasuto nigṛhya nipātya bhūmau pradadau prahāram |
| padā ṇsirasyeva sa piṣṭamastako mamāra madhye pṛthivīpatīnām | tasmin hate bhaimaseniḥ kurūṇāṃ vyadrāvayad rathavṛndaṃ samantāt |
| tadā'sadat kṛtavarmā rathena senāṃ pāṇḍūnāṃ śaravarṣaṃ pramuñcan | dadau varaṃ tasya hi pūrvamacyutaḥ prītaḥ stutyā sarvajayaṃ muhūrte |
| sa tena pāñcālagaṇān vijigye yamau ca bhīmasya puro'tha taṃ ca | vivyādha bāṇena sa vāsudevavaraṃ vijānan na tadā samabhyayāt |
| vinaiva vṛṣṇīn vijaye varo yadamuṣya tenāsya hayān sa sātyakiḥ | nihatya bāṇairatudat sa yānamanyat samāsthāya tato'pajagmivān |
| tadā hariḥ pāñcajanyaṃ sughoṣamāpūrayāmāsa jaye'bhiyuddhyati | karṇādibhirdrauṇimukhai ripūṇāṃ balaprahāṇāya paraḥ parebhyaḥ |
| sa pāñcajanyo'cyutavaktravāyunā bhṛśaṃ supūrṇodaranissṛtadhvaniḥ | ccclxix.jagad viriñceśasurendrapūrvakaṃ prakampayāmāsa yugātyaye yathā |
| gāṇḍīvaghoṣe ca tadā'bhibhūte yudhiṣṭhiro bhītabhītastadetya | śaineyamūce parasainyamagne pārthe svayaṃ yuddhyati keśavaḥ sma |
| na śrūyate gāṇḍīvasyādya ghoṣaḥ saṃ śrūyate pāñcajanyasya ghoṣaḥ | tad yāhi jānīhi tamadya pārthaṃ yadi sma jīvatyasahāya eṣaḥ |
| itīritaḥ sātyakiratra viprān sampūjya vittaiḥ paramāṇsiṣaṇsca | jayāya tebhyaḥ pratigṛhya senāmukhaṃ yayau bhīmasenānuyātaḥ |
| bhīmastu senāmukhamāṇsu bhittvā prāveśayad yuyudhānaṃ camūṃ t ām | sa yuddhyamāno guruṇā'bhyupekṣitaḥ sūtaṃ nihatya drāvayāmāsa cāṇsvān |
| balaṃ vivṛddhaṃ ca tadā'sya sātyakerviprāṇsīrbhiḥ kṛṣṇavarādapi sma | balasya vṛddhirhi purā'sya dattā kṛṣṇena tuṣṭena dine hi tasmin |
| tato vivṛddhorubalāt sa sātyakiḥ saṃ sthāpya bhīmaṃ prayayau rathena | taṃ bāṇavarṣaiḥ pṛtanāṃ samantānnighnantamājau hṛdikātmajo'bhyayāt |

| tayorabhūd yuddhamatīva dāruṇaṃ tatrākarot taṃ virathaṃ sa sātyakiḥ | vijitya taṃ sātyakirugradhanvā yayāvatītyaiva śirāṃ si yūnām | kṛntan śaraistaṃ jalasandha āgamad raṇe gajaskandhagato'bhiyoddhum |
| nivārayantaṃ tamasaṃ hyavikramaṃ nihatya bāṇaiḥ samare sa sātyakiḥ | vilol . ayāmāsa balaṃ kurūṇāṃ nighnan gajasyandanavājipattinaḥ |
| sa pārvatīyāṃ śca śilāpravarṣiṇo nihatya vidrāpya ca sarvasainikān | samāsadat keśavaphalgunau ca balī tamārā'śu ca yūpaketuḥ |
| tayorabhūd yuddhamatīva ghoraṃ ciraṃ vicitraṃ ca mahad vibhīṣaṇam | parasparaṃ tau turagān nihatya nipātya sūtau dhanuṣī nikṛtya | samīyatuścarmamahāsidhāriṇau vicitramārgān yudhi sañcarantau |
| sa saumadattirbhuvi sātyakiṃ raṇe nipātya keśeṣu ca sampragṛhya | ccclxx.padā'sya vakṣasyadhiruhya khaḍgamudagrahīdāṇsu śiro'pahartum |
| tad vāsudevastu nirīkṣya viśvataścakṣurjagādā'śu dhanañjayaṃ raṇe | trāyasva śaineyamiti sma so'pi bhallena ciccheda bhujaṃ parasya |
| sa tena cotkṛttasakhaḍgabāhurvinindya pārthaṃ niṣasāda bhūmau | prāyopaviṣṭaḥ śarasaṃ stare hariṃ ddhyāyan vinindannasurapraveśāt |
| gate'surāveśa utātibhaktyā dhyāyatyamuṣmin garuḍadhvajaṃ tam | śaineya utthāya nivāryamāṇaḥ kṛṣṇārjunādyairaharacchiro'sya |
| tadā svakīyaṃ rathametadarthaṃ klṛptaṃ dadau sātyakaye sasūtam | kṛṣṇo'tha pārthasya hayāstṛṣā'rditāstadā'sṛjad vāruṇāstraṃ sa pārthaḥ |
| tenaiva tīrthaṃ paramaṃ cakāra tathā'śvaśālāmapi bāṇarūpām | tato vimucyātra hayānapāyayaddharistadā vāsavirārdayat parān |
| yuyoja kṛṣṇasturagān rathe punargataśramānuddhṛtasāyakān prabhuḥ | pracodite tena rathe sthitaḥ punastathaiva bībhatsurarīnayodhayat |
| śinipravīre tu gate yudhiṣṭhiraḥ punaśca cintākulito babhūva ha | jagāda bhīmaṃ ca na gāṇḍivadhvaniḥ saṃ śrūyate pāñcajanyasya rāvaḥ |
| mayā niyuktaśca gataḥ sa sātyakirbhāraṃ ca tasyādhikameva manye | tat pāhi pārthaṃ yuyudhānameva ca tvaṃ bhīma gatvā yadi jīvatastau |
| itīritaḥ prāha vṛkodarastaṃ na rakṣitaṃ vāsudevena pārtham | brahmeśānāvapi jetuṃ samarthau kiṃ drauṇikarṇādidhanurbhṛto'tra |
| ato bhayaṃ nāsti dhanañjayasya na sātyakeścaiva hareḥ prasādāt | rakṣyastvamevātra mato mamādya droṇo hyayaṃ yatate tvāṃ gṛhītum |
| itīritaḥ prāha yudhiṣṭhirastaṃ na jīvamāne yudhi māṃ ghaṭotkace | dhṛṣṭadyumne cāstravidāṃ variṣṭhe droṇo vaśaṃ netumiha prabhuḥ kvacit |
| ccclxxi.yadi priyaṃ kartumihecchasi tvaṃ mama prayāhyāṇsu ca pārthasātyakī | rakṣasva sañjñāmapi siṃ hanādāt kuruṣva me pārthaśaineyadṛṣṭau |
| tathā hate caiva jayadrathe me kuruṣva sañjñāmiti tena bhīmaḥ | uktastu haiḍimbamamuṣya rakṣaṇe vyadhācca senāpatimeva samyak |
| sa cā'ha senāpatiratra bhīmaṃ prayāhi tau yatra ca keśavārjunau | na jīvamāne mayi dharṣituṃ kṣamo droṇo nṛpaṃ mṛtyurahaṃ ca tasya |
| iti bruvāṇe praṇidhāya bhīmaḥ punaḥ punastaṃ nṛpatiṃ gadādharaḥ | yayau parānīkamadhijyadhanvā nirantaraṃ pravapan bāṇapūgān |
| nyavārayat taṃ śaravarṣadhāro droṇo vacaścedamuvāca bhīmam | śiṣyasnehād vāsaviḥ sātyakiśca mayā pramukto bhṛśamānatau mayi |
| svīyā pratijñā'pi hi saindhavasya guptau mayā pārthakṛte visṛṣṭā | dāsye na te mārgamahaṃ kathañcit paśyāstravīryaṃ mama divyamadbhutam |
| ityuktavākyaḥ sa gadāṃ samādade cikṣepa tāṃ droṇarathāya bhīmaḥ | uvāca cāhaṃ pitṛvanmānaye tvāṃ sadā mṛdustvāṃ prati nānyathā kvacit |
| amārdave paśya ca yādṛśaṃ balaṃ mameti tasyā'śu vicūrṇito rathaḥ | gadābhipātena vṛkodarasya sasūtavājidhvajayantrakūbaraḥ |
| droṇo gadāmāpatatīṃ nirīkṣya tvavapluto lāghavato dharātal . e | tadaiva duryodhanayāpitaṃ rathaṃ paraṃ samāsthāya śarān vavarṣa ha|
| śaraistadīyaiḥ paramāstramantritaiḥ pravṛṣyamāṇo jagadīraṇātmajaḥ | śiro nidhāyā'śu puro vṛṣo yathā tamabhyayādeva rathādavaplutaḥ |
| manojavādeva tamāpya bhīmo rathaṃ gṛhītvā'mbara ākṣipat kṣaṇāt | śakto'pyahaṃ tvāṃ na nihanmi gauravādityeva sujñāpayituṃ tadasya |
| suvājisūtaḥ sa rathaḥ kṣitau patan vicūrṇito'smād gururapyavaplutaḥ | tadā viśoko'sya rathaṃ samānayat tamāruhad bhīma udāravikramaḥ |
| ccclxxii.droṇo'pi duryodhanadattamanyaṃ rathaṃ samāsthāya yudhiṣṭhiraṃ yayau | gṛhītukāmaṃ nṛpatiṃ prayāntaṃ nyavārayat saṃ yati vāhinīpatiḥ |
| vidāritāṃ droṇaṇsaraiḥ svasenāṃ saṃ sthāpya bhūyo drupadātmajaḥ śaraiḥ | droṇaṃ nivāryaiva camūṃ pareṣāṃ vidrāvayāmāsa ca tasya paśyataḥ |
| tayorabhūd yuddhamatīva raudraṃ jayaiṣiṇoḥ pāṇḍavadhārtarāṣṭrayoḥ | atyadbhutaṃ santatabāṇavarṣamanārataṃ suciraṃ nirviśeṣam |
| tataḥ prāyād bhīmaseno'mitaujā mṛdgañcharaiḥ kauravarājasenām | vindānuvindapramukhā dhārtarāṣṭrāstamāsedurdvādaśa vīramukhyāḥ | viddhaḥ śaraistairbahubhirvṛkodaraḥ śirāṃ si teṣāṃ yugapaccakarta |
| hateṣu teṣu pravareṣu dhanvināṃ satyavrataḥ puramitro jayaśca | vṛndārakaḥ pauravaścetyamātyāḥ samāsedurdhārtarāṣṭrasya bhīmam |
| sa taiḥ pṛṣatkairavakīryamāṇaḥ śitān vipāṭhān yugapat samādade | jahāra taireva śirāṃ si teṣāṃ hateṣu teṣveva pare pradudruvuḥ |
| sa siṃ havat kṣudramṛgān samantato vidrāpya śatrūn hṛdikātmajaṃ raṇe | abhyāgamat tena nivāritaḥ śaraiḥ kṣaṇena cakre virathāṇsvasūtam | sa gāḍhaviddhastu vṛkodareṇa raṇaṃ visṛjyāpayayau kṣaṇena |
| vijitya hārdikyamathā'śu bhīmo vidrāvayāmāsa varūthinīṃ t ām | sampreṣayan sarvanarāṇsvakuñjarān yamāya yāto haripārthapārśvam |
| dṛṣṭvaiva kṛṣṇavijayau paramaprahṛṣṭastābhyāṃ nirīkṣita uta pratibhāṣitaśca | sañjñāṃ nṛpasya sa dadāvapi siṃ hanādān śrutvā parāṃ mudamavāpa sa cāgryabuddhiḥ |
| bhīmasya nānadata eva mahāsvanena viṇmūtraśoṇitamatho mṛtimāpureke | bhīteṣu sarvanṛpatiṣvamumāpa tūrṇaṃ karṇo vikarṇamukharā api dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ |
| hatvā vikarṇamuta tatra ca citrasenaṃ sañcūrṇitaṃ ca vidadhe rathamarkasūnoḥ | ghoraiḥ śaraiḥ punarapi sma samardyamānaḥ karṇo'payānamakarod drutameva bhīmāt |
| ccclxxiii.āṇsvāsya caiva suciraṃ punareva bhīmaṃ yuddhāya yāti dhṛtarāṣṭrasutaistathā'nyaiḥ | t āṃ ścaiva tatra vinihatya tathaiva karṇo vyaśvāyudhaḥ kṛta utāpayayau kṣaṇena |
| vikarṇacitrasenādyā evaṃ vīratamāḥ sutāḥ | karṇasya paśyato bhīmabāṇakṛttaśirodharāḥ |
| nipeturdhṛtarāṣṭrasya rathebhyaḥ pṛthivītal . e | trayoviṃ śatirevātra karṇasāhāyyakāṅkṣiṇaḥ |
| ekavīṃ śativāraṃ ca vyaśvasūtarathadhvajaḥ | gāḍhamabhyardditastīkṣṇaiḥ śarairbhīmena saṃ yuge |
| prāṇasaṃ śayamāpannaḥ sarvalokasya paśyataḥ | raṇaṃ tyaktvā pradudrāva rudan duḥkhāt punaḥ punaḥ |
| dvāviṃ śatimayuddhe tu rāmadattaṃ subhāsvaram | abhedyaṃ rathamāruhya vijayaṃ dhanureva ca |
| taddattameva saṅgṛhya tūṇī cākṣayasāyakau | āsasāda raṇe bhīmaṃ karṇo vaikartano vṛṣā |
| sughora āsīt sa tayorvimardo bhīmasya karṇasya ca dīrghakālam | ākāṇsamācchādayatoḥ śaraughaiḥ parasparaṃ caiva suraktanetrayoḥ |
| tato bhīmo mahābāhuḥ sahajābhyāṃ ca saṃ yutam | tvāṃ tu kuṇḍalavarmabhyāṃ śaknuyāṃ hantumañjasā |
| iti jñāpayituṃ tasya kuṇḍale kavacaṃ tathā | śarairutkṛtya samare pātayāmāsa bhūtal . e |
| evaṃ t ānyapakṛṣyāhaṃ hanyāṃ tvāmiti vedayan | punaśca bahubhistīkṣṇaiḥ śarairenaṃ samārdayat |
| tatastu bhīmasya babhūva buddhiraspardhinaḥ sarvajayo hi dattaḥ | ccclxxiv.amuṣya rāmeṇa naca spṛdhā'yaṃ karṇo mayā yuddhyati kṛcchrago hyayam |
| tathā'pi me bhagavānatyanugrahājjayaṃ dadātyātmavaco'pahāya | mayā tumānyaṃ vacanaṃ hareḥ sadā tasmād dāsye vivaraṃ tvadya śatroḥ |
| evaṃ smṛtvā tena randhre pradatte karṇo'stravīryeṇa dhanurnyakṛntat | raśmīn hayānāṃ ca tato rathaṃ sa tatyāja naijaṃ balameva vedayan |
| na me rathādyairdhanuṣā'pi kāryamityeva sa khyāpayituṃ vṛkodaraḥ | khamutpapātottamavīryatejā rathaṃ ca karṇasya samāsthitaḥ kṣaṇāt |
| bhītastu karṇo rathakūbare tadā vyalīyatātaḥ sa vṛkodaro rathāt | avapluto jñāpayituṃ svaśaktiṃ nirāyudhatve'pyarinigrahādau |
| naicchad gṛhītuṃ vinihantumeva vā rathaṃ dhanurvā'sya raṇe'pahartum | droṇasya yadvat pūrvamatīva śakto'pyamānayad rāmavaco'sya bhaktyā |
| satyāṃ kartuṃ vāsaveśca pratijñāṃ sammānayan vaiṣṇavatvācca karṇam | dātuṃ randhraṃ sūryajasya prayātaḥ śarakṣepārthaṃ duramatiṣṭhadatra |
| tataḥ karṇo dūragataṃ vṛkodaraṃ sammānayantaṃ rāmavākyaṃ vijānan | śarairavidhyat sa ca tānavārayad gajairmṛtaistāṃ śca cakarta karṇaḥ |
| vyasūn gajān prakṣipantaṃ sametya saṃ spṛśya cāpena vacaśca duṣṭam | saṃ śrāvayāmāsa suyodhanasya prītyai prajānannapi tasya vīryam |
| saṃ śrāvayantaṃ vacanāni rūkṣāṇyapāhanad bāṇavaraistadā'rjunaḥ | sa varmahīnaḥ pārthabāṇābhitapto vyapāgamad bhīma āpā'tmayānam |
| karṇo bhīme vāsavīṃ naiva śaktiṃ vimoktumaicchannaiva bībhatsuto'nyān | hanyāmiti prāha yataḥ sa kuntyai yadyapyavadhyaḥ sa tayā'pi bhīmaḥ |
| nārāyaṇāstraṃ śirasi prapātitaṃ na yasya lomāpyadahaccirasthitam | kiṃ tasya śaktiḥ prakaroti vāsavī tathā'nyadapyastraśastraṃ mahacca |
| ccclxxv.bhīmaḥ karṇarathaṃ prāptaḥ śaktiṃ nā'dātumaicchata | abhiprāyaṃ keśavasya jānan haiḍimbamṛtyave | tataḥ karṇo'nyamāsthāya rathamarjunamabhyayāt |
| divyaṃ rathaṃ dhanuścaiva kṛṣṇabuddhyo'rjuno haret | iti bhītastu tāṃ śaktimādāyārjunamṛtyave | yuddhāyāyād rathaṃ cāpaṃ śaktiṃ caikatra nākarot |
| ekaṃ hṛtaṃ cedanyat syāditi matvā bhayākulaḥ | bibheti sarvadā nīteḥ kṛṣṇasyāmitatejasaḥ |
| niścito maraṇāyaiva mṛtikāle tu taṃ ratham | āruhyāgāddhi pūrvaṃ tu na kālaṃ manyate mṛteḥ |
| śaktiṃ tu tadrathagatāṃ prasamīkṣya kṛṣṇaḥ saṃ sthāpya pārthamapi sātyakimeva yoddhum | dattvā svakīyarathameva virocanasya putreṇa so'diśadamuṣya balaṃ pradāya |
| śiṣyaṃ tvaśaktamiha me pratiyodhanāya pārtho hyadāditi sa sātyakimīkṣamāṇaḥ | saṃ spardhayaiva yuyudhe virathaṃ cakāra tenaiva sātyakiramuṃ hariyānasaṃ sthaḥ |
| na keśavarathe kaścit sthito yāti parājayam | ataśca sātyakirnāpa karṇenātra parājayam |
| śastrasaṅgrahakāle tu kumārāṇāṃ vrataṃ bhavet | ityuktaṃ j āmadagnyena dhanurvidyāpurākṛt ā |
| tacchatruvadharūpaṃ ca pūrvāsiddhaṃ ca gūhitam | aviruddhaṃ ca dharmasya kāryaṃ rāmasya tuṣṭidam |
| anupadravaṃ ca lokasyetyato bhīmo vrataṃ tvidam | cakāra tūbaretyukte hanyāmiti rahaḥ prabhuḥ |
| anupadravāya lokasya suvyañjacśmaśrumaṇḍalaḥ | suśmaśruṃ māṃ na kaściddhi tathā brūyāditi sphuṭam | tadarjuno vijānāti snehād bhīmoditaṃ rahaḥ |
| ccclxxvi.arjunasyāpi gāṇḍīvaṃ dehītyukto nihanmyaham | iti tacca vijānāti bhīma eko nacāparaḥ | gāṇḍīvasyā'gamaṃ pūrvaṃ j ānātyeva hi nāradāt |
| pratijñāṃ bhīmasenasya bruvataḥ phalgune rahaḥ | duryodhanastu śuśrāva tāṃ ca karṇāya so'bravīt |
| atūbaro'pi tenāsau tasmāt tūbara ityalam | uktaḥ prakopanāyaiva tasmādarjunamabravīt |
| j ānāsi matpratijñāṃ tvaṃ tvatpratijñāmahaṃ tathā | tatra hantavyatāṃ prāpto mama vaikartano'trahi |
| pratijñāto vadhaścāsya tvayā'pi madanujñayā | atastvayā mayā vā'yaṃ hantavyaḥ sūtanandanaḥ |
| ityukto vāsaviḥ prāha hantavyo'yaṃ mayaiva hi | tvadīyo'haṃ yatastena matkṛtaṃ tvatkṛtaṃ bhavet |
| na tvatkṛtaṃ matkṛtaṃ syād gururmama yato bhavān | ato mayaiva hantavya ityuktvā karṇamabravīt |
| rūkṣā vācaḥ śrāvito'yaṃ bhīmaḥ kṛṣṇasya śṛṇvataḥ | yaccābhimanyuryuṣmābhirekaḥ sambhūya pātitaḥ |
| atastvāṃ nihaniṣyāmi tvatputraṃ ca tavāgrataḥ | ityukto'nyarathaṃ prāpya karṇa āvījjayadratham |
| drauṇikarṇābhiguptaṃ taṃ nāṇsakaddhantumarjunaḥ | tatra vegaṃ paraṃ cakre drauṇiḥ pārthanivāraṇe |
| nacainamaśakat tartuṃ yatnavānapi phalgunaḥ | tayorāsīcciraṃ yuddhaṃ citraṃ laghu ca suṣṭhu ca |
| ccclxxvii.tad dṛṣṭvā bhagavān kṛṣṇo lohitāyati bhāskare | ajite droṇatanaye tvahate ca jayadrathe | arjunasya jayākāṅkṣī sasarja tama ūrjitam |
| tamovyāpte gagane sūryamastaṃ gataṃ matvā drauṇipūrvāḥ samastāḥ | viśaśramuḥ saindhavaścārjunasya hatapratijñasya mukhaṃ samaikṣata |
| tadā harerājñayā ṇsakrasūnuścakarta bāṇena jayadrathasya | agniṃ vivikṣanniva darśitaḥ śirastadā vacaḥ prāha janārdanastam |
| naitacchiraḥ pātaya bhūtal . e tvamitīritaḥ pāṇsupatāstratejasā | dadhāra bāṇairanupuṅkhapuṅkhaiḥ punastamūce garuḍadhvajo vacaḥ |
| idaṃ pitustasya kare nipātyatāṃ varo'sya datto hi purā'munā'yam | śiro nikṛttaṃ bhuvi pātayed yastavāsya bhūyācca śiraḥ sahasradhā |
| iti sma vadhyaḥ sa pitā'pi tenetyudīrite tasya sandhyākriyasya | aṅke vyadhāt tacchira āṇsu vāsaviḥ sa sambhramāt tad bhuvi ca nyapātayat |
| tato'bhavat tasya śiraḥ sahasradhā hariśca cakre tamaso layaṃ punaḥ | tadaiva sūrye sakalaiśca dṛṣṭe hāheti vādaḥ sumahānathā'sīt |
| bhīmastadā ṇsalyasuyodhanādīn kṛpaṃ ca jitvā vyanadat subhairavam | kurvan sāhāyyaṃ phalgunasyaiva tuṣṭo babhūva śaineya uto hate ripau |
| apūrayat pāñcajanyaṃ ca kṛṣṇo mudā tadā devadattaṃ ca pārthaḥ | bhīmasya nādaṃ sahapāñcajanyaghoṣaṃ śrutvā nihataṃ sindhurājam | j ñātvā rājā dharmasuto mumoda duryodhanaścā'sa suduḥkhitastadā |
| tato drauṇimukhāṃ senāṃ sarvāṃ bhīmo'bhyavartata | pārthaḥ karṇamukhāñchiṣṭān tato'bhajyata tad balam |
| śīrṇāṃ senāṃ praviviśurdhṛṣṭadyumnapurogamāḥ | tatastaṃ deśamāpuste yatra bhīmadhanañjayau |
| ccclxxviii.tata ekīkṛt āḥ sarve pāṇḍavāḥ sahasomakāḥ | parān vidrāvayāmāsuste bhīt āḥ prādravan diśaḥ |
| vidrāpyamāṇaṃ sainyaṃ taṃ dṛṣṭvā duryodhano nṛpaḥ | jayadrathavadhāccaiva kupito'bhyadravat parān |
| sa bhīmasenaṃ ca dhanañjayaṃ ca yudhiṣṭhiraṃ mādravatīsutau ca | dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ sātyakiṃ draupadeyān sarvānekaḥ śaravarṣairvavarṣa |
| te vivyadhustaṃ bahubhiḥ śilīmukhaiḥ sa tānanādṛtya cakarta bāṇaiḥ | dhanūṃ ṣi citrāṇi mahārathānāṃ cakāra saṅkhe virathau yamau ca |
| ādāya cāpāni parāṇi te'pi duryodhanaṃ vavṛṣuḥ sāyakaughaiḥ | acintayitvaiva śarānsa eko nyavārayat tānakhilāṃ śca bāṇaiḥ |
| taṃ gāhamānaṃ dviṣatāṃ bahūnāṃ madhye droṇadrauṇikṛpapradhānāḥ | dṛṣṭvā sarve jugupuḥ svāttacāpā anārataṃ bāṇagaṇān sṛjantaḥ |
