| suyodhanaḥ karṇamāha jahi bhīmamimaṃ yudhi | sa āha naiṣa ṇsakyo hi jetuṃ devaiḥ savāsavaiḥ |
| daivājjīvāmyahaṃ rājan yuddhyanenātipīḍitaḥ | ato ghaṭāmahe śaktyā jayo daive samāhitaḥ |
| duryodhano droṇamāha saindhavastvadupekṣayā | pārthena nihato bhīmasātyakibhyāṃ ca me balam |
| pratijñā ca parityaktā pāṇḍavasnehatastvayā | ityuktaḥ kupito droṇaḥ pratijñāmakarot tataḥ |
| itaḥ paraṃ naiva raṇād rātrāvahani vā kvacit | gaccheyaṃ naca mokṣyāmi varma baddhaṃ kathaścana |
| matputraśca tvayā vācyaḥ pāñcālān naiva śeṣayeḥ | sadauhitrānitītyuktvā vijagāhe niśāgame |
| ccclxxix.camūṃ pareṣāmabhyāgād dhṛṣṭadyumnastamāṇsu ca | drauṇiduryodhanau tatra virathīkṛtya mārutiḥ | drāvayāmāsa tat sainyaṃ paśyatāṃ sarvabhūbhṛt ām |
| akṣohiṇyastu saptaiva senayorubhayorapi | hatāstāsāṃ ca bhīmena tisro dve phalgunena ca |
| saubhadrasātyakimukhaistanmadhye ṣoḍaṇsāṃ śakaḥ | haiḍimbapārṣatamukhaistrayācca daśamāṃ śakaḥ |
| bhīṣmadroṇadrauṇibhiśca dve samaṃ nihate tadā | tadanyairmil . itaiḥ sarvaistaccaturthāṃ śa eva ca |
| tato rātrau pañcabhiśca pārthāḥ ṣaḍbhiśca kauravāḥ | akṣohiṇībhiḥ saṃ vyūhya yuddhaṃ cakruḥ sudāruṇam | bhīmaṃ senāṃ drāvayantaṃ punaḥ karṇaḥ samāsadat |
| sa karṇapurato bhīmo duṣkarṇaṃ karṇameva ca | duryodhanasyāvarajau niṣpipeṣa padā kṣaṇāt | rathāṇsvadhvajasūtaiśca saha tau na vyadṛśyatām |
| nirāyudho'hamiti māṃ tvamāttha puruṣaṃ vacaḥ | nirāyudhaḥ padaivāhaṃ tvāṃ hantumaśakaṃ tadā |
| iti karṇasya tau bhīmaḥ sañjñayā jñāpayan bhuvi | padā pipeṣa kāliṅgaṃ muṣṭinaiva jaghāna ha |
| muṣṭinā tvadvadhāyāhaṃ samartha iti kiṃ vade | tasmānmayā rakṣitastvamiti jñāpayituṃ prabhuḥ | sāṇsvasūtadhvajarathaḥ kāliṅgo muṣṭicūrṇitaḥ |
| ketumāṃ śca pitā tasya śakradevaḥ śrutāyudhaḥ | akṣohiṇyā senayā ca saha bhīmena pātitāḥ | khaḍgayuddhe purā bhīṣme senāpatyaṃ prakurvati |
| ccclxxx.karṇānujān dhruvādyāṃ śca bahūn jaghne sa vai niśi | sañjñāṃ bhīmakṛt āṃ j ñātvā ṇsaktiṃ cikṣepa cāparām | karṇaḥ śaktirmayā divyā na muktā tena jīvasi |
| iti jñāpayituṃ t āṃ tu jñātvā bhīmaḥ kṣaṇāt tadā | khamutpatya gṛhītvā ca karṇe cikṣepa satvaraḥ |
| yadi tvayā tadā muktā ṇsaktistvāṃ sā haniṣyati | iti jñāpayituṃ sā ca karṇarakṣaṇakāṅkṣiṇā |
| muktā dakṣabhuje sā'tha vidārya dharaṇīṃ tathā | bhittvā viveśa karṇasya darśayantī nidarśanam |
| tato bhīmaḥ punaḥ svaṃ tu rathamāsthāya cāpabhṛt | karṇasya purataḥ śatrūn drāvayāmāsa sarvataḥ |
| taṃ karṇo vārayāmāsa śaraiḥ sannataparvabhiḥ | bhīmaḥ karṇarathāyaiva gadāṃ cikṣepa vegataḥ |
| sa tadgadāvighātāya sthūṇākarṇāstramāsṛjat | tenāstreṇa pratihatā sā gadā bhīmamābrajat |
| bhīmo gadāṃ samādāya karṇasya rathamāruhat | tayā sañcūrṇayāmāsa karṇasya rathakūbaram |
| evaṃ tvaccūrṇane śakto matkāmāt tvaṃ hi jīvasi | evaṃ nidarśayitvaiva punaḥ svaṃ rathamābrajat |
| punaḥ karṇapuraḥ senāṃ jaghāna bahuśo raṇe | karṇastu taṃ parityajya sahadevamupādravat |
| sa tu taṃ virathīkṛtya dhanuḥ kaṇṭhe'vasajya ca | kutsayāmāsa bahuśaḥ sa tu nirvedamāgamat |
| ccclxxxi.na hantumaicchat taṃ karṇaḥ pṛthāyai svaṃ vacaḥ smaran | taṃ vijitya raṇe karṇo jaghne pārthavarūthinīm |
| tato drauṇirvividhairbāṇasaṅghairjaghāna pārthasya camūṃ samantataḥ | sā hanyamānā raṇakovidena na śaṃ lebhe mṛtyunā'rtā prajeva |
| dṛṣṭvā senāṃ drauṇibalābhibhūtāṃ tamāhvayāmāsa ghaṭotkaco yudhe | drauṇistamāhā'lamalaṃ na vatsa putrastātaṃ yodhayasvādya māṃ tvam |
| ityukta ūce na pitā mama tvaṃ sakhā pituryadyapi śatrusaṃ śrayāt | ariśca me'sīti tamāha yadyariṃ māṃ manyase tadvadahaṃ karomi te |
| ityūcivāñchakradhanuḥ prakāṇsaṃ viṣphārya cāpaṃ prakirañcharaughān | abhyāgamad rākṣasamugravegaḥ svasenayā so'pi tamabhyavartata |
| sa rakṣasāṃ lakṣasamāvṛto balī nṛbhiśca vīrairbahubhiḥ suśikṣitaiḥ | akṣohiṇīmātrabalena rākṣasaḥ saṅkṣobhayāmāsa guroḥ sutaṃ śaraiḥ |
| sa tena bāṇairbahubhiḥ prapīḍito vibhinnagātraḥ kṣatajāplutāṅgaḥ | vyāvṛtya netre kupito mahad dhanurviṣphārya bāṇai rajanīṃ cakāra |
| so'kṣohiṇīṃ t āṃ kṣaṇamātrataḥ kṣaran mahāṇsarāṃ stānapi rākṣasān kṣayam | nināya putraṃ ca ghaṭotkacasya niṣṭyaṃ purā yo'ñjanavarmanāmakaḥ |
| nirīkṣya senāṃ svasutaṃ ca pātitaṃ ghaṭotkaco droṇasutaṃ śareṇa | vivyādha gāḍhaṃ sa tu vihvalo dhvajaṃ samāṇsritaścā'śu sasañjñako'bhavat |
| utthāya bāṇaṃ yamadaṇḍakalpaṃ sandhāya cāpe pravikṛṣya rākṣase | mumoca tenābhihataḥ papāta vinaṣṭasañjñaḥ svarathe ghaṭotkacaḥ |
| vimūrcchitaṃ sārathirasya dūraṃ nināya yuddhājjagato vipaśyataḥ | drauṇiśca senāṃ niśi taiḥ śarottamairvyadrāvayat pāṇḍavasomakānām |
| sañjñāmavāpyātha ghaṭotkaco'pi kruddho'viśat kauravasainyamāṇsu | vidrāvayāmāsa sa bāṇavarṣaiḥ prakampayāmāsa mahārathāṃ stathā |
| ccclxxxii.tadaiva pārthaṃ prati yoddhumāgataṃ vaikartanaṃ vīkṣya jagatpatirhariḥ | ghaṭotkacaṃ prāhiṇocchaktimugrāṃ tasmin moktuṃ pārtharakṣārthameva |
| sa karṇamāhūya yuyodha tena tasyānu duryodhanapūrvakāṇsca ye | droṇena caitān samare sa eko nivārayāmāsa mamarda cādhikam |
| te bādhyamānā bahuśo balīyasā karṇaṃ purodhāya tamabhyayodhayan | na vivyathe tatra raṇe sa karṇaḥ svavīryamāsthāya mahāstravettā |
| nivārayāmāsa guroḥ sutaṃ tadā bhīmastrigartāñchatamanyunandanaḥ | alambalo nāma tadaiva rākṣasaḥ samāgamad bhīmasutaṃ nihantum |
| yuddhvā pragṛhyainamatho nipātya ghaṭotkaco bhūmital . e'sinā'sya | utkṛtya śīrṣaṃ tu suyodhane'kṣipad viṣeduratrākhilabhūmipālāḥ |
| alāyudho'thā'gamadugravīryo narāṇsanastaṃ sa ghaṭotkaco'bhyayāt | yuddhvā muhūrtaṃ sa tu tena bhūmau nipātya taṃ yajñapaśuṃ cakāra |
| athāsya śira uddhṛtya krodhād duryodhanorasi | cikṣepa tena sambhrāntāḥ sarve duryodhanādayaḥ |
| ghaṭotkacabalakhyātyai samarthenāpi yo raṇe | na hato bhīmasenena hato'smin bhaimaseninā |
| sarve sañcodayāmāsuḥ karṇaṃ śaktivimokṣaṇe | asmin hate hataṃ sarvaṃ kiṃ naḥ pārthaḥ kariṣyati |
| evaṃ sañcodyamānaḥ sa dhārtarāṣṭraiḥ punaḥ punaḥ | haiḍimbenārdyamānaistu svayaṃ ca bhṛśapīḍitaḥ | ādatta śaktiṃ vipulāṃ pākaśāsanasammatām |
| t āmambarasthāya ghaṭotkacāya śailopamāyātulavikramāya | cikṣepa mṛtyo rasanopamāmalaṃ prakāṇsayantīṃ pradiśo diśaśca |
| ccclxxxiii.nirbhiṇṇavakṣāḥ sa tayā papāta vicūrṇayañchatrubalaṃ hato'pi | tasmin hate jahṛṣurdhārtarāṣṭrā uccukruśurdudhuvuścāmbarāṇi |
| tadā nanarta keśavaḥ samāṇsliṣacca phalgunam | nanāda śaṅkhamādhamajjahāsa corunisvanaḥ |
| tamapṛcchad guḍākeśaḥ kimetaditi durmanāḥ | hate sute'graje'smākaṃ vīre kiṃ nandasi prabho |
| tamāha bhagavān kṛṣṇo diṣṭyā jīvasi phalguna | tvadarthaṃ nihitā ṇsaktirvimuktā'smin hi rākṣase |
| tato yudhiṣṭhiro duḥkhādamarṣāccābhyavartata | karṇaṃ prati tamāhātha kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaḥ prabhuḥ |
| yayā'rjuno nihantavyastayā'sau rākṣaso hataḥ | tanmā ṇsucastvaṃ rājendra diṣṭyā jīvati phalgunaḥ | ityuktvā prayayau vyāsastato yuddhamavartata |
| bhīmārjunābhyāmiha hanyamāne bale kurūṇāmitaraiśca pāṇḍave | pradīpahastā atha yodhakāṇsca sarve'pi nidrāvaśagā babhūvuḥ |
| dṛṣṭvaiva tānāha dhanañjayastadā svapsyantu yāvacchaśinaḥ prakāṇsaḥ | itīritā āṇsiṣaḥ phalgunāya prayujya sarve suṣupuryathāsthitāḥ |
| punaśca candre'bhyudite yudhe te samāyayuḥ śastramahāstravarṣāḥ | tatrā'yātaḥ sātyakiṃ somadatto bhūriśca tābhyāṃ yuyudhe sa ekaḥ |
| hatau ca tau petatustena bhūmau bāhlīka enaṃ samare tvayodhayat | sa sātyakiṃ virathīkṛtya bāṇaṃ vadhāya tasyā'śu mumoca vīraḥ |
| ciccheda taṃ bhīmasenastridhaiva tasmai śataghnīṃ prajahāra bāhlikaḥ | tayā hato vihvalito vṛkodaro jaghāna taṃ gadayā so'patacca |
| bāhlīkaḥ prārthayāmāsa pūrvaṃ snehapurassaram | ccclxxxiv.bhīmaṃ tvayaiva hantavyo raṇe'haṃ prītimicchatā | tadā yaśaśca dharmaṃ ca lokaṃ ca prāpnuyāmaham |
| ityukta āha taṃ bhīmo nitarāṃ vyathitastadā | hanyāṃ naivānyathā yuddhe tat te śuśrūṣaṇaṃ bhavet | iti tena hatastatra bhīmasenena bāhlikaḥ |
| hate bāhlīke kauravā bhīmasenamabhyājagmuḥ karṇaduryodhanādyāḥ | drauṇiṃ puraskṛtya guruṃ ca pārṣataḥ sabhrātṛkaḥ sātyakinā samabhyayāt |
| saṃ śaptakaireva pārtho yuyodha tad yuddhamāsīdati raudramadbhutam | akṣohiṇī tatra bhīmārjunābhyāṃ nisūditā rātriyuddhe samastā |
| tataḥ sūryaścābhyuditastadā'tighoraṃ droṇaḥ karma yuddhe cakāra | sa pāñcālānāṃ rathavṛndaṃ praviśya jaghāna hastyaśvarathān narāṃ śca |
| vidrāvitāstena mahārathāṇsca naivāvindañcharma bāṇāndhakāre | yuveva vṛddho'pi cacāra yuddhe sa ugradhanvā paramāstravettā |
| rathārbudaṃ tena hataṃ ca tatra tataḥ sahasraṃ guṇitaṃ narāṇām | tato daśāṃ śo nihato hayānāṃ gajārbudaṃ caiva raṇotkaṭena |
| tathā virāṭadrupadau śarābhyāṃ nināya lokaṃ paramājimadhye | tato vijityaiva guroḥ sutādīn dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ bhīmaseno jugopa |
| dhṛṣṭadyumno bhīmasenābhigupto droṇaṃ hantuṃ yatnamuccaiścakāra | nivārayāmāsa guruḥ śaraughairdhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ so'pi taṃ sāyakena | vivyādha tenābhihataḥ sa mūrcchāmavāpa vipro niṣasāda cā'śu |
| dhṛṣṭadyumnaḥ satvaraṃ khaḍgacarmaṇī ādāya tasyā'ruruhe rathottamam | sañjñāmavāpyātha guruḥ śaraughaiḥ prādeśamātrairvyathayāmāsa taṃ ca |
| sa tairativyathitastadrathācca parāvṛttaḥ svaṃ rathamāruroha | susaṃ rabdhau tau punareva yuddhaṃ sañcakraturvṛṣṭaṇsarāmbudhārau |
| ccclxxxv.nivārya śatruṃ sa śarairbrahmāstramasṛjad dvijaḥ | tena sandāhayāmāsa pāñcālān subahūn raṇe | purujit kuntibhojaśca tenānye ca hatāstadā |
| bhīmo'rjunaḥ sātyakiśca paryāyeṇa guroḥ sutam | dūrato vārayāmāsurmahatyā senayā saha |
| karṇaduryodhanādīṃ śca śalyaṃ bhojaṃ kṛpaṃ tathā | bhīmārjunau śaraugheṇa vārayāmāsatū raṇe |
| tatra bhīmo gajānīkaṃ jayatsenaṃ ca māgadham | jaghāna subahūṃ ścaiva māgadhānāṃ rathavrajān |
| atha māl . avarājasya tvaśvatthāmābhidhaṃ gajam | bhīmasenahataṃ dṛṣṭvā vāsudevapracoditaḥ | aṇsvatthāmā hata iti prāha rājā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ |
| aṇsvatthāmavadhaṃ śrutvā nāhaṃ yotsya iti svayam | puroktaṃ dharmajāyaiva tena droṇo yudhiṣṭhiram |
| brūhi satyamiti prāha satyamityeva so'bravīt | upāṃ śu kuñjaraśceti droṇo'to vyathito'bhavat |
| tasya bhīmo ratheṣāṃ ca gṛhītvā na tavedṛśam | yogyaṃ guṇavato nityaṃ paradharmopajīvanam |
| ityāha khasthā munayaścālamehīti taṃ tadā | ūcustadakhilaṃ j ñātvā droṇaḥ śastramavāsṛjat |
| sa nyasya karmāṇi tadā'khilāni yogārūḍhaḥ paramaṃ vāsudevam | sarveśvaraṃ nityanirastadoṣaṃ dhyāyan muktvā dehamagāt svadhāma | taṃ keśavaḥ pāṇḍavā gautamaśca yāntaṃ svalokaṃ daddaśurvihāyasā |

| dhṛṣṭadyumnaḥ pāṇḍavairvāryamāṇo'pyagāt khaḍgaṃ carma cā'dāya tatra | chitvā'sinā tasya śiraḥ punaśca rathaṃ svakīyaṃ tvarayā samāsthitaḥ | ccclxxxvi.dṛṣṭvā kṛpastaṃ subhṛśaṃ bhayārditaḥ samprādravad vājinamekamāsthitaḥ |
| sañchinne droṇaṇsirasi garhayāmāsa vāsaviḥ | yudhiṣṭhiraṃ ca pāñcālyaṃ sātyakiścāpi kopitaḥ |
| dhṛṣṭadyumnastu tāvāha kathaṃ bhūriśravā hataḥ | iti taṃ sātyakiḥ kruddho gadāpāṇiḥ samabhyayāt | āhvayāmāsa pāñcālyastaṃ dhṛt āsiravismayaḥ |
| tadā jagrāha śaineyaṃ bhīmaḥ kṛṣṇapracoditaḥ | śamayāmāsa pārthaṃ ca pāñcālyasnehayantritaḥ |
| te vāsudevena tadā'nuśikṣit āḥ snehaṃ punaḥ pūrvavadāpuruttamam | yattāṇsca yuddhāya samudyatāṇsca tadā'gamad drauṇirapyāttadhanvā |
| āṇsrutya tātaṃ nihataṃ pratijñāṃ cakāra niḥ śeṣaripupramāthane | nārāyaṇāstraṃ visasarja kopāt tadā bhīt ā bhīmamṛte samastāḥ |
| yudhiṣṭhiraḥ prāha viṣaṇṇacetanaḥ śaineyapūrvāḥ pratiyāntu sarve | sabhrātṛko'haṃ drauṇivarāstramagno bhaveyamityatra jagāda keśavaḥ |
| namadhvamastrasya tato vimokṣyathetyatha praṇemuśca dhanañjayādikāḥ | sarve na bhīmastadamuṣya mūrdhni papāta so'gnāviva saṃ sthito'gniḥ |
| adahyamāne bhīme'pi vahnau vahniriva sthite | aveṣṭayad vāruṇena pārtho'trā'tmaprapattaye |
| na dehe patitāstrasya bahirveṣṭanataḥ phalam | tathā'pi snehavaśago veṣṭayāmāsa phalgunaḥ |
| amoghatvaṃ nijāstrasya bhīmasyāvadhyatāmapi | sādhayan sārjunaḥ kṛṣṇo bhīmasya rathamāruhat |
| veṣṭitaṃ vāruṇāstreṇa praviṣṭaṃ bāhyatastadā | sahitatvāt keśavena naratvādatha phalgunam |
| ccclxxxvii.tadastraṃ nādahat tābhyāṃ svarathādavaropite | bhīma ācchinnahetau ca tadastraṃ śāntimāgamat |
| śuddhakṣatriyadharmeṣu niratatvād vṛkodaraḥ | vāhanādavatīryānyaiḥ praṇate'pi nirāyudhaiḥ | sāyudhaḥ saratho'yuddhyadaviṣahyamapīśvaraiḥ |
| svadharmahānau mitrāṇāṃ kartavyaṃ yanniṣedhanam | ataḥ so'nyānapi prāha mā gamadhvamiti svayam |
| namaskāryamapi hyastraṃ na namyaṃ jīvanecchayā | samare śatruṇā muktaṃ tasmāt tanna cakāra saḥ |
| astrābhimānī vāyurhi devatā'sya hariḥ svayam | tasmād bhīmaṃ svarūpatvānnādahaccāgnimagnivat |
| manasaivā'daraṃ cakre bhīmo'stre ca harau tadā | kṣatradharmānusāreṇa na nanāma ca bāhyataḥ |
| vāsudevaḥ svakīyāstraṃ bhīmaṃ cāmoghameva tu | sādhayitvā'nantaśaktiḥ punaraśvānacodayat |
| punaḥ prayoktumastraṃ taṃ dhārtarāṣṭro'bhyacodayat | drauṇirna śakyamityuktvā dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ samabhyayāt |
| āyāntamīkṣyaiva guroḥ sutaṃ taṃ dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ sātyakiranvayād raṇe | ubhau ca tau sāyakābhyāmavidhyannipetatustau ca vimūrcchitau raṇe |
| bhīmasyābhyāgatasyāṇsvān drauṇirvyadrāvayad raṇe | saṃ sthāpayati tān bhīme dadarśa drauṇimarjunaḥ |
| tato'rjunastaṃ pratiyoddhumāgamad rukṣā vācaḥ śrāvayan kruddharūpaḥ | tatrā'gneyaṃ drauṇiramuñcadastraṃ tena vyāptā pṛtanā pāṇḍavānām |
| ccclxxxviii.akṣohiṇī nihatā cātra senā pārthaṃ sayānaṃ harirujjahāra | jīvantamālokya surendranandanaṃ drauṇiḥ kopāt kārmukaṃ cāpahāya | yayau tamāgatya jagāda kṛṣṇo vedāntakṛt pūrṇaṣāḍguṇyadehaḥ |
| mā yāhi sākṣād giriśaḥ surāṇāṃ kāryāya bhūmau balavānajāyathāḥ | mahacca kāryaṃ punarasti dṛṣṭaṃ tavā'śu tacca pratipādayeti |
| tathoditaḥ prātariti bruvāṇo yayau praṇamyākhilavedayonim | yayustamanveva suyodhanādayo duḥkhānatāste śibirāya bhīt āḥ |
| pārthāṇsca sarve muditā janārdanaṃ paraṃ stuvantaḥ śibirāya jagmuḥ | tatrāpi rātrāvamitān harerguṇānanusmaranto mumuduḥ sametāḥ |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye nḸarāyaṇāstropaśamanaṃ nḸama ṣaḍviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ ccclxxxix.(karṇavadhaḥ ) atha saptaviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | athānujñāmupādāya drauṇerduryodhano nṛpaḥ | karṇaṃ senāpatiṃ cakre so'gād yuddhāya daṃ sitaḥ |
| prasabhaṃ sagajabalasya kṣatrasyoccaiḥ samabadharājabalasya | mḸanaṃ śiśupālavaraṃ hatvā bhaiṣmīmavāpa śiśupālavaram |
Chā. U.
| tatrābhavad yuddhamatīva dāruṇaṃ pāṇḍoḥ sutānāṃ dhṛtarāṣṭrajairgaje | tatrodayādripratime pradṛśyate bhīmo yathodyan savitā'tinirmalaḥ |
| taṃ kālayantaṃ nṛpatīn kṣemadhūrtirabhyāgamat tasya gajaṃ jaghāna ca | taṃ vīryamattaṃ pratilabhya bhīmo nināya mṛtyoḥ sadanāya śīghram |
| nihatya taṃ mārutirabhyakṛntacchirāṃ si yūnāṃ parapakṣapātinām | vikṣobhayāmāsa ca śatrusainyaṃ siṃ ho yathaiva śvasṛgālayūtham |
| saṅkṣobhyamāṇaṃ tadanīkamīkṣya drauṇī rathena pratijagmivāṃ stam | tad yuddhamāsīdatighoramadbhutaṃ purā yathā nā'sa ca kasyacit kvacit |
| dṛṣṭvaiva tad devagandharvaviprā ūcurnedṛg dṛṣṭapūrvaṃ suyuddham | nacottaraṃ vā'pi bhaviṣyatīdṛk kalāṃ ca sarvāṇi na ṣoḍaṇsīmiyuḥ |
| naitādṛśī jñānasampad balaṃ vā dvayaṃ kuto vāyumṛte śivaṃ tathā | dvayoḥ samāhāra iha dvayorapi jñānasya bāhvośca balasya sūrjitaḥ |
| itīryamāṇe vibudhairnarottamau diśaḥ samastā gaganaṃ ca patribhiḥ | nirantaraṃ cakraturuttamojasau dṛṣṭvaiva tad bhītimagurmahārathāḥ |
| śarāsane mārutinā nirākṛto drauṇirmahāstrāṇi mumoca tasmin | t ānyastravaryairbalavānavismayaḥ saṃ śāmayāmāsa suto'nilasya |
| punaḥ śaraireva parasparaṃ t āvayuddhyatāṃ citramalaṃ ca suṣṭhu | tadā tubhīmasya śarairbhṛśārto drauṇiḥ papātā'śu dṛḍhaṃ vicetanaḥ |
| bhīmaśca vihvalatanuḥ sa tu kiñcideva pūrvaṃ gate gurusute prayayau kṣaṇena | nirdhūtayuddhaśrama āttadhanvā yoddhuṃ gajaughaṃ pratināditāṇsaḥ |
| cccxc.tasmin gajān mardayati dhārtarāṣṭro yudhiṣṭhiram | agād yuddhāya tau yuddhaṃ rājānau cakratuściram |
| tatra taṃ virathaṃ cakre sahasaiva yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | sa gadāmādade gurvīṃ taṃ bhīmo'bhyapatad gadī |
| dṛṣṭvā kṛpastaṃ svarathamāropyāpayayau tataḥ | tadaiva karṇanakulau bhṛśaṃ bāṇairayuddhyatām |
| nakulaṃ virathaṃ kṛtvā karṇo'tha prapalāyitam | anudrutya ca vegena kaṇṭhe dhanuravāsṛjat |
| uktvā ca puruṣā vācaḥ kuntyā vacanagauravāt | na jaghānaiva nakulaṃ visṛjya ca yayau parān |
| vindānuvindāvatha kaikayau raṇe samāsadat sātyakirugravikramaḥ | tayoramuṣyābhavadugravaiśasaṃ pravarṣatoruttamasāyakān bahūn |
| t ābhyāṃ niruddhaḥ sahasā jahāra tatrānuvindasya śiro'tha vindaḥ | yuyodha śaineyamathārathāvubhau parasparaṃ cakraturuttamāhave |
| tataśca carmāsidharau praceratuḥ śyenau yathā'kāṇsatal . e kṛtaśramau | nikṛtya cānyonyamubhau ca carmaṇī varāsipāṇī yugapat samīyatuḥ |
| tatrāpahastena śiraḥ sakuṇḍalaṃ jahāra vindasya mṛdhe sa sātyakiḥ | nihatya taṃ bandhujanaiḥ supūjito jagāma śatrūnaparān prakampayan |
| kṛpamāyāntamīkṣyaiva tapasāṃ māṃ prapīḍayet | iti matvā pārṣatastu bhīmaṃ śaraṇameyivān |
| karṇaṃ samantāt pratikālayantaṃ varūthinīmindrasutaḥ samabhyayāt | kṣaṇāt tamājau virathaṃ ca cakre tato'pahāraṃ sa cakāra camvāḥ |
| parājitaḥ saṃ yati sūryasūnuḥ sutena śakrasya sa dhārtarāṣṭram | cccxci.jagāda bāhuṃ pratigṛhya pārtho jigāya māmanyamanaskamājau |
| kāmaṃ ratho me dhanurapyabhedyaṃ dattaṃ bhṛgūṇāmadhipena divyam | yantā natādṛṅ mama yādṛśo hariḥ śalyo yadi syāt tvadariṃ nihanyām |
| itīrite sautyakṛte sa śalyaṃ provāca sa kruddha ivābhavat tadā | duryodhano rathinaḥ sārathestu vyāvarṇayannuttamatāmaśāmayat |
| buddhyā balena jñānena dhairyādyairapi yo'dhikaḥ | rathinaḥ sārathiḥ sa syādarjunasya yathā hariḥ | yathā ṇsivasya brahmā'bhūd dahatastripuraṃ purā |
| ityādivākyaiḥ saṃ śānta iva śalyo'sya sārathiḥ | babhūva tena sahitaḥ senāṃ vyūhya raveḥ sutaḥ |
| gacchan yuddhāya darpeṇa prāha yo me'rjunaṃ pumān | darśayet tasya dāsyāmi prīto vittamanargal . am |
| iti bruvantaṃ bahuśaḥ prāha śalyaḥ prahasya ca | nivātakavacā yena hatā dagdhaṃ ca khāṇḍavam | ko nāma taṃ jayenmartyo dṛṣṭo vo'pi sa gograhe |
| kākagomāyudharmā tvaṃ haṃ sasiṃ hopamaṃ raṇe | mā yāhi pārthaṃ mā yāhi hato'nena yamakṣayam |
| ityukte ravijo madrān nitarāṃ paryakutsayat | śalyo'pi sarvadeśeṣu nīcamadhyottamā narāḥ | santītyuktvā'sya sārathyaṃ cakre pārthahitepsayā |
| karṇo'tha śalyaniyatena rathena pārthasenāmavāpya vidudhāva śaraiḥ samantāt | saṃ rakṣito yudhi suyodhanagautamādyairācāryajena ca mahāstravidāṃ vareṇa |
| taṃ bhīmapārṣataśinipravarābhiguptā sā pāṇḍaveyapṛtanā'bhivavarṣa bāṇaiḥ | t āṃ sūryasūnuratha bāṇavarairvidārya samprārdayacchitaśarairapi dharmasūnum |
| cccxcii.kṛtvā tamāṇsu virathaṃ dhanurasya kaṇṭhe sajyaṃ nidhāya paruṣā gira āha coccaiḥ | dṛṣṭvaiva mārutiramuṃ bhṛśamātutoda duryodhanaṃ virathakārmukamatra kṛtvā |

| taṃ prāṇasaṃ śayagataṃ nṛpatiṃ nirīkṣya karṇaṃ jagāda yudhi madrapatiḥ pradarśya | yasyārtha eva samarastvamiyaṃ ca senāṃ taṃ tvaṃ yamasya sadanaṃ prayiyāsumadya | bhīmena pīḍitamamuṃ paripāhi śīghraṃ kiṃ te yudhiṣṭhiramimaṃ hi mudhā'bhipīḍya |
| śrutvā'sya vākyamatihāya yudhiṣṭhiraṃ taṃ karṇo yayau nṛpatirakṣaṇatatparo'lam | dṛṣṭvaiva taṃ pavanasūnurabhi tviyāya krodhād didhakṣuriva karṇamameyadhāmā |

| rājāvanāya śinipuṅgavapārṣatau ca sandiśya karṇamabhigacchata āsa rūpam | ante kṛt āntanarasiṃ hatanoryathaiva viṣṇorharaṃ grasata āttasamastaviśvam | tadvegataḥ praticacāla dharā samastā vidrāvitā ca sakalā prativīrasenā |
| vaikartanena śarasañcayatāḍitaḥ sa bāṇaṃ ca vajrasadṛśaṃ pramumoca tasmin | tenā'hato mṛtakavat sa papāta karṇo bhīmaḥ kṣuraṃ ca jagṛhe'bhiyayau ca padbhyām |
| nindāṃ harestu vidadhāti parokṣago'pi yastaṃ pragṛhya karavāṇi vijiṃ hvameva | evaṃ hi vāyutanayasya mahāpratijñā chettuṃ sa tena ravijasya sasāra jiṃ hvām |
| āyāntamantikamamuṃ prasamīkṣya śalyo netyāha hetubhiraho na mṛṣā pratijñā | kāryā tvayaiva puruhūtasutasya jiṃ hvāṃ mā tena pātaya marutsuta sūtasūnoḥ |
| ityuktvā pramukhāt tasya rathenaiva tu madrarāṭ| vaikartanamapovāha sarvalokasya paśyataḥ |
| jitvā sūryasutaṃ bhīmaḥ kauravāṇāmanīkinīm | sarvāṃ vidrāvayāmāsa drauṇiduryodhanāvṛt ām |
| akṣohiṇītrayaṃ tena tadā vilul . itaṃ kṣaṇāt | tadaiva guruputro'yāt pāṇḍavānāmanīkinīm |
| vimṛdya sakalāṃ senāṃ kṛtvā ca virathaṃ nṛpam | dhṛṣṭadyumnaṃ yamau caiva sātyakiṃ draupadīsutān | kṣaṇena virathīkṛtya sarvāṃ ścakre nirāyudhān |
| cccxciii.t ān bhagnadarpān raṇato'payātānanveva bāṇāvṛtamantarikṣam | kurvan yayau dharmarājastamāha kiṃ naḥ svadharme niratān vihaṃ si |
| kṣatriyān paradharmastho mā hiṃ sīriti coditaḥ | prahasya tān vihāyaiva yayau yatrācyutārjunau |
| saṃ śaptakaistatra saṃ yuddhyamānaṃ samāhvayāmāsa sureśasūnum | sa bāṇayuktaṃ bhujagendrakalpamunnamya bāhuṃ yudhaye suśūram |
| pārthaḥ saṃ śaptakagaṇaiḥ saṃ sṛṣṭaḥ samarārthibhiḥ | āhūto drauṇinā caiva kāryaṃ kṛṣṇamapṛcchata | codayāmāsa ca hayān kṛṣṇo drauṇirathaṃ prati |
| ubhau ca tāvastravidāṃ pradhānau mahābalau saṃ yati jātadarpau | śaraiḥ samastāḥ pradiśo diśaśca droṇendrasūnū timirāḥ pracakratuḥ |
| drauṇistadā syandanavājiromasvaromakūpadhvajakārmukebhyaḥ | śarānamoghān satataṃ sṛj āno babandha pārthaṃ śarapañjareṇa |
| tasmin nibaddhe hariraprameyo vibodhayāmāsa surendrasūnum | āliṅganenāsya dadau balaṃ ca sa utthito'strāṇyamucanmahānti |
| nivārya tānyastravarairguroḥ sutaściccheda ca jyāṃ yudhi gāṇḍivasya | vavarṣa pārthaṃ ca śarairathā'nyā jyā'sīt tayā gāṇḍivaṃ so'pyayuṅkta |
| tataḥ śareṇa kupitaḥ śitena drauṇisāratheḥ | śiro jahāra kaunteyaḥ sārathyaṃ so'karot svayam |
| śarān visṛjatā tena sārathyamapi kurvatā | śarakūṭena pārthaḥ sa punarbaddho dvijanmanā |
| punarāliṅgya kṛṣṇastamadhācchatruvighātakam | balamasmiṃ stataḥ pārthaḥ uttasthau śaracāpabhṛt | vavarṣa caśarān bhūyo droṇaputre'rimardanaḥ |
| cccxciv.punastasya nunoda jyāṃ drauṇiḥ sandhāya tāṃ punaḥ | pārtho droṇasutasyāṇsvaraśmīṃ ściccheda sāyakaiḥ |
| viraśmayo hayā drauṇeḥ punaḥ pārthaśarāhatāḥ | apohurdūrametasmāt so'pi saṃ sthāpya tān punaḥ | cintayāmāsa naitasmādadhikaṃ śakyate'rjune |
| sārathitvāt keśavasya dhvajasthatvāddhanūmataḥ | gāṇḍivatvāt kārmukasya ceṣudhyorakṣayatvataḥ |
| avadhyatvāt tathā'śvānāmabhedyatvād rathasya ca | ato yoddhuṃ samartho'pi nādya yāmi dhanañjayam |
| evaṃ sa matvā praviveśa senāṃ pāṇḍoḥ sutānāmatha taṃ samabhyayāt | pāṇḍyastayorāsa suyuddhamadbhutaṃ pravarṣatoḥ sāyakapūgamugram |
| aṣṭāvaṣṭaṇsatānyūhuḥ śakaṭāni yadāyudham | ahnastadaṣṭabhāgena drauṇiścikṣepa tatra ha |
| atha taṃ virathaṃ kṛtvā chitvā kārmukamāhave | sakuṇḍalaṃ śiro drauṇirjahāra makuṭojjvalam |
| atha vidrāvayāmāsa pṛtanāṃ pāṇḍavīṃ śaraiḥ | tadā jaghāna pārtho'pi daṇḍadhārākhyamāgadham |
| vidrāpyamāṇāṃ pṛtanāṃ nirīkṣya guroḥ sutenābhyagamat tvarāvān | dhṛṣṭadyumnastaṃ sa ūce supāpaṃ haniṣye tvāmadya yuddhe gurughnam |
| ityukto darśayāmāsa pārṣataḥ khaḍgamuttamam | ayaṃ tava piturhantā vadiṣyati tavottaram |
| ityuktvā dhanurādāya vavarṣa caśarān bahūn | tayoḥ samabhavad yuddhaṃ tumulaṃ romaharṣaṇam |
| cccxcv.tatra pārṣataṃ drauṇiḥ kṣaṇena virathāyudham | kṛtvā'ntāya śarāṃ stīkṣṇān mumoca naca tasya te | tvacaṃ ca cicchidurdrauṇiḥ khaḍgahasto'bhijagmivān |
| khaḍgena sāstraiḥ śastrairapyanirbhiṇṇatvacaṃ tadā | maurvyā mamantha dhanuṣaḥ pātayitvā dharātal . e |
| ākṛṣyamāṇaṃ pārṣataṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛṣṇapracoditaḥ | pārtho bhīmaścobhayataḥ śarairabhinijaghnatuḥ |
| sa tābhyāṃ vajrasadṛśaiḥ śarairabhihato bhṛśam | visṛjya pārṣataṃ svīyamāruroha rathaṃ punaḥ |
| jagāma ca tato'nyatra pāñcālyo'pi rathaṃ punaḥ | āruṃ hyānyaṃ svāttadhanvā kṛtavarmāṇamabhyayāt |
| tayorāsīt sutumulaṃ yuddhamadbhutadarśanam | tatra nātiprayatnena pāñcālyo virathāyudham | cakāra kṛtavarmāṇaṃ tamapovāha gautamaḥ |
| atha duryodhano rājā mādreyāvabhyayād rathī | t ābhyāṃ tasyābhavad ghoraṃ yuddhamadbhutadarśanam | tatra nātiprayatnena tena tau virathīkṛtau |
| svayaṃ yudhiṣṭhiro rājā tadā taṃ samavārayat | vyaśvasūtadhvajaṃ cakre taṃ ca duryodhano raṇe |
| athā'gataṃ sūryasutaṃ punaśca jagāma bhīmo rabhaso rathena | duryodhanaṃ cāsya samakṣameva cakāra vīro virathaṃ kṣaṇena |
| nivārya karṇaṃ ca śarairamuṣya sūnoḥ suṣeṇasya śiraścakarta | papāta bhūmau sa pituḥ samīpe yathā hataḥ satyaseno'munaiva | yathaiva karṇāvarajau puraiva niśāyuddhe karṇapuraḥ prapātitau |
| hataṃ tamīkṣyaiva vikartanātmajaḥ krodhānvito bhīmasenaṃ vihāya | cccxcvi.yayau pramṛdyaiva camūṃ yudhiṣṭhiraṃ rathe'pare svaśvayute vyavasthitam |
| nyavārayetāṃ śinipautrapārṣatau kṛṣṇāsutāḥ somakasaṅghayuktāḥ | sa tān samastān virathān vidhāya yudhiṣṭhiraṃ prāpa yutaṃ yamābhyām |
| nihatya so'śvān yudhi dharmasūnornirāyudhau tau ca yamau cakāra | t ānekayānopagatān punaśca mamarda bāṇaiśca vacobhirugraiḥ |
| tadaiva mokṣāya nṛpasya bhīmo duryodhanaṃ virathaṃ saṃ vidhāya | vivyādha marmasvatitīkṣṇasāyakaistaṃ darśayāmāsa raveḥ sutāya |
| śalyastadā dharmasutaṃ vihāya karṇo yayau tatra yudhiṣṭhiro'pi | gatvā ṇsanaiḥ śibiraṃ tatra śiśye karṇo yadā rājagṛdhnī jagāma |
| drauṇiḥ kṛpaścātra tadaiva jagmatustadā bhīmo drauṇikarṇau jagāma | yadā bhīmo drauṇikarṇau jagāma kṛpo nṛpaṃ rathamāropayacca |
| nṛpaṃ samādāya kṛpe'payāte bhīmārditau drauṇikarṇau śaraughaiḥ | vihāya taṃ jagmatuḥ somakānāṃ camūṃ śaraughairabhipātayantau |
| athātra rājānamacakṣamāṇo dhanañjayo vāsudevapraṇunnaḥ | abhyāyayau pārṣataḥ svāṃ tu senāṃ karṇāhatāṃ vīkṣya kurūnapīḍayat |
| nyavārayat samāyāntaṃ kapipravaraketanam | drauṇirduḥ śāsanaścaiva dhṛṣṭadyumnamavārayat |
| ubhāvatirathau tau tu śastrāstrairabhyavarṣatām | duḥ śāsanaḥ pārṣataśca kurvantau bāṇajaṃ tamaḥ |
| tatra duḥ śāsanenā'jau stambhito drupadātmajaḥ | yatamāno'pi niryatnaḥ kṛto yuddhe nirāyudhaḥ |
| tadā'bhavad yuddhamatīva dāruṇaṃ drauṇestanūjena tu vajrapāṇeḥ | tatrāpi baddhaḥ śarapañjareṇa pārtho'panuttā'pi hi gāṇḍivajyā |
| cccxcvii.pārtho'tha kṛṣṇedhitabāhuvīryo nihatya sūtaṃ guruputrakasya | chitvā caraśmīṃ sturagānamuṣya vidrāvayāmāsa śaraiḥ sudūram |
| atītya putraṃ tu guroḥ samāgate pārthe karṇo drāvayāmāsa senām | pāṇḍoḥ sutānāṃ śaravarṣadhāro duryodhanaścānu yayau tameva |
| karṇamāyāntamālokya drāvayantaṃ nijāṃ camūm | dhanuranyat samādāya dhṛṣṭadyumno nyavārayat |
| tayorāsīnmahad yuddhaṃ ciraṃ samamaviśramam | tadaiva sātyakirvīro duryodhanamavārayat |
| nivāritaḥ sātyakinā raṇe duryodhano nṛpaḥ | nihatya sātyakeraśvān draupadeścāpamacchinat |
| tadantaraiva karṇo'pi pārṣatāṇsvānapātayat | tayorvirathayoreva bhagnaṃ tat pāṇḍavaṃ balam |
| balaṃ svakīyaṃ bahudhā vibhinnaṃ samīkṣya bhīmo mṛgarājaketuḥ | kṛtvā dharākampakamugranādaṃ raṇe'bhyayāt kauravarājasainyam |
| nādena bāṇaiśca vṛkodareṇa bhagnaṃ tadā kauravasainyamāṇsu | diśo vidudrāva suyodhano'pi kṛto raṇe tena vivāhananāyudhaḥ |
| dṛṣṭvaiva tat pāṇḍavānāṃ ca senā samāvṛtt ā kṣipramavāryavegā | tayā punaḥ kauravāṇāṃ balaṃ tad bhagnaṃ dūrād dūrataraṃ pradudruve |
| hanyamānaṃ diśo yātaṃ pāñcālairbhīmasaṃ śrayāt | suyodhanabalaṃ dṛṣṭvā jajvālā'dhirathiḥ krudhā |
| so'moghaṃ rāmadevatyamastraṃ bhārgavasañjñitam | sarvāstranāṇsakaṃ divyamapratidvandvamādade |
| tacca bhīmapurogeṣu sainyeṣvamucadudblaṇam | tadastraṃ varjayāmāsa bhīmaṃ rāmaprasādataḥ | cccxcviii.anye tu dudruvuḥ kecicchiṣṭāḥ prāpuryamakṣayam |
| nahyastraṃ dravamāṇāṃ staddhanti tena sapārṣatāḥ | pāñcālā draupadeyāṇsca śaineyādyāṇsca sarvaśaḥ |
| palāyanenorvaritā arjuno'pyastramudyatam | vīkṣya pratyastrahīnaṃ tadaprāpyaiva raveḥ sutam |
| vāsudevamidaṃ prāha varjayitvaiva sūtajam | anyatra yāmi naivāsmādastrājjīvanamanyathā |
| ityūcivāṃ saṃ pārthaṃ taṃ kṛṣṇo'prāpyaiva sūtajam | anyenaiva pathā bhīmaṃ prāpayāmāsa viśvakṛt |
| tatrārjuno'vadad bhīmaṃ yāhi draṣṭuṃ yudhiṣṭhiram | pravṛttiṃ viddhi bhūpasya māṃ tu saṃ śaptakā yudhe | āhvayanti hatoccheṣāstānahaṃ yāmi tad yudhe |
| ityūcivāṃ saṃ tamuvāca bhīmo j ānan svabāhvorbalamaprameyam | saṃ śaptakān sūtajaṃ kauravāṃ śca yotsye'hamekastvamupaihi bhūpam |
| tyaktvā raṇaṃ nāhamito vrajeyaṃ na māṃ vadet kaścana yuddhabhītam | iti bruvāṇaṃ tamanantaśaktiḥ prītaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ praśaśaṃ sādhikeṣṭam |
| yayau yudhiṣṭhiraṃ draṣṭuṃ śibiraṃ sārjuno hariḥ | dṛṣṭvā tau nṛpatiḥ karṇaṃ hataṃ matvā ṇsaśaṃ sa ha |
| abhivādya haniṣyāmītyuktaḥ pārthena sā krudhā | bhṛśaṃ vinindya bībhatsumāha kṛṣṇāya gāṇḍivam | dehi putraṃ sa rādhāyā haniṣyati na saṃ śayaḥ |
| athavā bhīma evainaṃ nivṛtte tvayi pātayet | tvaṃ tu kuntyā vṛthā sūtaḥ klībo mithyāpratiśrutaḥ |
| ahaṃ hi sūtaputreṇa kliṣṭo mārutitejasā | cccxcix.jīvāmītyagrajenokta udbabarhāsimuttamam | vāsudevastadā'hedaṃ kimetaditi sarvavit |
| tamāha gāṇḍivaṃ dātuṃ yo vadet tadvadho mayā | pratijñātastato hanmi nṛpamityāha taṃ hariḥ |
| satyasya vacanaṃ śreyaḥ satyajñānaṃ tu duṣkaram | yatsatāṃ hitamatyantaṃ tat satyamiti niścayaḥ |
| dharmasya caraṇaṃ śreyo dharmajñānaṃ tu duṣkaram | yaḥ satāṃ dhārako nityaṃ sa dharma iti niścayaḥ |
| kauśikākhyo brāhmaṇo hi līnaṃ grāmajanaṃ kvacit | taskareṣvabhidhāyaiva nirayaṃ pratyapadyata |
| kaścid vyādho mṛgaṃ hatvā mātāpitṛnimittataḥ | bhakṣārthamabhyagāt svargamasuro'sau mṛgo yataḥ | upadravāya lokasya tapaścarati durmatiḥ |
| tasmāt saddhārako dharma iti kṛtvā viniścayam | mā nṛpaṃ jahi satyāṃ tvaṅkuru vācaṃ tataḥ kuru | ityukto bahudhā'nindat krodhādevārjuno bhṛśam |
| tvaṃ nṛśaṃ so'kṛtajñaśca nirvīryaḥ paruṣaṃ vadaḥ | tvattaḥ sukhaṃ nāsti kiñcinna māṃ garhitumarhasi |
| bhīmo māṃ garhituṃ yogyo yo hyasmākaṃ sadā gatiḥ | yo yuddhyate sarvavīrairadyāpi tvaṃ tu nindakaḥ |
| ityādyuktvā'tmanāṇsāya vikośaṃ cakṛvānasim | punaḥ kṛṣṇena puṣṭaḥ san svābhiprāyamuvāca saḥ | tacchrutvā garhayitvainaṃ punarāha janārdanaḥ |
| matipūrvaṃ dehahānāt pāpaṃ mahadavāpyate | dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ sādhanaṃ dehato'sti yat |
| cd.ato mā tyaja dehaṃ tu kuru cā'tmapraśaṃ sanam | vadho gurūṇāṃ tvaṅkāraḥ svapraśaṃ saiva cātmanaḥ | ityuktaḥ sa tvahaṅkārācchaśaṃ sa svaguṇānalam |
| gurunindā'tmapūjā ca na dharmāya bhavet kvacit | tathā'pyarjunahārdaṃ tat samprakāṇsya janārdanaḥ |
| tasya lajjāṃ samutpādya nāṇsayitvā ca taṃ madam | nāhaṃ veda paraṃ dharmaṃ kṛṣṇa eva gatirmama |
| iti bhāvaṃ samutpādya doṣān nāṇsayituṃ hariḥ | kārayāmāsa tat sarvamarjunena jagatpatiḥ |
| tata evadavijñānāt kupito nṛpatirbhṛśam | āhāstu rājā bhīmastvaṃ yuvā māṃ jahi ca svayam | vanaṃ vā viphalo yāmītyuktvottasthau svatalpataḥ |
| taṃ vāsudevaḥ pratigṛhya hetumuktvā sarvaṃ śamayāmāsa netā | pārthaśca bhūpasya papāta pādayoḥ kṣamāpayan so'pi suprītimāpa |
| tau bhrātarau vāsudevaprasādānmahāpado muktimāpyātihṛṣṭau | bhaktyā samastādhipatiṃ śaśaṃ satustvayā samaḥ ko nu hare hito naḥ |
| tataḥ praṇamya bībhatsuragrajaṃ parirambhitaḥ | tenābhinanditaḥ prītyā cā'śīrbhiḥ prayayau yudhe |
| taṃ śaṅkitaṃ karṇajaye svinnagātraṃ haristadā | saṅkīrtya pūrvakarmāṇi narāveśaṃ viśeṣataḥ | vyañjayāmāsa dhairyaṃ ca tasyā'sīt tena susthiram |
| bhīmastadā ṇsatrubalaṃ samastaṃ vidrāvayāmāsa jaghāna cā'jau | vīrān raṇāyābhimukhān svayantrā kurvaṃ śca vārtā ramamāṇa eva|
| tadā'sadat taṃ śakuniḥ sasainyo duryodhanasyāvarajairupetaḥ | cdi.taṃ bhīmaseno virathaṃ nirāyudhaṃ vidhāya bāṇairbhuvi ca nyapātayat |
| na jaghnivāṃ staṃ sahadevabhāgaṃ prakalpitaṃ svena tadā'kṣagoṣṭhyām | taṃ mūrcchitaṃ śvāsamātrāvaśeṣaṃ duryodhanaḥ svarathenāpaninye |
| duryodhanasyāvarajā daśātra pradudruvurbhīmasenaṃ vihāya | tadā'rjunaṃ vāsudevaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā prītaḥ śrutvā dharmarājapravṛttim |
| punaśca nighnantamaripravīrān vidrāvayantaṃ ca nijāṃ varūthinīm | sasāra duḥ śāsana āttadhanvā bhīmo'pi taṃ siṃ ha ivābhipetivān |
| taṃ rūkṣavāco muhurarpayantaṃ vidhāya bhīmo virathaṃ kṣaṇena | pragṛhya bhūmau vinipātya vakṣo vidārayāmāsa gadāprahārataḥ |
| ākramya kaṇṭhaṃ ca padodare'sya niviśya paśyan mukhamāttaroṣaḥ | vikośamākāṇsanibhaṃ vidhāya mahāsimasyorasi sañcakhāna |
| kṛtvā'sya vakṣasyurusattaṭākaṃ papau nikāmaṃ tṛṣito'mṛtopamam | tacchoṇit āmbho bhramadakṣamenaṃ saṃ smārayāmāsa purākṛt āni |
| vāksāyakāṃ ścāsya purā samarpitān saṃ smārayāmāsa punaḥ punarbhṛśam | dantāntaraṃ na praviveśa tasya raktaṃ hyapeyaṃ puruṣasya jānataḥ |
| tathā'pi śatrupratibhīṣaṇāya papāvivā'svādya punaḥ punarbhṛśam | smaran nṛsiṃ haṃ bhagavantamīśvaraṃ sa manyusūktaṃ ca dadarśa bhaktyā |
| "yaste manyo"
| uvāca vācaṃ puruṣapravīraḥ satyāṃ pratijñāṃ lokamadhye vidhāya | yāḥ sapatayastā apatayo hi jātā yāsā'patiḥ sā sapatiśca jātā |
| paśyantu citrāṃ paramasya śaktiṃ ye vai tilāḥ ṣaṇḍhatilā babhūvuḥ |
| iti bruvāṇaḥ punareva raktaṃ papau sudhāṃ devavaro yathā divi | punaśca saprāṇamamuṃ visṛjya nadan nanartāribale nirāyudhaḥ |
| pratyanṛtyan ye'smān punargauriti gauriti | t ān vayaṃ pratinṛtyāmaḥ punargauriti gauriti |
| iti bruvan nṛtyamāno'rimadhya āsphoṭayañchatrugaṇānajohavīt | śaśāka ca draṣṭumamuṃ na kaścid vaikartanadrauṇisuyodhanādiṣu |
| bhayācca karṇasya papāta kārmukaṃ nimīlayāmāsa tadā'kṣiṇī ca| sambodhito madrarājena yuddhe sthitaḥ kathañcit sa tu pārthabhāgaḥ |
| drauṇirvihāyainamapājagāma dūraṃ tadā bhīmaseno jagāda | pītaḥ somo yuddhayajñe mayā'dya vadhyaḥ paśurme haraye suyodhanaḥ |
| iti bruvan mṛtamutsṛjya śatruṃ duryodhanaṃ cā'śu ruṣā'bhidudruve | āyāntamīkṣyaiva tamugrapauruṣaṃ dudrāva bhītaḥ sa suyodhano bhṛśam |
| baladvayaṃ cāpayayau vihāya bhayād bhīmaṃ kṛṣṇapārthau vinaiva | āyodhanaṃ śūnyamabhūnmuhūrtaṃ nanarta bhīmo vyāghrapadena harṣāt |
| saṅkalpya śatrūn govadevā'jimadhye śārdūlavat taccaritaṃ niśāmya | jahāsa kṛṣṇaṇsca dhanañjayaśca śaśaṃ satuścainamatiprahṛṣṭau |
| yadā saraṅgaḥ pavamānasūnunā ṇsūnyaḥ kṛtastatra mahūrtamātrāt | duryodhanasyāvarajāḥ śaraughairavīvṛṣan bhīmamudārasattvam |
| t ān mārutirbāṇavarairnikṛttaśīrṣān yamāyānayadāṇsu vīraḥ | tasmin dine viṃ śatidhārtarāṣṭra hatāstadanye samarāt pradudruvuḥ |
| karmāṇyananyaupayikāni bhīme kurvatyevaṃ bhītabhīte'risa' nghe | nimīlitākṣe ca bhayena karṇe karṇātmajo nakulaṃ pratyadhāvat |
| cdiii.mādrīsuto vṛṣasenaṃ śaraughairavārayat taṃ virathaṃ cakāra | karṇātmajaḥ so'pyasicarmapāṇistasyānugāṃ strisahasraṃ jaghāna |
| karṇātmajastasya sañchidya carma bhīmārjunādīnapi bāṇasaṅghaiḥ | avīvṛṣat tasya pārthaḥ śareṇa grīvābāhūrūn yugapaccakarta |
| ekena bāṇena sute hate sve vaikartano vāsavimabhyadhāvat | tayorabhūd dvairathayuddhamadbhutaṃ sarvāstravidvarayorugrarūpam |
| pakṣagrahāstatra surāsurāstayoranye ca jīvā gaganaṃ samāsthitāḥ | mahān vivādo'pyabhavat tayoḥ kṛte tadā girīśo'vadadabjayonim |

| surāsurāṇāṃ bhīmaduryodhanau dvau samāṇsrayau tatpriyau karṇapārthau | prāṇopamau tena caitatkṛte te surāsurāḥ kartumicchanti yuddham | tadā vināṇso jagatāṃ mahān syāt tenānayoḥ samamevāstu yuddham |
| itīrite vāsavaḥ padmayoniṃ jagāda kṛṣṇo yatra jayaśca tatra | kāmo na kṛṣṇasya mṛṣā bhaveddhi kāmo'sya pārthasya jayaṃ pradātum |
| ityūcivān vāsavaḥ phalgunasya jayo'stu karṇasya vadhastatheti | uktvā'namat kañjabhavastatheti prāhāsurān devatāṇscā'babhāṣe |
| na karṇārjunayorarthe virodhaṃ kuruta kvacit | bhīmaduryodhanārthe vā paśyantveva ca saṃ yugam | ityukte śāntimāpannā dadṛśuḥ saṃ yugaṃ tayoḥ |
| vavarṣatustau ca mahāstraśastrairbhīmo rathastho'varajaṃ jugopa | śaineyapāñcālamukhāṇsca pārthamāvārya tasthuḥ prasabhaṃ nadantaḥ |
| duryodhano drauṇimukhāṇsca karṇaṃ rarakṣurāvārya tadā'sa yuddham | tatrārjunaṃ bāṇavaraiḥ sa karṇaḥ samardayāmāsa viśeṣayan raṇe |
| tadā nadan bhīmaseno jagāda gadāṃ samādāya samāttaroṣaḥ | ahaṃ vainaṃ gadayā pothayāmi tvaṃ vā jahīmaṃ samupāttavīryaḥ | kṛṣṇo'pi taṃ bodhayāmāsa samyaṅ narāveśaṃ vyañjayan bhūya eva |
| cdiv.samṛddhavīryaḥ sa tadā dhanañjayaḥ suyodhanadrauṇikṛpān sabhojān | sākaṃ ca bāṇairvirathāṃ ścakāra vivyādha tānapyarihā supuṅkhaiḥ |
| te kiñcid dūratastasthuḥ paśyanto yuddhamuttamam | amānuṣaṃ tat pārthasya dṛṣṭvā karma guroḥ sutaḥ | gṛhītvā pāṇinā pāṇiṃ duryodhanamabhāṣata |
| dṛṣṭaṃ hi bhīmasya balaṃ tvayā'dya tathaiva pārthasya yathā jitā vayam | alaṃ virodhena sametya pāṇḍavaiḥ praśādhi rājyaṃ ca mayā sametaḥ |
| dhanañjayastiṣṭhati vārito mayā janārdano naiva virodhamicchati | vṛkodarastadvacane sthitaḥ sadā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ śāntamanāstathā yamau |
| hitārthametat tava vākyamīritaṃ gṛhāṇa me naiva bhayādudīritam | ahaṃ hyavadhyo mama caiva mātulo na śaṅkituṃ me vacanaṃ tvamarhasi |
| itīritaḥ prāha suyodhanastaṃ duḥ śāsanasyādya papau hi śoṇitam | śārdūlaceṣṭāmakarocca bhīmo na me kathañcit tadanena sandhiḥ |
| ityukto drauṇirāsīt sa tūṣṇīṃ karṇadhanañjayau | mahāstraśastravarṣeṇa cakratuḥ khamanantaram |
| āgneyavāruṇaindrādīnyetānyanyonyamṛtyave | brahmāstramapyubhau tatra prayujyā'nadatāṃ raṇe | anyonyāstrapratīghātaṃ kṛtvobhau ca virejatuḥ |
| krameṇa vṛddhorubalena tatra surendraputreṇa virocanātmajaḥ | nirākṛto nāgamayaṃ śarottamaṃ brahmāstrayuktaṃ visasarja vāsavau |
| taṃ vāsudevo rathamānamayya moghaṃ cakārārjunataḥ kirīṭam | cūrṇīkṛtaṃ tena surendrasūnordivyaṃ yayau bāṇagataśca nāgaḥ |
| namite vāsudevena rathe pañcāṅgulaṃ bhuvi | apāṅgadeśamuddiśya mukte nāge kirīṭinaḥ |
| cdv.bhaṅktvā kirīṭaṃ viyati gacchati prabhuṇoditaḥ | bāṇaistakṣakaputraṃ taṃ vāsaviḥ pūrvavairiṇam |
| hatvā nipātayāmāsa bhūmau karṇasya paśyataḥ | brahmāstrasyātivegitvaṃ prāptaṃ karṇena bhārgavāt |
| punaśca pārthena mahāstrayuddhaṃ prakurvataḥ sūryasutasya cakram | rathasya bhūmirgrasati sma śāpādastrāṇi divyāni ca vismṛtiṃ yayuḥ |
| uddhartukāmo rathacakrameva pārthaṃ yayāce'vasaraṃ pradātum | netyāha kṛṣṇo'ñjalikaṃ sughoraṃ trinetradattaṃ jagṛhe ca pārthaḥ |
| satyena dharmeṇa ca sanniyojya mumoca karṇasya vadhāya bāṇam | ciccheda tenaiva ca tasya śīrṣaṃ sandhitsato bāṇavaraṃ sughoram |
| aparāhṇe'parāhṇasya sūtajasyendrasūnunā | chinnamañjalikenā'jau sotsedhamapatacchiraḥ |
| tasmin hate dīnamukhaḥ suyodhano yayau samāhṛtya balaṃ saśalyaḥ | yudhiṣṭhiraḥ karṇavadhaṃ niśamya tadā samāgatya dadarśa tattanum |
| śaśaṃ sa kṛṣṇaṃ ca dhanañjayaṃ ca bhīmaṃ ca ye'nye'pi yudhi pravīrāḥ | gatvā cateśibiraṃ modamānā ūṣuḥ sakṛṣṇāstadanuvratāḥ sadā |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye karṇavadho nāma saptaviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ cdvi.(pāṇḍavarājyalābhaḥ ) atha aṣṭāviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | prabhātāyāṃ tu śarvaryāṃ guruputrānumoditaḥ | śalyaṃ senāpatiṃ kṛtvā yoddhuṃ duryodhano'bhyayāt |
| haṃ so ḍibhakaścapalāvamunā saṃ sūditau yavanakaśca palā | kīrtirvimalā viratā pratatā viśvadhipāvanīlāviratā |
Mahā.
| tamabhyayuḥ pāṇḍavāṇsca hṛṣṭā yuddhāya daṃ sitāḥ | tatrā'sīt sumahad yuddhaṃ pāṇḍavānāṃ paraiḥ saha |
| agre bhīmaḥ pāṇḍavānāṃ madhye rājā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | pṛṣṭhe gāṇḍīvadhanvā'sīd vāsudevābhirakṣitaḥ |
| cakrarakṣau yamau rājño dhṛṣṭadyumnaśca sātyakiḥ | nṛpasya pārśvayorāstāmagre'nyeṣāṃ guroḥ sutaḥ |
| madhye śalyaḥ pṛṣṭhato'bhūd bhrātṛbhiśca suyodhanaḥ | cakrarakṣau tu śalyasya śakunistatsutastathā | kṛpaśca kṛtavarmā capārśvayoḥ samavasthitau |
| tatrabhavanmahad yuddhaṃ bhīmasya drauṇinā saha | rājñaḥ śalyena ca tathā ghorarūpaṃ bhayānakam |
| tatra nātiprayatnena drauṇirbhīmena sāyakaiḥ | virathīkṛtastathā dharmasūnuḥ śalyena tatkṣaṇāt |
| āsasāda tadā ṇsalyaṃ kapipravaraketanaḥ | tayorāsīnmahad yuddhamadbhutaṃ romaharṣaṇam |
| rathamanyaṃ samāsthāya drauṇirbhīmaṃ samabhyayāt | duryodhanaśca bhīmasya śarairāvārayad diśaḥ |
| t āvubhau śaravarṣeṇa vārayāmāsa mārutiḥ | t ābhyāṃ tasyābhavad yuddhaṃ sughoramatimānuṣam |
| duryodhanasyāvarajān draupadeyā yuyutsunā | cdvii.śikhaṇḍyādyairmātulaiśca saha sarvān nyavārayan |
| sahadevastu śakunimulūkaṃ nakulastadā | dhṛṣṭadyumnaśca hārdikyaṃ sātyakiḥ kṛpameva ca | teṣāṃ tadabhavad yuddhaṃ citraṃ laghu ca suṣṭhu ya |
| śalyastu śarasaṅghātaiḥ pārthasyāvārayad diśaḥ | so'pi vivyādha viśikhaiḥ śalyamāhavaśobhinam | tayoḥ susamamevā'sīcciraṃ devāsuropamam |
| tataḥ śaraṃ vajranibhaṃ madrarājaḥ samādade | tena vivyādha bībhatsuṃ hṛdaye sa mumoha ca |
| upalabhya punaḥ sañjñāṃ vāsaviḥ śatrutāpanaḥ | ciccheda kārmukaṃ saṅkhe madrarājasya dhīmataḥ |
| so'nyat kārmukamādāya mumocāstrāṇi phalgune | sauraṃ yāmyaṃ ca pārjanyaṃ t ānyaindreṇa jaghāna saḥ |
| punarnyakṛntat taccāpamindrasūnuramarṣitaḥ | śalyo gadāṃ samāvidhya cikṣepārjunavakṣasi | tadā mumoha bībhatsustata uccukruśuḥ pare |
| prāpya sañjñāṃ punaḥ pārthaḥ śalyaṃ vivyādha vakṣasi | sa vihvalitasarvāṅgaḥ śiśraye dhvajamuttamam |
| samāṇsvastaḥ punarbāṇaṃ yamadaṇḍanibhaṃ raṇe | mumoca pārthasya sa ca nirbibheda stanāntaram |
| tena vihvalitaḥ pārtho dhvajayaṣṭiṃ samāṇsritaḥ | samāṇsvastaḥ praciccheda madrarājasya kārmukam | chatraṃ dhvajaṃ ca tarasā sārathiṃ ca nyapātayat |
| tadā'nyaṃ rathamāsthāya dharmarājaḥ śarottamaiḥ | caturbhiścaturo vāhāñchalyasya nijaghāna ha |
| cdviii.śalyo'nyaṃ rathamāsthāya sarvāṃ stāñcharavṛṣṭibhiḥ | chādayāmāsa rājānaṃ virathaṃ ca cakāra ha |
| nihatyāṇsvān sātyakeśca dhṛṣṭadyumnasya cābhibhūḥ | cāpe cchittvā ca yamayordadhmau śaṅkhaṃ mahāsvanam |
| tatastu śalyaṃ samudīryamāṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā raṇe bhīmasenastarasvī | nyavārayad bāṇavarairanekaiścakāra cainaṃ virathaṃ kṣaṇena |
| āsthāya cānyaṃ rathamāpatantaṃ punaśca śalyaṃ bhṛśameva marmasu | nirbhidya bāṇaurvirathaṃ cakāra punastṛtīyaṃ ca rathaṃ ruroja |
| āttānyāttānyāyudhānyasya bhīmaḥ sarvāṇi ciccheda bibheda cāsya | marmāṇi bāṇairnitarāṃ punaśca sa muṣṭimudyamya jagāma dharmajam |
| taṃ bhīmabhinnamarmāṇaṃ vivarmāṇaṃ nirāyudham | śvāsamātrāvaśiṣṭaṃ ca maraṇāyaiva kevalam |
| ātmānamabhigacchantaṃ dṛṣṭvā'nyaṃ rathamāsthitaḥ | hantukāmo raṇe vīramamoghāṃ śaktimādade |
| divyāstrairapi saṃ yojya tāṃ tadā dharmanandanaḥ | satyadharmaphalaiścaiva cikṣepāsya hṛdi tvaran |
| sa bhinnahṛdayo bhūmau papātābhimukho nṛpam | satyadharmarataḥ śalya indrasyātithitāmagāt |
| madrarāje hate vīre suśarmā'rjunamabhyayāt | saṃ śaptakāvaśiṣṭaistamanayanmṛtyave'rjunaḥ |
| duryodhanasyāvarajānavaśiṣṭān vṛkodaraḥ | sarvān jaghāna senāṃ ca niśśeṣamakarod raṇe |
| ulūkaṃ sahadevo'tha śakuniṃ cātipāpinam | cdix.jaghāna drauṇihārdikyakṛpān bhīmārjunau tataḥ |
| bahuśo virathīkṛtya pīḍayitvā punaḥ punaḥ | drāvayāmāsatuste tu bhīṣit ā viviśurvanam |
| śaineyena gṛhīto'tha sañjayo'nantaśaktinā | vyāsena mocito'thaikaḥ pārthān duryodhano'bhyayāt |
| teṣāmabhūt tasya ca ghorarūpaṃ yuddhaṃ sa bāṇairbahuśo'rjunaṃ ca | cakāra mūrcchābhigataṃ yudhiṣṭhiraṃ yamāvayatnād virathāṃ ścakāra |
| taṃ bhīmaseno virathaṃ cakāra gajaṃ samāruhya punaḥ samabhyayāt | punaśca śaineyaśikhaṇḍipārṣatān yamau nṛpaṃ ca vyadadhānnirāyudhān |
| gaje ca bhīmena śarairnipātite samāruhad vājivaraṃ sunirbhayaḥ | sa tena ca prāsakaro raṇe'rihā cacāra śainaiyamatāḍayacca |
| mumoha tenābhihataḥ sa sātyakiryamāvapi prāsanipīḍitau rathe | niṣīdaturdharmasutaṃ prayāntaṃ samīkṣya bhīmo'sya jaghāna vājinam |
| prāse nikṛtte ca vṛkodareṇa vivāhanaḥ so'payayau suyodhanaḥ | ādāya gurvīṃ ca gadāṃ prayāto dvaipāyanasyorusaro viveśa |
| evamakṣohiṇīṣaṭkaṃ bhīmena nihataṃ raṇe | pañca pārthena nihatā arddhaṃ kāliṅgakānṛte | ekādaśākṣohiṇībhyaḥ śiṣṭamanyairnisūditam |
| akṣohiṇīcatuṣkaṃ ca pārthānāṃ drauṇinā hatam | anyairanyāḥ samastaiśca droṇakarṇamahābratāḥ | duryodhano bhaumasūnuḥ prāyaḥ senāhanaḥ kramāt |
| jayaṃ labdhvā tadatsūccaiḥ pāṇḍaveṣu mahātmasu | duryodhano jalastambhaṃ kṛtvā mantrān jajāpa ha |
| mantrā durvāsasā dattā mṛtasañjīvanapradāḥ | cdx.jale sthitvā japan saptadinaiḥ sarvān mṛt ānapi | uddhared dhārtarāṣṭro'yaṃ syuravadhyāṇsca te punaḥ |
| iti vidyābalaṃ tasya jñātvā pāṇḍusutāstataḥ | anveṣantaḥ śuśruvuśca vyādhebhyastaṃ jale sthitam | agacchaṃ śca tatastatra puraskṛtya janārdanam |
| tadā jalāt samunmajjya tribhirdrauṇipurassaraiḥ | mantrayantaṃ sma dadṛśustān dṛṣṭvā te pradudruvuḥ |
| duryodhano'viśat toyaṃ dṛṣṭvā taṃ keśavājñayā | yudhiṣṭhiraḥ supuruṣairvākyairenamathā'hvayat |
| amarṣito'sau dhṛtarāṣṭraputraḥ śvasaṃ stadā daṇḍahato yathā'hiḥ | uvāca śāṭhyāt tapase vanāya yāyāṃ bhavāñchāsatu sarvapṛthvīm |
| tamāha dharmajo rājā yastvaṃ kṛṣṇe samāgate | sūcyagravedhyāṃ pṛthivīṃ dātuṃ naicchaḥ kathaṃ punaḥ |
| ghātayitvā sarvapṛthvīṃ bhīṣmadroṇamukhānapi | dātumicchasi sarvāṃ ca pṛthvīṃ nādya vayaṃ punaḥ |
| ahatvā pratigṛhṇīṃ ehi yuddhe sthiro bhava | na kurūṇāṃ kule jātastvaṃ yo bhīto hyapo'viśaḥ |
| ityādi rūkṣavacanaṃ śrutvā duryodhano ruṣā | jalastambhāt samuttasthau śvasannāṇsīviṣo yathā |
| uvāca caika evāhamakirīṭo vivarmakaḥ | bhavanto bahavo varmaśirastrāṇayutā api |
| yadyevamapi me yuddhaṃ bhavadbhirmanyase samam | sarvairekena vāyuddhaṃ kariṣye naca bhīrmama |
| ityukta āha dharmātmā varmādyaṃ ca dadāmi te | cdxi.vṛṇīṣva prativīraṃ ca pañcānāṃ yaṃ tvamicchasi |
| hatvaikaṃ tvaṃ bhuṅkṣva rājyamanye yāma vayaṃ vanam | hate vā tvayi tenaiva bhuñjīmaścākhilāṃ bhuvam | ādatsva cā'yudhaṃ yena jetumicchasi śātravān |
| ityukta ūce nahi durbalairahaṃ yotsye caturbhirbhavadarjunādibhiḥ | bhīmena yotsye gadayā sadā hi me priyā gadā nānyadathā'yudhaṃ spṛśe |
| śrutvā'sya vākyaṃ rabhaso vṛkodaro gadāṃ tadā'dhyarddhabharādhikāṃ mudā | rājño gadāyāḥ parigṛhya vīraḥ samutthito yuddhamanāḥ samunnadan |
| athā'ha nārāyaṇa ādidevo yudhiṣṭhiraṃ kaṣṭamidaṃ kṛtaṃ tvayā | nahyeṣa rājā gadayā raṇe caran śakyo vijetuṃ nikhilaiḥ surāsuraiḥ |
| sa niścayād vaścaturo nihanyāt sahārjunān bhīmasenaḥ kathañcit | hantainamājau nahi bhīmatulyo bale kvacid dhārtarāṣṭraḥ kṛtī ca|
| ūrū bhīmena bhettavyau pratijñāṃ rakṣatā ripoḥ | nābheradhastāddhananaṃ janā āhurgadāmṛdhe |
| adharma iti tat kṛṣṇo lokanindānivṛttaye | āpaddharmaṃ darśayituṃ kiñcidvyājena saṃ yutaḥ |
| bhīmo hanyād dhārtarāṣṭramityūce yadyapi sphuṭam | avyājenāpi śakto'sau balaṃ nissīmamāha ca |
| āha śikṣāmapyanūnāṃ yatnaṃ duryodhane'dhikam | nahi bhīmo'tiprayatnaṃ kuryāditi guṇo hyayam |
| pratijñāpālanaṃ dharmo duṣṭeṣu tu viśeṣataḥ | iti dharmarahasyaṃ tu vittaḥ kṛṣṇavṛkodarau |
| nānyastato lokanindāṃ vyapanetumubhāvapi | anāpadyāpadiva ca darśayetāṃ janasya tu |
| cdxii.tato bhīmaḥ sarvalokasya dharmaṃ prakāṇsayan vākyamidaṃ jagāda | ūrū tavāhaṃ hi yathāpratijñaṃ bhetsyāmi naivātra vicāraṇīyam |
| ityuktavantaṃ prasasāra cā'jau duryodhanastatra babhūva yuddham | bhīmastadā'gryaprakṛtiṃ vidhitsurmandaḥ sa ājau vyacarajjanārthe |
| darśayantau gadāmārgaṃ citraṃ tau praviceratuḥ | balabhadro'pyājagāma tadā tau prativāritum |
| vāritāvapi tenobhau naiva yuddhaṃ pramuñcatām | tato dadarśa tad yuddhaṃ mānitaḥ kṛṣṇapūrvakaiḥ | tau śikṣābalasaṃ yuktau maṇḍalāni viceratuḥ |
| tato bhīmaṃ vañcayituṃ dhārtarāṣṭraḥ śiraḥ kṣitau | nyadhāducchritasakthīkastadā kṛṣṇābhyanujñayā | pṛṣṭhamūle'hanad bhīmo bhinnasakthiśca so'patat |
| pratijñāpālanārthāya nobhernoparyadhastadā | gadāyuddhasya maryādāṃ yaśaścāpyabhirakṣitum |
| nādhastānmadhya evāsau nijaghne taṃ vṛkodaraḥ | evaṃ pratijñāyugmārthaṃ bhagnaṃ sakthiyugaṃ raṇe |
| kṛṣṇaṃ dyūte nidhehīti yadavādīt suyodhanaḥ | tatpratijñānusāreṇa bhīmo mūrddhānamakramīt | "ṛṣabhām mā samānānāṃ "
| teṣāṃ puṇyḸani vidyāṇsca samādāyaiva sarvaśaḥ | tāṃ ścakāra tamogantḸṛnstasya mūrdhni padā'kraman |
| smārayāmāsa karmāṇi yāni tasya kṛtāni ca | kṛṣṇabandhe kṛto mantra iti mūrdhni padā'hanat |
| punaḥ punaśca tad vīkṣya cukrodha musalāyudhaḥ | cdxiii.iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite cukrośa naiva dharmo'yamityasāvūrdhvabāhukaḥ |
| punaḥ krodhābhitāmrākṣa Ḹadāya musalaṃ halam | abhidudrāva bhīmaṃ taṃ na cacāla vṛkodaraḥ |
| abhaye saṃ sthite bhīme rāmaṃ jagrāha keśavaḥ | āha dharmeṇa nihato bhīmenāyaṃ suyodhanaḥ |
| na maṇḍale'bhisāre vā nāpasāre ca nābhitaḥ | adho hanyād vañcayantamadho hatvā na duṣyati |
| kṛtā pratijñḸa ca vṛkodareṇa bhetsye tavorū iti yuktipūrvam | saṃ śrāvayānena tadeṣa dharmato jaghāna duryodhanamagryakarmā |
| vḸasudevavacaḥ śrutvā dharmacchalamiti bruvan | rauhiṇeyo jagāmā'śu svapurīmeva sānugaḥ |
| tasmin gate vāsudevaṃ samapṛcchad yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | dharmo'yamathavā'dharma iti taṃ prāha keśavaḥ |
| na sākṣād dharmato vadhyā ye tupāpatamā narāḥ | devairhi vañcayitvaiva hatāḥ pḸurvaṃ surārayaḥ | ato'yamapyadharmeṇa hato nātrāsti dūṣaṇam |
| bhīṣmadroṇau ca karṇaṇsca yadaivopadhinā hatāḥ | ko nu duryodhane pāpe hate doṣaḥ kathañcana |
| pratijñḸapālanāyāpi vibhedorū vṛkodaraḥ | dharmataśca pratijñeyaṃ kṛtā tenānurūpataḥ |
| lokato'pi na dharmasya hāniratra kathañcana | ye bhīmasyāprabhāvajñḸa Ḹapaddharmaṃ ca manvate |
| avadhyatve śivavar ād gadāṇsikṣābalādapi | jarāsandhopamo yasmād dhārtarāṣṭraḥ suviśrutaḥ |
| tasmāt saddharma evāyaṃ bhīmacīrṇa iti bruvan | api saṃ śayinaṃ cakre dharmarājaṃ jagatpatiḥ |
| bhūbhārakṣatijo dharmo macchuśrūṣātmakastu yaḥ | bhīmasyaiva bhavet samyagiti buddhyā paraḥ prabhuḥ |
| cdxiv.svenaiva balabhadrāya janāya ca punaḥ punaḥ | śrutvā'pyuktaṃ na tatyāja saṃ śayaṃ dharmajo yataḥ | tato'pyasaṃ śayaṃ kṛṣṇo na cakāra yudhiṣṭhiram |
| mukhyaṃ dharmaṃ hi bhagavān balāyā'ha janāya ca | dharmeṇaiva hato rājā dhārtarāṣṭraḥ suyodhanaḥ | iti yad vakṣyati punarniścayārthe'rjunāya ca |
| punaḥ punardharmata eva bhīmo jaghāna rājānamiti bruvantam | jagāda kṛṣṇaṃ sphuritādharoṣṭhaḥ krodhāt supāpo dhṛtarāṣṭrasūnuḥ | tvayaiva pāpe nihitā hi pārthāḥ pḸapādhikastvaṃ hi sadaika eva |
| ityūcivāṃ saṃ prajagāda kṛṣṇo na tvatsamaḥ pḸapatamaḥ kadācit | bhīṣmḸadihatyā'pi tavaiva pāpaṃ yadanvayustvāmatipāpaniścayam | pḸapaṃ ca pāpānugataṃ ca hatvā kathañcanāpyasti nacaiva pāpam |
| na pāṇḍaveṣvasti tato hi kiñcit pāpaṃ prayatnācca nisargato'pi | guṇādhikāste madapāṇsrayācca ko nāma teṣvaṇvapi pāpamāha |
| nisargataḥ pḸapatamastvamanyān dharmasthitān pāpapathe nidhāya | svayaṃ ca pāpe nirataḥ sadaiva pāpāt supāpāṃ gatimeva yāsi |
| iti bruvantaṃ punarāha kṛṣṇaṃ duryodhanaḥ pḸapakṛtāṃ pradhānaḥ | svantottamo nāma ka eva mattaḥ ko nāma doṣo'sti mayā kṛto'tra |
| iṣṭaṃ ca yajñaiścaritaṃ ca pūrtaiḥ padaṃ ripūṇāṃ nihitaṃ hi mūrdhni | mṛtyuśca saṅgrāmaśirasyavāpto raṇonmukhenaiva mayā kimanyat |
| iṣṭā bhogā mayā bhuktāḥ prāptā ca paramā gatiḥ | duḥkhino duḥkhamāpsyanti pārthāste kūṭayodhinaḥ |
| candrasūryanibhaiḥ śūrairdhārmikaiḥ sadbhirujjhitā | keval ā ratnahīneyaṃ pḸaṇḍavairbhujyatāṃ mahī |
| ityuktavatyeva nṛpe sureśaiḥ prasūnavṛṣṭirvihitā papāta | tāmeva buddhiṃ dhṛtarāṣṭrasūnoḥ kṛtvā dṛḍhḸaṃ pḸatayituṃ tamo'ndhe |
| sambhāvayata ātmānaṃ vḸasudevaṃ vinindataḥ | tatparāṃ śca kathaṃ na syāt tamo'nte ca viśeṣataḥ |
| yadaikaikamalaṃ tatra duḥkhādhikyaṃ samuccayāt | iti tat kārayitveśa āha moghaṃ tavākhilam |
| cdxv.nṛśaṃ sasya kṛtaghnasya guṇavaddveṣiṇaḥ sadā | yadi dharmaphalaṃ dhvāntaṃ sūryavat syāt prakāṇsakam |
| vadan punaḥ punaridaṃ dharmato hata ityapi | khyāpayāmāsa bhagavān jane nijajaneṣṭadaḥ |
| prakhyāpite vāsudevena dharme satāṃ sarveṣāṃ hṛdyamāsīt samastam | hataṃ ca dharmeṇa nṛpaṃ vyajānan pāpo'yamityeva ca niścitārthāḥ |
| yudhiṣṭhiro'pāyadarśī sadaiva sasaṃ śayo'bhūt sumano'bhivṛṣṭyḸa | snehād drauṇiḥ sañjayo rauhiṇeyo dauryodhanāt pāpamityeva cocuḥ |
| tataḥ kṛṣṇaḥ pḸaṇḍupāñcālakaistairbhṛśaṃ nadadbhirhṛṣitaiḥ sametaḥ | yayau viriñceśasurendramukhyaiḥ sampūjitastaiśca raṇāṅgaṇāt smayan |
| tataḥ śrutvā sañjayād duḥkhataptaṃ sambodhayiṣyan pitaraṃ yuyutsuḥ | kṛṣṇasya rājñaśca matena yāto jagāma cānveva janārdanaśca |
| dharmayuktaiśca tattvārthairlokavṛttānudarśakaiḥ | vḸakyai rājānamāṇsvāsya prāyāt pārthān punarhariḥ |
| kḸalānusārato daivāṃ ścopasaṃ hartumacyutaḥ | yayau sapārthaśaineyaḥ kurūṇāṃ śibiraṃ niśi |
| tadaiva hārdikyakṛpḸanvito'yāt suyodhanaṃ drauṇiramuṃ śayānam | prabhagnasakthiṃ ca sṛgḸalabhūtaiḥ sambhakṣyamāṇaṃ dadṛśe śvasantam |
| sa duḥkhaśokābhihato vinindya pārthān mayā bhūpa kimatra kāryam | ityāha niṣpḸaṇḍavatāṃ kuruṣvetyamuṃ vyadhāt pāṃ svabhiṣekiṇaṃ nṛpaḥ |
| ucchidya santatiṃ pḸaṇḍoḥ kṛtvā svakṣetrasantatim | tayā bhūrakṣaṇahṛdḸa so'bhiṣiktastathetyagāt |
| sa kṛṣṇabhīmapārthānāṃ bhayādeva punarvanam | kṛpasātvatasaṃ yukto viveśa gahanaṃ rathī |
| tasya cintayato droṇavadhaṃ duryodhanasya ca | nḸa'gānnidrā niśīthe ca dhvākṣān nyagrodhavāsinaḥ |
| hatān subahusāhasrānekenātibalena tu | kauśikena nirīkṣyaiva prāha tau kṛpasātvatau |
| cdxvi.nidarśanena hyenena preritaḥ paramātmanā | yḸami pāṇḍusutān hantumityuktvā'ruruhe ratham |
| nivārito'pi tābhyāṃ sa prādravacchibiraṃ prati | anujagmatustāvapi taṃ śibiradvāri caikṣata |
| ugrarūpadharaṃ rudraṃ svakīyāṃ tanvameva saḥ | parītaṃ vḸasudevaṃ ca bahukoṭisvarūpiṇā |
| dṛṣṭvaiva vāsudevaṃ tamatrasad gautamīsutaḥ | vḸasudevājñayaivātra svātmanā'pi sadāṇsivaḥ |
| ayuddhyadagrasaccā'śu drauṇeḥ sarvāyudhānyapi | acintyā hariśaktiryad dṛśyante tmahano'pi hi |
| atastayā preritena svātmanaivākhileṣvapi | āyudheṣu nigīrṇeṣu drauṇiryajñaṃ tu mānasam | cakre'tmānaṃ paśuṃ kṛtvā svātmasthāyaiva viṣṇave |
| yajñatuṣṭena hariṇā preritaḥ śaṅkaraḥ svayam | ātmane droṇaputrāya dadau sarvāyudhāni ca |
| uvāca cāhamādiṣṭo viṣṇunā prabhaviṣṇunā | arakṣaṃ pḸarthaśibiramiyantaṃ kḸalameva tu |
| tadicchayaiva nirdiṣṭo dāsye mārgaṃ tavādya ca | āyudhāni ca sarvāṇi hantuṃ sarvānimān janān |
| ityudīrya pradāyā'śu sarvā hetīrvṛṣadhvajaḥ | tatraivāntardadhe so'pi provāca kṛpasātvatau |
| ye niryāsyanti śibirājjahitaṃ tāṃ stu sarvaśaḥ | ityuktvā praviveśāntardhanvī khaḍgī kṛtāntavat |
| pḸarāvatāṇsvaṃ sa tadā ṇsayānamupetya padbhyāṃ samatāḍayacca | vakṣasyasāvavadad vītanidro jāne bhavantaṃ hi gurostanūjam |
| samutthitaṃ mḸaṃ jahi śastrapāṇiṃ śastreṇa vīro'si sa vīradharmaḥ | lokāṇsca me santvatha śastrapūtā iti bruvāṇaṃ sa ruṣā jagāda |
| na santi hi brahmahaṇāṃ sulokā viśeṣataścaiva gurudruhāṃ punaḥ | cdxvii.na dharmayuddhena vadhārhakāṇsca ye tvadvidhāḥ pḸapatamāḥ supāpa |
| avaśyabhāvinaṃ mṛtyuṃ dhṛṣṭadyumno vicintya tam | tūṣṇīṃ babhūva svapne'pi nityaṃ paśyati tāṃ mṛtim |
| drauṇiṃ ca kāl . arātriṃ ca droṇapātādanantaram | viśasantaṃ kṛṣantīṃ ca svapne'paśyaddhi pārṣataḥ |
| samākṣipad droṇasuto'sya kaṇṭhe nibaddhya maurvīṃ dhanuṣopyurasthaḥ | mamantha kṛcchreṇa vihāya dehaṃ yayau nijaṃ sthānamasau ca vahniḥ |
| tataḥ śikhaṇḍinaṃ hatvā yudhāmanyūttamojasau | janamejayaṃ ca pāñcālīsutānabhiyayau jvalan |
| tairutthitairasyamānaḥ śaraiḥ khaḍgena jaghnivān | sarvān savyāpasavyena tathā'nyān pāṇḍavātmajān | ṛta ekaṃ bhaimaseniṃ kḸaṇsirājātmajātmajam |
| taṃ tadā'ntarhitaḥ śarvaḥ kailāsamanayat kṣaṇāt | sa śarvatrātanāmā'sīdatastatraiva so'vasat |
| purā'rthitaḥ svadauhitrasyāmaratvāya śaṅkaraḥ | kḸaṇsirājena tenāsau jugopainaṃ kṛpḸayutaḥ |
| vḸasudevamataṃ jñḸatvā sāmrājyāya parīkṣitaḥ | vḸarayāmāsa bhūlokaṃ naiva yāhītyamuṃ śivaḥ |
| sāmānyato'pāṇḍavāya drauṇinā'pyabhisandhitam | tadrūpeṇaiva rudreṇa vinainamiti cintitam |
| astraṃ brahmaśiraścainaṃ na jaghānaikyatastayoḥ | cekitānādikāṃ ścaiva jaghānānyān sa sarvaśaḥ |
| sa cedipāñcālakarūṇsakāṇsīnanyāṃ śca sarvān vinihatya vīraḥ | śiśūn striyaścaiva nihantumugraḥ prājvālayat tacchibiraṃ samantāt |
| jijīviṣūṃ statra palāyamānān dvāri sthitau gautamaḥ sātvataśca | nijaghnatuḥ sarvataḥ pḸarṣatasya sūtastvekaḥ śeṣito daivayogāt |
| khaḍgena prahṛtaṃ dṛṣṭvḸa hārdikyena papāta ha | bhūmau prāgeva saṃ sparśānna j ñḸatastamasā'munā | anyāsakte samutthāya prādravad yatra pārṣatī |
| cdxviii.tasyā akathayat sarvaṃ sā bhīmāyā'ha duḥkhitā | prādravad rathamāruhya sa dhanvī gautamīsutam |
| tadantare drauṇirapi prayātaḥ kṛṣṇāsutānāṃ muditaḥ śirāṃ si | ādāya hārdikyakṛpḸanuyāto duryodhanaṃ sannikṛṣṭaprayāṇam |
| dṛṣṭvḸa taduktaṃ ca niśamya pāpastuṣṭo'tyajat sādhviti dehamāṇsu | bhīmārjunābhyāmatha keśavācca bhītāḥ pṛthag drauṇimukhāḥ prayātāḥ |
| tatraikalaṃ droṇasutaṃ rathena yāntaṃ rathī mārutiranvadhāvat | tamādravantaṃ prasamīkṣya bhītaḥ parādravad drauṇiratidrutāṇsvaiḥ |
| ādravantaṃ punardṛṣṭvḸa bhīmaṃ droṇātmajo ruṣā | āvṛtya yuddhyan vijito'straṃ brahmaśira ādade |
| etasminnantare kṛṣṇo dharmajenārjunena ca | tatrā'gamat tadastraṃ ca bhīmaṃ cḸavyarthatāṃ nayan | avadhyo bhīmasenastadastraṃ cḸamoghameva yat |
| viṣṇunaivobhayaṃ yasmāt klṛptaṃ bhīmo'strameva tat | gḸayatrī tatra mantro yad brahmā taddhyānadevatā | dhyeyo nārāyaṇo devo jagatprasavitā svayam |
| ūce ca pārthayoḥ kṛṣṇo yat kṛtaṃ drauṇinā purā | svāyudhānāṃ yḸacanaṃ cḸapyaśaktena taduddhṛtau |
| pṛṣṭenoktaṃ tvayā hīnāṃ kṛtvā duryodhanāya gām | dḸatuṃ tvadāyudhaṃ me'dyetyevamukte tmanoditam | maivaṃ kḸarṣīḥ punariti ddhyāyatā'bdhestaṭe svamu |
| tadastraṃ prajvalad dṛṣṭvḸa'pāṇḍavatvavidhitsayā | dharāyāṃ drauṇinā muktaṃ kṛṣṇena prerito'rjunaḥ |
| svastyastu droṇaputrāya bhūtebhyo mahyameva ca | iti bruvaṃ stadevāstramastraśāntyai vyasarjayat |
| anastrajñeṣu muktaṃ taddhanyādastramucaṃ yataḥ | gurubhaktyā tato drauṇeḥ svastyastvityāha vāsaviḥ |
| tadā'strayostu saṃ yoge bhūtānāṃ saṃ hṛtirbhavet | bhūtānāṃ svastirapyatra kāṅkṣitā karuṇātmanā |
| cdxix.śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye tathā'pyastradvayaṃ yuktaṃ bhūtānāṃ nḸaṇsakṛd dhruvam | tasmānnivārayan yogaṃ tayormadhye'bhavat kṣaṇāt | nissīmaśaktiḥ paramaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ |
| saṃ sthāpyāstradvayaṃ dḸure tāvāha puruṣottamaḥ | santi hyastravidaḥ pḸurvaṃ prāyaścaitanna taiḥ kṛtam | lokopadravakṛt karma santaḥ kuryuḥ kathaṃ kvacit |
| ityukte phalgunaḥ prāha mayā muktaṃ mahāpadi | śāntyarthameva ca vibho kṣantavyaṃ bhavatā tataḥ |
| drauṇirapyevamevā'ha tau vedapatirabravīt | nivartyatāmastramiti śakrasūnustathā'karot | nivartanāprabhuṃ drauṇiṃ vḸasudevo'bhyabhāṣata |
| kṣatratejā brahmacārī kaumārādapi pāṇḍavaḥ | nivartane tataḥ śakto nāyaṃ droṇātmajo'pi san | abrahmacaryādityukte vyāso drauṇimabhāṣata |
| nivartanāsamarthastvaṃ dehi naisargikaṃ maṇim | jitaḥ prāgeva bhīmena bhīmāyaiva mahāprabham | api kevalayā vācā pārthebhyo'straṃ nivartaya |
| ityukto mūrdhajaṃ ratnaṃ jarāmaraṇanāṇsanam | kṣuttṛṭśramāpahaṃ divyagandhaṃ dhvāntaharaṃ śubham |
| utkṛtya bhīmāya dadau muktāḥ pañcaiva pāṇḍavāḥ | astrāditi tato vedabhartā vāsavimabravīt |
| tāta muktaṃ drauṇinā'pi tvamevāstraṃ nivartaya | ityuktastaṃ praṇamyā'śu sañjahārārjuno'pi tat |
| yḸadaveśo'tha gautamyāḥ sutamāhaikasantateḥ | vḸacā nivartayāstraṃ te ityukto drauṇirabravīt |
| pakṣapātādicchasi tvaṃ bhāgineyasya santatim | tatraiva pātayāmyastramuttarāgarbhakṛntane |
| vḸasudevaḥ punaḥ prāha yadi hantavya eva te | garbhastathā'pi naivāstraṃ pḸatayāsmin kathañcana |
| cdxx.abhimanyormṛtasyaiva dehe pātaya mānada | evaṃ tvadastranihataṃ garbhamujjīvayāmyaham |
| pḸataye garbha evāhamityūce gautamīsutaḥ | athā'ha vāsudevastamīṣatkruddha iva prabhuḥ |
| durmate paśya me vīryaṃ yat te śakyaṃ kuruṣva tat | ujjīvayāmyahaṃ garbhaṃ yatataḥ śaktito'pi te |
| santatirvarṣasāhasraṃ pḸaṇḍavānāṃ bhaved bhuvi | matpālitāṃ na kaścit tāṃ tāvaddhantuṃ kṣamaḥ kvacit |
| jānāmi te matiṃ duṣṭāṃ jighāṃ soḥ pḸarthasantatim | cikīrṣordhārtarāṣṭrasya tantuṃ bhūyaḥ suduṣkaram |
| madājñayā sā viphalā bhavitrī vāñchā mumukṣā vimukhasya viṣṇoḥ | yathaiva tenaiva narādhirūḍho gamyastava syānnaca bhūmibhāgaḥ |
| durgandhayukto vraṇasañcitāṅgaḥ sadā caraḥ syā vipineṣu manda | yḸavad bhuvi syādiha pārthatanturvyāso'pi taṃ prāha tatheti devaḥ |
| rūpadvayenāpi harestathokto jagāda kāl . ītanayaṃ sa kṛṣṇam | tvayā saha syānmama saṅgamo vibho yatheṣṭataḥ syānnaca me'tra vighnaḥ |
| ityukta Oṃ iti prāha bhagavān bādarāyaṇaḥ | taṃ praṇamya yayau so'pi svapnadṛṣṭamanusmaran |
| svapne hi draupadeyānāṃ vadho dṛṣṭo tmanā niśi | arjunena pratijñḸanaṃ draupadyai svavadhaṃ prati |
| nibadhyā'nayanaṃ caiva tenaiva śibiraṃ prati | muñceti draupadīvākyaṃ neti bhīmavacastathā | kṛṣṇavākyānmaṇiṃ hṛtvā deśānniryātanaṃ tathā |
| ityādi svapnadṛṣṭaṃ yat prāyaḥ satyamabhūditi | cintayan prayayau dāvaṃ drauṇiḥ śastrabhṛtāṃ varaḥ |
| sa kṛṣṇoktamapi prāpya bādarāyaṇaṇsiṣyatām | prāpyottaradvāpare ca vedān saṃ vibhajiṣyati |
| tataḥ saptarṣirbhūtvā pārāṇsaryaprasādataḥ | ekībhāvaṃ svarūpeṇa yāsyatyacyutaniṣṭhayā |
| cdxxi.pāṇḍavarājyalābho nāma aṣṭāviṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ kṛpo'tha pāṇḍavān prāpya gauravāt pūjitaśca taiḥ | abhūdācārya evāsau rājñḸaṃ tattantubhāvinām |
| bḸadarāyaṇaṇsiṣyatvaṃ punaḥ prāpya bhajannamum | sākaṃ svabhāgineyena bhāvyeko munisaptake | kṛtavarmā dvāravatḸ Ḷṃ yayau kṛṣṇānumoditaḥ |
| kṛṣṇāyai taṃ maṇiṃ datvā bhīmastāṃ paryasāntvayat | vikopā bhīmavākyena rājñe sā ca maṇiṃ dadau |
| rājārhe hi maṇau datte mahyaṃ bhīmena laukikāḥ | strīpakṣapātaṃ rājā caśaṅkeyurmāruteriti |
| maṇiṃ rājñe dadau kṛṣṇā bhartṛpriyahite ratā | so'pyābadhya maṇiṃ mḸurdhni reje rājā gavāmiva |
| vedeśvareṇāpi yadūttamena kṛṣṇena yuktāstata āṇsu pārthāḥ | yayuḥ sabhāryā nijarājadhānīṃ hatvaiva santo'ntararīn svarājyam |
| yudhiṣṭhirasyānu vicitravīryasutasya pādāvabhivandamānam | ākṛṣya bhīmaṃ parameśvaro'yo mayākṛtiṃ dhāt purato nṛpasya |
| bhīmākṛtiṃ tāṃ sa suyodhanena kārāpitāmabhyasane gadāyāḥ | āṇsliṣya cūrṇīkṛtavānasṛg vaman hā tāta bhīmeti vadan papāta |
| tamāha kṛṣṇo na hato'dya bhīmo naca tvayā'nyairapi śakyate'sau | hantuṃ svabuddhiḥ prathitā tvayā'dya pāpā hi te buddhiradyāpi rājan |
| svabuddhidoṣādatipāpaśīlaputrākhyapāpāni vivarddhayitvā | nīto vaśaṃ taiḥ phalamadya bhuñjan na krodhituṃ cḸarhasi bhīmasene |
| ityukte śāntabuddhyaiva rājñḸa'hūto vṛkodaraḥ | abhyavandata tatpādāvanujādyāṇsca tasya ye |
| vajrācca dṛḍhadehatvādavikāre vṛkodare | na doṣo vivṛto'sya syāditi kṛṣṇena vañcitaḥ | sarvānāṇsliṣya ca premṇā yuyoja nṛpa āṇsiṣaḥ |
| kulanāṇsakaraḥ pḸapaḥ śāpayogyastava hyaham | ityuktvaiva praṇamato gāndhārī supadāṅgulīḥ |
| cdxxii.dadarśa dharmarājasya paṭṭāntena prakopitā | tasyāḥ krodhāgninirdagdhanakhaḥ sa kunakho'bhavat |
| vandamānaṃ punarbhīmamāha sā krodhavihvalā | adharmataḥ kathaṃ bhīma sutaṃ me tvaṃ nijaghnivān |
| ityukto'syāḥ śamayituṃ krodhamagre vṛkodaraḥ | prāha na prāṇasandehe pāpaṃ syāt pāpino vadhe |
| ityuktvā tāṃ punaḥ prāha pratijñḸahānimantarā | na me'sti prāṇasandeha iti jānan vṛkodaraḥ |
| yathāpratijñaṃ bhrātṛvyān raṇe mama nijaghnuṣaḥ | kvādharmaḥ kṣatrajātestu taddhānau jīvitaṃ nahi |
| "pāpā naśuddhadharmeṇa hantavyā" iti ca śrutiḥ | "anyavat pāpahananaṃ pḸapayetyāha" iti śrutiḥ | ato'surān naikṛtikān nikṛtyā ghnanti devatāḥ |
| "nikṛtyā nikṛtiṃ hanyānnikṛtyā naiva dhārmikam" | iti śrutirhi paramā paṭhyate paiṅgibhiḥ sadā |
| ityuktā taṃ punaḥ prāha kathaṃ te naraśoṇitam | pītaṃ nareṇaiva satā napītamiti so'bravīt |
| dantāntaraṃ na me prāpa śoṇitaṃ tat sutasya te | pratijñḸapālanāyāpi pratikartuṃ ca tat kṛtam |
| bhīṣaṇāya ca śatrūṇāṃ pītavacca pradarśitam | vedadṛṣṭaṇsca dharmo'yamatipāpajanaṃ prati |
| ityuktovāca naivāndhadvayasyāsya vṛkodara | ghnatā putraśataṃ yaṣṭimātraṃ corvaritaṃ tvayā |
| tāmāha bhīmaḥ pḸapiṣṭhḸa vadhayogyāparādhinaḥ | sarve hatā iti punaḥ sā'ha yenākṛtastava | aparādhaḥ sa eko'pi kiṃ nḸastītyavadat sa tām |
| sarvaiḥ sametaiḥ kṛṣṇasya bandhanāya viniścitam | anyāni ca supāpāni kṛtānyatra purā'pica |
| vḸasudevaṃ sabhāsaṃ sthaṃ bruvāṇaṃ dharmasaṃ hitam | cdxxiii.(samastadharmasaṅgrahaḥ ) punaḥ punaravaj ñḸaya yāntaṃ duryodhanaṃ bahiḥ | sarve'nvagacchannityādīnyabhipretya vṛkodaraḥ |
| naiko'pyanaparādhī me svayaṃ tānanuśikṣitum | asamarthā mayi krodhaṃ kiṃ karoṣi nirarthakam |
| ityuktā sā'bhavat t ūṣṇīṃ kramāt sarvaiśca pāṇḍavaiḥ | vanditā vyāsavākyācca kiñcicchāntā'tha sā'bhavat |
| tasyā yāṇsca snuṣāḥ sarvāstābhiḥ saha puraskṛtām | kṛtvā taṃ dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ ca vidurādīṃ śca sarvaśaḥ |
| pḸaṇḍavāḥ pradhanasthānaṃ sabhāryāḥ pṛthayā saha | kṛṣṇābhyāṃ ca yayustatra gāndhāryāstapaso balam |
| jānan pāṇḍavarakṣārthaṃ cikīrṣustattapovyayam | vedeśvaro dadau divyaṃ cakṣuḥ satyavatīsutaḥ |
| tena dṛṣṭvḸa pretadehān sarvāṃ statra samākulā | śaśāpa yādaveśānaṃ tvayā'smatkulanāṇsanam | yat kṛtaṃ tat tava kulaṃ gacchatvanyonyataḥ kṣayam |
| ityukto bhagavān kṛṣṇaḥ svacikīrṣitameva tat | astvevamityāha vibhurīśvaro'pyanyathā kṛtau |
| tena tasyāstapo naṣṭaṃ hīnā sā'to hi bhartṛtaḥ | nḸaṇsayeddhi sadā viṣṇuḥ svayogyādadhikān guṇān |
| tata āṇsliṣya bhartḸṛṇāṃ dehān prarudatīḥ striyaḥ | sarvā duryodhanādīnāṃ darśayāmāsa keśavaḥ | kṛṣṇāyai sā ca taṃ devamastuvat pūrṇasadguṇam |
| tato dehān prasiddhānāṃ pḸarthāḥ samadahan satām | anyeṣāṃ dhṛtarāṣṭrādīn puraskṛtyaiva kāṃ ścana | sūtaiḥ pañcabhireva svaiḥ sarasvatyāṃ pracikṣipuḥ |
| snehānnṛpo yamau ca svān nā'jau tasmin hyayojayan | śavāḥ prāyo bahutvena tatratatraiva saṃ sthitāḥ |
| tato dadatsu pānīyaṃ gaṅgāyāṃ svajanasya tu | pṛthā karṇāya datteti pārthānāhāgrajaṃ ca tam |
| cdxxiv.atha ekonatriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | yadaiva kṛṣṇau sakalādhirājye yudhiṣṭhiraṃ yauvarājye ca bhīmam | viprairyutāvabhiṣicyā'śiṣaṇsca yuktā datvā harṣayāmāsatustau |

| cdxlv.iti tena na pārthānāṃ karmaṇā'nyat samaṃ kvacit | guṇairj ñḸanādibhirvā'pi tasmāt krodhaḥ sa tāmasaḥ | vinindya tān susattvasthāṃ stamo'ndhamupajagmivān |
| atha pṛṣṭo vāsudevaḥ suraviprādisaṃ sadi | yudhiṣṭhireṇa saṃ hṛṣṭo jagādāṇseṣataḥ prabhuḥ |
| te ca śrutvā'khilān dharmān bhaktyā paramayā yutāḥ | pūjayanto jagannāthamāpuśca paramāṃ mudam |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye (yāgasamāptirnāma) triṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ cdxlvi.(dhṛtarāṣṭrādisvargaprāptiḥ ) atha ekatriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | yajñeśvareṇābhiyuteṣu yuktyā mahīṃ praśāsatsu pṛthāsuteṣu | yiyakṣurāgānniśi vipravaryo yudhiṣṭhiraṃ vittamabhīpsamānaḥ |
| yena hiḍimbabakādyā rakṣodhīśā nipātitā babakādyāḥ | bhīme prītimameyāṃ vyañjayatā tena śeṣapāti mame yām |
j ñānapradaḥ sa bhagavān kamalāviriñcaśarvādipūrvajagato nikhilādvariṣṭhaḥ | bhaktyaiva tuṣyati haripravaṇatvameva sarvasya dharma iti pūrvavibhāgasaṃ sthaḥ |

'kvacidantaritānapi' iti vacanāt, idamādyapadyamasahamānāḥ kecidādau na likhanti | keral . adeśasya purātanapustakeṣu adyāpi dṛśyate | kathamanyathā lokācāryo vyāsaḥ lakṣaparimitaṃ granthaṃ kurvan granthādau lokaśikṣaṇāya maṅgal . apadyaṃ na racayet? yato'lpīyasi granthe bhāgavate harivaṃ śādau ca "satyaṃ paraṃ dhīmahi" iti, "so'nādirvāsudevaḥ śamayatu duritaṃ janmajanmārjitam" iti ca lokaśikṣaṇārthaṃ maṅgal . amakarot | ato asminmahāgranthe sakalaśiṣṭānāṃ gururvyāsaḥ maṅgal . amācaredeveti jñeyam | -Bhā. Pra. xx.tamimameva surāsurasañcaye harikṛtaṃ praviśeṣamudīkṣitum | prativibhajya ca bhīmasuyodhanau svaparapakṣabhidā kathitā kathā |
| prātardadānīti nṛpasya vākyaṃ niśamya viprastvarito makhārthe | bhīmaṃ yayāce sa nṛpoktamāṇsu niśamya cādānnijahastabhūṣaṇam |
| anarghamagnipratimaṃ vicitraratnāñcitaṃ vipravarastadāpya | yayau kṛtārtho'tha ca nandighoṣamakārayad vāyusutastadaiva |
| akālajaṃ taṃ tu niśamya rājā papraccha dūtaistamuvāca bhīmaḥ | yanmartyadeho'pi viniścitāyurabhūnnṛpastena mamā'sa harṣaḥ |
| itīrito'sau nṛpatistvareta dharmārthamityasya mataṃ prapūjayan | jagāda sādhvityatha bhūya eva dharme tvarāvānapi sambabhūva |
| athāmbikeyaṃ viṣayeṣu saktaṃ dussaṅgaduṣṭaṃ kṛtabhūridoṣam | samastarājāpyayahetubhūtaṃ nicāyya taṃ mḸarutiranvakampata |
| akurvatastīkṣṇatapaḥ kutaścinnaivāsya lokāptiramuṣya bhūyāt | rāgādhiko'yaṃ na tapaśca kuryādityasya vairāgyakarāṇi cakre |
| ājñḸaṃ parairasya nihanti sodarairvadhūjanairapyatipūjite'smin | sa niṣṭanatyevamapītaraiḥ sa supūjito nā'sa tadā virāgaḥ |
| sarve hi pārthāstamṛte sabhāryā vaicitravīryaṃ paramādareṇa | paryeva cakruḥ satataṃ sabhāryaṃ kṛṣṇā ca nasyāt tanayārtimāniti |
| sa prīyamāṇo nitarāṃ ca teṣu naivādhikaṃ prīyate bhīmasene | smaran sutāṃ stena hatān samastānapi prabhāvaṃ paramasya jānan |
| tasyāpanetuṃ viṣayeṣu saktiṃ dveṣaṃ tathaivā'tmani bhīmasenaḥ | jagāda mādrīsutayoḥ samakṣamāsphoṭya saṃ śṛṇvata eva tasya |
| cdxlvii.tāvimau me bhujau vṛttau pīnau candanarūṣitau | yayorantaramāsādya jaraḍhasya sutā hatāḥ |
| yamau tadanvamodetāṃ tatsnehād gauravādapi | naiva tat kṛṣṇayā jñḸataṃ pṛthayā ca saputrayā |
| tacchrutvotpannanirvedaṃ kṣattā jyeṣṭhasya varddhayan | uvāca jīvitāṇsā te nanu rājan mahīyasī | bhīmāpavarjitaṃ piṇḍamādatse gṛhapālavat |
| nacāparādho bhīmasya bruvatastvāmidaṃ vacaḥ | agnirnisṛṣṭo dattaśca garo dārāṇsca dūṣitāḥ | hṛtaṃ kṣetraṃ dhanaṃ yasya kiṃ bhīmena kṛtaṃ tvayi |
| alamāsajjataste'dya nirvedakaramīritam | upakārāya bhīmena tava dveṣaṃ tyajātra tat |
| vimucya dveṣakāmau tvaṃ vane tīrthaniṣevakaḥ | tapasā'rādhaya hariṃ tataḥ pūto bhaviṣyasi |
| ityukto dveṣamutsṛjya bhīme nirvedamāgataḥ | anujñḸaṃ tapase prāptumupavāsaparo'bhavat |
| anaśnantaṃ caturthe'hni dhṛtarāṣṭraṃ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ | jñḸatvā samprārthayāmāsa bhojanārthaṃ punaḥ punaḥ |
| anujñḸaṃ vanavāsāya tvattaḥ prāpyaiva sarvathā | bhokṣye'nyathā neti vadan dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ śramānvitaḥ | upavāsakṛśo bhāryāṃ śiśriye mūrcchitaḥ kṣaṇāt |
| śantamena kareṇātha dharmajastaṃ mṛdu spṛśan | śanaiḥ sañjñḸamagamayadabravīcca suduḥkhitaḥ |
| puraskṛtya yuyutsuṃ tvaṃ kuru rājyamakaṇṭakam | cdxlviii.vayameva tvadarthāya kurmaḥ sarve tapo vane |
| netyāha dhṛtarāṣṭrastaṃ kuladharmo hi no vane | ante dehaparityāgastanmā'nuj ñḸatumarhasi |
| tayorvivadatorevaṃ kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaḥ prabhuḥ | sarvajñaḥ sarvakarteśa āvirbhūto'bravīnnṛpam |
| tapasā'śeṣadoṣāṇāṃ kṣayakāmamimaṃ nṛpam | anujānīhi naivāsya dharmavighnakaro bhava |
| kḸale nirvedamāpannastapasā dagdhakilbiṣaḥ | śubhrāṃ gatimayaṃ yḸayādanyathā na kathañcana |
| ityukto dharmarājastamanujajñe sa cāṇsitaḥ | śikṣayāmāsa saddharmān nītiṃ ca viduṣe'pyalam | kevalasnehato rājñe śuśrāva vinayāya saḥ |
| anujñḸaya gṛhaṃ prāpte dharmaje viduraṃ punaḥ | śrāddhāya vittamākāṅkṣan preṣayāmāsa tadvacaḥ |
| śrutvā yudhiṣṭhiro bhīmamāha dātavyamadya naḥ | putrapautrāptabandhūnāṃ śrāddhecchorvittamañjasā |
| tamāha bhīmaḥ pḸapānāṃ vimukhānāṃ madhudviṣaḥ | pḸaralaukikasāhāyyaṃ na kāryamitarārthataḥ | dattenāpi hi vittena putraśrāddhaṃ kariṣyati |
| tajj ñḸatvā dadatāṃ doṣo bhavediti vicintayan | kaṣṭāt kaṣṭataraṃ yḸantu sarve duryodhanādayaḥ |
| bhīṣmḸadīnāṃ vayaṃ śrāddhakartārastena kiṃ tataḥ | kḸanīnatvāttu karṇasya sahāsmābhiḥ pṛthaiva hi | śrāddhakarmaṇyadhikṛtā kiṃ tasmai dīyate dhanam |
| cdxlix.ityuktavantaṃ nṛpatirarjunaścocatuḥ punaḥ | yiyāsoryācamānāya nijabāhubalārjitam | dehi vittaṃ paramataḥ kiṃ tvāmeṣo'bhiyācate |
| ityuktamapi netyeva bruvāṇaṃ śuddhadhārmikam | aprītyā joṣamāsveti procyovāca yudhiṣṭhiraḥ |
| kośato yad bahirvittaṃ dḸanabhogādikāraṇam | mama sannihitaṃ sarvaṃ tat pitre'dyārpitaṃ mayā |
| evamevārjuno'pyāha viduraṃ punarūcatuḥ | mukhyadharmarate bhīme na pitā kroddhumarhati | ityukto vittamādāya gatvā kṣattā'graje'bravīt |
| yudhiṣṭhirārjunau bhaktiṃ nitarāṃ tvayi cakratuḥ | nḸatihṛṣṭastvadājñḸayāṃ bhīmastanmā krudho'tra ca |
| śuddhe kṣatriyadharme hi nitaro'yaṃ vṛkodaraḥ | nṛpḸarjunau dharmaratāvapi lokakṛpḸaparau |
| ajātakopastacchrutvā dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ praśāntadhīḥ | kṛtvā ṇsrāddhāni sarveṣāṃ mahādānānyanāratam | daśarātraṃ dadau śuddhamanasā nirṛṇatvadhīḥ |
| sarvaṃ samarpya govinde pārthebhyo'nyebhya eva ca | svajanebhyaḥ samādāya sravannetrebhya uccadhīḥ | anujñḸaṃ nirgataḥ prāha paurajānapadān nṛpaḥ |
| dharmato rakṣitā yūyamasmatpūrvairmahātmabhiḥ | nacāhaṃ paramasnehād yuṣmḸabhiḥ sukṛpḸalubhiḥ | arakṣiteti kathitaḥ pramādādapi sajjanāḥ |
| iṣṭaṃ ca yajñaiḥ pūrtaiśca caritaṃ yuṣmadāṇsrayāt | putrastu mama pāpātmā sarvakṣatravināṇsakaḥ | sarvātiśaṅkī mūḍhaśca vṛddhānāṃ śāsanātigaḥ |
| cdl.saubhrātraṃ yena santyajya pāṇḍaveṣu mahātmasu | kṛtaṃ virūpaṃ sumahat kuryād yannāparaḥ kvacit |
| apriyāṇi ca kṛṣṇasya subahūnyācarat kudhīḥ | prāyastenāpi mandena na yuṣmḸasvaśivaṃ kṛtam |
| bhrātaro'sya ca sarve'pi tacchīlamanuvartinaḥ | hatāṇsca svena pāpena sasutāmātyabāndhavāḥ |
| so'haṃ vayogataścaiva putrādhibhirabhiplutaḥ | tatsambandhakṛtaṃ pḸapaṃ svakṛtaṃ cḸatyapeśalam | pḸaṇḍaveṣu sakṛṣṇeṣu tapasā mārṣṭumudyataḥ |
| tatra māmanujānīdhvaṃ kṛpayā mitravatsalāḥ | matpriyārthamapi snehaḥ pḸaṇḍaveṣu mahātmasu |
| kriyamāṇo'pi kartavyo bhūya eva sadā'calaḥ | te hi me putrakāḥ santa ihāmutra ca saukhyadāḥ |
| ityuktaiḥ svaguṇānuccaiḥ kīrtayadbhiḥ suduḥkhitaiḥ | paryaśrunayanaiḥ kṛcchrāt paurajānapadaiścirāt | anujñḸato yayau pārthairanuyātaḥ sudūrataḥ |
| sañjayo viduraścainaṃ sabhāryamanujagmatuḥ | anuvavrāja taṃ kuntī vanāya kṛtaniścayā |
| vḸaryamāṇā'pi tanayaiḥ sabhāryairbhṛśaduḥkhitaiḥ | saṃ sthāpya tān sukṛcchreṇa yayau sā'nveva taṃ nṛpam |
| saṃ ndarśitapatho rājā kuntīvidurasañjayaiḥ | gḸandhārīsahitaḥ prāpa kurukṣetre jagadguroḥ | krameṇaivā'śramaṃ vyāsadevasya surapūjitam |
| trivatsarādasya nijasya lokasyā'ptiṃ sabhāryasya jagāda tatra | cdli.brahmāṅkajastena bhṛśaṃ pratīto vyāsopadiṣṭaṃ vyacarat tapo'gryam |
| sakṣattṛgḸandhāripṛthe sasañjaye tapobhirārādhayati prabhuṃ harim | vaicitravīrye'tra sadārabandhubhṛtyāstu pārthā dṛśaye samāyayuḥ |
| kṣattaikatāmatra yudhiṣṭhireṇa prāpto'tha bhāryāsahitaṃ sasañjayam | upāsamāneṣu vicitravīryaputraṃ pṛthāṃ caiva pṛthāsuteṣu |
| prādurbabhūvāmitaśaktitejojñḸanādbhutaiśvaryasukhādir ūpaḥ | vyāso haristatra samīkṣya sarve sampūjayāmāsurudagrabhaktyā |
| taiḥ pūjitastatra niṣaṇṇa āha yadyad yadiṣṭaṃ pravadantu tattat | dḸasyāmi tasyādya tadityamuṣmin bhaktyucchrayaḥ pḸaṇḍusutaiḥ sadāraiḥ | vṛto'tra kuntī ravisūnujanmamṛtyūtthadoṣāpagamaṃ yayāce |
| teṣāṃ pradatteṣvabhivāñchiteṣu vaicitravīryaḥ saha bhāryayaiva | sammantrya niḥ śeṣaraṇehatānāṃ sandarśanaṃ prārthitavāṃ stamīśam |
| tatastu te satyavatīsutasya sarveśvarasyā'j ñayā sarva eva | samāgatāḥ svargalokāt kṣaṇena dattā cadivyā dṛgamuṣya rājñaḥ |
| ūṣuṇsca rātriṃ paramājñayaiva sarve svabhāryāsahitā yathā purā | tṛptaḥ sadāro nṛpatiśca tatra sarve'pi dṛṣṭvḸa mahadadbhutaṃ tat |
| athā'j ñayaivāsya parasya sarvāḥ striyo nijeśaiḥ sahitā yayuḥ svam | vinottarāṃ tāṃ tu kathāṃ niśamya pārīkṣito'yācata tātadṛṣṭim |
| taṃ cḸa'nayāmāsa tadaiva kṛṣṇo hyacintyaśaktiḥ sa vikuṇṭhalokāt | dṛṣṭvḸa sapārīkṣita āpa tuṣṭiṃ svatātamīśena samāhṛtaṃ punaḥ |
| sampūjya taṃ kṛṣṇamapīśavandyaṃ kṣamāpayāmāsa parīkṣidātmajaḥ | cakre ca visrambhamatīva bhārate punaśca tatratyajanaiḥ sametaḥ |
| pḸarthāḥ punaḥ prāpya puraṃ svakīyaṃ dharmeṇa pṛthvīṃ paripālayantaḥ | bhogānarāgā ajuṣanta yogyān yuktā jagaddhātari vāsudeve |
| cdlii.varṣatrayānte tmasamāhitāgniṃ tyaktāgnibhistairvanamālihadbhiḥ | te śuśruvurdhṛtarāṣṭraṃ sabhāryaṃ sahaiva kuntyā paridagdhadeham |
| vrīl . āmukhā dhyānaparā niśamya svaryātamātmīyapitṛvyamāṇsu | sametya bhartrā pratipūjyamānāṃ kuntīṃ ca taptā vidadhuḥ kriyāṇsca |
| te viṣṇubhaktyā paripūtakarmabhirjñḸanena cānte tamanusmarantaḥ | pḸarthaiḥ suputraiḥ sukṛtordhvakarmabhirvṛddhiṃ sukhasyā'puranapyayāṃ śubhām |
| gḸavadgaṇirvyāsasakāṇsametya śuśrūṣayā tasya punarnijāṃ gatim | prapedivān pāṇḍusutāṇsca kṛṣṇaṃ pratīkṣamāṇāḥ pṛthivīmaśāsan |
| aṣṭādaśābdāḥ pṛthivīṃ samastāṃ praśāsatāmevamagurmahātmanām | ariktadharmārthasukhottamānāmanujjhitānantapadasmṛtīnām |

| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye (dhṛtarāṣṭrādisvargaprāptirnāma) ekatriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ cdliii.(pāṇḍavasvargārohaṇam) atha dvātriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | tataḥ kurukṣetramavāpya kṛṣṇo dīkṣāṃ prapede dviṣaḍabdasatre | sa eva ca vyāsabhṛgūdvahātmā cakre'tra sādasyamajo'prameyaḥ |
| atha kṛṣṇāvaraṇe tān prāptān rājño'śṛṇot sadāvaraṇetān | draṣṭuṃ yḸataḥ sabalastāṃ cḸanaiṣīt pṛthāsutāṃ stataḥ sabalaḥ |
Bha. Gī.
| tatrartvijo dakṣabhṛgupradhānāḥ pḸarthā yadūnāṃ pravaraiḥ sametāḥ | brahmeśaśakrapramukhāḥ surāṇsca cakruḥ susācivyamanantadāsāḥ |
| sarve ca jīvā vasudhātal . asthā ye'nye'ntarikṣadyumukhottareṣu | vasanti nārāyaṇapādasaṃ śrayāste cātra sarve mumuduḥ sanāgāḥ |
| sunirṇayastattvavinirṇayārthināṃ tattvasya cābhūdiha vādaśīlinām | mitho vivādāt surabhūsurāṇāṃ vḸakyāddharervyāsabhṛgūdvahātmanaḥ |
| dharmārthakāmānakhilānavāpustadarthino muktimapīha kṛṣṇāt | yatheṣṭapānāṇsanavāsaso janā viceruratrāmaramānavādayaḥ |
| kṣetraṃ tadāsīddharilokasammitaṃ yadīyuratrākhilasajjanā yutim | nḸanāptakāmāṇsca tato babhūvurniryatnadṛśyaśca yato'tra keśavaḥ |
| dvādaśābdaṃ mahāsatramevametādṛśaṃ hariḥ | samāpyāvabhṛthasnātaḥ pūjayitvā'khilān janān |
| anujajñe krameṇaiva vatsareṇa samāgatān | svakulaṃ sañjihīrṣuḥ sa vipraśāpamajījanat |
| upadiśya paraṃ jñḸanamuddhavāyāmumāṇsramam | badaryākhyaṃ prāpayitvā saptamābdaṃ śatottaram | pratīkṣan pālayāmāsa pārthaiḥ saha bhuvaṃ prabhuḥ |
| samārabdhaṃ kaliyugaṃ yadā duryodhano'patat | ṣaṭtriṃ śābdaṃ punaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ kṛtamevānvavartayat |
| kṛtādapi viśeṣo'yaṃ yat puṇyasyādhikaṃ phalam | cdliv.alpameva ca pāpasya kālāt kṛṣṇājñayā tathā |
| evaṃ sudhārmike loke haribhaktiparāyaṇe | naṣṭeṣu kalili ṅgeṣu yugavṛttimabhīpsavaḥ |
| brahmarudrādayo devāḥ stutvā keśavamavyayam | vyajñḸapayan svalokāptiṃ Oṃ ityāha sa cācyutaḥ |
| prācurye sajjanasya syānna kalervṛddhirañjasā | iti svakulasaṃ hṛtyai prabhāsamanayat prabhuḥ |
| puṇyakṣetre'pi na mṛtiḥ svagṛhe tvatidharmadā | gatyaivālpamapi kṣetraṃ syānmahatphalamityajaḥ |
| prakāṇsayitumevainān prabhāsāya kuśasthalāt | nītvā dānādisaddharmāṃ stairakārayadacyutaḥ |
| te tataḥ śāpadoṣeṇa kṛṣṇenaiva vimohitāḥ | maireyamattā anyonyaṃ nipātya svāṃ tanuṃ gatāḥ | tad dṛṣṭvḸa baladevo'pi yogena svatanuṃ yayau |
| tataḥ pareśo'gaṇitānubhāvaḥ svasārathiṃ pḸaṇḍavānāṃ sakāṇsam | svalokayānaprativedanāya svasyānu caiṣāṃ tvarayā'bhyayātayat |
| athā'sataḥ pippalamūla īśiturūrusthitaṃ pḸadatal . aṃ sutāmram | dṛṣṭvḸa jarā nāma sasarja śalyaṃ bhakto'pyalaṃ rohitaṃ śaṅkamānaḥ |
| acchedyābhedyadehasya śalye pādamupasthite | samīpamāgato vyādho dṛṣṭvḸa bhīto'patad bhuvi |
| vipravākyaṃ mḸanayānaḥ kḸarayitvā'munā hariḥ | pḸapaṃ mḸaṃ jahi deveti yācantamanayad divam |
| pḸadaprahāradoṣeṇa taṃ bhṛguṃ vyādhatāṃ gatam | paścāttāpena bhaktyā ca suprītastaccharīriṇam | cdlv.svājñḸaprāptavimānena divaṃ ninye janārdanaḥ |
| nīcā yonirnīcanīca karmā'ptaṃ nīcakarmataḥ | aduṣṭatvāttu manaso bhaktilopo nacāpyabhūt | bhṛgoratrābuddhipūrvaṃ nḸatidoṣakṛdapyabhūt |
| tato viri ñceśapurandarādyāḥ punaḥ stuvanto'bhiyayuḥ praṇamya | kṛṣṇaṃ sa cā'śveva yayau svalokaṃ svatejasā sarvamidaṃ prakāṇsayan |
| gopālamantraṃ bhajatāṃ phalaprada ekena r ūpeṇa sa bhuvyadṛśyaḥ | tasthau dvitīyena ca sūryamaṇḍale tṛtīyamāsīcchivapūjitaṃ vapuḥ |
| sampūjitaṃ brahmaloke caturthaṃ kañjodbhavenātha paraṃ svadhāma | samāpnuvānaṃ vapurasya pañcamaṃ bhaktyā'nvayurdevavarāḥ svaśaktyā |
