| jñḸanapradānāya satāṃ tadanyajñḸanapraṇāṇsāya ca viṣṇunaite | klṛptāstataste saviri ñcaśarvā vijñḸapayāmāsurupetya viṣṇum |
| kṣīrodadheruttaratīraviṣṭhitairabhiṣṭutaḥ suṣṭutibhiḥ puruṣṭutaḥ | pradāya teṣāmabhayaṃ ramāpatiḥ kṣaṇādabhūccārutamākṛtiḥ śiśuḥ |

| yastraipurāṇāṃ prathamo'tra jātaḥ śuddhodanetyeva jineti coktaḥ | kṣetre gayākhye'sya śiśuṃ prajātaṃ samprāsya dūre'tra babhūva viṣṇuḥ | ajānamānāḥ svaśiśuṃ gataṃ taṃ śiśuṃ hariṃ vīkṣya nijaṃ sma menire |
| teṣāṃ tadā vaidikakarma vīkṣya samprāhasat tadvapuṣaiva keśavaḥ | taṃ jātamātraṃ prahasantamīkṣya suvismitaiḥ pṛṣṭa uvāca viṣṇuḥ | buddho'hamityeva sunityabodhājjagāda caiṣāmatha buddhadarśanam |
| tathā'pyaviśvāsamavekṣya teṣāṃ sasmāra devānakhilān janārdanaḥ | vijñḸaya te tasya manogataṃ nijān pracikṣipurhetigaṇānamuṣmin |
| sa jātamātraḥ śivapūrvakāṇāṃ śūlādihetīrakhilā nigīrya | daityātimohāya nijaṃ ca cakraṃ svamuktamāṇsveva vaśī samagrahīt |
| tadāsanatvena vidhāya tasmin samāsthitaṃ devagaṇāḥ praṇamya | jagmuḥ svadhāmāni vacāṃ si cāsya svīcakrurāṇsveva jinādidaityāḥ |
| te j ñḸanadharmāvapahāya pāpā vimohitā devavareṇa sarve | jagmustamo'ndhaṃ kṣaṇikaṃ samastaṃ jñḸanaṃ nasacceti dṛḍhaṃ smarantaḥ |
| nḸarāyaṇo'pyāpya surendravṛndaṃ vṛttaṃ ca teṣāmakhilaṃ nigadya | pṛṣṭaṇsca tairāha nijaṃ hṛdisthaṃ bauddhāgamārthaṃ sṛtibandhamocanam |
| kṣaṇādayaṃ kṣaṇikāstadviśeṣā yataḥ prayāntyeva nisargato'khilāḥ | cdlxvi.tataḥ sthiratve'pi viśeṣasaṃ śrayāduktaṃ kṣaṇasthāyi mayā samastam |
| tadvān viśeṣaṇsca yato na bhinno sadā svanirvāhakaśaktiyuktau | ataḥ kṣaṇasthāyi samastametat sthirātmakaṃ ceti hi nāsti bhedaḥ |
| jño'haṃ sadaikaḥ paramo mayaitat sadā'nanīyaṃ hi yato'svatantram | jñḸanātmakaṃ viśvamato mayoktaṃ jaḍasvarūpaṃ ca kimu sma cetanam |
| śaṃ śīlako'haṃ yata eva coccaḥ śūnāmakastaddhi mayā nidheyam | śūnyābhidhaṃ doṣaviruddharūpo doṣojjhito'nyastvakhilādanāmā | enaiva sādyaṃ tvasadeva nāmatastvabhāva enaiva bhaved yatastat |
| ityādi boddhavyamidaṃ samastaṃ mayoditaṃ kvāpi na heyamasti | ityādi devān pratibodhayaṃ śca devaiḥ sahovāsa sa buddhadevaḥ | gatvā svadhāmāpyapareṇa rūpeṇā'ste pṛthak caikatanuryatheṣṭam |
| tatastu buddhoditapakṣasaṃ stho jino'pi cakre matamanyadeva | bauddhena jainena matena caiva daityāṃ śakāḥ prītimaguḥ samastāḥ |
| praśāntavidyetyabhidhaṃ tathā'nyad buddhoktaśāstraṃ tridaśā avāpya | toṣaṃ yayurvedasamastasāraṃ yḸamāsthitānāmacireṇa muktiḥ |
| anye manuṣyḸa api bhāratādyaṃ satsampradāyaṃ parigṛhya viṣṇum | yajanta āpuḥ paramāṃ gatiṃ tanna sehire krodhavaśādidaityāḥ |
| śaivaṃ tapaste vipulaṃ vidhāya jagadvimohorjitaśaktimasmāt | prāpya prajātā bhuvi mohanaṃ ca cakruḥ kutarkairabhidāṃ vadantaḥ |
| teṣāṃ prapātāya satāṃ ca muktyai janmā'sa bhīmasya yaduktamatra | durgā punarviprakule'vatīrṇā haniṣyati vrātamathāsurāṇām |
| tataḥ kalerantamavāpya dharmajñḸanādikalyāṇaguṇaprahīne | loke viri ñcatripuraghnaśakrapūrvāḥ payobdhiṃ tridaśāḥ prajagmuḥ |
| nḸarāyaṇastaiḥ stutipūrvamarthito bhavāya lokasya sa śambhal . ākhye | cdlxvii.grāme munerviṣṇuyaśo'bhidhasya gṛhe babhūvā'viracintyaśaktiḥ |
| kalestu kātkārata eṣa kalkī jñḸanaṃ kalaṃ kaṃ sukhameva tadvān | kalkīti vā tena samastadasyuvināṇsanaṃ tena dinād vyadhāyi |
| adharmavṛttaṃ vimukhaṃ hareśca nihatya niḥ śeṣajanaṃ turaṅgī | saṃ sthāpayāmāsa sa dharmasetuṃ jñḸanaṃ svabhaktiṃ ca nijaprajāsu |
| ityādyanantāni harerudārakarmāṇi rūpāṇi ca sadguṇāṇsca | nityavyapetākhiladoṣakasya brahmetyananteti ca nāma yena |
| ānandatīrthākhyamuniḥ supūrṇaprajñḸabhidho granthamimaṃ cakāra | nḸarāyaṇenābhihito badaryāṃ tasyaiva śiṣyo jagadekabhartuḥ |
| yastatprasādādakhilāṃ śca vedān sapañcarātrān sarahasyasaṅgrahān | vedetihāsāṃ śca purāṇayuktān yathāvadanyā api sarvavidyāḥ |
| samastaśāstrārthavinirṇayo'yaṃ viśeṣato bhāratavartmacārī | granthaḥ kṛto'yaṃ jagatāṃ janitraṃ hariṃ guruṃ prīṇayatā'munaiva | vinirṇayo nāstyamunā vinā yad viprasthitānāmiva sarvavācām |

| tad brahmasūtrāṇi cakāra kṛṣṇo vyākhyā'tha teṣāmayathā kṛtā'nyaiḥ | nigūhitaṃ yat puruṣottamatvaṃ sūtroktamapyatra mahāsurendraiḥ | jīveśvaraikyaṃ pravadadbhirugrairvyākhyāya sūtrāṇi cakāra cā'viḥ |
| vyāsājñayā bhāṣyavaraṃ vidhāya pṛthakpṛthak copaniṣatsubhāṣyam | kṛtvā'khilānyaṃ puruṣottamaṃ ca hariṃ vadantīti samarthayitvā |
| tanustṛtīyā pavanasya seyaṃ sadbhāratārthapratidīpanāya | granthaṃ cakāremamudīrṇavidyā yasmin ramante haripādabhaktāḥ |

| "tṛtīyamasya vṛṣabhasya dohase daśapramatiṃ janayanta yoṣaṇaḥ | niryadīṃ budhnān mahiṣasya varpasa īśānāsaḥ śavasā kranta sūrayaḥ | cdlxviii.yadīṃ anu pradivo madhva ādhave guhāsantaṃ mḸatariśvā mathāyati"85 |
| ityādivākyoktamidaṃ samastaṃ tathā purāṇeṣu ca pañcarātre | atroditā yāṇsca kathāḥ samastā vedetihāsādivinirṇayoktāḥ |
| tasmādayaṃ granthavaro'khilorudharmādimokṣāntapumarthahetuḥ | kiṃ voditairasya guṇaistato'nyairnārāyaṇaḥ prītimupaityato'lam |

| yasya trīṇyuditāni vedavacane r ūpāṇi divyānyalaṃ baṭtaddarśatamitthameva nihitaṃ devasya bhargo mahat | vḸayo rāmavaconayaṃ prathamakaṃ pṛkṣo dvitīyaṃ vapuḥ madhvo yattu tṛtīyametadamunā granthaḥ kṛtaḥ keśave |
| yaḥ sarvaguṇasampūrṇaḥ sarvadoṣavivarjitaḥ | prīyatāṃ prīta evālaṃ viṣṇurme paramaḥ suhṛt |
| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracite śrīmahābhāratatātparyanirṇaye (pāṇḍavasvargārohaṇaṃ nāma) dvātriṃ śo'dhyāyaḥ samāpto'yaṃ granthaḥ
| tānindrasthal . avāsāṃ ścakre kṛṣṇaḥ paro nijasthal . avāsān | svabalodrecitamānairjugopa dharmaṃ ca taiḥ parācitamānaiḥ |
Bha. Gī. 7.6-7 xxii."avajānanti māṃ mūḍhā mānuṣīṃ tanumāṇsritam"34 | "moghāṇsā moghakarmāṇo moghajñānā vicetasaḥ | rākṣasīmāsurīṃ caiva prakṛtiṃ mohanīṃ śritāḥ "

Bha. Gī.
| nīto divi devavarai reme satyāsamanvito'devavaraiḥ | sarvartuvane śaśinā niśi satyāṃ vḸasare vane'śaśinā |
Bha. Gī.
| śivabhaktapravarādyaṃ pumān na sehe girīśa vipravarādyam | taṃ svātmendravareṇa vyadhunod bhīmena dhūtarudravareṇa |
Bha. Gī.
| cdlxxii.mḸatuḥ paribhavahānyai rājñḸa dyusadāmitaśca paribhavahā'nyaiḥ | abhavannarakamurāriryo'vāsīdat samastanarakamurāriḥ |
Bha. Gī.
| suratarumāpā'l . imatāt prakāṇsayacchaktimātmanaḥ pḸal . imatāt | suravaravīreṣu darī pradhānajīveśvaraḥ pareṣudarī |
Bha. Gī.
| puramabhiyāyāridarī datvā bhadrāṃ pṛthāsutāyāridarī | śakrapurīmabhiyātaḥ prādād vahnervanaṃ satāmabhiyā'taḥ |
Bha. Gī.
| yasyā'j ñḸabalasāraiḥ pḸarthairdigbhyo hṛtaṃ dhanaṃ balasāraiḥ | jitvā kṣmḸamaviśeṣāṃ prasahya bhūpān samastakāmaviśeṣām |
Bha. Gī.
| nihatau saubhakarūṇsau śīto bhātaśca yena tau bhakarūṇsau | ajayad rudraṃ ca raṇe bāṇārthe'vanatipatitakacandraṃ caraṇe |
Bha. Gī.
| yasyā'veśorubalānnyahanat pārtho'surān prajeśorubalāt | varadānādasyaiva jagatprabhorīraṇāt samanugatanādasyaiva |
| "tānahaṃ dviṣataḥ krūrān saṃ sāreṣu narādhamān | kṣipāmyajasramaśubhānāsurīṣveva yoniṣu"45 |
Bha. Gī.
| yasyā'veśāt sa balaḥ pracakarṣa puraṃ prasahya veśāt sabalaḥ | kurupatināma nu yamunā kṛṣṇā yenā'hurarhyamatanu yamunā |
| atha pārthān kraturājaṃ prāpayadamareṭsarudraśakraturājam | pūjā tenāvāpi cchinnaścaidyaḥ sṛtiṃ gate nāvā'pi |
Bha. Gī.
| asṛjajjvaramugratamaḥ kṣayaprado līlayā'dhivaramugratamaḥ | krīḍāmātraṃ viśvaṃ prakāṇsayannātmanaḥ sa viharakamātraṃ viśvam |
Bha. Gī.
| yadbalavān krodhavaśānnināya nāṇsaṃ vṛkodaraḥ krodhavaśān | cdlxxiii.lebhe'cānyā gamyaṃ sthānaṃ puṣpḸaṇi dhāma cānyāgamyam |
Bha. Gī.
| yadbalabhāravahatvānnācaladuragādibhiḥ subhāravahatvāt | dharmādarihā'pi padaṃ bhīmo yenaiva sāhasaṃ lihā'pi padam |
Bha. Gī.
| na hi nahuṣo'laṃ nahituṃ dharmo drauṇistathetare'laṃ nahitum | no rāṭkarṇau brahmavarī yena dhvasto'stramagrahīt subrahma varī |
Bha. Gī.
| kṣātraṃ dharmaṃ svavat ā guruvṛttyai keśavājñayā ca maṃ svavat ā | sarvaṃ sehe manasā bhīmeneśaikamāninā hemanasā |
Bha. Gī.
| yadbhaktapravareṇa protaḥ svasmin sa kīcakaḥ pravareṇa | patitāstasya sahāyāḥ kṛṣṇārthe māninaḥ samasya sahāyāḥ |
Mahā.
| yadbhaktyā'nugṛhītau pārtho bhīmaśca gonṛpau nu gṛhītau | ṛṇamuktyai suvyatyastyai kramaśo vīrāvamuñcatāṃ suvyatyastyai |
Mahā.
| yadbhaktyā'mitayā'laṃ kṛṣṇā kārye viveśa kṛṣṇākārye | yḸamīrārddhatanutvānnā'pā'd bhīmādṛte'pi nā'pād bhīmāt |
Mahā.
| yḸaṃ spraṣṭumicchantamajātaśatruṃ nyavārayat svasthamajātaśatrum | śaṃ rūpāne nityarateriyaṃ śrīriti sma deveḍyaditeriyaṃ śrīḥ |
Mahā.
| manasāmanasā'manasā manasā yamanantamajasravedanuyā | vilayaṃ vilayaṃ vilayaṃ vilayannikhilaṃ tvaśubhaṃ pracakāra ca yaḥ |
Mahā. 12.338.2-3 * xxv.sa eṣa bhagavān kṛṣṇo naiva kevalamānuṣaḥ | yasya prasādajo brahmā rudraśca krodhasambhavaḥ " |

| yasya sunīta sahāyānna ripūn mene'rjunaḥ sametasahā yān | akaroccā'su parāsupratatiṃ senāsu dhāvanāsuparāsu |
Ṛgveda 1.141.1-5 xxix.anāvṛttirdehināṃ dehapāte tasmād vāyurdevadevo viśiṣṭaḥ " |
| cdlxxiv.yena jayadrathamāraḥ pḸarthaḥ śatrūnavāpatadrathamāraḥ | yadvirahādapi dehe sa rathaḥ śaśvat sthiteḥ sadādapi dehe |
"vīrāṇāṃ śāstraviduṣāṃ kṛtināṃ tattvanirṇaye | sattve bāhubale dhairye prāṇe ṇsārīrasambhave |

"vīrāṇāṃ śāstraviduṣām", "nāsti nārāyaṇasamam" ityādi mahābhāratādyuktāni bhagavatpādairudāhṛtāni mudritapustakeṣu anupalabhyatve'pi prācīnakośeṣu prāyaśaḥ dṛṣyante | xxx.yādṛśāni ca karmāṇi bhīma tvamasi tādṛśaḥ "
| yadbharito bharatābhaḥ prabhurambhābhāvito'bhibharatābhaḥ | bhīmo rabhasā'bhibhavī prasabhaṃ bhā bhābhibhūrbhasā bhibhavī |
| 2.159| "asmin yuddhe bhīmasena tvayi bhāraḥ samāhitaḥ | dhūrarjunena voḍhavyā voḍhavya itaro janaḥ "
| yadanugrahi pūrṇatvād bhīmaḥ sarvānarīnanahipūrṇatvā't | adahad bāhubalena krodhāgnāvāhitān nijāhubalena |
| uktaṃ purāṇe brahmāṇḍe brahmaṇā nāradāya ca |
Mahā.
| kṛṣṇābhīmāptatamaḥ śīrṇaṃ yena svakīyahṛdayamāptatamaḥ | dhṛtarāṣṭrasutānavadhīd bhīmena sthāpito manasi susutānavadhīt |
Mahā. Ādi.
| bhīmavipāṭita dehānadarśayat svānarīn vipāṭitadehān | kṛṣṇāyā hitakārī samyagdhīrapriyaḥ sadā'hitakārī |
Bhā. Pu.
| atha hariṇā pītabalaṃ drauṇerastraṃ mahāriṇā'pītabalam | dadhatā vāsomaraṇaṃ nītaṃ cakre'bhimanyujaṃ somaraṇam |
Bhā. Pu.
| jñḸanaṃ paramaṃ prādād bhīṣmagataḥ sṛtivimokṣacaramaṃ prādāt | pḸaṇḍusutānāmadhikaṃ cakre vedaṃ guṇottaraṃ svanāmadhikam |
Bhā. Pu.
| tenāvāpi sujātairharimedhasturagavartane'pi sujātaiḥ | pḸaṇḍusutaiḥ savas ūkairāptairvyāsā'tmanā ca susavasūkaiḥ |
Bhā. Pu.
| tadanu sa pāṇḍutanūjai reme kṣmḸaṃ pḸalayan supāṇḍutanujaiḥ | anupamasukharūpo'jaḥ paramaḥ śrīvallabhaḥ sati kharūpo jaḥ |

"vyatyāsaḥ prātilomyaṃ ca gomūtrī praghasastathā | ukṣaṇaḥ sudhuraḥ sādhuḥ saptabhedāḥ prakīrtitāḥ | (9.135.1)| śraddadhānāya śiṣyḸaya pṛcchate me sutāya ca | vidhivadvada he (bho) tāta vyatyāsādyarthanirṇayam |

prācīnakośeṣveva 'nirasya', 'nipīya' iti dvividho'pi pāṭho likhitaḥ | yatra sannikṛṣṭo'pi janaḥ samadhigna viprakṛṣṭastatra kathaṃ nirṇeyāt? - bannañje govindācāryaḥ cix.(bhagavadavatārapratij_ñḸa) atha ekādaśo'dhyāyaḥ Oṃ | śaśāṅkaputrādabhavat purūravāstasyā'yurāyornahuṣo yayātiḥ | tasyā'sa patnīyugal . aṃ sutāṇsca pañcābhavan viṣṇupadaikabhaktāḥ |
| reme tatrā'pisukhī paramo'nanto nananda tatrā'pi sukhī | prāṇenendirayā ca prayuto nityaṃ mahāguṇendirayā ca|
Vi. Pu.
| evaṃ sarvāṇi hare r ūpāṇi śrīpateḥ suparvāṇihareḥ | pūrṇasukhāni subhānti pratatāni nirantarāṇi nisubhānti |
Bhā. Pu. 10.14.6-7 cxlvi.tadgandhato nṛpaśumukhyasamastabhūtānyāpurmṛtiṃ bahal . aroganipīḍit āni | dhāturvarājjagadabhāvakṛtaikabuddhirvaddhyo na kenacidasau tarurūpadaityaḥ |

nāgāhvayaṃ puramathā'yayurapyamīṣām | dṛṣṭvā virodhamavadannṛpatiśca dharmaputraṃ purandarakṛtasthalamāṇsu yāhi |

prācīnakośe "mṛtakapratīpāḥ " iti paṭhyate | arthastu na sphuṭaḥ | yataḥ pratīpaśabdaḥ sādṛśyavācī na prasiddhaḥ - bannanje govindācāryaḥ ccxxxiv.ityukta āha sa yudhiṣṭhira Oṃ iti sma cakre'bhiṣekamapi tasya sa āmbikeyaḥ |

Bha. Gī.

pūrvaṃ tenoditaṃ yattallokān mohayatā'ñjasā | śarvaṃ prati tavāhaṃ tu kuryāṃ dvādaśavatsaram |

guṇānviṣṇoryuñjannityatra nityena śociṣā prakāṇsarūpā sākṣiṇā yuñjan manasā dhyāyan | bhuñjanniti pāṭhe 'bhuji pḸalanābhyavahārāyoḥ ' iti dhātoḥ manasā pālayan dhyātvā sthirīkurvan, iti bhāvaḥ | -bhā.pra. cccix.iti tasmāt tadā kṛṣṇa ekāhena bṛhaspatim |
| yo nirmame'śeṣapurāṇavidyām | yo nirmameśe ṣapurāṇavidyām | yonirmameśeṣapurā'ṇavid yām | yo'nirmame'śeṣapurāṇavid yām |
Harivaṃ śe Bhaviṣyatparvaṇi A.
| anantapārāmitavikrameśa prabho ramāpāramanantapāra | mahāguṇāḍhyāparimeyasattva ramālayāṇseṣamahā'guṇāḍhya |
cccxii.supāpo'sāvekalavyaḥ subhīto rāmaṃ matvaivānuyātaṃ punaśca | samudre'śītiṃ yojanānāmatītya paścādaikṣad dvīpamevādhiruṃ hya |
| ityuktaḥ sa tathā cakre pārthaḥ paśyaṃ śca bāndhavān | visasarja dhanuḥ pāpāṇsaṅkī tatrā'ha mādhavaḥ |
Bha. Gī.
| naiva paraḥ keśavataḥ paramādasmāt samaśca sukhakeśavataḥ | so'yaṃ śapathavaro naḥ śaśvat sandhāritaḥ suśapathavaro'naḥ |
Bha. Gī.
| kṛṣṇakatheyaṃ yamitā suśatīrthenoditā'nane yaṃ yamitā | bhaktimatā parameśe sarvodrekā sadānutā'pa rameśe |
| iti nārāyaṇanāmā'va katīrthe pūjitaḥ surāyaṇanā mā | pūrṇa guṇairdhika pūrṇajñḸanecchābhaktibhiḥ svadhikapūrṇaḥ |
Bha. Gī.
| iti śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācāryaviracitam śrīmadyamakabhārataṃ sampūrṇam bhāratīramaṇamukhyaprāṇāntargata śrīkṛṣṇārpaṇamastu
ityato nārasiṃ haṃ somaṃ tasmai cā'rpayacchoṇit ākhyam | yuddhākhyayajñe somabuddhyā'rivakṣa iheti sāmnā gadayā vibhindan |
Ṛgveda
ṛgveda
Mahā.
ityādisūktāni ca tatpramāṇam |

Ṛgveda 1.141.2-3 cdlxix.Oṃ Śrīmadānandatīrthabhagavatpādācārya viracitam Śrī Yamakabhāratam (Mahābhārata-tātparyam) Oṃ dhyāyet paramānandaṃ yanmātā patimayadaparamānandam | ujjhitaparamānaṃ dampatyādyādyāṇsramaiḥ sadaiva paramānandam |
| tasya ca rakṣā sukṛtā janārdaneneśaśeṣakekṣāsukṛtā | pḸartheṣu premavatā nityaṃ bhartrā'sutāsuvipremavatā |
